Name: Dezeen
Description:
Dezeen is the world's most influential architecture and design magazine. Our mission is simple: to bring you a carefully edited selection of the best architecture, design and interiors projects from around the world, and to set the agenda for the global design community.

Dezeen receives over three million visitors every month, and has readers in every corner of the globe. 

It has over five million social media followers, with 3.2 million Instagram followers and over three million followers on Facebook, Twitter and Pinterest. 

It has won over forty awards for publishing excellence including digital publisher of the year, best use of video, best branded entertainment and commercial partnership of the year.

Founded in 2006 by Marcus Fairs, Dezeen has an in-house creative team called Dezeen Studio, which produces branded content and events for partner brands. It also has Dezeen Jobs, a recruitment website; Dezeen Awards, which is the most desirable global awards programme in the design sector; the Dezeen Day conference and other services for the design community.

Name: HuffPost
Description:
HuffPost is for the people — not the powerful. We are empathetic reporters and observers. We hold power accountable. We entertain without guilt. We share what people need to know to live their best lives. If something matters to our audience, it matters to us. 

Here on LinkedIn, our Work/Life reporters help you navigate the twists and turns of modern careers. You can also find them at https://www.huffpost.com/life/worklife. 

We are the original internet newspaper, founded in 2005. Now we have newsrooms and editions in 15 countries. We’re truly global, but still feel local. We tell stories in text, video, audio and pictures, and bring them to our audiences wherever they are. We're fast, fun and inclusive. And we'll always make sure you know what's real.

Name: African Heroes
Description:
The African dream is stronger than ever and is carried by the new generation. There is no doubt that the true African dream must start from the continent and inspire the whole world. And that it is up to us Africans to seize this dream and write our own epic.

Many Africans are already working in the shadow of others in the light and making their contribution in several areas despite a difficult African momentum. But the youth continues to lack landmarks, Africa is increasingly lacking heroes. Our media wants to fill this void and wants to be the machine for making African heroes. We work to reveal and / or exalt these black heroisms.

In a purely futuristic vision of Africa, we give ourselves the mission of shaping today the image of the African elite of tomorrow. We are betting on the dynamics of the African population and the rise of a middle class. Which says a lot about our thirst for recognition by the whole world as Africans and proud to be so without this perpetual miserable accent that we are glued to. Looking for African role models and inspiring men's or women's stories, we are the solution.

Our differents channels:
 Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/africanheroesmagazine/

Name: EdSurge
Description:
Education is changing, now more than ever. It is shaped by technological advancements, scientific research, demographic shifts, business interests and other socioeconomic forces that impact not just teaching and learning, but also the world in which students will enter. And education will increasingly take place not just in schools, but in homes, at work and throughout life.

EdSurge is at the forefront of covering these changes and their impact and consequences. We do this through journalism, research and analysis. We also share stories that elevate the voices and experiences of educators, entrepreneurs, researchers and other stakeholders working to support equitable opportunities for all learners.

Through our work, EdSurge aims to bridge the information gaps and disconnect that often exist between those who drive change, and those they impact.

Name: Vert, le média qui annonce la couleur
Description:
Vert, c'est toute l'actualité de l'écologie en 7 minutes de lecture, chaque jour ou chaque semaine dans votre boîte mail ! 

Soutenez-nous sur : https://soutenir.vert.eco

----
C'est quoi ? Vert, c’est l’actualité de l’écologie au sens large- scientifique, politique, militante, etc. - dans un format minimaliste. Chaque jour, entre trois et cinq articles, rédigés dans un style clair, concis et accessible, vous sont proposés.

Vert est un média indépendant, qui n’est financé par aucune publicité, aucun industriel, aucun parti politique. C’est également un projet de partage de connaissances : avec un ton pédagogique qui ne laisse personne sur le bas-côté, Vert veut aider les citoyen•ne•s à mieux saisir les enjeux de la crise climatique et à entrevoir des solutions. 

C'est où? Puisque l’environnement ne s’arrête pas aux frontières de l’hexagone, Vert propose un regard international sur l’actualité au travers, notamment, de la presse étrangère.

C'est combien ? La crise climatique en cours impose de penser différemment la diffusion des savoirs. C’est pour cela qu’il est possible de lire Vert gratuitement. Pour autant, ce jeune média ne vit que du soutien de ses lecteurs. Une contribution, même symbolique, permettra à Vert de continuer à exister et de produire davantage de contenu de qualité.

C'est quand ? A n'importe quel moment de la journée ou de la nuit sur notre site, ou bien chaque jour à midi dans votre boîte mail. Le samedi matin, à l'heure du café et des croissants, une édition hebdomadaire vous offre un condensé de l'actualité de la semaine. Cliquez ici pour consulter les anciens numéros de nos éditions quotidiennes et hebdomadaires, et vous inscrire.

Name: MailOnline

MailOnline (dailymail.co.uk) is one of the world’s largest English-speaking newspaper websites, with over 163 million unique browsers worldwide.

Name: Business Insider India
Description:
Welcome to Business Insider India, the Indian edition of Business Insider (BI) - the fastest growing business news website around the globe.

At BI India readers get amazing synergy between India and its foreign counterpart - News that has great appeal and relevance for Indian readers, coming in round the clock from more than 50 journalists in the US newsroom, and access to in-depth features and articles written in the US, along with strong narratives from our country - developed, analyzed and presented in hallmark BI style.

Business Insider India has a mix of cutting edge business and technology happenings, entrepreneurial initiatives, creative exchanges, lifestyle concepts and leadership insights. The Indian edition features the country's business heavyweights, ranging from start-ups to veterans across industries. Over that, we also cater to advances in the Indian technology space, automobiles, gadgets and sports.

BI India comes under the banner of Times Internet Limited (TIL), which is India's number 1 Internet network since 2011. TIL continues to grow and is extending its lead ever since. Under the TIL network readers get everything from news, to information, to entertainment. There is something for everyone at TIL.

Thank you for reading Business Insider India. We hope you enjoy the site!

Description:
Daily Maverick is a unique blend of news, information, analysis and opinion delivered from our newsrooms in Johannesburg and Cape Town, South Africa. There are many ways to describe exactly what we do (and for the price of a cup of coffee we'll talk your ears off about it), but the best way to understand the end result is to experience it. Head to our website or subscribe to one of our free newsletters.

Every part of Daily Maverick is free-to-air and no-payment-required, although free registration is required for a small subset of functions and pages.

Daily Maverick is run by an independently owned, private company with no affiliation to any other media group (or political party or religious organisation.) It is funded through advertising, events and reader contributions. 

Its investigative unit, Scorpio, is mostly grant funded.

Name: Heavy Lift News
Description:

In 2018 Heavy Lift Specialist and Heavylift News were taken over by Temporary Works Design and the site is now edited by Dick Hill

Name: Fairfax Media
Description:
Fairfax Media Limited [ASX:FXJ] is an innovative and digitally progressive media company in Australia and New Zealand - the trusted voice informing, engaging and entertaining audiences and communities via newspapers, websites, radio stations, events and dynamic digital venues. 

Fairfax operates several broadly-based services businesses spanning marketing, property, entertainment and beyond. Fairfax’s independent journalism and quality content has been keeping people informed and connected for more than 185 years. Business divisions include Australian Metro Publishing, Australian Community Media, Digital Ventures, Stuff (Fairfax New Zealand) and Fairfax Events & Entertainment. 

Fairfax Media has a portfolio of leading websites, tablet and smartphone apps, including the online news sites afr.com, smh.com.au and theage.com.au in Australia and stuff.co.nz in New Zealand. The group also has leading classified and transaction websites in Australia.

Fairfax Media publishes metropolitan, agricultural, regional and community newspapers, financial and consumer magazines. In Australia, mastheads include The Sydney Morning Herald, The Age, The Australian Financial Review, The Canberra Times, The Sun-Herald, and The Land. In New Zealand mastheads include The Dominion Post, The Press, The Sunday Star-Times, TV Guide, NZ House and Garden and New Zealand Fishing News, as well as agricultural publications.

Fairfax Media has a 59.4% shareholding in real estate media and technology services business Domain Holdings Australia [ASX:DHG]; a 54.5% interest in radio broadcaster Macquarie Media Limited [ASX:MRN] with No. 1 stations in Sydney (2GB) and Melbourne (3AW); a 50% interest in Australia's leading subscription video on demand (SVOD) service Stan; and other investments.

Name: BlogHer
Description:

Since 2005, BlogHer has pursued the mission to change the ratio of women-led businesses in the US. Serving a vast community of entrepreneurs, small businesses, and content creators, BlogHer has pioneered the business ethos of women supporting women.

Today, BlogHer is a content and community platform built to inspire and educate millions of enterprising women.

Name: Automotive Management (AM)
Description:
Automotive Management (AM) has been the UK’s trusted voice for franchised car dealers and automotive retail leaders since 1990. As the primary source of news, insight and analysis for the sector, we equip retailers with the essential knowledge and perspective they need to navigate the fast-changing world of modern automotive retail.

Through AM-online, our webinars, digital content and newsletters, we deliver deep analysis, expert commentary and practical guidance that helps retail leaders build future-ready, high-performing businesses. We are proud to champion the industry’s progress, showcasing innovation and highlighting the people and organisations driving change.

AM continues to bring the sector together through its flagship events — including the AM Awards, Automotive Management Live and the AM100 — celebrating excellence and fostering the connections that move the industry forward.

Name: State of Mind
Description:
State of Mind è il Giornale delle Scienze Psicologiche. 

Un contenitore di pensieri e attualità sulla mente e i suoi meccanismi. Documentato e allegro. 
“State of Mind” è un journal online di psicologia, psicoterapia, psichiatria e varia attualità. Vogliamo ospitare tutti, dal professionista interessato ad argomenti specialistici e tecnici al navigatore del web che desideri dare uno sguardo psicologico sul mondo. 
Nel formato di questo journal ci siamo ispirati anche al mondo dei blog, permettendo ad esempio i commenti agli articoli. Vogliamo infatti consentire a tutti di discutere, dissentire e proporre nuovi argomenti. 
Al momento la redazione è composta soprattutto da clinici e ricercatori di orientamento cognitivo. Ma tutti possono collaborare con noi. Vogliamo arricchire il respiro di questo journal aggiungendo i punti di vista di altri orientamenti clinici, dallo psicodinamico al sistemico, dall’esperienziale al biologico e neuroscientifico.

Name: Investir au Cameroun

Le média se décline également en magazine mensuel distribué dans les aéroports de Londres, Paris et Bruxelles, en classe affaires sur les lignes aériennes desservant Yaoundé et Douala, ainsi qu’au Cameroun dans les hôtels d’affaires, les ministères et les grandes entreprises. 
Une version anglophone, du site comme du magazine, est éditée sous la marque Business in Cameroon. 
Investir au Cameroun est édité par Stratline Ltd, et opéré par l’Agence Ecofin.

Elle décrypte aussi les bonnes pratiques des entreprises (grands groupes, PME, start-up...), tous secteurs confondus, et analyse les tendances de fond de la high tech.

Name: The Onion
Description: The Onion is the world’s leading news publication, offering highly acclaimed, universally revered coverage of breaking national, international, and local news events. Rising from its humble beginnings as a print newspaper in 1756, The Onion now enjoys a daily readership of 4.3 trillion and has grown into the single most powerful and influential organization in human history.

Name: AML/CFT
Description:
Blatant and rampant crimes around the world have increased scrutiny on the efforts against money laundering and terrorism financing. From banks and insurance to law firms and money changers, the prevention of money laundering and terrorist financing plays a critical role in the society. 

As a specialised media outlet for anti-money laundering and countering the financing of terrorism (AML/CFT), we have been providing latest trends, intelligence and news to financial crime analysts around the world. AML-CFT gathers critical information and provides you with the justification and context in participating in efforts against money laundering and terrorist financing.

Name: Le Moniteur
Description: Média leader du secteur du BTP, Le Moniteur compte plus d’1,5 million de visites par mois (APCM juillet 2024). Sa rédaction décrypte au quotidien toute l’actualité économique, sociale, technique, architecturale et réglementaire du bâtiment et des travaux publics. Du financement à l’exploitation des ouvrages et des grands projets d’aménagement du territoire, en passant par leur conception et leur réalisation, elle interroge chaque phase de l’acte de construire. Son objectif : offrir aux maîtres d’ouvrage publics et privés, maîtres d’œuvre, bureaux d’études, architectes, entreprises travaux et industriels les clés de lectures et les outils, au travers notamment de services à valeur ajoutée, qui leur permettront d’agir et de se développer sur des marchés en transition. Mobilité, énergie, biodiversité, adaptation au dérèglement climatique et lutte contre le réchauffement sont autant d’enjeux décisifs pour un secteur au cœur des grandes transformations de notre temps.

Name: NDT.org

Name: LokerSemar.id - Lowongan Kerja Semarang
Description:
Semarang adalah kota yang sudah berdiri sejak tahun 1547, sehingga kota ini sudah melalui berbagai peradaban mulai dari Kerajaan Mataram Kuno sampai dengan Republik Indonesia. Sejarah yang panjang ini membuktikan bahwa kota ini mempunyai nilai strategis untuk kegiatan perdagangan dan perindustrian. Hal ini didukung oleh letak kota Semarang yang berada di tengah pulau jawa dan langsung berbatasan dengan laut utara jawa. Kota ini mempunyai pelabuhan Tanjung Mas yang sangat sibuk dengan kegiatan mobilisasi manusia dan barang, sehingga tidak diragukan lagi apabila kota Semarang ini merupakan pusat peradaban di Provinsi Jawa Tengah.

Melihat geliat pertumbuhan ekonomi yang yang terus meningkat dan cenderung stabil, LokerSemar.id hadir sebagai jawaban untuk memudahkan masyarakat Semarang untuk mencari pekerjaan di berbagai industri dan usaha perdagangan. Kami hadir di masa modern dengan membawa teknologi yang akan membuat masyarakat Semarang mudah untuk mencari informasi lowongan kerja dan mendaftar di Perusahaan yang sesuai dengan minat dan bakatnya.

Begitu juga dengan Perusahaan yang ada di kota Semarang dan sekitar Provinsi Jawa Tengah, kami hadir untuk membantu memudahkan perusahaan anda untuk mendapatkan kandidat yang diinginkan. Jaringan media LokerSemar.id cukup luas yaitu terdiri dari website, aplikasi, dan akun-akun media sosial yang siap memberikan informasi lowongan kerja kepada masyarakat kota Semarang dan sekitarnya di Provinsi Jawa Tengah.

Semoga dengan hadirnya LokerSemar.id ini membuat dunia kerja di Semarang ataupun di Provinsi Jawa Tengah semakin “mudah, cepat, dan dapat” seperti slogan kami.

Name: Zetland
Description:
Zetland is a Danish-language, digital media that offers an online space for reflection, afterthought, and meaningful public conversation by help of in-depth journalism. In a media realm otherwise known for it’s ultra-fast, noisy and confusing news cycle, Zetland is going the other way and insist on journalism’s fundamental mission: To tell stories that explain context, show perspective and engage hearts as well as minds.

Since Zetland’s launch in 2012 we’ve published e-singles once a month that covers politics, culture, sports, money, pop, finance and everything in between. We’ve also launched the onstage magazine Zetland Live that has brought Zetland to the forefront of the international movement of performed journalism and attracted huge crowds of enthusiastic Copenhageners. 

For the time being the team behind Zetland is working 24/7 in an effort to re-launch Zetland in 2016 with – among other things – daily publications and tools for Zetland’s members to contribute easily to the editorial process and choices.

Zetland was founded by Jakob Moll (CEO), Silke Bock, Hakon Mosbech and Lea Korsgaard (editor-in-chief), who quit their daytime job from legacy media to participate in the much needed reinvention of not only Danish quality journalism, but also the business model behind it. Zetland is counted among the most innovative media start-ups in Denmark and has been awarded with several prizes

Name: ClioMakeUp
Description:
ClioMakeUp is the leading Italian online community and digital publisher dedicated to Beauty.

Born in 2008 in New York City from Clio Zammatteo’s (Co-Founder & Talent) and Claudio Midolo’s (Co-Founder & CTO) idea and managed by Elena Dominique Midolo (CEO), ClioMakeUp has been experiencing significant growth over the years ultimately becoming a guide for millions of women who, every day, give life to the largest Italian online community focused on Beauty.

ClioMakeUp is a media company built around the core values of respect for its audience and its needs, content quality and simplicity, in order to accomplish its mission: to make the world of Beauty fun, simple and empowering for all.

Our services span across a wide variety of possibilities ranging from online communication and marketing to offline events and partnerships thanks to Clio Zammatteo’s versatility: make-up artist, beauty blogger, Youtuber and Tv personality.

Our numbers:

http://blog.cliomakeup.com - 5,2M unique users/month 19M pageviews/month*

http://facebook.com/cliomakeup - 2.6M followers and and 5M reach/week**

for direct inquiries: elena.midolo@cliomakeup.com

Name: URBANIA Media
Description: Since its creation, URBANIA has surprised and provoked, both with its edgy content and its strong visual approach. Anti-conformist, curious, audacious, URBANIA is widely recognized as having changed the landscape of Quebecois media. It has become the voice for a generation for whom the traditional media does not resonate. Thanks to our unique standing, we have been able to hone our expertise in creating, producing, and broadcasting content for an audience that is young, educated, and savvy. This position allows us to offer brands uncommon access to a discerning and much coveted audience. URBANIA is a generator of multifaceted content with a prestigious client list that includes Radio-Canada, Bell Media, Ubisoft, RDS, Corus, Dairy Farmers of Canada, and Air France. We are a media outlet, a production house and a creative agency, all rolled into one.

Name: Idol Image Consulting
Description:
IDOL Image Consulting has developed strategies to help individuals, groups or corporate organizations face today’s challenges and fierce competition.
Our services include but are not limited to:

Media and Public Relations
Target your audience and get your message through with our services on Media and Public Relations. We take the “pressing” load off your shoulders and arrange for your Press Releases, Conferences, Reports in Magazines and Editorials or Interviews on Radio and Television.

Corporate Consultations
There is no doubt that vision, mission, policy and continuous education can ensure attunement to the fast changing work and social requirements for sustainability and success. Rely on our proven methods for analyzing your organization’s needs and let us boost your company’s productivity and revenue. We assist you with the development of strategies on Corporate Image and Branding and we ensure that your workforce training needs are met with seminars on Brand Name, Image or Business Etiquette to reinforce your Corporate Culture.

Personal (one-to-one) Consultations
Redefine your style and explore the secrets for reinforcing the strong points of your personality and image. We offer a variety of consultations fully customized to suit your specific needs: Body and Color Analysis, Speech and Etiquette, Fashion Styling, Make-Up and Hair Styling, Wardrobe Analysis and Organization, Personal Shopping or even Shopping Tourism to the ultimate fashion destinations around the world from New York to Paris, London and Dubai.
Group Consultations
Learn the basics in a friendly atmosphere and benefit from the styling and comme-il-faut powerful “toolbox” we will be providing you. Special programs are also designed focusing on teenagers. Maximum attendance in group consultations: 10 persons.

In every case we carefully select our network of professionals to provide you with the most stress-free and rewarding experience.

Name: Technext
Description:
Technext is your go-to site for Tech News, Reviews and Insightful Analysis in Nigeria.

We publish Technology and business related content with a deliberate emphasis on the African narrative and the desire to mirror the impact of technology on the continent. Our goal is to positively influence our society broadly and our readers and industry stakeholders personally.

If you have any breaking story or inside scoop you wish to share with us, you can simply send an email to info@technext24.com 

For advertisement and partnership ideas, please send an email to info@technext24.com

Name: Youth Ki Awaaz
Description:
Youth Ki Awaaz (YKA) is where young India writes. It is India’s largest, completely crowdsourced platform for young people to write and share stories on topics they care about. With a growing community of over 160K+ creators, YKA is uniquely positioned to be at the forefront of young India’s pulse on culture, politics, economics, healthcare and a lot more.

YKA also uses the power of its community to amplify and bring attention to key social issues through strategic campaigns and surveys, in collaboration with high-impact organisations such as the United Nations, Twitter, and many others.

YKA’s Action Network and it’s Writer’s Training Program have been at the forefront of building young India’s capacity in campaigning, advocacy and writing. The Action Network has also funded over 50 young changemakers across issues such as menstrual hygiene and girls’ access to education.

Name: XO Group Inc.
Description:
Through our family of brands—The Knot, The Nest, The Bump, GigMasters and How He Asked—we inspire, inform and cheer on our community as they move through life’s most amazing (and stressful!) milestones. From the proposal, to planning a wedding, creating a home and starting a family together, we’re there for every step of the journey. 

The Company is publicly listed on the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE: XOXO) and is headquartered in New York City.

Name: SmartBrief
Description:
A Future plc company, SmartBrief is the industry leader in targeted business news.

Serving over 6 million senior executives, thought leaders and industry professionals, SmartBrief is the leading digital media publisher of targeted business news and information by industry. By combining technology and editorial expertise, SmartBrief filters thousands of sources daily to deliver the most relevant industry news in partnership with more than 180 leading trade associations, professional societies, nonprofits and corporate entities. 
 
SmartBrief's data-driven advertising solutions enable brands and media agencies to reach engaged and relevant audiences using display, video and content marketing platforms.

Name: APAC Media
Description:
APAC Media
Advocating Progressive Actions for Change (APAC)

Mission Statement:
At APAC Media, our mission is to empower communities, organizations,
and government bodies to embrace transformative solutions that address
the challenges of today and tomorrow. Through thought leadership,
in-depth coverage, and impactful events, we aim to inspire progress in
critical sectors—ranging from healthcare and education to energy and
digital governance—by promoting technological innovation, inclusivity,
and responsible growth.

Objective:
To drive impactful change by fostering innovation, technological
advancement, and progressive action across key sectors, including public
sector, healthcare, pharma, education, skill development, BFSI, startups,
water, energy, and digital governance.
APAC Media strives to be the leading platform for sharing insights,
sparking dialogue, and creating opportunities for collaboration that drive
sustainable progress and development in India and beyond.

Name: Italiafruit News
Description:
Italiafruit News è un servizio di informazione dedicato agli operatori del settore ortofrutticolo e rivolto a tutti i decision-makers della filiera, dalla produzione alla distribuzione, fino alle tecnologie, con l'obiettivo di presentare strumenti utili ad interpretare al meglio i cambiamenti del settore.
Il team è composto da giornalisti professionisti e ricercatori in diversi campi del sistema ortofrutticolo, con differenti background formativi e professionali, che si riflettono in rubriche originali, volte a raccontare il settore da diverse prospettive.
La pubblicazione tratta quotidianamente gli eventi più rilevanti del panorama ortofrutticolo, suddivisi in Rubriche dalla Redazione, con approfondimenti, interviste, analisi ed articoli originali, e Mercati&Imprese, con news attuali e di impatto provenienti dal mercato e dal mondo delle imprese.
La testata vanta preziose partnerships con Eurofruit, Fruchthandel, Agronotizie, AgroTer, Reefer Logistics.

Name: Business News Australia
Description:
Business News Australia is a digital news site reporting on the people, companies and trends shaping the future of Australian business.

We cover the game changers and deal breakers, the loss makers and profit takers, delivering breaking news and narrative-rich features that keep our diverse national readership informed, inspired and empowered.

From high-growth startups to established companies, we report on founders scaling globally, investors backing bold ideas, and businesses responding to the challenges of sustainability, innovation and leadership in real time.

Our coverage spans every state and territory, with dedicated pages for Australia’s largest cities and a strong focus on regional stories often overlooked by traditional media.

We also run the Young Entrepreneur Awards, a national program spotlighting Australia's most innovative founders through annual events in Brisbane, Sydney, Melbourne and on the Gold Coast.

Proudly registered as a news business with the Australian Communications and Media Authority (ACMA).

Whether you’ve been a business owner for years or are just starting with a dream, we’ll help you ditch the time-wasters and focus on what gets big results by using our proven playbooks that work for any business that needs clients or customers.

With a digital presence of more than 4M+ followers, 100M + video views, a top-rated business podcast and the top online membership for female entrepreneurs – we’re passionate about creating content that supports ambitious women in building wealth + creating lives they love.

Founded in 2014, Bossbabe has become a household name and the go-to brand for female entrepreneurs and ambitious women around the world.

Name: ZDNet France
Description:
Depuis 15 ans, ZDNet.fr est le site d'information dédié aux professionnels de l'IT. Chaque jour, il propose l’essentiel de l'actualité IT, décrypte les enjeux et les tendances, et prend part aux débats du secteur à travers sa communauté de blogueurs, composée d'experts et d'observateurs avertis de l'évolution des technologies et de leurs usages. 

Dans la catégorie des sites d'informations spécialisés, ZDNet.fr fédère la plus large audience de décideurs IT. Ces professionnels viennent sur ZDNet .fr pour trouver des réponses à leurs problématiques autour des technologies qu'ils déploient dans leurs entreprises - big data, virtualisation, services hébergés, cloud computing, business intelligence... - , via notamment des études de cas, des avis d'experts et une offre de livres blancs.

The focus is to give valuable, actionable information as well as public health perspectives to expand upon your understanding and/or learning of the public health field.

Name: Lamudi
Description:
Lamudi is one of the most promising and exciting start-ups of Rocket Internet with the aspiration to be the fastest growing online property portal in emerging markets. Lamudi is the ideal platform to connect sellers, buyers and tenants to easily buy, rent and sell homes, land, and commercial properties. Founded in 2013, Lamudi operates in 13 countries across Asia, the Middle East, and Latin America, and has already become the market leader in several markets. 
 
Lamudi is a part of the Rocket Internet family which is the fastest and the most successful venture builder across the globe. With an exceptional team that has been building online companies since 1999 and has created over 100 market leading companies in 40+ countries, it has unrivaled experience in launching internet ventures. Superior expertise and proficiency of an international company together with a deep understanding of local markets are the foundation for building the best online real estate marketplace.

Description:
Founders, creators, athletes, builders.
Different paths, same mindset: the drive to push, to try, to achieve.

Startups, journeys, wins, failures and everything in between.

Stories of those who dare.

Name: The Cipher Brief

The Cipher Brief is the go-to digital platform for the latest security news and  high-level analysis. More than just reporting on the news, The Cipher Brief helps readers understand what the news means to them.

Join the community on thecipherbrief.com to stay informed on The Cipher News.

Name: NOIZE Media
Description:
Em 2007 levamos para a rua uma revista sobre comportamento musical, que apelidamos de NOIZE. Hoje expandimos nosso DNA para quatro diferentes núcleos, que compõem a Noize Media.

Noize Record Club
Unimos a publicação da NOIZE à prensagem de um álbum exclusivo em vinil, dando origem ao primeiro (e único) clube de assinatura de discos de vinil da América Latina. A cada mês, lançamos um LP acompanhado de uma revista sobre o universo do álbum. Nossa curadoria mira em obras que merecem ser eternizadas. 

Boost
Sob a forma de sites e blogs especializados, formamos uma rede para que as marcas cheguem em quem vive a música. Geramos mais comentários, mais compartilhamentos, mais engajamento e promovemos mais conexões. 

Fuzz
Usamos a criatividade como plataforma para conectar as pessoas com o propósito das marcas. Desenvolvemos conteúdos, gerenciamos projetos e estabelecemos diálogos multiplataformas que promovem engajamento dentro e fora das redes. 

Grito
Contamos histórias que aproximam os artistas dos fãs, mostramos as curiosidades por trás de cada trabalho e o melhor, convertemos o seu produto em crescimento de streaming e plays.

Name: ESV FRANCE
Description:
ESV (previously eSearchvision) is a Digital Marketing Agency specialising in Search Marketing, Social Media, Data Analytics, Branding / Creative and Strategy Consulting Services. We are international specialists with over 12 languages spoken. 

We have over 200 clients globally, ~150 employees working from our 4 global offices in London, Paris, Luxembourg and Ann Arbor. We are pioneers, with our innovative technologies, best practice methodologies, wide-ranging staff expertise and the transparent manner in which we do business. Our mission is to maximise ROI and growth for all our clients, no matter the service type, scope or size.

We are seeking for talents in several locations. If you've got what it takes, send us your CV and tell us a little bit about yourself at: jobs@esvdigital.com.

Name: Maldita.es
Description:
Maldita.es is an independent journalistic platform focused on the control of disinformation and public discourse through fact-checking and data journalism techniques. We are a non profit organization with three main objectives:  

- Monitor and control political discourse and promote transparency in public and private institutions.
- Verify and fight against misinformation.
- Promote media literacy and technological tools in order to create an aware community that can defend itself from disinformation and lies in all areas.

Name: Petite Mu
Description:
Ce média s'adresse à la fois aux patients, à leurs proches, aux soignants, au grand public mais aussi aux entreprises. 

Touchant plus de 9 millions de personnes en France, le handicap invisible reste en marge de la société. Pour rappel 80% sont des handicaps invisibles. 

À travers des BDs, des interviews, des minis-reportages, nous sensibilisons aux handicaps invisibles pour une société plus inclusive.

Name: ITWatch
Description:
ITWatch går helt tæt på de danske it- og televirksomheder og sætter fokus på forretningerne bag produkterne - herunder strategi, ledelse, resultater, konkurrence, politik, ordrer, opkøb, innovation, profiler, karriere, jobskift og meget mere.

ITWatch leverer uafhængig, kritisk og fair journalistik om de store, toneangivende virksomheder, men også om underskoven af mindre og mellemstore danske virksomheder, der udgør ryggen i dansk erhvervsliv og samfundet generelt.

ToulEco édite ToulEmploi, ToulEco Green, ToulEcoTV et trois éditions régionales du magazine : Toulouse, Tarn et Montpellier.

Name: Film Companion Studios
Description:
Film Companion Studios is a speciality division for long form storytelling where we create, develop and produce documentaries on all things film and entertainment. At Film Companion Studios, we tell stories of storytellers and artists responsible for making cinema an experience. 
Through our various endeavours, including impact-driven programmes to fund emerging filmmakers, we aim to take Film Companion’s legacy of discerning and nurturing love for cinema ahead.

Name: FUTUREVVORLD
Description:
FUTUREVVORLD is a digital forum for terrestrials to discover, embrace and inform the growing sustainability movement in fashion, footwear and design.

We are not perfect, and we understand that no brand is either, because true sustainability requires one to cease all production at once and subsist on what already exists. 

With that awareness, we are providing eco-conscious and eco-curious consumers with a place to understand what’s possible and what’s needed to protect our planet with more mindful purchases.

Name: Stock Market
Description:
Stock Market (StockMarket.com) | Stay Informed, Become Empowered & Profit

StockMarket.com is a global financial markets platform that strives to educate, inform, engage & empower people to take control of their current & future financial lives, so they can profit within the stock market today!
We offer access to free stock quotes, stock charts, breaking stock news, top market stories, free stock analyst ratings, SEC filings, stock price history, corporate events, public company financials and so much more. Stock Market (StockMarket.com) is a true disrupter, vastly improving the way people consume financial market data.

Name: The Conversation UK
Description:
The Conversation, an independent news and commentary website produced by academics and journalists.

We source news, commentary and the latest research from the academic community. A team of professional journalists works with academic authors to unlock their expertise, apply it to topical issues, and make it available to the public. All content is published under Creative Commons.

The site is open and free for everyone to read. It is both a media resource, allowing republishing of all articles, and a source of story ideas and new voices to follow up for interview.

Name: ESS et société
Description:
Media social et solidaire dédié à l'économie sociale et solidaire en France et dans le monde. Au travers d'un agenda et revues de presse et l'économie sociale et solidaire, c'est l'information que vous recherchez pour comprendre et débattre sur ce qui vous entoure.
Association, mutuelle, fondation, coopérative, syndicat, comité d'entreprise, vous trouverez leurs informations à  travers plus de 45000 articles sur le site.

Name: Agriland Media
Description:
Agriland is the fastest growing digital Agricultural news publisher in Europe. Using the latest technology across mobile, desktop and app we deliver current and breaking farming news, views, opinion and technical information to farmers and the agricultural business community.

As a digital only news publisher, we are committed to bringing a new ethos and focus to a sector that is changing rapidly. Our team of highly skilled news and technical journalists are committed to bringing you the news and information that matters as it happens in a format that is accessible and convenient.

Established in 2013 Agriland has pioneered the daily delivery of agricultural and farming news content in a digital only format. Each day Agriland is the trusted source for thousands of farmers to keep up to date with what’s happening both locally and globally from both a farming and business perspective. With close to 500,000 unique users a month we understand what our readers want and the information they require to make the necessary business decisions to keep them at the forefront of food and commodity production.

We publish news as it happens, seven days a week, 365 days per year with all content easily accessible on which ever device suits your lifestyle. We are passionate about agriculture and farming, with most staff having a background in agriculture, so we understand the day to day issues that the industry can face and how these can impact on their business decisions. Our core focus is agriculture and how the industry and people working in it are portrayed in a professional and understanding light.

Agriland is a modern digital media publishing company and while we do not charge for content, we are still fully committed to providing the most accurate and timely news and information to our readers.

Technology is changing farming and agricultural practices rapidly and we aim to use technology to keep you informed in a new and unique format.

Name: ClickZ Media

ClickZ Media connects you with over 1 million senior professionals through a portfolio of trusted digital brands that have shaped the business conversation for over 25 years.

Our brands, Accountancy Age, The CFO, ClickZ, HRD Connect, Global Treasurer, and more—deliver agenda-setting content across finance, marketing, tech, HR, and the public sector. We serve the decision-makers driving the global economy.

With two decades of deep sector experience, we help partners build brand authority and drive results through high-impact media products, including Native Content, Newsletter Sponsorships, Solus Mailshots, and Live Broadcasting.

Whether you're launching a new product, generating leads, or growing awareness in a niche, we make sure your message lands with the right audience—at scale.

CANNABIS. CULTURE. FOR ALL.

Through our reporting and analysis, Soch seeks to empower individuals, highlight local stories, promote social justice, and provide a southern-subaltern perspective on issues of global concern. As such, our reportage emphasizes citizen responsibility to organize and lobby governments to bring about positive change.

A podcast (now turned media company), AsianBossGirl is focused on empowering and sharing the stories of the modern-day Asian American woman

It's no secret that Asian women are lacking in almost all media outlets, and those who are present mostly represent the fashion, beauty, or blogging industries.

Name: Klix.ba
Description:
Internet portal Klix.ba je najposjećeniji i najrelevantniji internet medij u Bosni i Hercegovini koji je ujedno i lider u internet oglašavanju.

Portal je nastao u oktobru 2000. godine kao Sarajevo-x.com, da bi u aprilu 2012. godine promijenio ime u Klix.ba s ciljem, kako regionalnog, tako i sadržajnog, razvijanja. Od samog početka nije zamišljen kao samo sarajevski portal, kako ga je prvo ime definiralo, već kao bosanskohercegovački portal. U vrijeme kada je u Bosni i Hercegovini pristup internetu imao veoma mali broj korisnika, tadašnji Sarajevo-x.com je od samog početka bio nezaobilazna web-stranica bh. internet pionira. 

Klix.ba uvijek nastoji tačno, objektivno i pravovremeno informirati svoje čitatelje o svim aktuelnostima iz svih sfera života, poštujući postulate novinarske profesije i profesionalne standarde. Portal svojim tekstovima ukazuje na aktuelne probleme u različitim oblastima, s ciljem pozitivnih društvenih promjena, ali prije svega afirmira pozitivne vrijednosti, ljude i događaje koji doprinose stvaranju zdrave i pozitivne atmosfere u društvu. Sadržaj portala se od nastanka do danas konstantno povećavao i napredovao. Klix.ba je jedan od malobrojnih portala u Bosni i Hercegovini koji ima profesionalnu redakciju po uzoru na tradicionalne medije, dopisnike u svim većim gradovima BiH, proizvodi vlastiti sadržaj ili ga legalno kupuje od novinskih i fotoagencija. Danas se na Klixu objavi oko 150 vijesti dnevno. Klix.ba je vjerovatno jedini nezavisni internet medij u Bosni i Hercegovini iza kojeg ne stoji nijedna politička opcija, nevladina organizacija ili marketinška agencija, pa je sadržaj našeg portala i zbog toga najprivlačniji našim čitateljima.

Prema podacima Google Analyticsa za mart 2018. godine, sa više od 3 miliona jedinstvenih posjetitelja i 65 miliona učitavanja na na webu, te oko 120 hiljada aktivnih korisnika i 30 miliona učitavanja stranica iOS i Android aplikacija, portal Klix.ba čini najposjećenijim informativnim portalom u BiH.

Također, prema rezultatima istraživanja DotMetrics, koje obuhvata gotovo sve bosanskohercegovačke web-stranice, Klix.ba najposjećeniji je informativni portal u BiH. U martu 2018. godine, Dotmetrics je zabilježio preko 530 hiljada stvarnih korisnika iz BiH koja su posjetila portal Klix.ba, koji su u prosjeku na Klixu provodili jedan sat i 10 minuta.
Location: Sarajevo, Federation of Bosnia and Herzegovina

The mission of the Texas Water Journal 501c3 is to provide peer-reviewed water science and policy for Texas. The journal is always encouraging submissions relating to Texas water research. Submission guidelines are on the website.

Główny obszar aktywności Instytutu to działania edukacyjne, takie jak organizacja seminariów, konferencji, warsztatów, współpraca ze środowiskami akademickimi, a także programy stażowe.

W każdym roku Instytut organizuje seminaria w Krakowie, Poznaniu, Gdańsku i Warszawie. Uczestniczą w nich klienci Cityboard Media. Jako prelegenci zapraszani są wybitni specjaliści z zakresu marketingu, reklamy, psychologii i digitalu (między innymi Paweł Tkaczyk, prof. Andrzej Falkowski, czy prof. Alicja Grochowska). W panelach eksperckich i warsztatach corocznie uczestniczy kilkaset osób.

We współpracy z Uniwersytetem SWPS w Warszawie realizowane są projekty edukacyjne i stażowe. W ich ramach eksperci z Cityboard Media prowadzą na uczelni zajęcia z komunikacji marketingowej i zapraszają studentów na wizyty studyjne do firmy. Od lat Instytut realizuje skierowany do młodych ludzi, program stażowy „Kuźnia talentów Cityboard Media”. Pozwala on na zdobycie doświadczenia i jest szansą wejścia na rynek pracy i karierę w mediach.

Instytut realizuje misję Cityboard Media, czyli firmy dla której priorytetem jest dostarczanie innowacyjnych rozwiązań marketingowych. Firma tworzy strategie marketingowe, kreuje marki, buduje nowoczesne strony www, obsługuje media społecznościowe i realizuje kampanie reklamowe w internecie. Sieć outdoorowa firmy, to kilka tysięcy nośników w ponad 60 miastach w całym kraju. Na tablicach reklamowych Cityboard Media rocznie pojawia się kilka tysięcy kampanii.

Name: Tricycle: The Buddhist Review
Description:
Established in 1990 as a not-for-profit 501(c)(3) educational organization, The Tricycle Foundation is dedicated to making Buddhist teachings and practices broadly available. In 1991 the Foundation launched Tricycle: The Buddhist Review, the first magazine intended to present Buddhist perspectives to a Western readership. Tricycle soon became the leading independent journal of Buddhism in the West, where it continues to be the most inclusive and widely read vehicle for the dissemination of Buddhist views and values. Our readership includes longtime practitioners, those who are curious about Buddhism or meditation, and those who do not identify as Buddhist but value the teachings of wisdom and compassion that Buddhism has to offer.

Tricycle has been recognized with the prestigious Folio Award for Best Spiritual Magazine three times, and has twice garnered the Utne Media Award.

Tricycle: The Buddhist Review is a print and digital magazine dedicated to making Buddhist teachings and practices broadly available. Tricycle also offers monthly spiritual films online, podcasts with leading Buddhist voices, monthly dharma talk videos, and a variety of online courses with expert teachers.

Founded in 1991, Tricycle is one of the leading sources of Buddhist perspectives in the western world. The editorial spans a broad spectrum of topics, including but not limited to philosophical tenets, historical analysis, contemporary issues, and cultural commentary, all seen through the lens of Buddhist teachings and practices. 

Tricycle's approach provides a comprehensive view of Buddhism, beyond cultural and regional boundaries. Readers can explore a plethora of teachings, from Theravada to Mahayana, Zen to Vajrayana, and beyond.

Start your morning off on a positive note with a quick hit of Buddhist wisdom, click the link on our profile, or go to to: https://tricy.cl/3MdVrzn

Available on all major connected TV platforms and app stores, Marquee TV is the only arts and culture service to have negotiated third party distribution deals with the key international platforms, including Amazon Prime Channels, The Roku Channel, Comcast, Cox, Verizon, YouTube PrimeTime and EON. 

With members in over 160 countries, Marquee TV has established itself as the pre-eminent global digital brand for arts audiences, arts organizations and artists themselves.

Name: ZAHG Marketing Digital
Description:
Somos especialistas em inteligência e estratégia digital, nossas soluções baseadas em análise e tratamento de dados, auxiliam nossos clientes a compreenderem suas suas jornadas de vendas, damos suporte ao posicionamento estratégico, estimulamos o branding  awareness e aceleramos negócios.
Atuamos com quatro competências fundamentais:

1. INTELIGÊNCIA  & ESTRATÉGIA

L'offre SPICEE est disponible via son site internet www.spicee.com décliné en application mobile iOS et Android, mais aussi sur Molotov, Orange, Prime Vidéo et Voo (Belgique). d’étendre rapidement sa distribution à d’autres opérateurs, consoles de jeux ou plateformes OTT.

Hey, Welcome ! On se tutoie ?
Tkt, nous avons une cooouurrte présentation.

Pour la petite histoire, nous sommes des community managers, des digital managers et des directeurs artistiques qui ont décidé un jour de créer une mafia digitale :D. Des « Pablo Escobar » et des « Don Vito » du digital…sympa non  ? Mais quelle idée farfelue 

Puis on a dit « niet » ! On va développer la plus belle et la plus grande communauté de professionnels autour de la communication digitale au Sénégal.

Et pour ça, nous allons :

parler de tous les sujets qui se rapportent au digital,
concevoir des baromètres pour le secteur,
faire des études de cas,
mettre en lumière beaucoup de métiers méconnus,
partager toutes les offres d’emploi,
former les community managers,
collaborer avec tous les professionnels.
Galsen CM est ainsi née. Elle est conçue par nous et pour vous. Ensemble, nous allons créer la plus grande plateforme de professionnels du digital au Sénégal . On sait que cette phrase sonne comme un slogan de campagne, mais on y tient.

Sinon il y a aussi « Sharing is Caring » que nous aimons bien. Tu l’as trouvée top ou flop, notre présentation ?

Ecris nous sur coucou@galsencm.sn . Sinon tu peux toujours nous contacter. Parfois on a de bons plans.

Name: Adconion Media Group
Description:
AMG is a technology company who has built one of the largest global multi-screen, multi-channel audience platforms. Our Digital Distribution Platform (DDP) enables content owners, app developers and device manufacturers to monetize their global audiences across multiple devices and screens. This is done by building proprietary data profiles and models on their consumers and then selling these profiles to the highest bidder in a real-time marketplace.

Since 2005, Adconion has leveraged technology to aggregate global audiences to bring massive reach and scale to its advertising partners. Since then the platform continues to evolve as audiences consume and interact with media across multiple devices, websites and applications. As a result, the Adconion DDP is collecting data on the 50+ billion events a month that take place across the platform. This data is ingested, mapped and segmented, providing Adconion with a 360° audience profile across one platform.

Adconion provides customized solutions and innovative products that are delivered across multiple screens on a single platform. As a digital platform and technology company, Adconion provides a portfolio of brand and performance solutions for advertisers worldwide. Adconion Media Group wholly owns Adconion Direct, providing performance solutions spanning display, email and social media; along with smartclip, the video and brand advertising platform specializing in multi-screen delivery.

Description:
Founded in 2017, The Post Millennial has become one of the fastest growing news corporations throughout Canada. It is owned and operated by the Après le Millénaire / The Post Millennial Corporation.

At the Post Millennial, we strive to deliver the news to you as it unfolds, ensuring that you never fall behind on the current or trending news.

With a particular verve for equality in thought, The Post Millennial provides various reports on today’s issues such as Canadian politics, business, local provincial news, analysis coverage and opinion pieces.

To best deliver the news to you, The Post Millennial employs a dedicated team of writers, podcast hosts, and video creators.

A Letter from the Co-Founders

To Our Readers,

The Canadian government grows in importance every day.

This potential for overreach impacts Canadians of every race, ethnicity, and creed.

At The Post Millennial, our mission is quite simple: To accurately and adequately report Canadian news events as they unfold and progress, and to share this reporting with as many Canadians and citizens of the World as possible.

Due to our open, honest and straightforward approach to reporting, we like to refer to ourselves as, “Your Reasonable Alternative”.

Every Canadian deserves access to accurate information, whether they’re an immigrant family running a small business, or a tenacious oil worker in Alberta.

If you love this country, its unified diversity and the opportunities it provides, we aspire to be your voice.

Your Co-Founders,

Matthew Azrieli & Ali S. Taghva

Osservatorio Balcani e Caucaso Transeuropa (OBCT) is a think tank focused on South-East Europe, Turkey and the Caucasus which was launched in the year 2000. Over time, OBC expanded its scope and now reports on the socio-political and cultural developments of six EU member states, of seven countries taking part in the EU Enlargement process, and much of post-communist Europe, which is included in the European Neighborhood Policy (ENP).

Born to provide a forum for knowledge-sharing and dialogue among civil society organizations working for the EU integration of SEE, OBC is committed to strengthening the European project by supporting transnational relations and exploring issues which are crucial for the EU democracy.

To achieve its mission, OBC developed a multi-sectoral participatory strategy that combines online journalism, research, training, knowledge dissemination and policy advice. OBC is crossmedia, multi-lingual and transnational so as to stimulate bottom-up exchanges at the European level.

Name: DU Beat
Description:
DU Beat is India’s largest independent student newspaper, run entirely by the students of the University of Delhi. It was founded in the year 2006 and has served the students and faculty of Delhi University by addressing students’ issues, reporting news, and publishing opinions. It is distributed to students weekly, across 20 colleges in the University, including both North and South campus, as well as a few off-campus colleges. We reach them via our online and offline platforms spread across our print edition, Facebook, Instagram, Twitter, YouTube, and Snapchat.

Over the last 13 years, DU Beat has increased its online and offline audience engagement and has proved to be the leading voice of the university students. On Instagram, the organisation has around 8 million monthly impressions and an estimate of 48,000 followers. With a reach of 252,000 people on Facebook, DU Beat has been instrumental in bringing about a change in the lives of the students. On the offline platform, 3000 print copies are distributed every week to the students of the University.

From ideating stories, investigating, writing, raising funds for our print edition, to regular managerial work - every little thing in our organisation is handled solely by undergraduate students. We recruit students, train them to excel in their various fields, and prepare them to work in professional settings. In the last decade, students who have worked at DU Beat in various capacities have gone ahead to lead major teams at Google, pursued journalism in globally influential outlets like The New York Times and Huffington Post, excelled in academics as Commonwealth Scholars, and begun their own media initiatives. The team has eventually come to consist of the University’s best talents as correspondents, graphic designers, photographers, and videographers, aided with a full functioning team of human resources and marketing from the various colleges of the varsity.

Name: Le Board média, incubateur de solopreneurs
Description:
Il y a 3 ans, je me suis lancée dans l'aventure du solopreneuriat et je n'ai pas trouvé grand chose pour m'aider à entreprendre seule. 

Partout où on parlait d'entreprendre, on parlait recrutement, levée de fonds, ou management ... 

Mais c'est bon, j'avais déjà donné en tant qu'ancienne dirigeante :  moi, ce que je voulais, c'était développer une entreprise en solo, pour rester  libre et flexible. Pas envie de devenir entrepreneure pour être l'esclave de mon business ! 

Mais je voulais aussi développer une "vraie" entreprise : rentable, scalable et agréable à vivre, pour bien vivre ma vie d'indépendant·e. Pas "juste" "vendre" mon temps et ne plus pouvoir profiter de la vie.

Donc j'ai cherché mais... j'ai trouvé aucune ressource ! 

Alors j'ai décidé de créer mon média, Le Board, pour documenter mon parcours et réunir les conseils des meilleur·es expert·es du sujet. 

Le Board, c'est aussi un pied de nez à tous les "grand·es entrepreneur·es" qui ont des conseillers en tous genres pour les aider à prendre de bonnes décisions, alors que souvent, quand on est solo, on n'a pas la chance d'être aussi bien entouré·e. 

Mais ça, c'était avant. 

Maintenant, grâce au Board, tu auras toujours accès au board de tes rêves, 24/7, à portée d'Airpods ou de clic. 

Et puis, comme en tant que solopreneur·e, on est toujours overbooké·e, on n'a pas le temps pour écouter de longs podcasts ou lire des pavés...

... alors j'ai voulu créer des formats courts et efficaces pour t'aider à progresser : 

 Un épisode de podcast de 5 minutes chaque jour
 Une communauté à ta dispo pour l'entraide rapide sur Discord 
 Une newsletter hebdo avec tous mes outils pour ta solo-entreprise

Alors, prêt·e à devenir membre du Board ? 

Abonne-toi à cette page et au podcast pour commencer : https://audmns.com/YLZYvbb

Name: Bank Automation News
Description:
Formerly Bank Innovation, Bank Automation News is no stranger to exploring the future of financial services technology. Since 2009, our team has been at the forefront of tracking the evolution of digital banking. With the future of innovation pointing to opportunities in automation, we are evolving the focus of our coverage to continue to provide insights and information that guide industry professionals to better results.

Automation is the next frontier of financial services technology. Set to improve or transform most banking processes from customer experience to compliance, lending solutions and investment, automation technology will create the greatest transformation at financial institutions since the digitization of financial services in the wake of the Credit Crisis. According to PWC, the growth of robotics and AI automation is not a matter of “if,” but “when.” Banks that are not already investing in automation technologies must begin shifting their focus to remain competitive. This will require investment in training and educational resources. Bank Automation News is the first and only news and education source dedicated to fostering this emerging segment of financial services technology.

Bank Automation News offers a Premium subscription service, which includes unlimited Premium articles, a weekly video update, exclusive event discounts, and much more. The Bank Automation News Premium subscription provides its subscribers with valuable data and exclusive market knowledge. Additionally, Bank Automation News offers a Premium Plus subscription, where members will receive everything included in Premium; plus passes to attend all Bank Automation News events, a library of on-demand conference content, exclusive monthly webinars, and more. Subscribe today  to the definitive source for automation news. 

Bank Automation News is the definitive source for insights and news surrounding automation in financial services.

Mere end 250 virksomheder annoncerer løbende deres juridiske stillinger via Jurainfo, herunder størstedelen af landets kommuner, styrelser, ministerier og største private selskaber. 

Med mere end 100.000 månedlige besøgende og mere end 17.000 abonnenter, når Jurainfo.dk ud til:

77 % af landets største virksomheder, alle landets kommuner samt størstedelen af landets styrelser og ministerier.

Name: Métamorphose Podcast
Description:
Engagée depuis plus de vingt ans dans des projets porteurs de sens, et ayant à cœur de faire entendre les voix des acteurs de l’avènement d’un nouveau monde, Anne Ghesquière a créé en 2019 le podcast Métamorphose, éveille ta conscience !
Diffusé chaque lundi et jeudi à partir de 7h, Métamorphose vous emmène à la rencontre d’experts et de grands témoins sur des sujets engagés et conscients pour vous aider à y voir plus clair dans un monde en pleine mutation. Métamorphose propose une voie où le questionnement de notre incarnation et la quête de sens sont au centre du projet. Un expert a nommé un jour Métamorphose “le MBA de la conscience” !
Chaque épisode est nourri par une vision holistique de l'harmonie du cœur, du corps et de l’esprit. On y aborde des thèmes tels que la quête de soi, l’engagement, l’alimentation saine, l’écologie, la spiritualité, le développement personnel, la biodiversité du féminin, les pédagogies  bienveillantes, la nutrition et bien d’autres sujets encore grâce aux nombreux et différents invités qui se succèdent au micro d’Anne !

Description:

Publicada desde 1982, trata dos temas atuais relacionados à vasta área da ciência dos alimentos, estrategicamente distribuídos em diversas seções (Editorial, Comentários, Artigos, Pesquisas, Notícias, Atualização Bibliográfica, Legislação, Agenda etc.), para oferecer ao leitor os subsídios necessários à formação de ideia acerca das mais palpitantes questões que envolvem a produção das matérias-primas, sua industrialização e, sobretudo, o entendimento das modernas técnicas de processamento para a obtenção de um alimento nutritivo, de alta qualidade e sem risco para o consumidor.

A matéria publicada é rigorosamente original, assinada por especialistas dos mais conceituados institutos de ensino, de pesquisa e de extensão universitária do Brasil e do exterior, bem como por profissionais ligados aos segmentos empresarial e governamental, o que a converte em valioso instrumento de consulta para os profissionais atualizarem-se, num momento marcado por transformações tecnológicas muito rápidas, em que a qualidade e a segurança dos alimentos ocupam posição de fundamental importância.

 هدفنا أن نكون المنصة العربية الأولى في الانفراد والعمق، وأن نترك أثراً حقيقياً عبر محتوى يثري القارئ ويعزز حضورنا في الساحة الإعلامية العربية.
 الرسالة
 
 مهمتنا واضحة: البحث عن الحقيقة ومساعدة الناس على فهم العالم.
 نؤمن أن الصحافة العظيمة قادرة على إثراء حياة القراء، تقوية المجتمع، ودعم العدالة، وكشف الحقائق، وفهم ما وراء الأحداث.
 ولهذا يعمل فريقنا من الصحافيين المتميزين عبر العمل الميداني، التحليل المعمّق، وتدقيق المعلومات لتقديم صحافة نافعة تغيّر حياة الناس للأفضل.
 
 قيمنا: 

الانفتاح على الثقافات المختلفة


التفكير الرقمي كمنصة عصرية


الطموح للوصول إلى العالمية والتواجد في كل مكان


الاستثمار في المستقبل


دعم الإبداع والمواهب داخل فريقنا


 عربي بوست منصة رقمية تابعة لشركة إنتيجرال الإعلامية، المتخصصة في خدمات التواصل الاستراتيجي، والمالكة لعدد من المنصات الإعلامية الناطقة بالعربية.

Name: APS - Agence de Presse Sénégalaise
Description:
Voilà + de 60 ans que l’Agence de presse sénégalaise existe grâce à un décret signé par feu Mamadou Dia, à l’époque Président du Conseil. 

Il convient de mentionner la réforme de 1972, au terme de laquelle l’APS a hérité des Centres régionaux d’information (CRI), des structures qui appartenaient à l’Etat. Grâce à un tel legs, l’agence nationale se dota de bureaux régionaux presque partout dans le pays. Elle put ainsi procéder à un maillage important du territoire national.

Conduite pour l’essentiel par feu Amadou Dieng, qui jusqu’ici sera celui qui sera resté le plus longtemps à la tête de l’APS (juillet 1976-novembre 1993), cette réforme aux allures de révolution a eu pour principale conséquence l’éclosion de journalistes qui, dans l’ombre, auront donné le meilleur d’eux-mêmes, pour que l’information régionale ait droit de cité dans le fil de l’APS : Souleymane Ndiaye ‘‘Julaps’’, Abdou Sylla et Malamine Diop (décédés), Mbargou Diop, Babacar Ndiaye, Birassy Sow, Moustapha Sow et Abdou Djigo (retraités), etc.

A ceux-là, ont succédé d’autres journalistes plus jeunes, mieux formés car issus du CESTI ou d’autres écoles de journalisme à l’étranger : Mamadou Amath, Ibrahima Bakhoum, Saliou Traoré, feu Alpha Abdallah Sall, Oumar Dieng, Madieng Seck, Omar Faye et Ibrahima Niane. Ayant servi dans les régions avant de revenir au desk central de Dakar, ces journalistes travaillent aujourd'hui pour d’autres structures de presse. De par leur rigueur et leur sens de l’information, ils ont largement contribué à forger le label APS, qui force actuellement le respect dans le milieu journalistique.
L’Agence de presse sénégalaise occupe aujourd'hui une place de choix dans le paysage médiatique sénégalais. Elle a connu dans la douleur comme en douceur, de profondes mutations. Les changements ont été dans les hommes et les directions, dans le style rédactionnel et le mode de distribution de l’information. L'APS dispose depuis 1998 d'un site internet : www.aps.sn

Name: Salud con lupa
Description:
Es un medio nativo digital dedicado a la salud pública en Perú y con alcance en América Latina que pertenece a la Asociación de Periodismo con Lupa.

Nuestra misión es empoderar a las personas con información necesaria y rigurosa para comprender la salud como un bien común. Por ello, nuestro enfoque periodístico trasciende la visión de la salud como la ausencia de la enfermedad y se adhiere al de Una sola Salud, que entiende la salud de las personas, los animales y el medio ambiente como parte de un todo que debe estar en equilibrio y ser visto de forma integral.

A través de investigaciones periodísticas en diversos formatos, reducimos la desinformación en salud, denunciamos las fallas del Estado y los abusos de poder de las industrias que impactan directamente en la vida de millones de personas, como las corporaciones tabacaleras, de alimentos ultraprocesados, las farmacéuticas y las compañías de combustibles fósiles. Con todo ello, aspiramos a proteger la salud como un derecho humano fundamental.

En Salud con lupa buscamos que nuestras noticias ayuden a elevar la calidad del debate público y el proceso de toma de decisiones de las autoridades. Pero, sobre todo, aspiramos a que la salud forme parte de las conversaciones cotidianas de los ciudadanos. Este debe ser un tema de discusión permanente: si solamente pensamos en salud cuando caemos enfermos o estamos en crisis, es demasiado tarde.

Description:
Coqtail Milano è la prima community dedicata alla mixology che rende democratico il bere di qualità. Finestra sulle nuove tendenze liquide e sui cocktail, racconta il mondo dell’alta miscelazione.

Nata da un’idea di Chiara Degl’Innocenti e Penelope Vaglini si presenta come una mappa di facile lettura per il mondo dei drinkstagrammer. 

In modo inedito e con video-storie coinvolgenti sul saper fare italiano mescola pagine web e canali social. Unisce bartender e lettori, drink influencer e consumatori, shakera e rinnova le vecchie dinamiche della comunicazione ed è un punto di riferimento per l'intera comunità dei cocktail.

Fuori dagli schemi, Coqtail Milano va a caccia di idee, le sviluppa e le promuove. Organizza eventi, workshop e incontri con l’obiettivo di raccontare l'evoluzione del drink and beverage.

Coqtail  
/ kɒk•teɪl /

Esistono molte storie sulla nascita del primo cocktail: tante sono fantasie curiose, alcune non sono state mai confermate. Tutte hanno però in comune un elemento fondamentale, la coda di un gallo. 

Utilizzata come guarnizione, evocata dalla forma di una caraffa o dai colori di una mistura liquida, rappresenta l’ispirazione che ha guidato i primi barman alle prese con i rudimenti della mixology. 

Da qui prende vita Coqtail, il nostro neologismo che racconta storia e futuro del bere bene.

News Tank Football (FR/ENG) and News Tank Sport (FR) are BtoB market intelligence media for key actors and decision-makers in the sports ecosystem.

Name: The Morning Call
Description:
The Morning Call is a Media Company in Allentown, PA that serves the Lehigh Valley and its surrounding communities.  It's part of Tribune Publishing.  

The Critic, an Allentown newspaper founded in 1883, was the direct ancestor of The Morning Call. 

David A. Miller and his brother Samuel Miller were sole owners by 1904.  In 1906 The Morning Call was invited to join the Associated Press.

In 1984 it was sold to The Times Mirror Company, 

In Septempter 1996, The Morning Call launched mcall.com. 

In 2000, Times Mirror was acquired by the Tribune Company.

In August 2014, The Morning Call became part of the company now known as tronc, Inc. as Tribune Co. spun-off its publishing businesses.

Inn October 2018, tronc reverting to the original name, Tribune Publishing.

Broker Daily is a targeted publication dedicated to the third party mortgage distribution channel. 

This resource is focused exclusively on the issues that affect and influence Australia’s mortgage industry across the supply and distribution chain.

Leveraging off Momentum Media's extensive distribution across the financial services sector, Broker Daily is read by a targeted audience of mortgage industry professionals, including mortgage brokers, financial planners, SMSF advisers and accountants writing mortgages, as well as financial services businesses considering business expansion into this sector.

As Australia’s only dedicated mortgage industry title focused on the converging financial services sector, this new digital resource delivers valuable market insights to the most prolific mortgage brokers, advisers and planners and accountants operating in the third party channel. 

As well as delivering news impacting the third party distribution sector and interpretation of key market trends, Broker Daily features analysis on Australian and international mortgage origination – including mortgage innovation, funding issues and analysis, lending trends and the economic and demographic factors influencing the flow of mortgage lending. It also offers valuable market insights at a macro level to those involved in the mortgage lending industry.

Name: Qaziniafrica
Description:
In a world where media coverage often perpetuates negative stereotypes about Africa, Qazini emerges as a beacon of change. Unlike the conventional narrative that focuses on challenges, our platform seeks to showcase the African continent's success, opportunities, and vibrancy.

International and even African media frequently overlook the positive stories, regular voices, and diverse perspectives that paint a fuller picture of Africa. Qazini is the antidote to this one-dimensional storytelling, offering an entry point for global audiences to explore emerging perspectives on the continent.

More than just countering disempowering narratives, we use storytelling as a powerful tool to foster connections, drive change, and leave a meaningful legacy. Qazini is dedicated to challenging simplistic and sensationalist portrayals, highlighting the richness and complexity of African experiences.

Our mission is clear: to drive systemic change in societies by consciously, purposefully, and relentlessly championing narratives that empower the continent of Africa and its people. Join us on a journey to discover the untold stories, celebrate successes, and contribute to reshaping the narrative about Africa. We invite you to be part of a movement that values the diverse voices and perspectives that make Africa truly extraordinary.

Name: Block Club Chicago
Description:
Block Club Chicago was created by former DNAinfo Chicago editors following the shutdown of DNAinfo and Gothamist in November of 2017. After hearing from people all over the city about how much they missed our truly local coverage, we knew we had to get back to work.

Thanks to more than 3,000 Kickstarter backers and generous support from Civil, we were able to recruit a dedicated team of reporters ready to hit the streets. Our focus remains on telling stories that matter in the neighborhoods, and growing our coverage sustainably through reader and donor support.

We decided to call ourselves the Block Club because we felt it reflected our mission: to build community through truly ground-level reporting of the city’s neighborhoods.

One of our journalistic roles is to publish articles, op-eds and series examining current health concerns and providing evidence-informed contributions to public debates and policy development. A rotating group of editors publishes regular articles at the website - www.croakey.org.

Our revenue is sourced via a number of options including services such as:
Croakey Conference News Service: comprehensive, independent journalistic reporting from health and medical events and conferences of public interest merit.
#CroakeyGO:  an innovation in journalism that provides a media platform for communities who share a common goal, concern, or geographic region, to walk and talk with senior journalists and content experts and broadcast and publish interviews, stories, discussions and multi-media content that are focused on solutions.

We also provide Professional Services including

Description:
That's Farming Media are the leaders in online, video, and social media interaction along with developing and producing proven campaigns for our clients in the Agri Sector. 

That’s Farming offers a unique way for businesses supplying the Agri-Sector to advertise.

We can do this through quality branded content in the form of editorials, competitions, and video branding 

We can help you tell your brands story in a unique and relatable way

Have you a story to tell?
Have you a new product?
Are you selling to the Irish market?
Are you looking for imaginative ways to sell you product? 

Then you need to talk to us! 
We offer the most affordable way for companies to advertise their products online through the power of video.
Just ask our clients! They will confirm! 

That's Farming is Ireland's largest all in one farming portal. It comprises of a network of News, Properties, Videos, Funny Articles and soon to be published Classifieds, all targeted at Ireland's farming community. Since it's launch in Summer 2015, it has amassed over 62,000 Facebook followers, and a hit rate which is growing massively on a monthly basis.

That's Farming is built completely from scratch, based on a Pinterest style grid layout. A user's login gives them access to all modules on the site, across news, properties and all future additions. Auctioneers and Journalists have elevated permissions, which allow them to publish properties / news articles. The site is closely integrated with Social Media, with users encouraged to sign up using their Facebook and Twitter accounts.

An astonishing 79% of the site's visitors are using either Mobile Phones or Tablets to access the site. While this is above the normal, it clearly demonstrates that companies who don't build their websites from Mobile up are soon going to regret their decision!

Grupa Iberion jest wydawcą Gońca – największego serwisu informacyjnego w social mediach oraz specjalistycznych portali tematycznych: Pacjenci, Biznes Info, Świat Gwiazd, Smakosze, Rolnik Info i Turyści. 
Każda z naszych marek łączy ekspertów oraz duże zasięgi w mediach społecznościowych. Nasze materiały tworzą m.in. Janusz Schwertner (redaktor naczelny Gońca i dyrektor programowy Iberionu), Radosław Gruca, Andrzej Sołtysik, Mateusz Szymkowiak, Karol Nowakowski, Daniel Arciszewski, Eryk Błaszak i Mikołaj Dowejko.

Iberion finansuje swoją działalność z kapitału własnego. Udziałowcami w spółce są wyłącznie członkowie jej zarządu: prezes Albert Wójcik; wiceprezesi – Maksymilian Tomanek i Jan Kruś; oraz Michał Chabas.
Kładziemy nacisk na samodzielność i kreatywność. Non stop poszukujemy twórców operujących zarówno słowem jak i obrazem. 

Wierzymy, że przyszłością mediów jest budowanie społeczności poprzez dostarczanie angażujących treści, głównie w formie video.

Mutimedialność to nasze DNA!

Name: Publico.bo
Description:
MANIFIESTO PUBLICO.BO 

Publico.bo es un espacio de libertad, libertad de pensamiento, libertad de información, libertad de opinión.
No somos neutrales. Estamos profundamente comprometidos con los principios, ideas y valores que sustentan una sociedad abierta, libre y prospera.
Desde este espacio defenderemos las libertades de todos los bolivianos y su derecho a vivir en una democracia plena y a progresar con una economía moderna, integrada al mundo, que genere oportunidades para todos sus habitantes.
Nacemos como un medio digital y desde esta nueva época en la cual las tecnologías de la información y la comunicación marcan profundas y permanentes transformaciones, trabajaremos por la modernización de Bolivia, enriqueciendo el debate público y fomentando el intercambio de ideas.  
Queremos ser un espacio de información y no de noticias. Información con análisis, información con opiniones, información con impacto para nuestras vidas.
Por ello nos concentraremos en todos aquellos temas que determinan nuestra calidad de vida, obviamente la política pero también la economía, el emprendimiento, la tecnología, la innovación, aquellos problemas que aún no logramos resolver en nuestro país, en pleno siglo XXI, como la salud, la educación, la seguridad.
Discutiremos los problemas de nuestra vida cada vez más urbanas y los desafíos de las ciudades para generar calidad de vida. También conversaremos sobre las tendencias de nuestra vida en sociedad.
Eso es Publico.bo, el espacio donde hablaremos de los temas que nos interesan para vivir mejor.

Name: Spacestation
Description:
Shaun McBride (aka Shonduras) is a former Forbes 30 under 30 honoree who took his fame on Snapchat and turned it into a series of companies launched from The Spacestation.  In 2015 Shaun built the breakout YouTube channel “Best Day Ever”. As that channel started taking off, Shonduras saw the opportunity to build something bigger than himself. Enter his friend Sean Holladay (aka Holladay) at the beginning of 2017. The combination of Holladay’s business savvy and Shonduras’ creative genius enabled the partners to build Spacestation Integrations and Spacestation Gaming. Both of these companies are rocket ships in their own markets and the Spacestation now employs teams focused on each company.

Since 2018 the duo launched a new YouTube channel, A for Adley, starring Shonduras’ 4-year-old daughter. With over 1.7 millions subscribers and nearly 1.5 billion views, it’s obvious that creativity runs in the family. And if all of this wasn’t enough, the founders invested in and help run Vidsummit, a top video creator conference. 

The Spacestation is an incredible place to work and Utah is an ideal place to live (sorry for the disappointment, this Spacestation is not orbiting the earth…yet). Shonduras and Holladay are pumped about the progress but admit, “we’re just getting started!”
