Name: Factcheck Bulgaria
Description:
Factcheck.bg е инициатива на Асоциацията на европейските журналисти-България.

Целта на екипа е да подпомогне усилията на журналистите да предоставят проверена и надеждна информация като се ангажира с проверка на фактите в актуални новини, изказвания и публикации в социалните медии.
Избираме твърденията, които да проверим, според тяхната актуалност и обществената значимост на темата или на източника. Наблюдаваме тенденциите в социалните медии, за да опровергаваме своевременно и с факти разпространяващата се дезинформация по важни обществени теми.
Спазваме първото и основно правило в журналистиката – проверяваме фактите, проследяваме информацията, търсим източника и неговите мотиви.

Силата на дезинформацията е в количествата лъжи, с които ни залива. Силата на утвърдените медии е в качествената журналистика, основана на проверката на фактите.

Name: YoungMD Connect
Description:
From the creators of MillennialEYE and Eyetube, YoungMD Connect is a platform to connect aspiring and young ophthalmologists with their peers and mentors. Supporting the next generation of ophthalmologists isn’t new for BMC Vision. Since the 2013 launch of MillennialEYE—a digital publication and online community designed exclusively for young ophthalmologists—BMC has invested in educating and connecting the future leaders in our field. Now, we’ve taken our support to the next level with YoungMD Connect.

During the COVID-19 pandemic, the team behind YoungMD Connect dug deeper to understand the pain points for trainees and new-to-practice ophthalmologists. The findings were clear: mentorship and educational opportunities were lacking. From these needs, YoungMD Connect was born.

Our team is passionate about supporting the next generation of eye care leaders. We come from a background of publishing, science, communications, and entrepreneurship. Between us, we’ve done everything from managing clinical trials and patents in eye care, to supporting emerging leaders on their path to the podium, to industry news reporting, to leveraging social media to provide solutions in niche markets. We know that, ultimately, your goal is to deliver the best patient care—YoungMD Connect provides the tools for you to make sure you end up where you want to be.

Name: Gramophone Podcast
Description:
Somos uma das principais produtoras e estúdios de podcast do Brasil. Com sede em São Paulo e mais de cinco anos de atuação, transformamos ideias em narrativas que inspiram, conectam e posicionam marcas como referência em seus segmentos.

Combinamos excelência técnica, inovação e atendimento personalizado, porque acreditamos que cada história merece ser contada de forma única.

Em nossa trajetória, já produzimos mais de 3.900 vídeos e 7.300 horas de conteúdo, alcançando milhões de pessoas em diversas plataformas: mais de 10 milhões de visualizações no Instagram, 3,8 milhões no YouTube, 3,2 milhões no Spotify e 2 milhões no TikTok, ultrapassando a marca de 19 milhões de visualizações e streams no total.

Somos filiados à ABPOD (Associação Brasileira de Podcasters), embaixadores do Prêmio MPB e parte da Podcast Experience, o maior evento de podcasts do Brasil. Essas parcerias reforçam nosso compromisso com a profissionalização, a inovação e o crescimento do mercado audiovisual no país.

Se você quer tirar sua ideia do papel e transformar sua voz em um projeto de impacto, fale com a gente!

Name: The Santiago Times
Description:
The Santiago Times is an independent news source focused exclusively on Chilean current events. Our mission is to make the country more accessible to the international community by providing balanced, comprehensive news coverage in English.

Founded in 1991, The Santiago Times has been working toward this goal for over two decades and we pride ourselves on the range and depth of our coverage — in our news analysis, we aim to make complex developments clear to everyone, not just insiders.

Our news team is made up of committed young journalists from Chile and across the globe. Our readership is diverse: from professionals in the international business and political community to Chileans looking for a different perspective on local news.

For more than 20 years, The Santiago Times has established a reputation for high-quality reporting with an emphasis on politics, human rights, and sports. Journalists enjoy freedom to pursue long-term, investigative pieces, and many former employees have gone on to careers in major international media organizations, including The New York Times and Reuters.

Name: AVIONEWS - World Aeronautical Press Agency
Description:
Dal 2000 la nostra redazione produce ogni giorno notizie, approfondimenti e servizi televisivi riguardanti trasporto aereo, elicotteri, aeroporti, difesa, sicurezza e spazio, sia nella versione in italiano che in quella inglese, classificandole in oltre trenta categorie per una copertura a 360° dei comparti aerospaziale, civile, della difesa e dell’industria. In questi anni Avionews ha conquistato autorevolezza, ed ottenuto l’apprezzamento di aziende aerospaziali, enti, società di gestione aeroportuale e della stessa stampa non specializzata.

Curiamo altresì la produzione e la diffusione di contenuti multimediali, anche legati a servizi istituzionali, per conto di società terze ed enti prestigiosi quali ENAC, ENAV, ANSV, AIRBUS, ALITALIA, AGUSTAWESTLAND, PIAGGIO AEROSPACE, ASSOCLEARANCE, SEA AEROPORTI MILANO, AIRBUS HELICOPTERS, AIRGEST, MERIDIANA, URBEAERO e IDS.

Chi decide di fare affidamento sui servizi informativi offerti da AVIONEWS, lo fa in considerazione della specificità delle tematiche trattate, con evidenti vantaggi in termini di costi/efficacia. Ricorrere ad una qualsiasi agenzia di stampa non specializzata per ottenere le stesse informazioni significa affrontare costi estremamente più elevati, essere costretti a filtrare le notizie di interesse separandole da quelle concernenti tutti i restanti settori con evidente perdita di tempo e praticità di impiego. E significa rinunciare ad una descrizione e ad un’analisi dei fatti o delle notizie fortemente basata su criteri di competenza tecnica, e perciò precisa e affidabile.

Il tutto riportato in maniera assolutamente neutrale e al di sopra delle parti. Ma in modo chiaro e comprensibile, per far sì che chi legge, sia questo semplice spettatore o protagonista del settore, possa trarre le sue conclusioni, o riflettere su quanto accade nel mondo dell’aviazione e della difesa, in quanto AVIONEWS è libera da ogni preconcetto politico o industriale. AVIONEWS è un’agenzia per sua natura in continua evoluzione, essendo basata su di un concept che la rende aperta e sempre aggiornata, in grado dunque di rispondere appieno alle nuove esigenze dei suoi lettori.

Name: LaCom Magazine for YoungPreneurs
Description:
تم تأسيس مجلة "لَكُم للرواد الشباب" في بداية العام 2021، حيث تتكون المجلة الشقيقة من مجلة الشرق الأوسط للأعمال - Middle East Business Magazine، وهي مجلة شبابية موجهة إلى أصحاب الأعمال الشباب / رواد الأعمال / الشركات الناشئة / والشباب المهتمين بعالم الأعمال، وكذلك الشباب الموظفين والعاملين في القطاع الخاص وغيره.
تهدف المجلة إلى نشر مقالات ومواضيع مختصة بعالم الأعمال التي تهم الجيل الشاب على وجه الخصوص عن طريق نشر موضوعات تساعد الشباب والشابات على إدارة أعمالهم والعمل بوظائفهم بطرق ذكية وعلى سبيل المثال مواضيع تساعد الشباب على توفير ما يتقاضونه من مال، مع تسليط الضوء على رواد الأعمال الشباب الناجحين والحديث عنهم وعن انجازاتهم بمقالات مختصة لتشجيع الشبان والشابات الآخرين والأخريات للاقتداء بهم وتشجيعهم على الاستمرار بالإبداع والابتكار. كما سيصاحب المجلة الرقمية أدوات ومواقع التواصل الاجتماعي لنشر رسالة المجلة ومقالاتها ومحتواها، إن المحتوى التي تقدمه مجلة "لَكُم للرواد الشباب" هو محتوى هادف ومسلي وممتع في الوقت ذاته مشابه لروح الشباب القارئ والمتابع للمجلة الرقمية. 

LaCom Magazine is a descendant of Middle East Business Magazine, and is aimed at young business owners/entrepreneurs/startups/young people interested in the business world.  
The magazine aims to educate and connect with the younger generation in the business world, while shedding light on successful young entrepreneurs and educated individuals to thrive in society. The content revolves around interesting news in the Middle East market in general and Palestine in particular, through articles and educational information that help young people to expand their knowledge and gain a new perspective on business.

Name: Termometro Politico
Description:
Termometro Politico è un progetto di informazione dedicato all'analisi e al commento di sondaggi, risultati elettorali e dell'attualità politica italiana e internazionale.

Il gruppo che sta dietro a TP è formato da giovani da tutta Italia e può contare su un'esperienza consolidata nel campo delle proiezioni elettorali, realizzate sul voto amminsitrativo (comunali di Torino, Roma e Vicenza; regionali di Abruzzo e Sardegna), e dei sondaggi online sulle intenzioni di voto con sistema CAWI, per i quali collabora con Affaritaliani e La Stampa.

Nel nostro sito, che punta a diventare un nuovo punto di riferimento sulle elezioni e la politica italiana, ha grande spazio anche l'interattività, con una community aperta in cui gli utenti possono comunicare con messaggi, gruppi, immagini, un forum e una sezione di blog dedicata.

Abbiamo seguito da vicino le Elezioni Europee e Amministrative e le Primarie del Partito Demcoratico del 2009, con sondaggi pre-elettorali, instant poll e proiezioni.

Name: Sorbonne Doctoral Law Review-Revue Doctorale de droit de La Sorbonne
Description:
La Sorbonne Student Law Review est une revue universitaire créée en 2017 par des doctorants, enseignants et étudiants de l'Université Panthéon-Sorbonne, en partenariat avec l'École de droit de la Sorbonne.

Cette revue veut offrir aux auteur.e.s anglophones et francophones l'opportunité d'être publiés, qu'ils soient expérimentés ou non.

 
La revue veut encourager les analyses originales par une politique éditoriale souple. Quand bien même un article serait plus en lien avec l'économie, la philosophie, l'histoire, les sciences politiques, etc., notre comité éditorial peut sérieusement le considérer pour publication dès lors qu'il participe à la pensée juridique. Outre nos activités éditoriales, la revue organise des conférences et des séminaires afin de créer un forum où tous peuvent se rencontrer, indépendamment de leurs spécialités et qualités. 

 
Si vous souhaitez rejoindre les équipes de la revue, n'hésitez pas à nous contacter.

Name: BikerKaz
Description:
As a female biker I like to bring a slightly different perspective to motorcycling. I like to keep my writing not only factual but with a small element of fun and humour. I have a friendly and outgoing personality.

I have been riding for a number of years and my personal motorcycles have ranged from my current Kawasaki Z900, CB1000R and Yamaha R6 to a classic Yamaha RD200 two stroke but I have also owned an MV Agusta Brutale and a Honda Hornet.

I have my own website where I write articles on a number of motorcycle related topics ranging from bike reviews to trips both in the UK and abroad to interviews and kit reviews. 

I have had a number of bikes from Triumph Motorcycles, Kawasaki and Aprilia on long term test and in the coming weeks I have an Energica electric motorcycle and a Harley Davidson Sportster S coming too. 

I use my social media platforms to post pictures and comments about the bikes giving a wide exposure and I write a review on the bike itself for my website and produce a video walk round of each bike for my YouTube channel. 

I am Editor of CrewOnTwo for ThePitCrewOnline covering two wheeled motorsport.

I am a regular contributor in MotoGusto magazine where my articles feature. This is a monthly national publication.

I write articles for Bike Stop which is a motorcycle clothing shop writing about products and events. 

I am a member of the British Association of Journalists.

Name: Artwave.it
Description:
Artwave è un progetto editoriale indipendente che nasce nell’aprile del 2016 dalla passione di alcuni ragazzi per l’arte in tutte le sue forme e declinazioni diverse.
Artwave è oggi una testata online di approfondimento artistico e culturale, letto e seguito in tutta Italia e all’estero, nonché un’agenzia creativa e di eventi che si occupa della promozione dei talenti emergenti.

Assieme a diversi partner prestigiosi abbiamo sviluppato progetti, eventi, talk, mostre e corsi di formazione rivolti principalmente ad un target giovane e motivato. Il destinatario privilegiato delle nostre attività sono infatti le nuove generazioni. Per coinvolgere al massimo questo tipo di pubblico adottiamo uno stile e una linea editoriale il più possibile diretta e trasparente, sfruttando al meglio gli strumenti e le potenzialità dei social network, così da coinvolgere in prima persona i giovani nelle iniziative e nei contenuti da noi promossi.

La nostra è una missione di carattere culturale che si pone come obiettivo principale quello di risvegliare le coscienze addormentate, informare e sensibilizzare il pubblico sulle criticità, i limiti e le sfide che sta attraverso il settore artistico-culturale, e sostenere e difendere le bellezze del nostro patrimonio e le eccellenze creative italiane.

Tuffatevi nell'arte, tuffatevi nel nostro mondo.

Seguite l'onda anche sui social: Facebook, Instagram,Twitter e YouTube

Facebook: @artwave.it (https://www.facebook.com/artwave.it/)

Instagram: @artwave_it (https://instagram.com/artwave_it)

MOBILSERVICE INFORMIERT AKTUELL
• Der monatliche Newsletter orientiert kostenlos und zeitsparend über die wichtigsten Neuigkeiten aus der Mobilitätswelt.
• In News Dossiers ist das Wissenswerte über aktuelle Themen und Entwicklungen zusammengestellt.
• Die Agenda schafft Überblick über Tagungstermine und Weiterbildungsveranstaltungen.

MOBILSERVICE VERMITTELT WISSEN
• In regelmässigen Mobilservice-Webinaren präsentieren und diskutieren Fachleute aktuelle Mobilitätsthemen.
• Die Praxis Beispiele bieten Umsetzungshilfen für konkrete Massnahmen in Gemeinden und Unternehmen.
• Die Beispiele für Mobilitätsmanagement zeigen Erfahrungen zur Förderung einer effizienten Mobilität bei Unternehmen auf.
• Die praktische Recherchefunktion ermöglicht gezieltes Suchen in der Wissensdatenbank.

MOBILSERVICE VERNETZT AKTEURE
• Als Träger und Partner tauschen sich Bund, Kantone, Städte, Unternehmen und Experten zur nachhaltigen Mobilität aus.
• Für individuelle Beratungen werden Profis im Mobilitätsmarkt vermittelt.
• Partner stellen ihre neuen Produkte und Mobilitätsdienstleistungen vor und tragen zum vielseitigen Know-how-Pool von Mobilservice bei

Werden auch Sie Partner von Mobilservice und profitieren Sie von unserer Plattform.

Name: Femme d'Influence
Description:
Créé le 8 mars 2015 par Sarah Yakan, FEMME D’INFLUENCE est le 1er site féminin d’empowerment et de développement personnel en France. Avec déjà plus de 2,5 million d’abonnées, il est l’un des principaux lieux de débats et de divertissement des jeunes femmes connectées.

Le but est de pousser les femmes à devenir qui elles veulent être en couvrant tous les domaines de leur vie — lifestyle, carrière, amour, apparence.

Toujours dans une relation engageante, FI motive 7/7 ses lectrices avec des citations, des vidéos et des articles partout où elles sont — Facebook, Instagram, Twitter et sur son Site Internet de 5 millions de pages visitées/mois.

En 5 ans, FI est devenu l’un des médias les plus influents chez les femmes de 18 à 34 ans.

Name: Momentum Media
Description:
Momentum Media is driven to creating Australia’s most influential media and professional development business across the markets we operate in.

With a reach spanning over a million professionals, high-net-worth individuals and SME business owners, we’re connected to the rapidly changing preferences and attitudes of our communities – and we’re making a positive contribution for them to thrive.

Momentum Media’s suite of brands help shape the direction of corporate Australia through delivering market intelligence, news, insights, leadership and knowledge across key market segments – ensuring organisations and individuals are better informed.

Whether it’s defence, national security and space through to mortgages, financial advice, legal or accounting, our aim is to be peerless and to excel in all facets of our business.

This vision empowers Momentum to set the standard that other media businesses admire and seek to emulate.  

And there’s a good reason why Momentum remains one of the fastest growing media businesses in Australia: we do media our way. 

We’re a trailblazing business that relishes challenge, change and opportunity. We’re not shackled to any form of communication and are driven by delivering essential content and intelligence to our audiences via the channels that they choose. 

This ranges from digital and mobile news and market intelligence, conferences and events, bench-marking, research and analysis through to broadcast, print, podcast, social and awards.

We move forward with purpose and the belief that every activity that we engage in will be an evolution of our proposition and of significance to our target audiences. 

This is how we earn the trust and loyalty from our communities. And for over a decade it’s how we have set the standard that leads us in the integrity of what we deliver. 

While the way we engage our audiences continually evolves, our philosophy remains the same: challenge everything, fear nothing and drive forward with purpose.

Name: Une Cession Presque Parfaite
Description:
Disponible sur Spotify, Apple Podcasts, Deezer etc. 
Dans ce podcast, intitulé Une Cession Presque Parfaite : Dans les coulisses de la transmission d’entreprise, je traiterai de tous les sujets liés à l’univers de la cession d’entreprise.

Ce sera LE rendez-vous de tous les acteurs du M&A : Dirigeants d’entreprises, fonds d’investissements, avocats d’affaires etc.

Seront interviewés :

 Des dirigeants qui ont vendu leur entreprise : Connaître leur parcours, leur entreprise, les raisons de cession, les réussites et les échecs, les conseils qu’ils peuvent donner aux dirigeants qui veulent vendre etc.

 Des dirigeants qui ont levé des fonds : A quel moment ont-ils eu besoin de lever des fonds, pourquoi ? Ce qu’ils ont fait avec, le résultat post levée, les conseils quand on veut lever des fonds, les réussites / échecs etc.

 Des avocats d’affaires : connaitre leur parcours, les opérations qui ont été marquantes, les points importants dans une opération de M&A, les conseils pour les dirigeants qui veulent vendre / lever des fonds.

 Des fonds d’investissements : Les grosses opérations, conseils, les points d’attention, ce qu’ils regardent en priorité etc.

L’idée de ce podcast est de démystifier l’univers du M&A, de le rendre accessible et de permettre à tout dirigeant souhaitant vendre leur entreprise ou lever des fonds d’avoir les clés de réussite pour de telles opérations.

Name: Club de Fundraising
Description:
Club de Fundraising
Es un club de colegas apasionados por lo que hacemos, unidos por nuestras ganas de mejorar el mundo desde la solidaridad; y es una comunidad digital desde la que buscamos compartir contenidos relevantes sobre el fundraising en español.

Nos inspiramos en múltiples medios en otros idiomas, pero queremos darles un acento local, latino, en español dando espacio a colaboradores con diversas miradas para activar la solidaridad y el cambio social.

Entendemos que nos unen muchas más cosas que las que nos separan, empezando por el idioma. Pero sabemos que eso que tenemos en común es mucho más que el español: son las realidades de nuestros países, las necesidades de nuestras organizaciones, la escasez de profesionales calificados en los temas que necesitamos, la falta de estadísticas y datos ciertos sobre nuestra actividad, y sobre todo… las ganas de mejorar el mundo desde el lugar adonde estamos.

Así que este es tu espacio también, y esperamos que lo sientas así. No dejes de comentar, opinar, consultar, y por supuesto, aportar.
Location: Buenos Aires, City of Buenos Aires

Name: Byrdie
Description:
We started Byrdie back in 2013 because, like you, we’re pretty obsessed with beauty and style, whether it's testing a new serum for hyperpigmentation, tracking down the best size-inclusive workleisure, or dissecting the real history of cornrows. Our team of award-winning writers and editors have worked for the biggest publishing houses and beauty companies in the business, including Hearst, Condé Nast, Meredith, and L’Oréal, and are committed to creating an inclusive space that lifts up diverse voices and celebrates the unique beauty found in each of us. Over the years, we’ve become one of the largest beauty sites on the internet, reaching over nine million readers a month, according to ComScore, with our library of more than 10,000 pieces of content—and it’s not all lipstick testing and brow grooming.

At Byrdie, our mission is simple: to celebrate individuality and empower our readers to find confidence, community, and joy through beauty and style. Our hair, our facial features, our bodies: They can reflect culture, sexuality, race, even politics. We believe when it comes to our beauty coverage—from how beauty products are chosen for review to why we write the things we do—the more transparency, the better. That’s why we feel it’s important to share exactly how we go about doing what we do: from how we create our content to who’s behind it and more.

So click around. Stay awhile. We hope to make you feel inspired, joyful, comfortable, and confident.

Name: The Laundry
Description:

Name: Blog da Engenharia
Description:
O Blog da Engenharia foi lançado em sua primeira versão no ano de 2011, a partir da árdua vontade de Eduardo Cavalcanti, seu fundador, em compartilhar conhecimentos, dificuldades e situações do dia-a-dia de quem estuda e atua na área. 

Com o passar do tempo, o site cresceu e ampliou seu foco para tudo o que diz respeito ao universo da engenharia, incluindo tecnologia, mercado de trabalho e empreendedorismo.

Entre os anos de 2012 e 2019, o Blog da Engenharia se consagrou como referência entre os estudantes e engenheiros como fonte de informações e conteúdos relevantes, buscando abordar os assuntos sempre com uma linguagem fácil e sem complicações.

Durante o último semestre de 2019, o site passou por completa reformulação de layout, conteúdo e programação editorial. Hoje, o Blog da Engenharia é um dos produtos gerenciados pelo bisnis HUB, com escritório físico no interior de São Paulo e que atua como um HUB de negócios, com presença nos meios online e offline – que também assina o Engenharia Depressão, a maior plataforma de humor focado na área, o Blog da Arquitetura, dentre alguns outros produtos que estão em fase de pré-lançamento.

Name: Directivos y Empresas
Description:
Revista Directivos y Empresas, la revista de las personas que deciden.

Directivos y Empresas es una revista mensual, presente en el mercado español desde hace más de 15 años. Desde sus inicios hasta la actualidad, ha tratado las principales tendencias económicas y empresariales con las voces más refutadas del panorama español. 

Reportajes, entrevistas a directivos y tribunas de analistas conforman los principales formatos de la publicación, con tratamiento especial a sectores clave como el energético, la Responsabilidad Social, las TIC o el entorno laboral, entre otros.
 
Sección fija es nuestra elección sobre hombres y mujeres récord, es decir, aquellos directivos que por su trayectoria merecen un especial tratamiento informativo a través de nuestras páginas.
 
Disponible también en formato digital, la publicación recoge además la opinión de expertos de la talla del ex Ministro de Trabajo Manuel Pimentel; el economista Juan Velarde, Jorge Sanz, consejero delegado de AtlCapital; Daniel Rodríguez Asensio, así como profesores de las mejores escuelas de negocios españolas, tales como IESE, ESADE, EAE o IE Business School.
 
Por todo ello, Directivos y Empresas está presente en las mesas de los grandes directivos de España, siendo una referencia del conocimiento empresarial para cualquier sector. 

No obstante, además de la gran empresa, su impacto también alcanza a la pequeña y mediana organización, con especial atención a las startups, amén de la transformación digital que está viviendo la economía en general. No en vano, es frecuente que la aparición de expertos y líderes digitales para explicar los últimos avances de las nuevas tecnologías.
 
También son asiduas las noticias y entrevista a profesionales de la salud y la prevención de riesgos laborales, dos campos muy unidos que a fin de cuentas son básicos para el rendimiento económico de un país.
 
Le invitamos a descargarse un número de nuestra revista!

الشبكة مبادرة مسؤولة مجتمعياً تملكها مجموعة نايا للتميز ذ.م.م. بصفتها شركة وطنية خاصة محدودة المسؤولية مسجلة رسمياً في هيئة المنطقة الإعلامية الحرة بابوظبي (twofour54) برقم B.L.195، تاريخ 21 يونيو 2012

عـهـدنـا:
يعمل فريق “بيئة ابوظبي” على تعزيز الهوية الإعلامية والمحتوى المعرفي باللغة العربية على الشبكة العنكبوتية انطلاقاً من موقع المسؤولية المجتمعية والوطنية اتجاه المحيط الحيوي الذي نعيش به بهدف توطين المعرفة المسؤولة وبناء مجتمع مستدام. كما تساهم الشبكة في نشر ثقافة الريادة والتميز المؤسسي والمسؤولية المجتمعية والاستدامة والتطبيقات الخضراء عبر تقديم أفضل الممارسات للنمو والارتقاء وجودة الحياة، وفاءً وانتماءً لدولة الإمارات العربية المتحدة، وعداً وعهداً.
كما تعرب إدارة الشبكة التزامها بكافة الأنظمة والقوانين واللوائح النافذة لعمل هيئة المنطقة الإعلامية الحرة بابوظبي والمجلس الوطني للإعلام بدولة الإمارات العربية المتحدة، مع التأكيد على احترام عقل القارئ العربي ضمن رؤية استراتيجية مسؤولة.

رؤيتنا: توطين المعرفة المسؤولة باللغة الأم وبناء مجتمع مستدام.
رسالتنا: تمكين الإنسان والمجتمع بالمعرفة.
قيمنا: مسؤولية، شراكة، تميز، استدامة.
شعارنا: كلنا شركاء في المسؤولية والبناء.
تاريخنا: تأسست الشبكة بتاريخ 27 أبريل 2011

هاشتاقات خاصة بشبكة بيئة أبوظبي:
#كلنا_شركاء_بالمسؤولية #كلنا_شركاء_بالمسؤولية_والبناء #شركاء_بالمسؤولية #كلنا_شركاء_بالمعرفة #شركاء_بالمعرفة #شركاء_بالوطن #شركاء_بالكوكب #شركاء_بالمجتمع
#السلوك_المسؤول_يساوي_نجاح_مستدام #توطين_المعرفة_المسؤولة_باللغة_الأم #شبكة_بيئة_أبوظبي #بيئة_أبوظبي

شركاؤنا:
حازت الشبكة على ثقة كبرى المؤسسات والشركات من القطاعين الحكومي والخاص على مستوى دولة الإمارات والمنطقة العربية، حيث وقعت عدد كبير من اتفاقيات التعاون الاستراتيجي والشراكة الاعلامية مع وزارة البيئة والمياه بالإمارات وجامعة ابوظبي ومهرجان الإمارات الأخضر، واسبوع ابوظبي للاستدامة (مصدر) ومعرض ابوظبي لطاقة المستقبل، ومهرجان سلطان بن زايد للتراث، ونادي تراث الإمارات، ومؤتمر المسؤولي

HUMM Studios is a media company. We create engaging long and short-form digital content through culinary storytelling tailored for the Arabic-speaking world.

Powered by passionate and diverse creatives, we've created thousands of pieces of content — from recipe videos, tutorials, shows, podcasts, viral vox-pops, styled photoshoots, advertising & campaign-based content, courses and educational content, and video content — all created in our in-house studios since 2018, with a track record of over 400 million collective views.

We reach out to nearly 2 million followers and subscribers through our creative content, all centered around food, published across platforms, to reach our (and your!) audience.

Name: Cantinho em Prosa - Podcast
Description: O Cantinho em Prosa é o Podcast do Cantinho Fraterno de São Carlos-SP. A atração será exibida semanalmente, ao vivo, todas às quintas-feiras com a apresentação de Luiz Alberto Botega, atual Presidente do lar, e Junior Mcfly, Locutor de Rádio, que atuou em emissoras como a Jovem Pan Fm, Rádio Realidade AM, Rádio Universitária FM e apresentador da série de Lives do Cantinho, ocorridas nos anos de 2020 e 2021. Os temas abordados terão como foco a saúde, tanto no aspecto físico quanto emocional e financeira, com convidados especialistas nessas diversas áreas, além de temas políticos no âmbito das leis e projetos que beneficiem a população idosa e infantil.

Name: BloomingYou
Description:
BloomingYou est un site holistique et d’auto-coaching pour répondre aux questions dédiées au mieux-être du corps et de l’esprit.
Notre ambition est de partager avec nos lecteurs des savoirs ayant un impact positif sur l’Homme et le vivant.
Comment cela se matérialise concrètement ?
Nous proposons chaque semaine du contenu pour nourrir une vision holistique de l’être humain à travers nos différentes rubriques que sont le : savoirs-être, la parentalité positive, le bien-être au travail, la santé, l'alimentation et aussi tout ce qui a trait aux vivre-ensemble et à la société.
Notre parti pris est d’aller à la rencontre de savoirs oubliés, de connaissances utiles et hétéroclites (tant scientifique, philosophique, psychologique, spirituelle, socio-économique, et culturelle...).
Vous l’aurez compris, BloomingYou est un media très curieux !
Cette curiosité et notre profondeur dans le traitement de l’info fait de nous aujourd’hui l’un des sites les plus référencés sur les questions de ce qui constitue une vie bonne et heureuse.
Nous sommes reconnaissants de l’intérêt toujours plus grand que vous portez à notre travail.
Grâce à vous, BloomingYou est un média libre, curieux et heureux!

Name: Root of Science Media
Description:
Root of Science Media is a digital platform dedicated to amplifying African voices in STEM through engaging, accessible, and impactful science communication.

What began as a podcast has evolved into a full-scale media hub offering:
	•	Podcast production & hosting
	•	Video storytelling & interviews
	•	Science-focused events & panels
	•	Newsletters & digital publications

We connect scientists, innovators, and the public to make African science visible, relatable, and globally recognised.

Name: Bedford Independent
Description:
The Bedford Independent was founded to provide the people of Bedford with a modern news desk that would give them easy access to genuine news. Our mission is to inform and inspire the people of Bedford and to do this we will work hard to bring them the news that matters to them. This may be: holding public officials to account, championing a local hero, celebrating an independent business, helping police bring a criminal to justice, or simply keeping readers informed of a breaking and ongoing news story.

The Bedford Independent is written, edited and managed by Bedfordians who understand that news is no longer something people are prepared to wait for. We will update our pages the moment a story breaks and continue to keep updating our stories as new facts and information emerges. There will no longer be any need to wait for a publication date, the news will be on your computer, your mobile, your social media news feed the same day. We won’t be swayed by rumour, our news will be investigated thoroughly and based on facts. The Bedford Independent will be a trusted news source dedicated to Bedford and a dedicated enemy of fake news and misinformation.

Our writers are from all walks of life and live and breath the areas they report upon. Our stories will be based on genuine local knowledge, our features will be full of passion for our town, our content will be exactly what Bedfordians want to read. We are not just independent in name, we will remain independent in our editorial stance too. We won’t take political sides. We promise to report the facts, and the facts alone. We believe our readers will then be able to make their own informed decision. Our advertisers and investors have no control over our editorial. All know, and understand, that if there is evidence of any wrong doing by them, we won't keep it quiet. If the news is of genuine public interest, it will be reported.

The Bedford Independent is a 21st century news desk for a 21st Century Bedford.

Name: Le Lien MULTIMÉDIA - Qui fait Quoi
Description:
Le Lien MULTIMÉDIA est le portail des professionnels du numérique. Qui fait Quoi est le portail de l'industrie de la culture et des communications. Restez informés sur votre industrie!

Le Lien MULTIMÉDIA fournit des informations stratégiques et pratiques sur l’industrie des nouveaux médias (affaires électroniques, jeux vidéo, contenus numériques en ligne et hors ligne, affichage électronique, Internet, animation...), de l’audiovisuel et des technologies de l’information. Son site Web, www.lienmultimedia.com, est actualisé en continu, grâce au travail assidu d'une équipe de reporters spécialisés sur le terrain.

Aportamos visibilidad de calidad, desarrollamos relaciones genuinas de largo plazo, generamos formación práctica y de actualidad y compartimos experiencias únicas y enriquecedoras. Todo esto, bajo un ambiente fresco, cercano y diferente.

Todos los lunes, en tu canal de podcast.

CarsIreland.ie in an online classified marketplace for the motor industry in Ireland. Our site is a must for users looking to purchase a new or used car with more motor dealers than any other platform. We specialise in providing top class websites and infrastructure to facilitate seamless online shopping and selling with a focus on excellent customer service to both consumers and traders.

Name: De Wereldwijven
Description:
Wij zijn De Wereldwijven. 

Het unieke netwerk van Nederlandstalige vrouwen, wonend in alle uithoeken van de wereld. 

We schreven allemaal vanaf het prille begin in 2013 voor Lindanieuws.nl. Via de rubriek Wereldwijven deelden we onze ervaringen in het buitenland. Wereldse verhalen over wat ons ter plekke opviel, bewoog of ontroerde. En die bijzondere en inspirerende verhalen willen we blijven vertellen! 
In 2017 kwam ons boek uit: ‘Wereldwijven, 27 portretten van grensverleggende Nederlandse vrouwen.’ De royalty's van dit boek, waarvan Lilianne Ploumen het voorwoord schreef, doneren we aan SheDecides. We doen dit omdat we dagelijks in de wereld om ons heen zien dat het hard nodig is het klimaat voor vrouwen in de wereld te verbeteren. 
Dit succes motiveerde ons om een online platform met verhalen over vrouwen en meisjes uit de hele wereld op te richten. Verhalen die geschreven en gefilmd worden door de wereldwijven. 
In 2018 lanceren we www.dewereldwijven.com. Op ons platform onderzoeken we regelmatig vrouwenthema’s. Vaak zijn onze verhalen inspirerend en motiverend: over ondernemende, avontuurlijke en sterke wereldvrouwen. Soms zijn we kritisch: over vrouwenrechten, gelijkheid en actuele kwesties. Maar we kunnen ook herkenbaar en kwetsbaar zijn: over onszelf en onze twijfels. Onze verhalen weerspiegelen in ieder geval altijd onze persoonlijke visie vanuit een bijzonder wereldwijd perspectief. 
De wereldwijven brengen eerlijke verhalen die je blik op de wereld verruimen. Hierbij laten we het ‘lawaai’ achterwege en blijven ver weg van ruis, sensatie en click-bates. Dagelijks een goed verhaal, een mooi portret en een boeiend filmpje. Want less is more. Voor ons is inhoud en diepgang van groot belang. Zo verkennen we samen met jou onze eigen leefwereld en die van de vrouwen om ons heen. Omdat we geloven dat storytelling inspireert, in beweging brengt en een verschil kan maken voor de positie van meisjes en vrouwen in de hele wereld!

Name: Planners' Place

Name: DailyWorth
Description:
DailyWorth.com is the leading financial media company for women.

Do women really need their own money advice? We think so, as do our one million-plus subscribers. Most publications about money focus on stocks and markets. Women, however, seek a more expansive take on money, which includes how it affects our careers, relationships, children and communities.

Launched in 2009 by Amanda Steinberg, DailyWorth delivers advice across all areas of finance, career and entrepreneurship via our daily email and website. 

Our goal is that all women see money not as a source of stress and anxiety, but of freedom and choices in their lives.

Name: NWX
Description: Mit der NWX (NEW WORK Experience) treibt die NEW WORK SE die Debatte über Neues Arbeiten und seine Entwicklung voran – mit der Vision einer besseren Arbeitswelt. Name: Boardroom Herald
Description:
Boardroom Herald provides a unique platform to enhance the visibility for listed companies within social media. We ensure you communicate your successes effectively, also staying relevant to the broader industry conversation your firm operates in.

We remove the requirement for you to employ a social media manager. We use machine learning to discover and automate the publishing of relevant content so you stay front of mind in your industry conversation.

The impact for your firm is clear, increased engagement with shareholders, clear differentiation from your competitors, resulting in improved visibility to retail and sophisticated investors as well as brokers, investment managers, family offices, early stage investment firms and venture capital firms.

Name: Gas Outlook

Our content is written by reputable energy and climate journalists. We are committed to producing industry-focused and neutral content that is free from bias.

Name: SumanTV
Description:
SumanTV is an online Telugu news portal platform, from the PlayEven Info Pvt Ltd., that provides the most accurate local, national and international news of various genres like politics, business, sports, science, entertainment, and technology with a single click.

In this technology-driven world, one doesn’t find time for the newspaper and look forward for user-friendly instant news updates and this platform could be the best place. People across the world can sit home and browse the instant news.

The news here is covered by the most professional and dedicated journalists who endeavor to bring home the latest news as it takes place, also making it available on various social media platforms like Facebook, Instagram, Twitter, and YouTube.

Browsing this website ensures you the best user-friendly experience throughout, thereby aiding you to get the news around the globe not only through an online website but also through a mobile application, at an ease.

Name: TV Finance
Description:
TV Finance, chaîne 100% web spécialiste des marchés financiers. Actualités, interviews et analyses vous attendent en direct du lundi au vendredi sur : https://www.tvfmedia.fr/

Name: Marktel Comunicação Inteligente - Omnichannel e Mensageria
Description:
Bem vindo à Marktel, sua parceira estratégica em soluções de mensagens inovadoras! Com mais de 19 anos de experiência, somos uma empresa de tecnologia líder, especializada em integrar canais de comunicação, desde telefonia fixa e celular até plataformas digitais, unificando redes sociais, sites corporativos e sistemas embarcados.

Ao longo de nossa trajetória, realizamos milhares de campanhas, enviando centenas de milhões de mensagens com eficiência e confiabilidade. Nosso time altamente qualificado utiliza as melhores práticas e tecnologias do mercado para garantir resultados excepcionais.

Desde nossa fundação em 2005, focamos em agregar e otimizar as tecnologias de comunicação, destacando-nos por oferecer soluções completas, de fácil operação, alta performance e confiabilidade. Estamos em constante expansão, ampliando nosso leque de serviços em mensagens inteligentes para atender às crescentes demandas do mercado. Ao longo de nossa jornada, acumulamos mais de 120 milhões de mensagens enviadas, auxiliando empresas de diversos segmentos em seus processos de comunicação, desde prospectar até fidelizar clientes.

Nossa missão é oferecer soluções de alta tecnologia com custo acessível, priorizando a qualidade e o respeito no atendimento. Junte-se a nós na Marktel e transforme suas comunicações, alcançando resultados excepcionais com inovação e eficácia!

Name: Street Fight
Description:
StreetFight follows the dynamic disruption taking place in multi-location (MULO) marketing.
We’re talking large-scale social media monitoring, reputation management, SEO, websites, and listings optimization. These dynamics have compelled their own purpose-built branch of the local commerce software ecosystem, which we call multi-location marketing.
Our brand and agency readers,  read StreetFight to stay informed on the events, innovations, and moves of their peers and competitors.

When we launched in 2009, our mission was to be an online publication that stood as an authoritative voice on hyper-local commerce. The thought at the time was, just like politics, all commerce is local. Meanwhile, a battle was brewing in tech & media circles for consumer engagement and corresponding local business marketing – a “Street Fight” if you will.
Over the years, Hyper became Multi. StreetFight’s focus and authority have shifted to the business dynamics of multi-location brands. Operating at the local level – but with national scale and brand prowess – this is an opportune, rapidly evolving, and influential segment of the local commerce ecosystem.

Description: La FM, las noticias como son

Name: The Italian Law Journal
Description:
The aim of  The Italian Law Journal is to spread the study and to promote the criticism of Italian legal culture, fostering international academic debate among scholars of different traditions, particularly with regard to private law.
The journal focuses on themes of legal theory, European law, comparative and international law, in order to reconsider the constitutional identity of Italian law and its institutions. It aims to disseminate knowledge and enhance awareness of the Italian legal heritage throughout the international community.

Name: Bahia Notícias
Description: O Bahia Noticias é o portal de notícias mais completo do estado, com foco na cobertura de política, esportes, música, cultura, justiça e saúde, entre outros fatos relevantes. Eleito como o Veículo de comunicação do ano em 2013 e Veículo Eletrônico de 2018 pelo prêmio Colunistas Norte e Nordeste.

AutoTalk is New Zealand's leading automotive industry news and information portal.

We produce a monthly magazine, and populate our website with new and views on a daily basis. Our new media offerings include videos, live stream webinars and podcasts.

Name: Fonds pour une Presse Libre
Description:
Le Fonds pour une Presse libre est une structure à but non lucratif qui défend le pluralisme de la presse, l’indépendance du journalisme, la liberté de l’information. 

Le FPL apporte son soutien aux éditeurs de presse indépendants, notamment à ceux contrôlés par leurs équipes rédactionnelles et à ceux vivant du soutien de leur lectorat pour trouver des solutions économiques viables. 

Le FPL soutient des initiatives journalistiques innovantes et 
mène des campagnes d’information ou de solidarité face à d’éventuelles menaces pesant sur la liberté de la presse ;

Il organise et finance également des rencontres, débats et échanges autour de la liberté de la presse et l’indépendance de l’information.

Name: AfrikBuzz
Description:
AfrikBuzz est un média créateur de contenus dédiés à la jeunesse africaine dans l’ère du temps.  L’objectif est de valoriser, et de promouvoir l’Afrique dans tous les secteurs d’activités. C’est aussi le rendez-vous idéal de l’info-divertissement. Nous offrons les dernières actualités ainsi que les buzz du moment.
L’équipe d’AfrikBuzz est composé de jeunes rédacteurs passionnés de l’information. À AfrikBuzz nous n’hésitons pas à traiter l’actualité avec un ton qui vous ressemble à savoir, jeune, décalé et impertinent.
Nos différentes rubriques destinées aux jeunes passionnés des cultures urbaines, d’actualités people, de politique et de nouvelles technologies, nous vous feront découvrir l’Afrique dans toute sa diversité.
Parlons de nous, Parlons d’Afrique 
AfrikBuzz.com

Name: MondoETF
Description:
MondoETF.it (formerly ETFplus.net) is the first web site in Europe dedicated to ETFs and ETPs, active since March 2002.
MondoETF is focused on the collection and processing of data on the ETFs and ETPs industry, as well as on related consultancy, training and information activities, and is a leader in financial information on Exchange Traded Funds listed in Borsa Italiana.
The rigorous data collection and processing is the basis for the annual assignment of the MondoETF Awards, an event considered the most important of the year for ETF investors in Italy. For more information: http://www.mondoetf.it

Name: Sochcast
Description:
Sochcast is a platform that aims to empower women through immersive audio experiences, providing listeners and creators a safe space to voice their thoughts, share their knowledge and experiences, and be rewarded for doing what they love. 

As a hub for hosting, redistributing, and monetizing audio content, Sochcast is the first full-stack audio suite supported by Ad-Tech. Our product offerings enable on-the-go content creation in every language, a monetization marketplace, audio libraries with social feeds for discovery, and live interactions for a gamified experience. With over 400 shows across 51 genres in 9 languages, we are poised to become the leading audio platform for content creators globally.

Name: Sports.ru
Description:
Sports.ru — наш флагманский проект с более, чем двадцатилетней историей. Это не просто главное медиа о спорте на русском языке, это технологическая платформа с десятками тысяч RPS, позволяющая пользователям читать тексты, блоги и новости, следить за матчами и участвовать в жизни комьюнити. 

Кроме сайта мы делаем мобильные приложения, шоу в YouTube и подкасты.

Мы также развиваем два новых направления: Cyber.sports.ru — наш проект про киберспорт и видеоигры, созданный игроками для игроков; «Здоровье» — медиа о здоровом образе жизни, где рассказываем о тренировках, питании, травмах и восстановлении. И это не конец!

Мы верим в то, что настоящее и будущее медиа — не только в топовой журналистике, но и в мощных пользовательских комьюнити, и умеем создавать и то, и другое.

Name: InnovaciónDigital360 - Nextwork360 Latam
Description:

El portal ofrece análisis editoriales, artículos, análisis de escenarios y estudios de casos para que los responsables de empresas y organizaciones que toman decisiones en materia digital y de TIC se pongan al día. 

InnovaciónDigital360 forma parte de Nextwork360,  la red en Hispanoamérica de revistas y medios de comunicación digitales B2B.

Name: Social Voices
Description:
Social Voices is an innovative media and development organisation that harnesses storytelling to highlight and promote transformative solutions to real-world issues, as well as advance democracy.

Emerging as a pioneer in the practice and application of solutions journalism in 2021, our newsroom participated in the Solutions Journalism Africa Initiative (SJAI), establishing us as a leading digital source for in-depth, solutions-focused coverage of gender issues, climate change, healthcare, education, and development.

Since then, we have empowered over 300 journalists across West Africa with the tools and knowledge to integrate solutions journalism principles into their reporting. We have also expanded our focus to produce and feature solutions-oriented stories that originate from and address issues within Nigeria, Malawi, Zimbabwe, and Uganda. Additionally, we have successfully nurtured a network of over 100 freelance journalists who support our work and contribute to our digital platform.

Our mission is to be the preeminent voice amplifying stories, influencing solutions, and driving collective action among communities across Nigeria and Africa through pioneering solutions-focused journalism and citizen engagement initiatives.

We envision a continent where marginalised voices shape equitable policies, grassroots solutions thrive, and informed citizens actively engage in the decision-making processes that affect their lives.

Name: LokadataID
Description:
Sejak 2015 ketika mengawali situs media Beritagar.id, secara perlahan kami mencoba membangun jurnalisme berbasis data. Sepanjang perjalanan, kami belajar dan berbenah di sana-sini. Di tengah rimba informasi yang berjejal setiap hari, pembaca artikel data menunjukkan grafik yang membaik seturut waktu.

Kami meyakini, data semakin berperan dalam pengambilan keputusan, baik di bidang bisnis, politik, atau pemerintahan. Berangkat dari keyakinan itu, mantaplah niat kami untuk melahirkan Lokadata.id, yang dulu dikenal sebagai pusat data dan merek dagang dari Beritagar.id.

Lokadata.id adalah perusahaan media dengan fokus utama pada jurnalisme data dan riset. Kami percaya pada masa depan, peran data kian penting dalam memberikan perspektif baru terhadap sebuah peristiwa atau tren. Sekaligus, memberi warna baru terhadap jurnalisme pada era yang kian menantang.

Selain artikel data kami juga menyiapkan berbagai laporan khas, termasuk hasil riset serta analisis mengenai dunia usaha, ekonomi dan politik. Semuanya disajikan tidak hanya dalam bentuk teks, tetapi juga dalam bentuk visual, yang diam maupun bergerak.

Lokadata.id secara entitas bisnis di bawah payung PT Lintas Cipta Media (LCM) yang merupakan anak perusahaan Global Digital Prima (GDP) Venture. GDP Venture adalah perusahaan investasi di bisnis konsumsi melalui internet dan aktif berinvestasi di perusahaan rintisan di Indonesia.

Name: Coastal News Today & American Shoreline Podcast Network
Description:
HISTORY

In 2007, Coastal News Today was started by two Florida coastal engineers working at Coastal Technology Corporation -- Jeff Birmingham and Walker Dawson -- as a hobby and to deliver recent and relevant news for the coastal engineering and environmental industry sectors.  The service was highly regarded within a small group of coastal engineers and other professionals.

In August 2013, CNT was sold to Philip Lonsdale, who successfully operated the news service from the Bahamas and Europe, developing it to be an indefensible resource for thousands of coastal practitioners.

The company pitch at the time said, "Whether you are a coastal engineer, environmental scientist, policy maker, marketing manager, or executive, the place to find the latest developments in the coastal engineering and environmental industry is on www.coastalnewstoday.com."

That core mission remains unchanged but we've expanded the concept to reach beyond engineering news.

THE NEW CNT and AMERICAN SHORELINE PODCAST NETWORK

In November 2017, Philip announced publication of CNT was ending as he moved to retirement and a more leisurely life.  That's when my firm, Peter A. Ravella Consulting, LLC stepped in.  We were longtime readers of CNT, going back to its founding, and it was required reading for all PARC staff.  

After an intensive investigation period, we completed the acquisition of CNT in May 2018 and we've been very busy working to make a very good news service a great news service.  We're expanding the scope of CNT and are excited to add the American Shoreline Podcast Network, which will feature more than ten coastal podcasts hosted by experts in specific economic sectors and stakeholder interests from around the American shoreline. 

The NEW, EXPANDED and IMPROVED CNT/ASPN website will relaunch in October 2018.  Podcasts on ASPN went live September 3, 2018 and can be found on our splash page,  www.coastalnewstoday.com, or wherever you get you podcasts.

Welcome back to CNT!

Name: Daily Business
Description:
Daily Business Group (DBG) is an integrated media and business services company headquartered in Scotland. DBG comprises the Daily Business news website, Daily Business Magazine and DB Media Services.

Daily Business Ltd, the registered company, was established in September 2014  and the Daily Business news website went live in November 2014.

DAILY BUSINESS NEWS AND MAGAZINE

Designed as the go-to News Website for the modern, mobile generation of readers who want their news and opinion delivered in a convenient and immediate format. It provides breaking news, opinion and interviews 7 days a week and is available via PC, laptop and mobile devices.

It focuses on a broad range of business, political, economics, sports, consumer, money, arts and lifestyle issues from a Scottish perspective.

The readership is focused in the main Scottish population centres and in London.

The rolling 30-day visitor numbers are about 25-30,000 and the number of page views about 70,000. Visitor numbers peak during the working week. 

Daily Business Magazine is an integrated co-site which was launched in April 2017 to provide extended coverage of business issues, interviews, the arts and leisure topics.

Details on advertising and other commercial opportunities are available on the Daily Business website.

DB MEDIA SERVICES

DB Media Services provides external services to companies seeking a complete editorial, branding and promotional package. It includes third party photography, media advice and media training and a CORPORATE PARTNERING service.

Corporate partnering offers companies an opportunity to publish branded editorial and image content on the Daily Business website, along with the option of advertising and a follow-on PR campaign. Unlike traditional PR, clients receive the guarantee of publication – on the Daily Business website – and exposure to thousands of quality business readers.

For 2019, Isolde Roumy and Selma Gasc have gone to Africa: for 6 months, they visited 11 countries (Morocco, Egypt, Ethiopia, Kenya, Rwanda, South Africa, Mozambique, Botswana, Gabon, Ivory Coast, Senegal) and met a hundred African women.

Name: BioSanté Éditions
Description:
BioSanté Editions est une jeune entreprise qui publie déjà - après quelques mois d'existence - des informations de santé naturelle à plus de 600 000 lecteurs du monde francophone !

L’équipe de BioSanté est composée de professionnels experts du marketing digital et de l'édition, tous passionnés de santé naturelle. 

Grâce à notre détection en continu nous sommes toujours à la pointe des meilleures méthodes et best practices marketing au niveau mondial, afin d'apporter un maximum de valeur ajoutée à nos clients.

Nous voulons aider un maximum de personnes à améliorer leur santé, sans jargon, avec des repères simples et à jour des toutes dernières recherches. Nos revues sont rédigées par les meilleurs médecins et thérapeutes dans leur domaine : aromathérapie, phythothérapie, alimentation, micronutrition, équilibre mental, etc. 

Chacun à BioSanté partage le goût pour l'aventure entrepreuneuriale, et l'envie d'apporter ses idées pour atteindre toujours plus vite nos objectifs ambitieux.

Le plus motivant est bien sûr les commentaires quotidiens de nos lecteurs, si enthousiastes pour soutenir le projet:

« J’ai l’impression de revivre en suivant vos conseils. Je souhaite que tous vos articles soient commentés dans les écoles afin que les jeunes prennent conscience que la médecine, ce n’est pas uniquement des médicaments et des analyses, mais une prise en compte à l’écoute de son corps. Merci à toute votre équipe de nous informer devant tant d’incohérences dû au profit des laboratoires pharmaceutiques. C’est sur vos poitrines qu’il faut épingler la légion d’honneur. »

« Votre équipe est composée de personnes très intégrées dans leur milieu professionnel, ce qui permet au plus grand nombre d’accéder à la science de la nature et du bon sens. »

« Merci d’être ce contre-pouvoir de cette désinformation médicale en permettant à chacun de continuer à être ou de devenir actif et proactif pour sa santé par ce type de présentation simple et claire.»

Sempre com o objetivo de fazer o seu dinheiro valer mais. Quer informações valiosas que ajudem na administração dos seus rendimentos, nas suas decisões na hora de poupar ou investir, no seu consumo consciente e na prevenção de situações desagradáveis?

Seu lugar é aqui. Nós falamos de Finanças na sua língua!

Las investigaciones de los ingenieros encausan las decisiones de los empresarios y autoridades responsables del desarrollo social y económico de las naciones. Por eso, Mundo Ingenieros asume con responsabilidad y compromiso la divulgación del conocimiento científico y la difusión del quehacer empresarial, en un contexto donde las relaciones comunitarias, el medio ambiente y las políticas públicas «conversan» bajo una mirada global y de largo plazo.

Name: Mundo das Franquias
Description:
Mais do que gerar conteúdo é a forma como iremos gerar estes conteúdos, oferecendo informação relevante aos públicos e negócios de interesse. Queremos ser um hub de negócios em franquias.

O setor de franquias é repleto de opções quando falamos em modelos de negócios, valores de investimento, lucratividade, prazo de retorno, etc. E como ser diferente em meio a tantas opções de mercado?

Para nós, é muito simples. Mostre aos investidores o que a sua marca tem como diferencial. E neste segmento, a base sólida de uma rede, com franqueados e multifranqueadossatisfeitos, pela qualidade de suporte, por produtos e serviços de primeira linha e lucratividade positiva dentro de uma margem real de ganhos, é o que mais encanta os empreendedores.

A única forma de fazer com que seu público enxergue isso é informando sobre o que e como a empresa faz.

Os consumidores B2B compram mais que produtos e serviços, eles compram o porquê das marcas fazerem o que fazem. Eles compram o sentido do projeto.

O Mundo das Franquias é um site de notícia sobre o segmento de franquias que, mais do que inserir conteúdo, irá produzir matérias positivas para as empresas que geram retorno e satisfação para seus parceiros mostrando que de fato são excelentes investimentos.

Contaremos, também com a contribuição de especialistas, inclusive dos apoiadores másters, com inserção de conteúdos baseados em know-how e experiência de mercado.

Teremos nossa produção diária de conteúdo jornalístico, dentro de nossa política editorial, onde buscaremos informações positivas relevantes para o mercado, produzindo matérias que sejam interessantes para os investidores e empreendedores.

Name: Contain Your Brain
Description:
Contain Your Brain is a simple app that will change the way you worry. 

The app is based on a science-backed strategy called, "Worry Time" that involves setting aside specific times to think about & process your worries. 

Research shows that trying to stop worrying doesn’t work, but delaying worry to a later time does! 

So when your worries are diverting your focus during the day or robbing you of sleep at night, you just park them in the app & let them go until a specific time that suits you most. 

When you are in your worry time, Contain Your Brain helps you address your worries effectively by categorising your worries as ‘solvable’, '’unsolvable’ or ‘solved’ and then suggesting tips that match the type of worry it is. 

Co-founded by Dr. Lillian Nejad, a clinical psychologist, and Brenton Cannizzaro, a digital design specialist, we are on a mission to help you spend less time worrying so you can spend more time living!

In other words, we are your digital publishing partner.

Description:
At Booming Encore, we believe that given our increasing longevity, this is transforming our lives into an opportunity to rediscover passions, explore new interests, and engage in meaningful experiences later in life that we never had before. We’re here to celebrate this vibrant phase and want to help you make the most of it!

Our Mission

Our mission is simple: to empower you to embrace your best life during this exciting stage. We recognize that each person’s journey is unique, and we’re committed to providing the resources, inspiration, and community you need to thrive. Whether you’re looking to rekindle a long-lost passion, stay fit and healthy, or learn about the latest trends in technology and longevity, Booming Encore is your place to go for information and support.

What We Offer

We cover topics that matter to you. From health and wellness information to stories of extraordinary individuals who are redefining what it means to age, we’re dedicated to sharing valuable insights that can enrich your life. Our articles, blogs, and videos aim to inspire and motivate you to take action, explore new avenues, and provide opportunities to learn.

Our contributors generously share their knowledge, experience and expertise designed to help you learn, question and create your best later life.

Our Story

Booming Encore was born out of a desire to shift our outdated views around aging. We wanted to create a digital media hub that would inspire and empower people to take control of their later lives, embrace opportunities and thrive.

We set out to create a vibrant space where people could find inspiration, resources, and support. Our commitment to providing credible and reputable information and resources drives everything we do.

Join Us

Let’s embrace this vibrant chapter together, make every day matter and all live our best booming encore!

#aging #retirement #retirementplanning #longevity

Name: The Mettle of Honor Podcast
Description:
Every military veteran embodies a unique quality — “mettle”.  Their uniqueness is strength of spirit and temperament, a caliber to accomplish everything put before them despite obstacles.

This podcast is a platform for stories of strength, courage, and perseverance. Told by military veterans and their families. These stories are not merely a list of accomplishments, awards received, number of deployments. It’s not about the rank achieved, the job they held or level of security clearance.


The purpose here is to shed light on personal issues our veterans have wrestled with, or are still grappling with every day - even after their life in uniform. I envision three things will be accomplished with this podcast. 

1. HEALING. The more we share our stories of those hard times in life, the easier it becomes to share it.

2. HOPE. When listeners hear these stories, they find they’re not alone in their struggles and also find encouragement to continue to fight through to the other side. 

3. HELP.  When veterans and spouses share their stories, we hear what resources helped them make it through their obstacles. Not only will we hear stories from them, we also hear from those who run nonprofit organizations that provide support to the military veteran community. 

These are their stories. 

PODCAST SUPPORT: https://anchor.fm/mettle-of-honor/support

EMAIL: info@gap-mettleofhonor.org

#YouveGotMettle

L’obiettivo è promuovere la conoscenza e il confronto su fatti concreti, esplorando tutte le tecnologie disponibili e senza pregiudizi, pronti ad ospitare tutte le opinioni e i punti di vista, sia di chi offre servizi per la mobilità, sia di chi ne usufruisce. Perché crediamo che la sfida di una mobilità che continui a esser diritto di tutti e che sia rispettosa dell’ambiente si potrà vincere esclusivamente con il contributo di tutti, con un approccio inclusivo e non esclusivo. 
Abbiamo scelto il titolo “muoversi” per dare due messaggi: ci occuperemo delle energie nell’ambito della mobilità e del trasporto e vogliamo essere uno stimolo per tutti gli attori della filiera ad accelerare sulla ricerca, l’avanzamento tecnologico e la sostenibilità. 

UNEM rappresenta le principali Aziende operanti in raffinazione, stoccaggio e distribuzione di prodotti petroliferi e di prodotti energetici low carbon e R&S

Los estudiantes se inscriben en la agencia periodística a modo de práctica, por fuera del plan de estudios obligatorio, para crear contenidos en las áreas de redacción, fotografía, ilustración, redes y multimedia.
ANCCOM tiene como objetivo dar voz a los que no la tienen, dar cobertura a aquellos temas que no son incluidos en la agenda de los medios: género, Derechos Humanos, derechos laborales, conflictividad social, arte y culturas, entre otras categorías. 
Este espacio nació en 2015, con la perspectiva de saldar una deuda histórica con nuestros estudiantes, ofrecerles un espacio multiplataforma en el cual pudieran desarrollar sus aprendizajes con un fuerte sentido político, social y pedagógico, que se enlacen con las necesidades de la comunidad. Por esta razón este medio propone una mirada alternativa e inclusiva. 
Quienes participan de ANCCOM buscan generar periodismo de calidad para sus lectores/usuarios, desde el lugar de los hechos y escuchando a nuevas voces. 
Para que muchas veces más se pueda decir, #ANCCOMCubre!

Name: SegmentNext
Description:
Here at SegmentNext we like to call ourselves the Gamer's Resource. That's because when we envisioned making this website, we never thought about anything but the gamers who would be reading it. 

Since we're all heavy gamers ourselves, we felt left out by all the large gaming websites that didn't cater to our needs and we set out with a dream to create a site that does give gamers the news and editorial experience that they both want and need.

We had small beginnings, but because of our amazing audience we managed to grow to the place we're at now. Without any of our readers we would never have gotten anywhere, and we're proud to think that we have created a resource for gamers that does pander to their desires.

SegmentNext has been going since January 2009 and now just a couple of years down the line we've grown exponentially as both a website and a company. In 2015 we're exploring the world of podcast and video content. As time marches on we just want to bring more great content to our readers and viewers.

När du lägger ut ditt uppdrag får du offerter från upp till sex intresserade företag – givetvis helt gratis och utan att binda dig. Med tusentals anslutna företag och över 63 000 omdömen från tidigare användare har Offerta blivit en trygg plats att hitta proffs andra är nöjda med.

Bakom Offerta finns ett femtiotal drivna medarbetare som tillsammans jobbar för att ständigt leverera den bästa tänkbara tjänsten till både företagare och tjänsteköpare. Sedan 2024 är Offerta en del av Tom i samägande med Fortnox, vilket ger en stark plattform för att fortsätta utveckla tjänsten.

Har du en verksamhet och vill hitta nya kunder? Vi letar alltid efter kvalificerade företag som kan hjälpa våra kunder renovera, städa eller flytta. Hör av dig till oss så hjälper vi dig att komma igång.

De son expérience, il tire une vision claire et unique de l'innovation solidaire. 


"Le handicap m'a apporté de pouvoir regarder les choses autrement. Et la canne blanche, c'est un truc sympa pour pêcher de belles rencontres et poursuivre sur le chemin de mes rêves." 

Il veut aujourd'hui transmettre cette flamme et dépasser ses seuls cadres d'expression pour parler à tous. Son envie ? Faire de ses rencontres de véritable sources d'inspiration. 

Didier Roche est un serial rêveur : il va nous faire partager son énergie et sa force pour ne pas laisser ses propres rêves s'échapper...

Name: Pubcon
Description:
Pubcon, the premier search and social media conference and expo, holds multi-track events throughout the United States. Our largest and longest running event is our annual fall conference at the Las Vegas Convention Center.

Our 2018 conferences include:

Pubcon Austin, February 21st.
Pubcon Florida, April 10-12th.
Pubcon Las Vegas, October 15-19th.

Pubcon Las Vegas, supported by the industry's leading businesses, speakers, exhibitors, and sponsors involved in social media, Internet marketing, search engines, and online advertising, offers an in-depth look at the future of technology presented by over 200 of the world's top speakers in more than 100 provocative cutting-edge sessions.

Pubcon originally began in 2000 as an informal gathering of early Web search engine optimizers and webmasters at a London pub, giving birth to the pub conference.

Industry insiders, owners and chief executives, founders and corporate presidents join social media and search engine company engineers, programmers alongside marketing and affiliate program professionals from around the world to meet for a week at Pubcon and explore the future of the Web and the people who use and expand it every day.

With more than 100 sessions and 200 speakers Pubcon is the setting for the new media industry's movers and shakers and up-and-coming technophiles alike to learn, advance new agendas, and perhaps most of all, to meet and network with the key people that don't go to any conference but Pubcon, making this conference opportunity, for now at least, one of the best-kept secrets for those creating the next Facebook, Google, Pinterest or Twitter.

Pubcon Las Vegas is one of the biggest and boldest international gatherings of optimization and new media innovators ever assembled. Register today for Pubcon and come join the world's leading technology professionals for a week of unlimited networking and cutting-edge Web innovation.

Description:

AOC est un quotidien d’auteurs. Conçu par des journalistes, il est écrit par des chercheurs, des écrivains, des intellectuels, des artistes et… des journalistes.
AOC entend prendre de la hauteur. Tenter de remettre un peu de verticalité dans un espace public désormais destructuré et horizontalisé en publiant des textes qui visent autant que possible à (re)faire autorité et à structurer le débat.
AOC est l’acronyme d’Analyse Opinion Critique.
AOC publie, du lundi au vendredi, trois articles par jour : une Analyse, une Opinion et une Critique.
AOC publie le samedi un grand entretien d’idées ou de parcours biographique selon les cas.
AOC publie le dimanche un texte littéraire inédit.
AOC est un journal quotidien en ligne accessible par abonnement (12€ par mois et 6€ pour les étudiants et les petits revenus.).
AOC est un quotidien imprimable facilement, pour ceux qui préfèrent le papier.

Fz Streaming: It brings the best global sports to enjoy live and on-demand from any device through different platforms, where you can find @Fanatiz, AFAplay, L1play, etc. 

Rights Management: Manages and commercializes sports rights - broadcasting, image, and distribution – providing a unique value proposition allowing leagues, federations, and brands to strengthen their connection with consumers @1190 Sports

Fz Sports is reinventing the value chain in sports content distribution. Based in Miami, Fz Sports operates at a global level with over 70 professionals based throughout Latin America, Europe and the United States.

Name: Travelution Media
Description:
Travelution Media is an independent Maldives-based media platform focused on editorial storytelling, industry insight and destination narratives across travel, tourism and related sectors.

Through our magazine, digital platforms and curated initiatives, we explore destinations, people and ideas shaping the Maldives today, connecting industry professionals, brands and audiences through content built on credibility, clarity and long-term relevance.

Name: The Tab
Description:
The Tab is a media brand covering youth culture and entertainment, with a global audience of millions.

Our London office is run by Gen Zs, who specialise in news, hot takes, celeb drama, lifestyle, and can spot a TikTok trend weeks before everyone else. We’re always bold, original, and voice-driven in our journalism - we don’t do boring. 

We were founded by three students at Cambridge in 2009 as a reaction to out-of-touch student papers. 

Then we launched The Tab Network – our guerilla army of student reporters across the country who are renowned for breaking the biggest news on campus.

Now, The Tab has exploded into one of the most influential brands for young people in the UK and the US, covering everything from global politics to Netflix. In 2025 The Tab launched Reality Shrine; the juiciest, funniest, pettiest new site for the reality TV-obsessed.

We’re always digging deeper: whether that’s silly drama on MAFS, exposing shameful CEOs, or unearthing what your fave politician was really like at uni. You name it, we go there.

Name: Key4biz
Description:
Supercom offre servizi di Business Relations, servizi avanzati di comunicazione e relazioni pubbliche, assieme all’organizzazione di eventi, la produzione di video, il content managing, come strumenti di sostegno alle attività delle aziende e delle Pubbliche Amministrazioni.
Le azioni promosse da supercom sono pertanto orientate al posizionamento sul mercato di persone e imprese, all’intercettamento di nuove opportunità,  al rafforzamento della reputation e del sistema di relazioni con il mondo delle istituzioni e dei decisori.
Supercom è editrice di Key4biz.it, il quotidiano italiano sulla digital economy e sulla cultura del futuro, specializzato in Internet, Media, Telecoms, Smart City, Games e Robot.
Nato nel 2002, Key4biz offre un’informazione accurata su policy, mercati, tecnologie e servizi dell’intero settore dell’ICT, registrando e analizzando quanto succede in Italia, in Europa e nel mondo.
www.key4biz.it

Description:
AllAfrica is a multi-media content provider, systems technology developer and the source-of-record for African news and information worldwide. It is a world-facing voice of, by and for a vibrant, fast-changing continent and producer of the popular web sites, allAfrica.com and allafrica.fr.  

AllAfrica is a voice of, by and for Africa – providing news and information to an influential African and global public. A virtual newsroom links offices in Cape Town, Dakar, Abuja, Monrovia, Nairobi and Washington DC., aggregating and producing content that reaches tens of millions of policy and decision makers, business leaders, researchers and scholars, health professionals and community activists.

Among the titles beloved by millions are Solo Leveling, The Abandoned Empress, Light & Shadow, Bloody Sweet, and What's Wrong with Secretary Kim, and many more. Launched in 2016, Tappytoon’s vetted translations and chart-topping smartphone apps offer the best way to read full-color digital manhwa and webtoons while supporting the artists, creators, and storytellers.

Name: M&A Teaser
Description: Tras 3 años y medio trabajando en Financial Services, descubrí que no hay una publicación que recopile lo que pasa en M&A en España (Gossips, oportunidades de trabajo, cambios en los equipos) por ello surge la idea de crear un canal informativo semanal que resuma todos los movimientos de Fusiones y Adquisiciones que suceden en ...El contenido de esta Newsletter está basado en el resultado de más de 50 cuestionarios en SurveyMonkey.

Name: World's Best News
Description:
World’s Best News is a Danish media founded by the UN, the Danish Ministry of Foreign Affairs’ development agency DANIDA, 100 Danish development organisations and 90 corporate partners.
World’s Best News is now an international network with sisters in Ireland, Netherlands, Norway and Finland. 

The purpose of the initiative is to inform the public that the United Nations’ Global Goals for Sustainable Development are achievable; the world is making huge progress.

The United Nations’ Global Goals for Sustainable Development are the framework for World's Best News communication and campaigning. We want everyone to know that the world has a plan. In 15 years we can end extreme poverty, fight inequality and injustice, and fix climate change.

Name: Les Jeunes Branches by Scalezia
Description:
Une boîte est la somme de ses compétences.

Fais-la progresser, et elle s’envole.

Laisse-la stagner, et elle s’effondre.

Et la meilleure façon de s’améliorer, c’est d’écouter ceux qui sont déjà passés par là.

Les Jeunes Branches, c’est le podcast des entrepreneurs, pour les entrepreneurs.

Des entrepreneurs chez qui tout va vite, tout va loin, tout va fort.

Et des entrepreneurs en quête d’humain, de croissance et de nouveauté.

Au programme : des réussites, des échecs, des méthodes.

Et surtout : des tonnes d’apprentissages à appliquer le jour-même sur ton projet.

Alors, prépare de quoi noter, et surtout :

Attention à la branche.

Description: Die Deutsche Unternehmerbörse DUB.de ist seit 2011 die reichweitenstärkste und unabhängige Onlineplattform für Unternehmenstransaktionen in Europa. Unsere ambitionierte Community besteht mittlerweile aus über 90.000 registrierten und aktiven Nutzern. Aktuell finden Sie bei uns knapp 3.800 Inserate aus den verschiedensten Branchen. Name: Kitab Sawti - كتاب صوتي (Acquired by Storytel)
Description:
Kitab Sawti is the world’s largest Arabic audiobooks library. Through a user-friendly smart-phone app, we grant Arabic speakers access to bestselling and award-winning titles in an audio format. With their headphones on, our users are able to travel to a parallel universe; in a moment of entertainment, acquiring knowledge at only one finger-press away. We believe in the power of stories that change lives, words that inspire, and literature that builds bridges between cultures and generations. By unleashing this power in a new format to a growing audience, the potential of every book in our library is completely transformed.

Kitab Sawti began initially as a project designed to help Syrian refugees in Swedish schools. During the process, we identified a global demand for Arabic content and decided to take on the challenge of building an Arabic audiobook market from scratch. Today, our platform brings together the content of Best-selling Arab authors like Saud Al Sanousi and Ahmed Khaled Tawfiq and International A-listers such as Dan Brown and Suzanne Collins, and the journey continues. The company has acquired a diverse international identity, with our offices across different continents and team members from all over the world. Together, we strongly believe in supporting and inspiring gifted authors to create more high quality Arabic literature for the world to listen to.

Publishers are also discovering a great new way to monetize their premium content away from traditional networks and their complexities. By inserting the Jubna widget on the bottom of articles, publishers will see a significant extra revenue.
