Contact our team today to get listed as a content marketer and we will fund your account with $25 for free to try promoting your content with Jubna.

Name: 3D ADEPT (3DA)
Description:
3DA Solutions is a communication company that is committed to enabling companies from different industries to develop within their sector of activity. With a keen interest in new technologies, we support clients in the creation and implementation of their communication strategy and the creation of various contents.
The company owns 3D ADEPT Media, a trade press that tracks, reports and analyzes the latest trends in the additive manufacturing industry and in all vertical industries adopting these technologies. 3D Adept Media includes an online media www.3dadept.com , available in English & French, a bimonthly magazine, 3D ADEPT Mag- available in English & French – and other special publications such as the International Catalogue of AM Solutions. Through these communication supports, we enable companies that specialize in Additive Manufacturing Technologies & companies that manufacture their products using 3D printing/Additive Manufacturing technologies to communicate about their activities and products, therefore to reach a target audience.
Our online media
On a daily basis, our online media provides the latest news on the additive manufacturing industry in all sectors of activity: research & development, education, aerospace, automotive, construction, art, architecture, high-tech, sport, food & medical industries, etc.
3D ADEPT Mag
Every two months, we invite a specific number of companies to discuss challenges encountered by industry professionals in an issue of 3D ADEPT Mag.
The print magazine is distributed free of charge in events where 3D ADEPT Media is a media partner. The digital version is sent to our subscribers by email. Lastly, those who would like to receive the print version in their office can subscribe to an annual paid subscription.
Do you want to know more about us or our services? Get in touch with us by email: contact@3dadept.com.

É este o trabalho que levamos aos ecrãs da SIC Notícias e da SIC Internacional desde 2012, num programa diário e num magazine semanal. Conteúdos com atualização diária no nosso site - thenextbigidea.pt - e nas nossas redes sociais.

Mais que empresas, mais que revolução tecnológica, mais que trabalho ou dinheiro, há uma sociedade em mudança onde pessoas de gerações diferentes convergem numa mesma mobilização: serem donos da sua vida, porem à prova as suas capacidades, terem liberdade para criar e testar novas ideias. Name: Freelance to Founder
Description:
Most freelancers dream of something bigger—more clients, more income, more freedom. But the leap from solo freelancer to agency owner can feel overwhelming.

That’s where Freelance to Founder comes in.

Hosted by Preston Lee, founder of Millo.co, the show features in-depth coaching calls with real-life freelancers who want to grow beyond solo work. Each episode dives into the exact challenges of scaling—finding better clients, hiring your first team members, building processes, raising your rates, and learning to run a business that doesn’t run you.

Preston has started, grown, and sold multiple six-figure businesses, and he brings that experience to every conversation. His goal: to help you skip the trial-and-error and get a front-row seat to the strategies that transform a freelance hustle into a thriving agency.

If you’re ready to stop working in your business and start building one, Freelance to Founder is your roadmap.

Subscribe wherever you get your podcasts.

NewsReach is backed by Hindustan Times Media Ventures, Zee Growth Capital, IIM-Ahmedabad Ventures, Ruxton Ventures, Faad Network, and JITO Angel Network. Our founders' recognition in Forbes 30 under 30 Asia 2022 highlights our relentless pursuit of excellence, showcasing our dedication, expertise, and innovative spirit in transforming the PR industry.

Name: Noema Magazine
Description:
Noema is an award-winning magazine exploring the transformations sweeping our world. We publish essays, interviews, reportage, videos and art on the overlapping realms of technology, philosophy, governance, economics, geopolitics and culture. In doing so, our unique approach is to get out of the usual lanes and cross disciplines, social silos and cultural boundaries. From artificial intelligence and the climate crisis to the future of democracy and capitalism, Noema Magazine seeks a deeper understanding of the most pressing challenges of the 21st century.

In ancient Greek, noēma means “thinking” or the “object of thought.” And that is our intention: to delve deeply into the critical issues transforming the world today, at length and with historical context, in order to illuminate new pathways of thought in a way not possible through the immediacy of daily media.

Published online and in print by the Berggruen Institute, Noema grew out of a previous publication called The WorldPost, which was first a partnership with HuffPost and later with The Washington Post. Noema publishes thoughtful, rigorous, adventurous pieces by voices from both inside and outside the institute. While committed to using journalism to help build a more sustainable and equitable world, we do not promote any particular set of national, economic or partisan interests.

Name: BORDEAUX Business
Description:
L’ACTUALITÉ ÉCONOMIQUE DE BORDEAUX
Mais pas que…

Marché, cible, concurrents, opportunités… L’économie bordelaise évolue très vite. Bordeaux Business vous donne les clés pour prendre les bonnes décisions pour votre entreprise, dans un contexte mouvant et parfois délicat à apprivoiser.

Aujourd’hui, le « métier » de chef d’entreprise change. Nous sommes confrontés à des contextes de plus en plus tendus, à la remise en question de certains modèles économiques, à un marché « stressé » où le client est devenu très volatile. Dans le même temps, l’envie d’entreprendre n’a jamais été aussi forte. Prendre son destin en main, avoir la liberté de choisir ses propres contraintes, assumer ses décisions, être passionné par son activité, donner toute son énergie pour entreprendre… Voilà ce qui nous anime.

Au-delà des (inévitables?) concentrations capitalistiques, la flexibilité, la rapidité, la capacité à se remettre en question permet de rejouer les équilibres traditionnels. L’ère numérique, puis l’ère digitale, redistribue les cartes avec une aisance dont nous ne mesurons pas encore toutes les conséquences à venir.

Dans ce contexte où tout va vite, où tout change, il est nécessaire de prendre le temps de la réflexion stratégique pour agir vite.

Entreprises qui montent, secteurs en mutation, nouvelles opportunités de développement, situation de l’emploi à Bordeaux, grands chantiers de Bordeaux Métropole, entrepreneurs de demain… Bordeaux Business vous propose une analyse sans compromis de l’actualité économique régionale.
Pour entreprendre, encore.

La Rédaction Bordeaux Business

Name: Savoo
Description:
Savoo is an online fundraising platform that's completely free to use - meaning that absolutely anyone can raise money for charity through their everyday online activities. All registered UK charities can sign up at Savoo.co.uk for free, and open themselves up to free, passive and unrestricted income. 

How it works

Savoo donates to charity on the consumer's behalf. Visitors to Savoo.co.uk select their favourite charity and then use Savoo as a search engine (instead of Google) and use free voucher codes and deals to save on shopping at thousands of retailers.

More info

Savoo Search - powered by Bing - donates 0.01p to UK charities for every legitimate search completed. In addition to the search functionality, Savoo Shop donates up to 50% of any confirmed affiliate commission on sales generated from shoppers and bargain hunters using some of the thousands of voucher codes and deals from over 2,000 UK retailers.

Outside of the UK, Savoo is an international group of discount code and money-saving websites dedicated to finding the very best deals for consumers.

Name: Info Luxo
Description:
Criado em 2012, o portal Terapia do Luxo surgiu do sonho de Manu Berger em criar um veículo de comunicação digital voltado ao debate do segmento de alto padrão. Após muito estudo de campo, cursos e capacitações em alguns dos mais importantes centros de ensino do Brasil e da Europa, Manu desenvolveu uma plataforma de conteúdo que, além de abordar produtos e lançamentos high-end, apresenta um panorama atual do mercado e aponta as principais tendências futuras.

Com o passar do tempo, o Terapia do Luxo se consolidou no mercado de luxo brasileiro, promovendo um diálogo profundo entre consumidores e marcas. Sua evolução natural transformou o portal em uma organização especializada no business de luxo, oferecendo serviços como assessoria em eventos, capacitação de equipes e consultoria estratégica. Propondo um debate amplo sobre o segmento e contando com a participação de colunistas renomados, o Terapia do Luxo contribuiu significativamente para que as empresas do setor conquistassem a satisfação de seus clientes. Agora, sob o nome INFOLUXO, o projeto passa por uma reformulação significativa para se tornar uma ferramenta de comunicação ainda mais abrangente.

O INFOLUXO é um projeto multiplataforma que inclui produção de conteúdo, organização de eventos, realização de cursos e capacitações, mentoria empresarial e profissional, além da comercialização de publicações e produtos editoriais focados no mercado de luxo. Com a democratização do mercado de luxo e a constante inovação em produtos e serviços, o INFOLUXO é um elo entre consumidores, clientes, acadêmicos e profissionais, oferecendo conhecimento e soluções estratégicas para atender as demandas contemporâneas do segmento.

Name: Foretagande.se
Description:
Företagande.se - Sveriges största digitala mötesplats för företagare.

Vi är ett affärsnätverk och e-tidning som sedan 2005 verkat för landets viktigaste arbetsgivare - småföretagaren.

Vår vision är att vara företagarens självklara mötesplats för affärsnyheter, kunskap och inspiration. 

Det är kostnadsfritt att vara medlem hos oss. Bli en del av vårt nätverk och ta del av våra medlemsförmåner:

* Erbjudanden & Rabatter
* Nätverka i vårt forum
* Juridiska mallar
* Möjlighet att bli skribent
* Lokala företagsnyheter

Bli vår skribent.
Sajten bygger på crowdsourcing, det vill säga att medlemmarna skapar innehållet. Du som skriver syns med namn och länkar till dina kanaler vilket ger möjlighet att driva trafik till din verksamhet. Du skriver om ditt expertisområde och det du brinner för i syfte att hjälpa, lyfta och inspirera landets småföretagare och entreprenörer, samtidigt som du bygger varumärke och når nya nya kunder och kontakter. Sajten har 150.000 unika besökare i månaden och vårt nyhetsbrev har 100.000 prenumeranter. Det är kostnadsfritt att vara vår skribent, välkommen att kontakta oss om du är nyfiken och vill veta mer!

Manager.ba svakodnevno prati puls tržišta kapitala u cilju informiranja investitora i onih koji to tek kane postati. Portal je vodeći inovator u području poslovnih vijesti, edukacije, informacija za osobne financije, komentara i mišljenja.

Uredništvo portala Manager.ba svakodnevno svojim naslovima, vijestima, zapažanjima, mišljenjima i analizama osigurava sveobuhvatnu percepciju poslovnog okruženja i tržišnog raspoloženja.

Uredništvo portala Manager.ba je predan tim ekonomista koji se bave različitom poslovnom problematikom i uvijek spreman u najkraćem roku korisnicima portala odgovoriti na upite vezane za poslovnu regulativu, problematiku izravnih i neizravnih poreza i poslovanja s vrijednosnim papirima, a sve u cilju unaprjeđenja poslovanja i akumuliranja poslovnih znanja naših korisnika.

Según empresas consultoras y de investigación de las tecnologías de la información como Gartner, estas audiencias serán el foco de atención los próximos años, y nosotros estaremos allí. Después de varios años al frente de Ciberespacio (Primer portal de Noticias en Venezuela y su homónimo programa de radio) hemos decidido enfocar todos nuestro background en materia de tecnología, para canalizar las informaciones y mensajes hacia las tendencias actuales del mercado.

ITNEWS.LAT es un portal de noticias diferente, su diseño y estructura es Responsive, una técnica que prioriza la correcta visualización de una misma página en distintos dispositivos, permite su fácil consulta. De esta manera, atendemos prioritariamente a 7 países de la región Panamá, Colombia, Venezuela, Ecuador, Perú, Chile y Argentina. Nuestro foco son las áreas de Transformación y Economía Digital, Big Data, Analitics, IOT, así como también colocamos suma atención a las áreas de Movilidad, Seguridad y de Canales que son la pieza fundamentales de las empresas. We are your one stop shop for your digital branding needs. Online portfolios, digital branding consulting, resume revamps, social media platform audits & workshops, career counseling & more! Visit us at www.thedeanslist.me to start your path to your dream job!

We have worked with a wide range of professionals including students, models, influencers, actors, journalists, athletes, musicians, producers, and biotech consultants from companies such as ESPN, Twitter, CBS, AT&T, NFL, Miss America Organization, and more. Most importantly, our uplifting culture stands on the core values of collaboration, the celebration of diversity, and human empowerment. Learn more about us from our community of 10,000+ professionals at our events:  Meetups, Dinners, TGIM Panels & IG Lives, EmpowerCon & our 20 Under 20 Awards.

In this fast-paced and ever-changing landscape, you need to make your best first impression on the web and we help you put your best foot forward.

Best part? We donate a portion of every branding package to empowering women and alleviating poverty in Western Kenya. AND we are the most affordable digital branding company you'll ever find. Our prices are scaled to help businesses and young professionals on a budget. We know what goes around comes around and that you will use your skills to help others, just like we do through our services.

Our CEO, Meredith Dean, started the framework for The Dean's List in her tiny New York City apartment in 2015. Today, The Dean's List has branded professionals from every profession in every corner of the globe. Her proudest accomplishment is donating a girls dormitory in Western Kenya -- all thanks to profits from TDL clients. 

Our Services Include:
1. Online Portfolios
2. Specialized Networking
3. DEI Community Events
4. Social Media Workshops
5. Resume/Cover Letter Design
6. Social Media Revamping
7. Career Consulting

Follow us @mydeanslist, visit www.thedeanslist.me, or email info@thedeanslist.me for more information!

Nato agli esordi della pandemia covid per dare consigli alle imprese su come affrontare e superare quel difficile periodo, il progetto si è evoluto con il coinvolgimento di importanti brand che sposano la missione no profit di diffusione di valori, etica, centralità delle persone, esperienze ed azioni di successo.

Ringraziamo anche tutti gli imprenditori di PMI e i loro team, che ogni giorno creano valore per il nostro Paese.

Name: EURACTIV Poland
Description:
We are the Polish branch of the independent European media network specializing in European and international affairs. EURACTIV publishes daily news and policy briefs in 13 European states and 13 languages.

Our European media network constitutes a forum for transparent, informed - and decentralised - European debate. We owe our success not only to our journalists – experienced EU experts, but also to our partners – European (European Commission, European Parliament, FRONTEX), state (eg. Polish presidency, Switzerland, Norway), corporate (eg. Coca-Cola, KPMG, MSD, TransferWise, PKN Orlen, Allegro Group), research and academic institutions, NGOs and the media. 

In addition to following us on our website, http://www.euractiv.pl, you can also join us on Facebook: 
https://www.facebook.com/euractivpl/ and Twitter: https://twitter.com/euractivpoland - where you can comment and engage in discussions with our journalists. We hope to see you there!

Name: True Culture University
Description:
The first-ever Pan-African Collegiate Platform. Publishing student-written articles on issues pertaining to Africans, both locally and globally.

True Culture University is a Pan - African collegiate Platform. With the advent of the 21st century, the internet provides a unique opportunity for the highest level of accessible communication between continental Africans and Diaspora Africans that has never been seen before in history. By publishing student-written articles on issues pertaining to Africans both globally and locally, True Culture U. will foster communication as well as an understanding of various viewpoints. Being African is split into a multitude of sub groups, however, we at True Culture University believe through communication - understanding can be achieved that allows an emphasis on our similarities rather than our differences. Most importantly, True Culture U. is committed to establishing and fostering connections between all African descended people - whether you are in America, the Caribbean, South America, or the Continent itself- cultivating a new collective mindset for the 21st and 22nd century. 

|Pan-Africanism 2.0|| Making Pan-Africanism Relevant for Black Millenials|

Name: TaxiPoint
Description:
TaxiPoint has been part of the UK taxi industry since summer 2017 and has become a vital cog in the industry’s communication.

Founded in 2017 by Perry, a London black cab driver, the vision has always been to deliver professional and impartial trade journalism. Lindsey, a sales and relationship manager, joined soon after, as TaxiPoint’s reach and engagement has rapidly grown.

The platform is the most read and trusted news source and takes a neutral stance on all things taxi related.

Annually our TaxiPoint news website is visited by 1.26m different readers, of which 227k are regular returning readers. On top of that, over 1 million reads are recorded each year for our popular monthly digital magazine.

TaxiPoint delivers both daily news articles and a monthly digital magazine aimed at everyone who works in the trade. From grassroots drivers to policy makers and large company CEO’s. Our impartial stance allows a true reflection on current issues impacting the sector.

TaxiPoint’s daily news site is unique to other blogs or journals offered. Our content can be found on mainstream news aggregators like Apple News, Google News and News Now. We are the only industry news source in the world to be indexed on these aggregators.

Our content is also licensed by Newstex which allows aggregation on professional databases such as Refinitiv and Moody's NewsEdge. We are the trusted and quoted journal for the taxi industry.

The magazine is widely read and also appears on  global newsstands like PressReader and Magzter.

For press and content queries, get in touch with us at contact@taxi-point.co.uk

For advertising queries, email us at advertising@taxi-point.co.uk

Name: World Over Here
Description:
World Over Here (WOH) is a production company and multimedia collective of storytellers, researchers, and practitioners dedicated to critically examining dominant narratives across digital and physical spaces while amplifying stories of justice, reconciliation, and repair. Rooted in plurality, participatory research, and decolonial thought, our network includes indigenous lawyers, anthropologists, ecologists, audio-visual artists, and activists who collaboratively produce knowledge and creative work. 

Through intersectional storytelling, we explore power, accountability, and ecological relationships. WOH questions entrenched structures, reimagines our connections to Earth, and supports co-created narratives that centre human and more-than-human life, fostering reflection, dialogue, and transformative action.

At WOH, we thrive on the richness of diverse cultural perspectives and lived experiences. Collaborating with communities, we strive to authentically reflect our shared humanity and foster collective liberation.

Visit us at: www.worldoverhere.org
Link to EE GoFundme: https://gofund.me/3efa86b7

Description:

What makes The Narrative Matters so special is that we’re documenting the truth of our culture. We leave no room for misinterpretation because we’re telling our story about people that look like us.

Name: Sabali Podcast
Description:
Avec Sabali, j’irai tous les 15 jours à la rencontre de femmes et d’hommes d’exception au parcours atypique et ayant réussi dans leur domaine respectif. Ensemble, nous allons décortiquer leur parcours, parler de leur succès, de leurs échecs et des enseignements tirés, de leur passion mais aussi de leurs choix professionnels. J’essaierai à chaque fois de mettre en lumière leur singularité, leurs différences qui on va l’entendre au fil des numéros, est aussi ce qui fait leur force.

Mon objectif à travers ces interviews de personnalités remarquables est de susciter des vocations auprès de nos jeunes sœurs et frères et leur montrer qu’à force de persévérance tout est possible. C’est l’occasion également de découvrir de nouveaux métiers et de mettre en lumière cette majorité silencieuse qui réussit.

Name: SaportaReport
Description:
Because the world of journalism and communications is ever changing with new channels and ways to deliver information, we want to maintain as much transparency as possible. We will strive to maintain high journalistic standards and will disclose any vested interests or relationships in stories and columns on SaportaReport.com. Advertising is being sold on the site, but there will be no quid-pro-quo that advertisers will receive special treatment on the site.  But it is highly likely that some of our advertisers on the site would have views parallel views to ours.

Maria Saporta, editor, is a longtime Atlanta business, civic and urban affairs journalist with a deep knowledge of our city, our region and state. Since 2008, she has written a weekly column and news stories for the Atlanta Business Chronicle. Prior to that, she spent 27 years with The Atlanta Journal-Constitution, becoming its business columnist in 1991. Maria received her Master’s degree in urban studies from Georgia State and her Bachelor’s degree in journalism from Boston University. Maria was born in Atlanta to European parents and has two young adult children.

Name: Lazy Women
Description:
Welcome to Lazy Women - an online platform and community created by extraordinary young women on a mission to change the world! 

Lazy Women is not just a platform; it is a global movement. We are a passionate group of young women, mostly coming from Eastern Europe and Central Asia, who have joined forces to amplify the voices of those identifying with womanhood all over the world. We are challenging the outdated stereotypes of laziness by turning it into a symbol of personal and collective care and empowerment. We are building a community that embraces the diversity of womanhood, sharing insights about lived experiences, political and social issues, successes, and life stories often seen as taboo or unnoticed in mainstream media and public discourse.

Over the past three years, Lazy Women has grown from a hobby blog into a full-scale volunteer-run feminist media outlet and a creative hub. We have nurtured a community of over fifty talented writers, podcasters, and illustrators, many of whom had no previous journalistic experience or came from disadvantaged geographical or societal backgrounds. Together, we have created thought-provoking content that challenges the norms, disrupts stereotypes, and inspires change.

Atendemos clientes particulares e empresas interessadas em utilizar o podcast como ferramenta de comunicação e divulgação de seus produtos e serviços, oferecendo também consultoria para aqueles que querem produzir, editar e publicar seu próprio conteúdo.

Para nos contratar, mande um e-mail para contato@radiofobia.com.br .

Sobre o podcast:

O Rádiofobia foi criado inicialmente como um programa de humor, produzido no formato Podcast, com a proposta de discutir temas variados e entrevistar convidados ligados à atividade humorística, que atuam no rádio, TV, teatro ou internet.

O diferencial do programa é a aplicação do formato radiofônico da mídia Podcast. O programa é gravado com transmissão ao vivo, via streaming, e todos os elementos sonoros - efeitos, trilhas e vinhetas - são aplicados em tempo real, exatamente como em um programa de rádio.

Com a aceitação do Podcast por um público de diferentes faixas etárias, o site - inicialmente utilizado apenas para a divulgação do programa - passou a ser atualizado diariamente com conteúdos variados, tais como vídeos de humor, textos, crônicas e tirinhas.

It is a scholarly journal that aspires to publish the upcoming research and technological developments. This free journal is a pioneer in publishing research articles, review articles, commentaries, short communications and case reports in peer reviewed journals list.

The journal is using Editorial Manager System online manuscript submission, review and tracking systems. Editorial board members of Anatomy & Physiology: Current Research or outside experts review manuscripts; at least two independent reviewer’s approval followed by the editor is required for the acceptance of any citable manuscript.

Name: Build Green Media
Description:
Beaucoup parle d'éco-construction, d'habitat écologique ou durable, mais comment peut-on définir cette démarche ?

BUILD GREEN est un média communautaire qui tente de répondre à cette question avec les professionnels de la filière.  Notre vision de l'habitat que ce soit en neuf, rénovation ou réhabilitation est avant tout une problématique de pertinence et de responsabilité.

Il doit être :
- respectueux : pour diminuer de sa conception à son usage, son impact (dont le CO2) sur l'environnement, en favorisant les ressources renouvelables
- sain : pour réduire les produits allergènes et cancérigènes (polluants et ondes électromagnétiques) et un meilleur renouvellement d’air
-  autonome : pour tendre vers l’auto-consommation en énergie, mais aussi en eau, en alimentation et pour une meilleure gestion des déchets
-  collaboratif : pour une organisation plus participative avec son environnement social

Que vous soyez distributeur, fabricant, prestataire, maître d'oeuvre, architecte, constructeur, bureau d'étude, artisan, vous pouvez contribuer gratuitement à Build Green :
- pour échanger avec d'autres adeptes de l'habitat écologique
- pour publier votre article dans une rubrique "actualités"
-  pour annoncer vos événements et formations dans l'agenda
-  pour ajouter vos documents techniques dans la médiathèque
-  et bien d'autres services à venir ...

Nous accorderons une grande importance à la qualité des contenus. Ainsi chaque article publié sera modéré par une équipe de professionnels. Nous pouvons également vous accompagner dans la mise en forme de vos contenus.

Pour valoriser votre engagement éco-responsable, rejoignez Build Green, un média dynamique,  et profitez de ses nombreux avantages.

Name: Pégase Daily - 1er média Cheval, Business, Société & Art de Vivre
FACT Magazine
Description:
FACT was founded in 2003 as a British bi-monthly music and youth culture magazine. The magazine became notable for commissioning covers by artists including M.I.A., Peter Saville, Trevor Jackson, Klaxons, Bat for Lashes, Kate Moross and Animal Collective, while its New Talent section was renowned for profiling future stars at an early date – Florence + The Machine, Adele and more were all interviewed early in their careers. As well as its cast of regular contributors, writing in FACT came from artists such as Andrew Weatherall, Kode9, Julian Cope and Richard X.

In 2005, FACT went digital, and in 2009 it became exclusively an online magazine, after the website’s status overtook that of the print magazine. This was down in no short part to FACT’s mix series, where each week an artist contributed an exclusive mix to download from the website. Past contributors include Autechre, the xx, Four Tet, Ariel Pink’s Haunted Graffiti, The Horrors, Carl Craig, The Orb & Lee ‘Scratch’ Perry and more.

Now, in 2016, FACT retains a status as one of the Internet’s most popular music publications, with full-time staff in both the UK, US & Australia, and its own online TV channel, FACT TV. FACT is part of VF Publishing, a subsidiary of The Vinyl Factory group.

Name: Fachplattform bauinformation.com
Description:
Die Idee von bauinformation.com

Als Akteure in der Baubranche ist uns bewusst wie schnelllebig Wissen sein kann. Heute geteiltes Wissen kann morgen schon überholt sein. Innovationen, Normen, Standards, Trends, Forschung - es ist fast nicht möglich Schritt zu halten. 

bauinformation.com entstand aus der Idee eine Plattform zu schaffen, die alle Aspekte aufgreift  und Experten und Interessierte miteinander vernetzt. 

Vor der Digitalisierung hielt man sich auf Konferenzen, Tagungen und aus Fachzeitschriften auf dem Laufenden. Der digitale Wandel macht Wissenstransfer auch online möglich. 

bauinformation.com bietet keine Trainingskurse. Es ist ein innovatives Format, dass in keiner Konkurrenz zu Online-Schulungen, Konferenzen oder zu Fachliteratur steht. Wir greifen Neuigkeiten aus der Baubranche auf, die live und in kompakter Form von ExpertInnen in Fach-Webinaren und Digital Symposien vermittelt werden. 

Wissenstransfer online

Die Plattform bauinformation.com ist die logische Weiterentwicklung einer bestehenden und bewährten Kommunikationskultur. Der persönliche Austausch wird immer wichtig sein. Die Art und Weise wie wir mit anderen kommunizieren, hat sich mit den neuen Medien weiter entwickelt. Wir tauschen uns nicht nur mehr offline aus, sondern stellen auch online Fragen, wollen Antworten erhalten, unsere Erfahrungen mit anderen teilen und in Diskussion treten. Wir wollen kommentieren, ergänzen, verändern oder sogar Neues erschaffen. 

Auch die Wissensaneignung hat sich mit den digitalen Medien verändert. Das Internet wird zur unerschöpflichen Wissensquelle, die uns gleichzeitig aber auch am Überangebot verzweifeln lässt. 

Lange Zeit hieß es “Wissen ist Macht”. Wir sind davon überzeugt, dass es mittlerweile “Geteiltes Wissen ist mächtiger” heißen sollte. Denn im digitalen Zeitalter sind diejenigen als Experten sichtbar, die ihr Wissen mit möglichst vielen teilen.

Name: Rural 21 - The International Journal for Rural Development
Description:
The international journal Rural 21 has dedicated more than 50 years to all topics surrounding rural development. Its ambition is to further those strategies and policies that strengthen rural areas of developing and newly industrialising countries and encourage their implementation. The journal addresses the complete range of relevant themes – from agriculture and fisheries via capacity building and education through to health and social security, energy supply and trade. Center-stage is always devoted to inquiring into how measures and strategies can contribute to global food security and to reducing poverty.

Rural 21 desires to further the dialogue between science and politics, the private sector, civil society and practitioners. Two platforms are designed for this purpose: Rural 21 in print is published four times a year, each issue highlighting a specific focus of rural development – this print edition is read in more than 150 countries. In parallel, Rural 21 online keeps the rural development community up to date on news and events, scientific findings and other print and online publications. 

Rural 21 is published by DLG-Verlag GmbH in Frankfurt/Germany. Financial partners are BMZ (German Federal Ministry for Economic Cooperation and Development), GIZ (Deutsche Gesellschaft für Internationale Zusammenarbeit), DLG (German Agricultural Society – Deutsche Landwirtschafts-Gesellschaft), SDC (Swiss Agency for Development and Cooperation) and Helvetas Swiss Intercooperation.

The first issue of Rural 21 dates back to 1967. From 1974 to 2007, the journal was published in three languages entitled „entwicklung & ländlicher raum“  /  „agriculture & rural development“ / „agriculture & développement rural“. In 2008, the journal was relaunched as „Rural 21“.

Name: BahaiTeachings.org
Description:
We are members of the Baha’i Faith who are striving to deepen our understanding of the Baha’i teachings and to apply these teachings to contemporary challenges. The Baha’i Faith has no clergy and invites everyone to take part in a life-long process of independent investigation and learning about how lofty spiritual principles — such as the elimination of prejudice and the equality of women and men — can be translated into a new social reality. The central teaching of the Baha’i Faith is the oneness of humanity, meaning that the long-promised age of global justice and peace is finally within humanity’s reach. Translating this vision into reality may take several generations of focused effort and learning. The primary purpose of BahaiTeachings.org is to help advance this humanitarian process. We invite our readers to engage in this learning process through direct action at the grassroots in your community. The Baha’i Faith is organized through a network of elected councils, called Spiritual Assemblies, at the local and national level. In thousands of localities across the United States, and in more than 180 countries, Baha’is are engaged in a process of learning, action and reflection about the process of spiritual community building. By filling out the contact forms on this site, you will be put in touch with Baha’is near you. It is not necessary to become a member of the Baha’i Faith to take part in a range of community building activities, such as study circles, prayer gatherings, and activities for children and teens — everyone is welcome.

With love,

Payam Zamani
Founder & Editor-in-Chief

Name: FemalExperts Magazin
Description:
FemalExperts ist ein Onlinemagazin von Frauen, für Frauen über Frauen. Wie verstehen uns als Plattform, die das Thema „Gleichberechtigung“ auf vielfältige Weise beleuchtet und aus unterschiedlichen Perspektiven darstellt.

Wir sind ein Magazin, welches von starken und unabhängigen Frauen geschrieben wird. Gemeinsam entlarven wir veraltete patriarchalische Regelwerke und „entthronen“ alteingesessene Archetypen, die uns den Weg nach oben versperren.

●	Für dich wollen wir eine Ressource sein, sodass du dich in der Themenwelt des „Female Empowerment“ aus verschiedenen Perspektiven informiert fühlst.

●	Für dich möchten wir eine Plattform schaffen, die dich zeigt, informiert und erfolgreich mach, was auch immer letzteres für dich bedeuten mag.

●	Für dich wollen wir auch eine Möglichkeit schaffen: Wir möchten dir eine Stimme geben – nicht weil du viele Klickzahlen hast oder eine Vielzahl an Follower*innen. Du bist nicht wichtig, weil du hübsche Fotos postest, sondern weil du etwas zu sagen hast.

Wir sind ein professionelles Onlinemagazin mit einer wachsenden Leser*innenschaft und möchte auch DICH gerne einladen, Teil unserer Community zu werden.

Wer Gästin, Autorin oder Kolumnistin bei FemalExperts sein möchte, kann sich hierzu gerne bei der Redaktion melden oder direkt als Autorin registrieren und ihren Artikel zur Prüfung einreichen.

Name: OVIS
Description:
OVIS uses blockchain technology to ensure that the news is trusted, verifiable and accountable. 

There is a crisis of trust in journalism.  Americans have lost faith in the news media.  OVIS was conceived to restore that trust.

As current and former journalists, members of academia, professionals, and individuals from diverse backgrounds, the OVIS community has come together with a common purpose: to restore the public's trust in news.  

OVIS' tokenized publishing model allows community members to curate and validate content by voting on story selection, fact accuracy and editorial objectivity. Members purchase Truth Tokens (TRUTH) and use them to vote on which stories to cover and on the accuracy of the content. The higher-ranking stories are rewarded. The TRUTH Token also has the power to hold the people of OVIS accountable to themselves and to each other, which is the exact opposite way mainstream media operates now. 

OVIS is the news reimagined.  OVIS is Journalism 2.0.

Men om man har et krævende lederjob og to børn som jeg, eller er under uddannelse med studiejob ved siden af, ja så kan tiden føles knap, og det kan være svært at holde sig ajour. Til det kan jeg kun sige; Ledelse Gennemtænkt to the rescue! Med Ledelse Gennemtænkt kan du på farten opleve på første række, hvad der rører sig indenfor ledelse, når jeg diskuterer et relevant emne sammen med eksperter, CEOs og virksomhedsejere - Lyt med :-)

Name: Beauty and Well-Being
Description:
Beauty and Well-Being (BWB) is the online destination for all things beauty and well being. 

A true beauty and cosmetics professional, Clémence von Mueffling earned her stripes working for iconic brands such as Clarins, Puig, and Dior before turning to beauty journalism at Casas & Gente magazine. Her transition felt very natural as writing is something of a family affair: both Mueffling’s mother and grandmother were beauty editors at the prestigious French Vogue.

Her marriage to a New Yorker and the birth of her twins led to a new interest in healthier lifestyle choices. BWB’s editor is an enthusiastic communicator, known among her friends for her insight and intuition of emerging trends. “BWB was an obvious thing to do,” she says. “It is my way to share my discoveries with all women who want to achieve a healthier life and feel beautiful, but have no time to find all the information. I will be doing the research for them!”

BWB brings a fresh aesthetic to the beauty and well being media. The site’s elegant visual identity exudes a real sense of chic à la française.

Now, her lifetime of wisdom has culminated in Clémence’s new book, Ageless Beauty the French Way. Weaving wisdom from three generations of beauty editors with insiders’ tips from top beauty experts Ageless Beauty is a luxurious entertaining, unparalleled guide to every French beauty secret for all women.

At Learning Revolution, we believe the need for continual, high-quality lifelong learning has never been higher. We live in a complex, fast-paced world where people need help to keep up and to thrive.

For entrepreneurial educators – what we call edupreneurs – this represents a unique opportunity, and our mission is to help edupreneurs capitalize on this opportunity. We want to help you reach your audience, deliver compelling, effective learning experiences, and grow a thriving, impactful  learning business.

If you find yourself asking questions like …

how do I find and connect with an audience that will value my expertise?
how do I decide on the right educational products and experiences to offer?
how do I create and sell online courses?
how do I deliver learning experiences that will have real impact?
how can I be strategic and ensure my learning business will grow over time?

… then you are in the right place. Through the resources we publish on our Web site, social media channels, and through our regular e-mails, we’ll provide you with the knowledge you need to build a thriving education business and lead the Learning Revolution!

Name: Look Group
Description:
Look es uno de los principales medios en moda high-end y estilo de vida en el Guatemala. Piensa en nosotras como ese medio cool y con buen gusto, actualizando a las lectoras con noticias, recomendaciones, biografías, temas pro mujer, mejoramiento personal y profesional, e impulsadoras de emprendimientos locales sobre todo lo relevante y deseable para la mujer moderna, desde moda y belleza hasta carreras y viajes.

Junto con su abundante contenido editorial en revista impresa, Look ofrece a sus lectoras acceso de 360 grados al estilo de vida de Look, a través de redes sociales, eventos, revista, agencia de generación de contenido (Rever Agency), tienda  y estudio física, y poco a poco mucho más!

Nuestra Historia:
En 2010, fundado por tres amigas, María Gabriela Camacho, Andrea Villacorta, y Mónica Niederheitmann, Look Magazine surgió como una revista referente de la moda internacional y nacional, además de incluir dentro de su contenido temas como cuidados de la salud, belleza, ayuda social, emprendimientos y la historia de varias mujeres guatemaltecas que son ejemplo por su labor.

Esta publicación abrió un nuevo nicho dentro del mundo editorial en Guatemala, imponiendo temáticas que muy pocos habían abordado y estándares de calidad en el trabajo y producción de un medio de comunicación escrito. 

La primera edición fue lanzada en febrero de 2012 y hasta hoy suman ya más de 85 ediciones en formato físico y digital. 

Look es una ventana al mundo de lo que acontece en la moda, además que fomenta temas enfocados en la salud, cuidado personal, superación, laboral y de emprendimiento. Dentro de los logros obtenidos cabe mencionar que tiene una de las audiencias más extensas en edad y segmento, ya que sus lectoras representan cerca del 95% de mujeres clave en el país. 

Lo que comenzó como una revista, hoy en día ha ido creciendo a algo más junto submarcas claves como Rever Agency, Entre Chapinas, She Rises, entre otras.

Name: Sacramento Press
Description:
Sacramento Press is an online news platform that covers stories, events, and topics that are relevant to the residents of Sacramento.

Founded in 2008, Sacramento Press was established on the idea that the community has a voice and can work alongside professional journalists to help tell the story. In October 2013, SacPress was sold to a new owner. We are working to redefine ourselves in a way that builds on the belief that the community is still the scaffold of what we do while focusing on reporting news in a way that is engaging, professional, relatable, and hyperlocal.

Our vision is ever-evolving, but we are building on these core values:

Tell relevant stories and stimulate interest in the city’s happenings. More than 2 million people reside in the Sacramento Metro Area. We aim to reach our residents with stories that highlight the people, events, businesses, and notable happenings that make this town what it is. We want to go behind the scenes of Sacramento to uncover the vibrancy of voices, interests, and activities in the city.

Support local businesses. From coffee shops to restaurants, museums to theaters, schools to colleges, small businesses to nonprofit organizations making a difference in our community, we aim to construct stories around the work they do.

People are at the core of our stories. After all, what would a story be without the people who make it one? We aim to maintain a human element in our articles. Our city is filled with passionate and knowledgable people who are ready to inform residents about topics that matter to them.

Encourage the community to join the conversation. You are the most important piece of Sacramento Press. We like to think we talk with you instead of talking to you. And we want you to talk with us! Whether you join the conversation by commenting on articles, letting us know about story-worth things happening in our community, or becoming a contributing author, your voice matters.

Name: DATEAGLE AR
Description:
ONLINE

DATEAGLE ART is an online platform based in London that showcases and supports the work of emerging artists. Our in-depth interviews and on-site studio visits offer an intimate look at the talent and creativity of the next generation of artists who deserve recognition and celebration. Founded in 2017 by curators Martin Mayorga and Vanessa Murrell, DATEAGLE ART is committed to promoting accessibility, diversity, and transparency.

Our content is ad-free and gender-neutral, and we celebrate a wide range of artistic expression, rejecting fixed categories and supporting a diverse group of artists working in various mediums including painting, photography, performance, sculpture, and more. In our safe and inclusive community, we foster critical dialogue and innovation, providing a platform for artists, curators, and writers to share their perspectives and collaborate, especially those who may not have had the opportunity to do so in the past.

Our focus on analogue photography resists the rapid, instant gratification of digital media, instead honouring the slower, more thoughtful process of image-making. These 35mm images document our weekly studio visits with local artists, offering a raw and unedited glimpse into their creative process. This stands in contrast to the polished, globalized, and over-curated representation of art that is often found in mainstream media.

OFFLINE

Offline, we have been actively involved in curating nomadic exhibitions and events in various locations throughout the UK. These have taken place in a range of spaces, including domestic, industrial, and gallery spaces. Each exhibition is site-specific and features works that engage with and enhance the character of the space.

Name: CINAFORUM
Description:
www.cinaforum.net è un portale di informazione e approfondimento sulla Cina contemporanea. Nato nel febbraio 2014, cinaforum pubblica notizie, fornisce strumenti di lettura e uno spazio libero di dibattito.

Dove porterà l’urbanizzazione senza precedenti nella storia intrapresa dalla Cina? Pechino favorirà lo sviluppo di un nuovo ordine internazionale multipolare? Il Partito comunista riuscirà a riformarsi e a governare una società sempre più diversificata? Quale rapporto l’Italia costruirà con la Repubblica popolare cinese?

Su queste e altre problematiche ci interroghiamo avvalendoci del contributo di studiosi, esperti e giornalisti.

Un misto di scetticismo e timore accompagna l’ascesa della Cina. Sentimenti esacerbati dalla perdita del primato delle economie avanzate e dalla rapidità e portata delle trasformazioni in corso in Asia, Africa e America latina.

Sforzarsi di comprendere senza pregiudizi dove va la Cina è importante, perché, in un’epoca di globalizzazione dei mercati e delle conoscenze, il risveglio – non privo di acute contraddizioni – di una nazione da 1 miliardo e 300 milioni di abitanti già influenza il futuro di tutti noi.

Name: The Signal
Description:
Current affairs. Strange world.

We’ve always needed to understand our world. Now, that’s more challenging than ever: Seemingly every aspect of our lives is transforming. Every place we live is globally and intricately connected. And we’re trying to navigate it all in a digital-media environment that’s dominated by algorithmic manipulation, partisan conflict, and polarizing spin from across the political spectrum.

The Signal is for people who want something different. We’re a U.S.-based current-affairs brand; we’re nonpartisan but committed to democracy and democratic life; and we have a deep belief in humanity. But above all, we’re in the business of complexity at a time of chronic change and uncertainty.

As we see it, none of us wholly owns the truth; those who think differently from us often know something we don’t; and what any of us does know is always surrounded by mystery. Which is why everything The Signal does starts with good questions, and every answer we find leads us to more of them.

If it sounds like we’re onto something, sign up for our free newsletter or become a member to access our full archive.

Description:

En effet, SNA vient combler le manque d’accès à l’information relative à l’actualité sportive africaine et renforcer la visibilité des sportifs africains évoluant aussi bien sur le continent qu’à l’extérieur.
SNA, c’est aussi une rédaction aux contenus 100% originaux
Tous les contenus publiés par SNA sont produits en interne par une équipe de rédacteurs experts du sport en Afrique et basés aux quatre coins du continent.
SNA, c’est aussi, un traitement quotidien du sport avec :

les infos sportives majeures en Afrique
les sportifs africains qui font l’actualité dans le monde
les news incontournables dans le sport mondial
Pas d’algorithme, mais une plateforme logicielle novatrice !
SNA bénéficie d’une plateforme de publication de contenus qui fonctionne sur le principe d’une salle de presse virtuelle qui permet de suivre en temps réel la production éditoriale et sa conformité aux règles du référencement.
SNA intègre également un dispositif technique performant qui lui permet d’offrir une expérience de navigation fluide et sécurisée.
Une couverture éditoriale unique sur le continent !
Non seulement SNA suit les 2 sports majeurs que sont le football et le basket, mais aussi tous les autres sports qui font l’actualité sportive africaine.
SNA c’est aussi le seul média sportif à avoir accordé une telle vitrine aux femmes sportives africaines avec une rubrique qui leur est totalement dédiée. C’est aussi le cas de l’E-sport qui trouve une place à part entière dans SNA.
Enfin SNA offre une couverture éditoriale du sport africain partout dans le monde.
Le sport en Afrique, un marché en pleine croissance
SNA offre à ses annonceurs un accès privilégié à un marché panafricain de consommateurs CSP+. Cette cible émergente est friande de produits de grande consommation, de produits hi-tech ainsi que de tous les ser

Description:
From Balloons to Drones, exploring the development of air power from the earliest days of flight to now and the future.

Air power remains the preferred weapon of choice for many governments. However, the application and development of air power are controversial and misunderstood.

To remedy this, 'From Balloons to Drones' is an online platform that seeks to provide analysis and debate about air power history, theory, and contemporary operations in their broadest sense including space and cyber power.

'From Balloons to Drones' seeks to encourage a healthy discussion over the use of air power and seeks contributions ranging from historical themes through to commentary on contemporary operations and challenges.

Name: Leiki - acquired by DoubleVerify

Leiki technology can understand any piece of text in a human-like manner. So instead of the human adapting to the machine, we make the machine adapt to the human.

Based on two decades of continuous R&D efforts and experience, Leiki’s Semantic AI technology analyses text with more than 200,000 topics connected to millions of rules, giving an unparalleled understanding of any given text. Every year, over 60 billion recommendations are served in 30 languages using our technology.

Founded in Finland in 2000, Leiki operates in Europe and the United States and partners with some of the most powerful brands in the world. Since 27 December 2018, Leiki has become a part of DoubleVerify, the leading independent provider of marketing measurement software, data and analytics. Leiki’s Semantic AI engine, ontology and unique expertise in contextual and audience analysis complement DoubleVerify’s comprehensive array of solutions for media transparency and accountability.

Name: GuestXR
Description:
The European project GuestXR is to develop an immersive virtual social space anchored in extended reality. It will feature a machine learning agent designed to unlock interactions between participants and help them achieve their goals while it additionally supports addressing conflicts in virtual environments such as the metaverse. 
A machine learning system called ‘The Guest’ is to be devised as an agent that can examine participants’ individual and group behaviour by drawing on existing theoretical models from the neuroscience and social psychology standpoint. Deep Reinforcement Learning will also give it the ability to learn over time and become more effective in terms of social interaction, learning from both simulations and real human meetings.

Acompáñame a entrevistar profesionales de diferentes sectores que, a través de su experiencia, nos cuentan las oportunidades de acceso a diferentes mercados, qué papel juegan las certificaciones, los retos que han tenido que superar, cuáles han sido sus estrategias o de dónde surgen algunas ideas. 

Descubre cómo diversificar la distribución de tu negocio y aumentar las cifras de tus ventas nacionales y de exportación.

Since then there has been no looking back. Today, from a humble beginning, we contribute in a small but powerful way towards promoting positive and ethical journalism.

Passion rules!

Unlike many media houses, which are profit and digits-driven, we at newskarnataka.com and its sibling newskannada.com, proudly proclaim that the news portals were born out of passion and not out of commercial interest.

They are undoubtedly the first of its kind crowd funded media undertakings, where it’s not the ‘owner’s’ interest that is paramount, but that of its readers, writers, contributors, employees and all who connect with it.It has spawned and supports our trademark‘truth endures’journalism where our journalists say what they want to say, honestly and without fear or favor. Newskarnataka.com is owned and published by Spearhead Media Pvt. Ltd. Visit https://www.spearheadpvtltd.com/ for more details.

Vision:

OUR MISSION 
To amplify queer voices, connect businesses with the LGBTQ+ community, and publish unapologetically honest, edgy, and inclusive stories in print and digital media.

VISION
A world where every LGBTQ+ person feels seen, represented, and empowered. We envision OFM as a household name in queer media—locally grounded, nationally resonant.

VALUES
Visibility * Integrity * Inclusion * Community care * Cultural leadership * Political Literacy

BRAND PROMISE
We tell the truth. We don’t flinch. We celebrate every letter and layer of the LGBTQ+ experience—even the messy, underrepresented, and politically inconvenient parts.

Name: Healthcare Soldiers Media
Description:
The Channel will provide content in the form of interviews of different members of the Nigerian Healthcare Industry at different levels and cadres, which will include and not limited to Pharmacists, Doctors, Nurses, Lab Scientists, Medical Representatives, leaders and administrators in healthcare institutions, pharmaceutical manufacturing and distribution companies.
The objective is to share the experiences of Healthcare workers from a professional and personal perspective to inspire, educate and possibly influence young professionals and students who might be interested in building a career in the Healthcare Industry.

The impact of the pandemic cut across various industries in different ways which range from the negative effect on the transportation and service industry and somewhat positive effect on other industries like Tech and IT.
One group of professionals that were uniquely affected were Healthcare workers, amongst other essential workers that were required to take risks to ensure the movement of goods and services were not at a complete stand still. 
Healthcare workers were synonymous with being at the front lines; whether it was the Doctors, Nurses & Lab scientists offering direct care or others like pharmacists, suppliers and manufacturers ensuring that the tools and  medication required were readily available to deliver care to patients and the general public that needed them.

Being at the front lines is synonymous with soldiers at war hence the decision to name the Channel *Healthcare Soldiers”.

Be inspired, be motivated, be challenged.

Name: Fanack | Chronicle of the Middle East & North Africa
Description:
Fanack is an independent organisation which aims to provide non-partisan facts and analysis of the Middle East & North Africa (MENA) and its history, society, economy, culture, water and energy crises from an Arab perspective. Fanack websites are tailored to those seeking a better understanding and knowledge of the wide variety of facets and assets of the region, be it students, academics, business people and policymakers, tourists and travellers.

The Fanack websites offers an unprecedented collection of free independent sources of information for those seeking a better understanding, new insights in and knowledge of the region. Its regional contributors (acclaimed academics and journalist) aim to present impartial comprehensive information from a local, regional and international perspective, looking beyond conventional topics such as security threats.

The Fanack Foundation (Stichting Fanack Nederland) has been set up in The Hague for international donors and organisations which share the idea of the importance of providing free, not biased or partisan, reliable information on the Middle East & North Africa region and wish to make a contribution.

The Fanack regional academics and journalist contributors are being kept anonymous to ensure the impartial comprehensive information on its websites.

Fanack is an independent organisation based in the Netherlands. It was founded by publisher and editor-in-chief Dr. Antonie Dake, former foreign correspondent and chief political editor for Dutch newspapers and public television.

Editorial and research teams are responsible for the websites, within the structure of the private limited company Fanack B.V. Contributors to Fanack.com include external scholars and journalists, mainly from Europe and the Middle East & North Africa region.

Name: Fédération Atlantique des Agences de Presse Africaines (FAAPA)
Description:
La Fédération Atlantique des Agences de Presse Africaines (FAAPA) est une plateforme professionnelle visant à promouvoir l’échange d’expériences, des informations et produits multimédia ainsi que l’échange d’idées et de réflexion sur l’avenir des agences de presse et sur le rôle qu’elles doivent jouer au 21ème siècle dans leurs diversités et leurs spécificités respectives, en tenant compte des  profondes mutations qui caractérisent le paysage médiatique dans le contexte de la mondialisation et à l’ère du multimédia.

La FAAPA s’est fixée pour objectifs d’asseoir un partenariat stratégique et de développer des relations professionnelles entre les agences de presse dans tous les domaines d’intérêt commun dont notamment l’information, la formation et les produits multimédia, outre la contribution à consolider la libre circulation de l’information ainsi que le renforcement de la coopération et de la coordination au niveau des forums régionaux et internationaux.

The Atlantic Federation of African Press Agencies (FAAPA) is a professional platform to encourage the exchange of experiences, information and multimedia products and to promote the exchange of ideas on the future of news agencies and the role they must play in the 21st century. This endeavor needs to take place in a manner that respects their diversity and their respective characteristics, while being fully aware of the profound changes of the media landscape in the context of globalization and the multimedia era.

FAAPA has set goals to establish a strategic partnership and develop professional relationships among news agencies in all areas of common interest, including information, training and multimedia products, in addition to contributing to strengthen the free flow of information and to promote cooperation and coordination in regional and international fora.

More than a digital and social media ad agency, Supply Chain Jobs CANADA, through our partnership network (with over 25 years industry experience), can also offer FULL RECRUITMENT SERVICES, for those ultra urgent, strictly confidential or truly unique SUPPLY CHAIN vacancies no matter the industry or sector - right across Canada.

Name: Interaction London
Description:
We are a full service Social Media Agency with strong academic links with the University of London. We work with a number of international brands on a global basis, researching, creating, executing and measuring Social Media campaigns.

Most audiences hold conversations within closed networks, therefore we only use 100% human intelligence to build an accurate picture of a brands digital footprint. By employing 72 individual metrics through our proprietary model we understand and quantify Key Influencer behaviour and Share of Voice across both open channels and closed communities.

Though we are not exclusively a research company, everything we do at Interaction London is informed by our rigorous research.

Name: Dutch Girls In Museums
Description:
Museumwereld stoffig? Niet als je met Dutch Girls In Museums (Daniëlle Lakeman en Iris Zaagman) gaat. De kunstkenners nemen je mee in de wondere wereld van musea in Nederland. Hoe dicht mag je eigenlijk op een schilderij staan? En hoe heeft kunst zich de afgelopen jaren ontwikkeld? Hoe kun je naar kunst kijken? De auteurs laten zien dat het om een beleving gaat zodra je over de drempel stapt van een museum. Laat je verrassen én verrijken met een nieuwe blik op kunst. ‘Kunst is voor iedereen. Ontdek jouw manier om naar kunst te kijken, net zoals wij dat doen!’

- Boek 'Dutch Girls In Museums: Nieuwe kijk op kunst'

Name: Event Report
Description:

Pubblica notizie di respiro nazionale e internazionale sul mercato degli eventi, del marketing e della comunicazione, e fornisce aggiornamenti sull'intera filiera: destinazioni, alberghi, centro congressi, location per eventi, agenzie e fornitoridi servizi per eventi, tecnologia, istituzioni, associazioni di settore.

Event Report propone anche articoli sui trend di mercato, riporta studi e ricerche italiani e internazionali, pubblica reporte case history di eventi, interviste ai professionisti del comparto e approfondimenti di taglio economico e tecnologico sui temi di maggiore attualità per il settore. 

Event Report pubblica due volte la settimana una newsletter che invia a un database di circa 40.000 contatti italiani specializzati nel settore meeting ed eventi.

Gli utenti del sito sono principalmente event/communication/marketing manager e meeting planner aziendali, agenzie di organizzazione eventi e PCO (professional congress organiser), agenzie di marketing e comunicazione integrata, incentive house, ma anche fornitori quali alberghi, centri congressi, location per eventi, società di servizi, convention bureau ed enti di promozione e marketing territoriale.

Name: The Fly
Description:
The Fly is a leading digital publisher of real-time financial news. Our mission is simple, but not easy: report and explain the news impacting publicly traded companies. Our exclusive live streaming subscription service breaks the material information moving stocks. If you need to know why a stock is moving, you need The Fly.
 
Our financial market experts understand that news impacting stock prices can originate from anywhere, at anytime. The Fly team scours all sources of company news, from mainstream to cutting-edge, then filters out the noise to deliver short-form stories consisting of only market moving content. Analyst research notes, company press releases, SEC filings, newspapers, blogs, social media and trading desk sources are among the many areas monitored by our experts. The Fly is your filter to the often complex world of stock news. 
 
The Fly was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Summit, New Jersey, with additional offices in New York and Argentina.

Description:
AfricaOnTheRise is committed to highlighting and propagating the positive changing realities of the African continent. This platform is changing the African conversation by monitoring, analyzing and sharing qualitative content about Africa’s rising potential, fostering development through the power of positive information and inspiring hope by humanizing the process of positive change.

AfricaOnTheRise is providing the entire continent of Africa and the rest of the world with a different view of Africa and Africans. It is succeeding in inspiring more people to get involved in the renaissance of Africa, and build a better economy and reality for the continent.

AfricaOnTheRise is the winner of the World Summit Awards for 'Digital Innovation', as well as the current holder of the African Blogger Awards for 'Best Blog about Africa' and 'Best Social Issues and Active Citizenship Blog'.

With the creation of a digital network, Sigmalive has become the leading digital content provider in Cyprus with more than 1,500,000 readers each month. Vi utvecklar ständigt tjänsten för ökad användarvänlighet och kraftfullare funktionalitet.  
Vi digitaliserar med hög kvalitet. Totalt har vi ca 85 miljoner bilder i vår tjänst.
Bildarkivet omfattar det mesta man behöver som släktforskare i Sverige och på Åland. Den information du hittar kan du spara i ett eget släktträd hos oss. 

Vi har även Sveriges största sökbara personregister som täcker åren 1800-1947 samt 1940, 1950, 1960, 1970, 1975, 1980, 1985 och 1990. 

Företaget startades 2005 och har cirka 35 anställda och 380 aktieägare

Whether you've bought bitcoin in 2009 or you've just started looking into this space, then this podcast is just for you.

Description:
Gardenstead is the world’s first social media platform dedicated to gardening. It’s a digital home where gardeners of all levels connect, share, and grow—plants and friendships alike. Download now on iOS and Android.

Join our global community of gardeners and plant lovers in over 120 countries. Whether you’re tending to a backyard or a balcony, Gardenstead brings you expert advice, local insights, and the tools to nurture your green space. 
Plants cultivate connections between people — from urban settings of balcony gardens and small spaces to rural backyards with larger and more expansive gardens. We believe we have an obligation to nourish these connections, and to inspire new ones — to provide a space where gardeners of all kinds can find what they need to keep growing.

Aicinām ieskaties mūsu produktu klāstā!

"iFinanses" ir pirmais un lielākais interneta žurnāls, kurā apkopota visa aktuālā informācija nodokļu, grāmatvedības un finanšu vadības jautājumos.

Interneta žurnāls "iTiesības" būs ikdienas palīgs tiesību aktu praktiskā pielietošanā un juridisku jautājumu risināšanā.

Interneta žurnālā "iBizness"  var lasīt nozares ekspertu un uzņēmēju padomus par vadītājiem svarīgiem jautājumiem.

Biznesa audiožurnālā "iAudio" klausies "iFinanses", "iTiesības" un "iBizness" rakstus audio formātā.

Apvienojoties drukātajiem žurnāliem "iFinanses" un "iTiesības", 2023. gada janvārī klajā nāca mūsu jaunākais izdevums – drukātais žurnāls "iFiT", kas būs katra mūsdienīga uzņēmuma padomdevējs par finanšu, grāmatvedības, darba, komerctiesību un vadības jautājumiem.

Uz tikšanos žurnālu lappusēs!

Name: Ma che razza di umani (What kind of humans)
Description: "What kind of humans!?" is a video storytelling format, published by Milano All News, the first Italian social web TV of local information (www.milanoallnews.it). The format tells special stories of normal people who, at some point in their lives, have had to or wanted to change, even radically, their point of view, their perspectives, improving themselves and the world around them. "What kind of humans!?" intercepts unique life paths. Each episode therefore brings to light stories of motivation and inspiration, often of rebirth, which always end with a call to action to the community: And you, what kind of human are you? These are narratives that make you feel, make you think and allow you to find inspiration for the improvement of your life. Even in a provocative way with an eye on important social issues of great relevance.

Vogliamo massimizzare il Rendimento di tutti i Professionisti del Benessere ed Operatori Olistici nella Consapevolezza di una Responsabilità umana globale.


La nostra Mission:

Name: VH Magazine
Description:
Nous sommes fiers d'annoncer une nouvelle étape pour *Version Homme*. Depuis vingt ans, nous partageons des articles inspirants et des reportages captivants qui ont enrichi nos vies. 

VH se lance dans une aventure passionnante avec le lancement d'une édition collector trimestrielle. Chaque numéro mettra en lumière des thèmes variés tels que le cinéma, le sport, la littérature, l'histoire, le patrimoine et la musique. Ces éditions seront une véritable célébration des passions qui nous animent, avec des mots soigneusement choisis et des images saisissantes. 

Cette nouvelle édition reflète notre engagement envers un Maroc généreux et accueillant. Nous croyons fermement que l'action et la réussite sont profondément ancrées dans notre culture, et nous souhaitons mettre en avant les histoires de ceux qui incarnent ces valeurs. Des artistes créatifs aux sportifs déterminés, en passant par notre riche patrimoine culturel et l'innovation de nos entrepreneurs, nous capterons l'esprit dynamique et hospitalier du Maroc à travers chaque page. 

VH, c'est aussi une présence quotidienne sur le digital. 

Nous vous invitons, chers lecteurs et partenaires, à nous accompagner dans cette nouvelle aventure. Ensemble, célébrons les réussites, découvrons de nouvelles perspectives et explorons les merveilles de notre monde.

A Kiszervezett Marketing 13x-os Marketing Diamond Awards-díjas ügynökség. Ezt a díjat a Magyar Marketing Szövetség ítélte oda számunkra, ami bizonyítja, hogy szakmailag kimagasló szolgáltatásokat nyújtunk az online marketing területén.

Büszkék vagyunk arra, hogy 2023-ban a Kiszervezett Marketing Kft. lett Az Év Marketing Nagykövete!

A Kiszervezett Marketing az a marketing ügynökség, amely nem olyan, mint a suszter és a cipője.

Ezt alátámasztja a 350+ szakmai blogcikkünk is, amelynek köszönhetően több mint 160.000 látogatónk van éves szinten a saját weboldalukon a Google Keresőből, fizetett hirdetések nélkül. Mindezt alig 1,5 év alatt értük el.

A megtervezett médiamegjelenésekkel folyamatosan ott vagyunk nagy hírportálok hasábjain a területünk szakértőjeként. Párat kiemelve: penzcentrum.hu, hirado.hu, hrportal.hu, origo.hu, blikk.hu.

Azért lehetünk Google Partnerek, mert rendelkezünk a Google által elismert szakértővel. Az ügyfeleink hirdetési kampányai kivétel nélkül minden esetben elérik a minimum 70%-os optimalizáltságot.

Tartottam már szakmai előadást több egyetemen online marketing témában, többek között: BME, BGE, ELTE, MATE, Óbudai Egyetem. Emellett a Magyar Marketing Fesztivál rendszeres előadójaként mutatom be a siker kulcsát a digitális térben.

We explore the best, most efficient, high-integrity ways of raising capital (Human & Financial).  We want our listeners to use their personal human capital to empower the growth of their financial capital.  Together we are stronger.

Name: Pagine Esteri
Description:
In un’era di saturazione dell’informazione, segnata dal lento e in apparenza inesorabile declino della carta stampata e dalla moltiplicazione di siti simili per contenuti e finalità, in prevalenza pubblicitarie, è sempre più arduo per chi naviga in rete poter approfondire temi di importanza centrale e arrivare a una maggiore comprensione dei motivi che sono dietro a guerre, crisi economiche, sollevazioni popolari, flussi migratori, sfruttamento del lavoro, forme nuove e vecchie di schiavitù, successi e arretramenti nell’emancipazione femminile in aree del mondo che pure sentiamo nominare ogni giorno.

La superficialità di gran parte dell’informazione in Internet, specie quella disponibile sui social, non aiuta a migliorare la conoscenza di culture diverse e lontane. Pagine Esteri, rivista online di approfondimento storico-politico-culturale, procede in controtendenza e offre ai suoi lettori una informazione solida e indipendente dal Medio Oriente, dall’Africa, dal Mediterraneo e da altre regioni del mondo, basata su analisi, reportage, documenti, recensioni di libri e produzioni culturali, contesti, podcast, video e foto non sempre disponibili in Italia. Pagine Esteri è diretta da Michele Giorgio, giornalista con una vasta esperienza in Medio Oriente, ed è edita dalla Spring Edizioni, casa editrice di lungo corso, gestita da giovani professionisti del settore, da sempre attenti alle tematiche dei diritti e della corretta informazione. Si avvale della collaborazione di analisti, accademici, esperti italiani e stranieri e punta sulla valorizzazione di giovani reporter, per contribuire a dare slancio alla scrittura e alla produzione giornalistica per le nuove generazioni.

Alan sincerely wanted to respond to the many requests from aspiring entrepreneurs asking for the information and introductions they needed. But he had to find a way to help in which his venture capital clients and friends would not mind. The American Dreams show became the solution, first as a radio show and now with YouTube videos as well. Always respectful of interview guest’s time, he’s able to give access to individuals information and inspiration previously inaccessible to the first-time entrepreneurs who need it most. They can listen to venture capitalists and successful business people explain first-hand, how they got to where they are, how to start a company, how to overcome challenges, how they see the future evolving, opportunities, work-life balance and so much more..

Topics from guest have included:

Creating purpose in life

Building a foundation for their life

Solving problems

Finding fulfillment through philanthropy and service

Becoming self-reliant

Enhancing effective leadership

Balancing family and work

American Dreams discusses many topics from some of the world's most successful individuals about their secrets to life's success.

Name: PsychoQuoi
Description:
Bienvenu sur PsychoQuoi !

Quoi ?
Une page soutenue par un collectif de professionnels pour aborder des sujets qui leur ressemblent.

Quels sujets ?
Nous abordons de nombreux sujets qui ont tous pour point commun la psychologie.

Où ?
Exclusivement sur LinkedIn (pour le moment).

Pourquoi ?
Beaucoup de personnes parlent, évoquent, abordent et expliquent la psychologie, notamment sur LinkedIn, et nous voulons aussi participer à ces échanges mais, à notre manière.

Comment ?
Très bonne question ! Pour cela, nous avons différents principes :
Lutter contre les idées reçues, les fausses croyances, les savoirs erronés, les connaissances manipulées, concernant la psychologie et les experts en psychologie.
Valoriser le doute, la prudence, la remise en question, sur les réseaux sociaux et de manière générale, au travers du champ de la psychologie.
Proposer des références dans le domaine de la psychologie pour orienter, guider, accompagner les personnes souhaitant s’informer et se former.
Sensibiliser et prévenir sur les risques de l’acceptation, l’utilisation et la manipulation d’informations tronquées en psychologie.
Promouvoir des postures et des visions de professionnels en psychologie.
Pour finir, donnant du sens à notre slogan ! 

Qui ?
Nous sommes un collectif de professionnels en psychologie qui souhaitent aborder des sujets de psychologie de façon claire, authentique, éthique et fiable.

Name: The Austin Grand Prix
Description:
The Austin Grand Prix (AGP) is Austin’s award winning website spreading awareness and raising support for motorsports in Austin, beginning with the return of the Formula 1 United States Grand Prix in Austin, Texas in November 2012. The AGP community brings a balanced perspective to the world of motorsports and connects curious minds with the knowledge needed to become dedicated fans.

Focused on leveraging new media strategies to develop a modern approach to sports media, AGP was recognized by Austin’s major daily newspaper, the Austin American-Statesman, in their 4th Annual Social Media Awards, being named The Statesman Social Media Awards 2012 Overall Winner.

Founded in Austin in May of 2010, AGP was created to bridge the gap between Austinites and motorsports fans worldwide.

Name: Research Africa (Pty) Ltd
Description:
Research Professional Africa is an essential online resource for researchers, research and innovations managers, research directors,development officers and policymakers in Africa with authoritative and appropriately highlighted information of over 50,000 research funding opportunities and 11,000 funders to enable sustained research for African development. 

An African-staffed newsroom, together with a network of regional news correspondents, covers the African science, policy and research funding news relevant to Research Africa readers weekly. 

In addition to managing these two key product offerings, the company, which was established in 2006, has widened its services to the research and development community in Africa to include providing communication services to key research-driven development projects, such as the Network for Coordination and Advancement of Sub-Saharan Africa-EU Science and Technology Cooperation (CAAST-Net). 

Research Africa also undertakes various consultancies and professional development training activities in the area of research management development and capacity building.

Research Africa counts universities, government departments, research institutes, think tanks and development agencies from 24 African countries amongst its many subscribers and users, and continues to grow its client base.

“Karen Bruns and her team at Research Africa are an innovative group in the field of research in Africa. Developing an effective web-based research funding database and providing intelligence on science, Research Africa is a trustful business partner, delivering quality products and technical advice of high quality.” - Nicole Généreux, Partnership office at International Development Research Centre (IDRC), Canada

Name: Fishipedia.fr
Description:
Fishipedia est une encyclopédie interactive en ligne dédiée à la biodiversité aquatique. Organisée autour de fiches espèces, de médias et d’outils de découverte, elle vise à diffuser des connaissances scientifiques accessibles au plus grand nombre, dans une démarche d’intérêt général au service du vivant.

Avec près de 3,5 millions de visiteurs par an en 2025, Fishipedia est le premier site francophone et hispanophone consacré aux poissons. Elle constitue également une référence en France sur les thématiques de l’aquariophilie et de la plongée.

Au-delà de l’activité web, Fishipedia conçoit et déploie des systèmes d’information et de médiation pour les aquariums publics et différents acteurs du secteur aquariophile : cartels et signalétique, contenus pédagogiques, parcours de visite et outils numériques de valorisation des espèces.

Fishipedia s’appuie sur des partenariats scientifiques à portée internationale, notamment avec FishBase, ainsi que sur un réseau d’une dizaine d’aquariums, dont La Cité de la Mer et Planet Ocean. Nous co-développons avec ces structures des solutions de sensibilisation et de valorisation de la biodiversité, y compris à travers des projets menés avec des aquariums et associations, en particulier en Amérique du Sud.

Enfin, nous collaborons avec des acteurs de l’aquariophilie, de l’édition, du jeu et de la mode, dans une approche éthique et cohérente avec nos objectifs éducatifs, sociaux et écologiques.
