Name: CARS PASSION – Blog Auto | Moto | Lifestyle
Description:
Dans l’univers automobile et moto, Cars Passion est un blog de passionnés qui vous fera vibrer, rêver en photos et vidéos ! L’équipe du blog traite des sujets autour de l’automobile, de la moto à 2 et 3 roues, avec une attention particulière à réaliser de belles photographies. Tout récemment, notre passion pousse les portes du lifestyle et du luxe avec le prêt-à-porter et les maisons horlogères. Pour traiter de tous ces sujets aussi passionnant les uns des autres, une équipe de 3 personnes s’attache à produire le meilleur contenu à travers le blog. Toutes les photos et vidéos diffusées nous appartiennent, une fierté pour l’équipe de réaliser de A à Z nos reportages. 

Le blog Cars Passion cherche à se différencier de la blogosphère existante avec la mise en scène de nos essais en vidéo par de courtes séquences dynamiques nous amènent a être unique. Les photos sont traitées d’une manière qualitative tout en respectant notre ligne éditoriale. Nos essais autos et motos sont compréhensibles par tous, finis les essais techniques avec un vocabulaire très poussé, nous parlons avec notre passion le plus simplement possible. L’idée c’est de vous partager notre ressenti sur un essai, une ambiance, un détail...

Notre passion se prolonge également sur les réseaux sociaux où le nombre d’abonnés continue d’être croissant, vous êtes de plus en plus nombreux, plusieurs milliers de fans nous suivent et nous répondons à chaque commentaire, ce qui nous pousse à faire encore mieux pour les prochaines fois.

N’hésitez pas à visiter notre blog Cars Passion.  

http://www.leblog-carspassion.fr/

Name: The Daily Report
Description:
Founded in 2019, The Daily Report grew out of the need for unadulterated and non-biased news in India. 
After a short hiatus, the founders at TDR did some soul-searching and realized that they couldn't deny their passion anymore. What are they passionate about, you ask? Animals!   
Fast forward to 2022 and The Daily Report has now become the only true online news source for dog lovers across the nation. TDR features an animal-focused blog enriched with well-researched information on canine health and a steady stream of pup-related stories. 
We at The Daily Report strive to bring like-minded folks together who share our unparalleled love and welfare for not only dogs and cats but all our furry, feathered, and scaly animal friends. 
From pet-oriented news and inspirational stories of animal activism to crowdfunding for rescued animals, TDR is heading towards becoming India's largest and most trusted platform for a wide variety of audiences in the pet industry. 

"When I look into the eyes of an animal, I do not see an animal. I see a living being. I see a friend. I feel a soul." - Anthony Douglas Williams

Name: Codesign
Description:
Although Codesign's history dates back to the early 2000s, we accept the year 2008, when we registered our brand as a milestone.

We have accomplished numerous projects over the past years. We provided website design and development services to many brands. We contributed to the branding process of institutions by carrying out digital marketing activities for the projects we prepared. 

"You can only have the hands to untie the tightest knots by working hard."

We stepped in at any point you needed us in the field of internet and digital marketing. Sometimes we used our ideas and implementation power to maximize your existing infrastructure. Even if you did not start your journey with us, we supported you every step of the way, from the smallest to the largest. In some cases we have only solved "a" problem, we have compassed the biggest projects in some.

Her ne kadar Codesign'ın geçmişi 2000'li yılların başına dayansa da milat olarak markamızı tescil ettiğimiz 2008 yılını kabul ediyoruz.

Geçen yıllar içerisinde sayısız projeye imza attık. Pek çok markaya web sitesi tasarım ve geliştirme hizmeti sunduk. Hazırladığımız projeler için dijital pazarlama faaliyetleri yürüterek kurumların markalaşma sürecine katkı yaptık. 

"En sıkı düğümleri çözecek ellere ancak çok çalışarak sahip olabilirsiniz."

İnternet ve dijital pazarlama konusunda siz hangi noktada bize ihtiyaç duyduysanız o noktada devreye girdik. Yeri geldi fikirlerimizi ve uygulama gücümüzü var olan altyapınızı en üst seviyeye çıkarmak için kullandık. Yolculuğunuza bizimle başlamamış olsanız da size en küçükten en büyüğe her adımda destek olduk. Sadece "bir" soruna çözüm de olduk, en büyük projelere pusula da.

Il nome (FoodEconomy) è una intuizione di Vittorio Angelaccio (co-founder di questo spazio di confronto online), imprenditore molisano, “adottato” dalla città di Firenze. E’ anche uno dei creatori (assieme al fratello Edmondo) del marchio “King of Truffles” (realtà isernina attiva nella lavorazione di prodotti a base di tartufo).

In questo nuovo viaggio editoriale lo affiancherà Marcel Vulpis, giornalista economico romano attento agli effetti dell’economia in alcuni specifici comparti. Da sempre nello sport (business), adesso debutta mondo del food.

Name: Studentski.hr
Description: Ideja „studentskiHR“ javila se zbog potrebe studenata za objektivnim informacijama koje se ne prilagođavaju interesnim skupinama i pritiscima trećih strana. Od samoga početka stava smo kako informativni sadržaj moraju kreirati studenti sami te da je potrebno obuhvatiti cijelu hrvatsku akademsku zajednicu s posebnim naglaskom na sveučilišne centre kao što su Zagreb, Split, Osijek, Rijeka i sl. Nakon analize web rješenja koje smo željeli ponuditi studentima, odlučili smo realizirati dodatna rješenja koja poboljšavaju studentski standard i potiču studente na aktivno pomaganje zajednici. Detaljnom analizom postojećih web rješenja i svakodnevne potrebe studenata, izrađena je detaljna specifikacija koja bi, kada se realizira, trebala svakodnevno i osjetno unaprijediti studentski standard i obrazovanje. U programskom rješenju koje ima obilježja društvene mreže predvidjeli smo sljedeće funkcionalnosti: digitalnu bazu studentskih skripta i materijala, oglasni prostor, profile studentskih udruga i projekata, bazu studentskih poslova i informacije o svim relevantnim studentskim institucijama.

Wait! nasce nel 2003 come Free Press indipendente. 

In pochi anni si conquista uno spazio importante nel panorama italiano di settore. Il nostro gruppo editoriale nel 2005 si è arricchito con la creazione di alcuni blog tematici rientranti nel progetto Dada Life.

Nel 2015, con la spinta sempre più forte del web Wait decide di diventare una company 100% digitale e puntare su nuovi progetti web innovativi.

Nel marzo 2015 nasce Wait Order /www.waitorder.com il primo showroom online italiano.

Nel 2016, dopo oltre 2 anni di lavoro vede la luce il progetto più importante: SHOPenauer / www.shopenauer.com
un portale innovativo e unico che include:

1-  Una guida (ai migliori brand, store e showroom del mondo)

2- Un marketplace, dove si possono acquistare i prodotti dei migliori shop e marchi collegati.

3- Un Social (dove ogni utente puo' creare il suo profilo personale, seguire altre persone, brand e negozi che ama)

SHOPenauer, vuole essere la più completa ed evoluta guida web interattiva ai migliori brand e negozi del mondo, e allo stesso tempo un marketplace che raduni i migliori prodotti dei migliori shop online.

Nel 2019 nasce anche WAIT STUDIOS, una casa di produzione foto/video che produce film, video, editoriali, advertising con la collaborazione dei migliori talenti, affermati o emergenti, del panorama italiano.

Description:
Entrepreneurs Dedicated to Growth and Excellence (EDGE)

EDGE is a Community Business Organization with media solutions, representing small/med size businesses & business owners in the Tampa Bay Region. With EDGE - it's not only Business, it's Personal

EDGE Media Hub was founded by businesswoman & entrepreneur, Kelly Wilson in August of 2013. For over a decade Kelly was in search of a community with like-minded individuals that were innovative, creative, supportive, positive and genuine. She was looking for a community that was not transaction focused; she wanted to build and nurture authentic relationships. Kelly’s search was unsuccessful, so she decided to create her own. 

EDGE started as a community organization, connecting business owners and entrepreneurs through membership and events. EDGE provided mentors and educational opportunities to learn from other leaders in the community, to share stories of success and failure and to grow together. Over the years EDGE has continued to evolve to provide the tools and resources that the community needed.

Today, EDGE Media Hub is a multi-platform media company specifically designed to assist small/ medium size business owners with gaining a voice, community connections, visibility and influence. We merged our community-based approach with powerful data-driven analytics and digital technology to help our business community grow and succeed.

EDGE continues to provide opportunities of personal & professional growth through all platforms. The key that has continued to boost EDGE’s growth is COMMUNITY. Now Combined with powerful DATA ANALYTICS & DIGITAL TECHNOLOGY we are unmatchable.

With EDGE – it’s not only business, it’s personal.
Find out more today!!

Quota.Media's specialist food systems community embraces the global business, policy and research fields. Our authoritative and unifying take fosters alignment across these fields, to help improve global food security.

Quota supports professional decisions by the food systems community through:
- Stay ahead of what's hot, impress everyone at work: sign up for the Best Quota https://quota.media/daily-quota/
- Fresh, investigative journalism – on everything from innovation to catastrophe.
- Great research that needs a wider audience for true impact.
- Monthly briefings on the biggest topics in food.
- Events, classified ads, a shop and advertising partnerships. 

Quota keeps your team updated, informed and inspired. We connect your team into the bigger picture and wider purpose of food systems – and that has a tangible impact on motivation and productivity. 

Quota is for those working in food and studying it, as well as the food curious – passionate amateurs. 

We deliver behind the scenes insights from decision-makers responsible for today's food systems.

At Quota we are on the side of food security. That’s it. We are endlessly curious about the relationship between environmental sustainability, commodities markets, farming, science, policies and food agencies, whose efforts combine to create today's food systems. 

Our primal response to good food is never forgotten. We love our food.

And we love good journalism. Our business model prioritises the re-investment of income into our award-winning reporting.

By always asking the business, research and policy communities to consider one another, by presenting their news in an integrated format, and combining their insights and aspirations through our events, we will strengthen the relationships across food systems for the benefit of food security.

Quota is where great minds think aloud.

Name: Across The Lines Podcast
Description:
What is Across The Lines?
Across The Lines is a podcast that highlights the stories of Pan Asian American leaders and explores the intersection of their personal and professional journeys. Our vision is to inspire and empower the next generation of leaders through candid conversations about the confluence of identity and work.

Why we chose the name “Across The Lines”?
There are often lines that compartmentalize us. There are lines between being Asian vs being American. Are you ever Asian enough? Are you ever American enough? There are lines drawn between our personal and professional lives. We believe who you are as a person is inextricable from you are as a professional. Throughout the podcast, we aim to delve into all the intersections that influence how we show up at work and in the world. We want you to be inspired to go across the lines to be your true self; whoever that may be.

How to listen?
Listen to Across The Lines on iTunes, Spotify, Google Podcasts, or Anchor. You can also subscribe to our newsletter on our website to join us for future conversations.

Name: Fursa Africa
Description:
In 2016, a group of like-minded individuals who shared a vision for giving back to the community voluntarily with what they had in grey matter and skills came together and formed what is now known as Opportunities in Kenya. 
Born by the need to bridge the gap between Kenyan graduates or prospective employees and employers, business start-ups and investors, mature companies, and the market the group has always been clear on what its yardstick for success in the country shall be. IMPACT!
In 2020, again under strenuous economic conditions arising from the worldwide pandemic that is Covid-19, people around the world have rendered jobless, businesses have shut down, families depressed, many left in critical conditions, and others dead.
With the rise in unprecedented unemployment, Opportunities in Kenya under her thriving projects arm decided to grant her members an opportunity to impact the world through the creation of a special purpose vehicle built for information dissemination pegged on individual members' strengths.
With the knowledge of the goldmine that Africa is, the Canaan of the world, the land of no limits, a child was been born.
Beautiful, colorful, and with white teeth she is now ready to pounce on the market, with her maiden name only close to royalty - Fursa Africa!!
Having been born at a time of uncertainty, Fursa Africa is dynamic and limitless. Fearless. Energetic. Young. Formless.
Fursa is a Swahili word. Written in the love language of the great Eastern Africa, Fursa connotes an opportunity - a chance for one to advance, to progress, and to profit.
Fursa Africa is an open-access website that boasts of millions of users who are engaged in the creation of original and clean content across thousands of topics that are of interest to the world.
We are focused on talking about social, political, economic issues including business, technology, investment, entrepreneurship, leadership, lifestyle, trade, globalization, poverty, environment, and health-related

Name: AU agenda urbana
Description:
Pequeña y de bolsillo, AU es una revista cultural, mensual, gratuita e independiente. Nuestra misión es rehabilitar el debate sobre la escena cultural y de ocio en Valencia y área metropolitana.
Porque el acceso fácil a la cultura es nuestro compromiso, cada mes ponemos en manos de nuestros lectores una selección de los mejores eventos; toda la música, el cine, el teatro, las exposiciones y mucho más. Un equipo de colaboradores ha puesto su afán y su empeño en esta tarea.
La recopilación de actividades culturales de una ciudad es una labor complicada y puede parecer arbitraria, AU ha creado su plataforma online, un espacio abierto a la participación de todos los ciudadanos. Por eso somos la agenda más completa de la ciudad de Valencia.

Edición online: www.au-agenda.com

Name: SofiaStartup
Description:
A common Bulgarian saying implies that a shared trouble is twice as easy to handle, meaning that when problems are spoken and communicated between agencies, it is more likely to find solutions to them collectively.  After all, we are all puzzled by the same stuff, why not collaborate? 

In a nutshell, Sofia Start Up (SUP) aims for developing an interaction and connectedness in Sofia’s startup society by bringing people closer together and thus resolving common issues that would later on have impact on a global scale. It is a cause, rather than a means to an end. Perhaps a cause with a well-thought means to an end!

Description:

intiLampung.com dalam mencari dan menyajikan berita sesuai dengan Pedoman Media Siber. Semangat jurnalis intiLampung.com dalam melaporkan suatu kejadian atau peristiwa berdasarkan fakta, diharapkan menjadi informasi yang bermanfaat masyarakat. intiLampung.com tentu akan menyajikan berita-berita terbaru dan terpcercaya dengan mengusung semangat jurnalisme yang bisa dipertanggungjawabkan.

Visi
Berpartisipasi dalam pembangunan Lampung melalui Media dengan mencari dan menyajikan informasi yang bersifat edukatif

Misi
- Menyajikan informasi yang bermanfaat dan berkualitas serta berpegang pada kode etik
- Menjadi media yang independen, berimbang dan bebas dari segala tekanan
- Bersinergi dengan pemerintah Provinsi Lampung dan seluruh Kota/Kabupaten dalam menyalurkan informasi kepada masyarakat
- Mengakomodir aspirasi masyarakat secara adil dalam mengkritisi pemangku kebijakan untuk kemajuan Provinsi Lampung

PT. Media Inti Lampung

Name: city.solutions
Description:
City.Solutions is a platform that enables cities and challenge owners to globally communicate, scout, and implement technologies and solutions to promote the transformation into sustainable cities.

This platform is a joint venture between Startup Guide, a global publishing and media company that has mapped more than 60 startup ecosystems, and Urban Impact, a Berlin-based innovation agency working on transforming urban systems at the intersection of startups and cities.

Born from the belief that local innovation is crucial to solving some of the most complex issues of our time, City.Solutions focuses on implementing existing solutions and technologies rather than finding the next big idea. It gets innovation into the hands of those who need it, sharing insights to ensure these solutions reach every corner of the globe, city by city.

The battle for the sustainable development of our planet will be won or lost depending on how we innovate our cities.

The good news is that many solutions and technologies are already out there.

We just need to implement them.

#Diplomacy #Tourism #Investment #AfricaDay #Mozambique50 #Agenda2063

Name: myhoogah
Description:
OUR VISION
“We hope to inspire you to discover, celebrate & share your happiness –  one hoogah at a time!”

We are an omnichannel, community-driven, media platform. We hope to kick-start a happy movement. Join us. Let's make happy contagious. The world needs loads of it!

DISCOVER your tiny pockets of happy. They can be many, they can change, they can be different as hell. Who cares, It’s your happy! Own it!

FIND your tribe that loves your quirk and celebrates your weirdness as you do!

CELEBRATE life & love. Lace your life with simple joys, inspirations, stories, laughter and lots of love. If not now, when?

MAKE handmade memories! Coz handmade is made with love and just for you! Move over Gucci, me rockin’ a vintage stole (made by grandma!), and how!

SHARE food & laughter. A whole lotta soul, stories, recipes, conversations and love is waiting to be shared over dal-khichdi; gnocchi and Maggi ;) Come on over.

GIVE happy back to the world. It always comes back!

Making happy contagious will take time and that’s ok. We will build this movement together- one hoogah at a time! You in?

OUR STORY
Most of our lives, we are pursuing happiness. But guess what! We most likely don’t know what truly makes us happy! Here’s a not so fun fact: When we don’t know what makes us happy, anything makes us happy!

We are living in the most connected, ‘social’ world, yet we seem to be the most disconnected lot. We need to break away from stupid, social stereotypes and the overwhelming need to conform and ‘appear perfect’!

There is no correct answer to what makes us happy! ‘Take a path that feels right for me’ is what we need to do. The 'journey' is what makes us happy.

We then got thinking,…if sadness, hatred, being fake, loneliness, ‘insta perfection’ can be contagious, then we surely can create a space where happiness, kindness, ‘being you’, raw, ‘anything but perfect’ is celebrated! myhoogah was born!

Name: Pardesi
Description:
Pardesi is a platform and community which celebrates, empowers and amplifies the voices of South Asian women and femmes around the world. Over the last two years, we have built a collaborative multimedia space rooted in powerful storytelling and community building. We strive to create a space which has the message of love and acceptance, and through our events,  development programmes and working with other platforms and individuals, we hope to present a new kind of digital community - a supportive, positive community where collaboration is valued over competition.

We encourage South Asian women to claim and find power in our identities by providing genuine representation and amplifying successes within the community.

Pardesi currently has over 10,000 followers across social media and is run by a core team of South Asian women and femmes. We host social events, workshops, programming, and in 2021 we launched the first ever global mentorship programme for South Asian women and non binary people. 

In 2023, supported by GirlDreamer, we launched our first queer zine - To Love is To Hope: South Asian Queer Experiences.

Name: Gutenberg Research
Description:
Gutenberg Research is an interactive earnings modeling community. Our Purpose is to drive the evolution of equity research through financial modeling. Our Goal is to make earnings models for all publicly traded companies available to all research participants. Our Vision is an ultra-efficient research market where all participants are able to contribute their opinions in a challengeable environment backed by both qualitative and quantitative support. Our Mission is to grow the Gutenberg community, seeking out like minded analysts who share our vision for the future of research, and educate and empower those who wish to join our efforts.
  
The Gutenberg name and philosophy are inspired by the fifteenth century visionary and inventor of the printing press, Johannes Gutenberg. Gutenberg's press forever altered the state of communication and flow of information through the mass production of books, changing literacy from a luxury of an elite few, to a right of all people. Now, taking a page from Johannes Gutenberg’s book, we are making earnings models available to the masses, rather than tools available only to the highest paying clients. 

We believe that our community’s collective knowledge will provide the best forecasting insight. To help facilitate the discussion between our members, we provide spreadsheet templates for analysis: our consensus-based earnings models which represent a “base-case” scenario for each subject company. Our community members can then download these base-case scenario spreadsheets, and input their own assumptions to add their opinion related to a particular stock’s earnings and valuation prospects.

We are growing our network of contributors, first seeking out those with prior modeling experience to assist in the build of our consensus-based model inventory, and then expanding the network to capture the opinion of a wide group of market participants. We have a long road ahead of us, but we are off to a great start…stay tuned!

Name: Bodhi
Description:
Bodhi is het platform voor hedendaagse en historische boeddhistische wijsheid, informatie en actualiteit. Met verhalen, reportages, interviews en columns onderzoeken we de dynamiek tussen het boeddhisme en de huidige cultuur en samenleving. We verspreiden het boeddhistisch gedachtegoed en houden het levend.

We informeren belangstellenden over de boeddhistische programma’s op de televisie en geven daarover achtergrondinformatie. We verkennen frisse perspectieven en bespreken gebruiken en technieken om verlicht(er) te leven. Centraal bij Bodhitv staan het cultiveren van inzicht en compassie – het ontdekken van de werkelijkheid zoals zij is, en zorgdragen voor een mooiere wereld.

We nemen de kern van de boeddhistische leer als uitgangspunt: De wens van alle wezens om vrij te zijn van lijden (dhukkha).

Oorsprong
Bodhi is van oorsprong een initiatief voor jongeren van de Boeddhistische Omroep Stichting (BOS). Per 31 december 2015 is de BOS gestopt als onafhankelijke publieke omroep. Bodhitv kon wél blijven bestaan dankzij de steun van ‘Stichting Vrienden van de BOS’, ooit opgericht om naast de uitzendingen van de BOS ondersteunende activiteiten te ontplooien. Per 1 januari 2017 is de naam Stichting Vrienden van de BOS gewijzigd in: ‘Stichting Vrienden van de Boeddhistische Media’. Via Bodhi houdt zij de boeddhistische inspiratie en dialoog levend. Op de colofon pagina lees je wie er verantwoordelijk zijn voor het maken en vullen van deze website.

Waarom de naam Bodhi?
Het woord ‘bodhi’ komt uit het Sanskriet en betekent ‘ontwaken’. Het is de wortel van het woord Boeddha en boeddhisme.

Algemene vragen of opmerkingen?
Mail naar: info [at] bodhitv.nl

Heb je een vraag voor de redactie?
Mail naar: redactie [at] bodhitv.nl

Name: Litteraturnu
Description:
LitteraturNu er aktuel litteraturkritik. Vi holder dig orienteret om, hvad der sker lige nu i litteraturens verden. Vi anmelder de vigtigste udgivelser, men har også fokus på de skæve bøger og dem, der trykkes i mindre oplag. Vi anbefaler og fraråder og viser vej til live litteratur i byen.
 
LitteraturNu er kompetent litteraturkritik. Alle vore anmeldere har en faglig baggrund inden for universitetsverdenen, journalistikken eller forlagsbranchen, og det giver dem en solid indsigt i de felter og problemstillinger, som de skriver om. På LitteraturNu deler de deres begejstring og viden med dig.
 
LitteraturNu er levende og udfordrende litteraturkritik. Den gode anmeldelse er klar, saglig og fængende. Vi har altid en holdning til de bøger, vi anmelder, og vi argumenterer for den.
 
Det litterære webmagasin LitteraturNu blev grundlagt i 2004 af journalist Jannie Schjødt Pedersen og litterat Nanna Goul. LitteraturNu opstod som et ønske om at danne en ny dansk platform for litteraturkritik og litteraturformidling, der kunne forene det faglige og saglige blik på litteraturen med et tilgængeligt, klart og levende udtryk. Den største ambition er at vise, at litteraturkritik kan give næring til hovedet og samtidig være en behagelig, underholdende og morsom oplevelse.

The foundation continues the lifework of “Przekrój” magazine’s founders by reviving and promoting the heritage of the magazine into the cultural life of Poland and beyond in many areas, such as arts, literature and education. Thus, PRZEKRÓJ Foundation’s aim is to establish itself as a uniquely equipped cultural organization, cultivating and growing the value of “Przekrój”’s inimitable worldview as Poland’s cultural heritage. The Foundation inspires and creates cultural events in Poland and abroad.

”We want to participate in creating the sort of world in which we would like to live, keeping in mind that we all have the power to change it. The beauty of each human being manifests itself in her or his talent, which can be used to change the world for the better. What we take on enables us to be more broadly involved in social life, by bringing in such values as health, gratitude, development, enthusiasm, and love.”

Tomek Niewiadomski, Founder of PRZEKRÓJ Foundation

Description:

Each issue of PS paisea focuses on a single project, studying it thoroughly, from the first ideas to its execution. In the case of small-scale projects, the issue will showcase up to 3 designs.

This will allow to show how in landscape architecture, even the seemingly simple interventions can be relatively complex.

It allows to get to know the landscape architecture interventions in all its variables and throughout all its layers, achieving to appreciate the final result.

Furthermore, each issue includes an assessment. It is a text written with the purpose of offering complementary visions to those offered by the authors of the project, to narrate the landscape experience already lived and to highlight, from a subjective point of view, the most interesting aspects of each intervention.  

As it was done with the magazines paisea and paiseaDos, pspaisea is published in Spanish and English, in order to reach all those interested, in Spain and in other countries both. 

Each two months an issue will be released, that is to say, 6 issues a year.

Description:

LES INTERVENANTS :

Président : Eric Le Bot
Dirigeant de la société Art House,  société de distribution cinéma, avec notamment LA FAMILLE ASADA.

Vice-Président : Masa Sawada
Producteur japonais installé en France, appui principal pour les coproductions entre les deux pays, il a notamment produit LES DÉLICES DE TOKYO ou L’INFIRMIÈRE.

Responsable Développement : Marta Tanese

QU’EST-CE QUE HANABI ?

·      UN MÉDIA SUR LE JAPON :
Une newsletter bimensuelle sur les événements Japonais en France, une revue critique dans les lieux japonais de France, un site web reprenant l’actualité cinématographique et culturelle, un vidéo-club pour découvrir les films japonais après le cinéma.

·      UNE AGENCE ÉVÉNEMENTIELLE :
HANABI organise de nombreuses avant-premières originales autour des films (immersion de 5h, dégustations, transversalité des arts, rencontres…) et, constatant l’attrait de ces événements, a décidé de lancer en 2019 un festival de cinéma : LES SAISONS HANABI.

·      UNE COMMUNAUTÉ TRÈS ENGAGÉE :
En seulement deux ans, plus de 100 000 français sont inscrits sur les réseaux sociaux (Facebook, Instagram, Twitter, Pinterest, Youtube) ou via la newsletter, attirés aussi bien par la culture traditionnelle que par la pop culture, démontrant qu’une passerelle est possible entre les deux univers.

Napi 24 órában adunk friss és pontos keresztmetszetet az ict-szektorról és a hozzá kapcsolódó üzleti életről – legyen szó az ágazatot érintő kardinális kérdésekről, vagy akár csak rövid, érdekes hírekről. Naponta frissülő publicisztikai rovat, karrier-, cég- és tenderszkenner.

Portfóliónk központi eleme továbbra is az itbusiness prémium magazin marad, amely, egyedüliként az ict-média piacán, ténylegesen heti periodicitású lapként jelenik meg. 2011-től már a megjelenés napján is digitálisan hozzáférhető az itbusiness hetilap.

Hagyományos, havonta jelentkező klubrendezvényeinken az ict-vonatkozású témák mellett egyre nagyobb teret kaptak a cégvezetést közvetlenül támogató területek. S a jövőben megszervezendő konferenciáinkat is erre a kettős tematikára építjük fel.
 
Az IT-Business Publishing a jövőben is az ict-világ meghatározó szereplőjeként, ügyfelei valódi szakmai médiapartnereként kíván fellépni. Az ict-piacra fókuszálva képesek vagyunk piacelemzések készítésére, a háztartások fizetőképességében, a hirdetők által elérni kívánt célcsoportok igényeiben bekövetkező változások értelmezésére. Így az IT-Business Publishing a kommunikációs felületek biztosításán túl valódi médiaszakmai tanácsadással is támogatja partnereit.

Description:
Elite Sports NY is a Digital Sports Media Publication delivering News, Views, Interviews, Real-Time Coverage, and Unique Commentary on everything New York Sports and National/Trending Topics.

ESNY is, by far, the most read independent New York City regional digital sports destination in the world (nearly half a million monthly visitors).

The Elite Sports Regional Network is where the “Diehards Come to Play.”

When it comes to sports, diehard knowledge will always be respected, especially in New York City. With too many outlets thinking entertainment and about the casual fan only, the diehards have few places to legitimately turn to. They have nowhere to go in terms of platforms actually talking about the game itself or “breaking plays down” at the level of respect it deserves.

The big guys simply cannot do it from a national level. What’s worse is those satellite team blogs under the big guys’ name employ writers who wouldn’t know a Cover 1 Robber or the difference between Control and Command if it smacked them in the face. Elite Sports doesn’t come at you with fancy dressed-up blog names like “Yanks in the Yard,” either. We simply deliver you the diehard information and analysis you crave.

City-by-city, sport-by-sport, ESRN will take over the sports landscape with a regional diehard mindset, starting with New York City and Elite Sports NY.

***

--Our Mission is to further "Regionalize" Sports using only Area Expertise. Unlike other Publishers who work off a National Platform, Elite Sports NY will never employ an Average Joe with no clue to be equipped with an important NYC Sports voice. Elite Sports NY Writers live and breathe the Big Apple in more ways than one.

--Each Region across the Nation provides unique viewpoints about specific topics, including National/Trending coverage. This is the very essence of "Elite Sports," to allow a specific Region to cover Regional and National/Trending news in their own unique style.

--As Writers, we Take Pride in the Delivery of our Content to the Diehard Fan: a Brutally Honest, Interestingly Unique-Take on the World of Sports and Trending Topics from the Professional Fan Angle.

Elite Sports NY's Readership has rapidly increased since its publishing inception in March of 2015.

Name: Pinoy Dutch Post
Description:
Pinoy Dutch Post is a nook of news, views and stories across shores, between the Philippines and the Netherlands, Asia and Europe and practically anywhere Filipinos have taken root. It opens its key to anything that matters in the intersections of mainstream and alternative politics, economy, and culture.

Pinoy Dutch Post is an independent community online publication that aims to enlighten people’s heart and mind, encourage criticism and engage in community actions. It is created as a wellspring of information and a revitalizing platform for connection, collaboration and solidarity among Filipino migrant workers, immigrants, scholars, asylum seekers, naturalized families and international friends.

Pinoy Dutch Post helps people in both lands experience home as they aspire it to be. It therefore stands for food security, sustainable work, healthy environment, cultural respect, saving heritage, gender emancipation, participatory governance, defending human rights, and attaining peace based on justice.

WHAT WE DO

Enlighten
Through inspiring stories from our past and contemporary struggles, we invite Filipinos to appreciate their roots, be proud of their heritage and enlighten others along the way.

Encourage
Through analysis and investigation of current debates and affairs, we invite Filipinos to take part in creating a public of critical minds for the betterment of society.

Engage
Through bringing forward the stories of migrants, activists, community organizations, people’s organizations and advocacy groups, we invite Filipinos to actively engage in acts of solidarity.

Name: Twistage
Description:
Twistage has re-imagined workflow for video platforms. Gone is the monolithic, player-centric video experience; the Twistage solution is both modular and flexible, giving you the freedom to define and customize your own workflow.

The Twistage difference – our open architecture. We offer robust solutions for content ingestion, content management, video delivery, monetization, syndication and reporting through a simple point-and-click console. There’s no need to replace the player; you can keep your custom or third-party solution. The same applies to transcoding, reporting, digital asset management, content access control, and other components. The Twistage platform acts as the glue for a cohesive workflow, adapting to your demands – not the other way around.

 The Twistage solution was designed to liberate media companies and enterprise companies alike, providing more return on existing investment. Already the platform of choice for many leading companies, Twistage is bringing simplicity to the once cumbersome workflows surrounding online video.

Name: Resonate
Description:
'Resonate’ is an online news, entertainment and blogging website that provides writers with a platform to discuss topics that strongly resonate amongst East Asian communities in the West. Our writers do not need to be of East Asian descent but simply harbour an interest in writing about topics that concern the East Asian communities around the world.

The representation of East Asians is unreasonably disproportionate within politics, the film industry, music industry and the media in general. For example, when East Asians are represented in the film, they are usually represented through takeaway owners or martial artists. Part of the problem is the lack of stories that are being told by the East Asian community. ‘Resonate’ aims to promote East Asian talent through the medium of written journalism and eventually film/television, photography and music.

‘Resonate’ will actively encourage positive representation in the media by making your voice heard by delivering interesting articles from your own perspectives to actively engage wider audiences.

Our platform will feature a combination of regular columnists and special guest columnists from writers across the world writing about common Asian interests. ‘Resonate’ will play host to the hub of ideas to showcase the creative talents of the global East Asian community.

 Some of the articles that resonate with East Asian communities will also resonate with other communities, whilst some articles will solely address East Asians issues.

At ‘Resonate’, we firmly believe that everyone has their own stories that have deeply affected them to the point where it was literally life changing.

Name: Trentino History
Description:
Trentino History nasce come pagina Instagram da un’idea di Federico Duca con l’intento di fare riscoprire una terra attraverso foto d’epoca e contemporanee che possano suscitare interesse e fare rivivere storie, eventi e personaggi. Le foto d’epoca vengono prelevate da libri e archivi e ne viene sempre menzionata la provenienza, le foto contemporanee sono scattate dal team di Trentino History. 

È bene specificare che la pagina non ha alcuno scopo di lucro, ma ha invece a cuore il solo obiettivo di diffondere la storia del Trentino. È e sarà sicuramente un progetto in perdita economicamente, ma fortunatamente non intellettualmente e questo ci basta per investirci tempo e risorse.

Sia ben chiaro però che la sfida non è quella di sostituirsi al lavoro dello storico, ma anzi aiutare lo storico a divulgare. Proprio per questo il metodo di Trentino History vuole essere rigoroso e rispettoso del lavoro di coloro che hanno contribuito a fare arrivare a noi le foto, gli studi e le informazioni che abbiamo. Il proposito è quindi quello di creare contenuti di qualità sia per quanto riguarda l’aspetto fotografico che l’aspetto storico.

La pagina si rivolge ai cittadini curiosi, agli amanti di questa bellissima terra di confine ricca anche di storia e ai turisti più esigenti che vogliono scoprirla anche attraverso le tracce che il passato ha lasciato.

L’idea è quella di scavare nel passato con l’aiuto dei cittadini, degli enti e delle realtà presenti oggi sul territorio per fare vivere un meraviglioso viaggio a chiunque voglia seguire Trentino History.

Name: Rehumanize International (Life Matters Journal)
Description:
Rehumanize International is a nonprofit human rights organization dedicated to creating a culture of peace and life, and in so doing, we seek to bring an end to all aggressive violence against humans through education, discourse, and action.

Our mission: to ensure that each and every human being's life is respected, valued, and protected.

We adhere to an ethos called the Consistent Life Ethic, which calls for an opposition to all forms of aggressive violence against human beings, including but not limited to:

    Abortion
    Capital Punishment
    Embryonic Stem-Cell Research
    Euthanasia and Assisted Suicide
    Police Brutality
    Torture
    Unjust War

The Consistent Life Ethic serves as the philosophical foundation of our advocacy.

Additionally, we achieve our vision by maintaining our organization as non-sectarian and non-partisan, and furthermore by promoting collaboration amongst many organizations across movements.

We are an affiliate of World Beyond War and a member group of the Consistent Life Network.

Name: Love Coco
Description:
So you want to know a little bit about me...

Obviously, you'll learn a lot more by exploring my blog, but let's get some of the basics out of the way.

I was born and raised in a stereotypical, middle-class suburb outside of Philadelphia. A town so on-the-nose that the official slogan, is "Everybody's Hometown". (You cannot make this stuff up...) Being a mixed child in a place that was overwhelmingly white was... a challenge to say the least, and I guess part of the reason why I ultimately fled to Los Angeles as soon as I had the chance.

After being here for a few years, I've learned a lot about myself, my purpose, and the world. I would be lying if I said that I wasn't still just figuring it out though. Full-time sports professional, part-time model.

Want to know more? I guess you'll have to check out the rest of my site. *shrug* Until next time.

Love, 
Coco

Name: Crux
Description:
What is Crux?
Crux is a community-funded website that delivers action and issues-focussed public interest journalism to the Southern Lakes and Central Otago regions of New Zealand's South Island.

What does the Crux brand mean?
We selected and trademarked the Crux brand name because it represents getting to the heart of the matter and also is the name of the Southern Cross constellation.

Why is it important now?
We need some form of quality journalism to document, explain and act on the complex issues that face our region. Journalism has been funded by advertising in the past but, thanks to Google and Facebook, that model is terminally broken. We are at a crunch point in our community’s development - low wages, expensive housing, explosive growth and many people leaving because they cannot afford to stay here. Good quality community journalism can help fix these critical issues. 

What are we committed to?
Quality journalism. Pure and simple. Balanced, fair and accurate. And, if necessary, long! Our community can’t be distilled into click-bait or an external template. We will listen, question, research, compare and explain. If a story takes weeks or months - then that’s what we will commit to. We’ll welcome comments and act on them. We are politically neutral - but committed to equal opportunity in all aspects of society. We’ll be courageous and respectful.

The main features are:

● Automatic processing: you can customise photos and videos with editing, logos, text and music. In addition, the system automatically creates web-optimised versions, previews and thumbnails. 
● Cloud distribution: your media is distributed via the cloud and reaches your customers on their smartphones. You can use 'QR-code cards' or the 'self media request' procedure to facilitate distribution: all it takes is a QR-code and your users can request and access their media themselves. If media are not yet online, the system notifies them as soon as they are available. 
● Online sharing and buying: with SHARED.MEDIA you can sell or give away your content to your users. With integrated e-commerce and social features, you can increase followers and shares, enhancing your marketing and making it profitable.

Name: Lokatantra
Description:
A one-stop solution to cater to every Mumbaikars' voting needs this election season. We connect leaders and citizens and answer all your voting-related how, when, where and who questions. With no affiliations to any party, person or ideology we only promise you honest and unbiased information to help you make the most of your right to vote. 

Considering ourselves a humble assault on the unfortunate game of "if you can't convince them, confuse them" we streamline the flow of information between the governed and the governors. We do extensive research to collect all the information that voters need to know about their candidates and the voting process, verify its authenticity and then organize it in a manner which makes it quick and easy to understand. On the flip side, we collect data on citizens’ opinions on key issues through polls and surveys, and then analyze and publish the results, to aid in the decision-making process of leaders. 

Ofcourse we should be able to hold our leaders accountable, but the first step to being able to do that is being accountable for our own votes. Let’s all do our bit to be worthy members of the world’s biggest democracy.

Name: TheDadLab
Description:
My name is Sergei Urban and I am a full-time dad to two adorable boys Alex and Max. We love creative play, experiments, easy-to-make crafts and, of course, educational toys.
I created TheDadLab to share creative projects that we do at home with as many parents as possible to inspire them to spend more quality time with their kids and to develop a thirst for knowledge and understanding in those curious little minds.
Let's be honest parents never have a lot of free time. So I am always trying to come up with projects using materials that everyone can find at home… and, of course, ensuring that activities are fun for the children! You will see (if you haven't already) from my posts how easy they are to set up and I really hope you can encourage your kids to put their own unique “twist” on the projects.
A little bit about me... I am not a teacher or a scientist nor do I have any background in filming. It all just came naturally to me after I became a dad. I should say that I am very lucky to be able to make TheDadLab my job and spend all the time in the world with my precious boys whilst getting incredible support from my better half and my community.
 Fun fact!  Alex and Max were born on the same day but two years apart, making all birthday twice as special (except for Alex's second birthday that we spent in a hospital).  Perhaps this is why they are so similar - always wanting to play with the same toy (:
I hope through reading this and learning a bit more about me and my kids you are encouraged to have a go yourself building happy memories together and seeing the excitement in their eyes as you unveil a new surprise for them to investigate and play with.

Name: ABSOLUTELY CARS
Description:
Fondé en 2019, ABSOLUTELY CARS est un blog automobile d’informations exclusivement en ligne. Notre rédaction veut offrir à ses lecteurs un panorama complet du secteur automobile pour vous immerger toujours plus dans la passion !

Fort d’une vraie communauté engagée qui croisse tous les jours, composée de fins connaisseurs et de collectionneurs de voitures anciennes, ABSOLUTELY CARS est un micro-influenceur qui se qualifie comme un "créateur de contenu" exclusif et de qualité !

Notre équipe dynamique, composée de passionnés, aborde tous les thèmes autour de l’automobile : salons et bourses d’échanges, rassemblements et roulages, sports automobiles, ventes aux enchères, essais automobiles, histoire des marques, focus de modèles, interviews de professionnels, portraits d’hommes d’automobile, comparatifs, musées, dossiers de fond...

Notre leitmotiv : s’intéresser d’abord et avant tout à la voiture, que ce soit une ancêtre, une vintage, une youngtimer, une collector ou une moderne.

ABSOLUTELY CARS, c’est également et avant-tout une association Loi 1901 qui :
- promeut le secteur de l’automobile pour faire connaître le monde des voitures auprès de toutes les générations
- sauvegarde le patrimoine automobile en favorisant la diffusion des informations sur les marques et les modèles
- diffuse des connaissances techniques et historiques pour mieux découvrir les modèles vintage et contemporains
- communique sur les #événements culturels ayant attrait au domaine de l’automobile ancienne et moderne.

Vous êtes une marque, un label, un club, un organisateur événementiel et vous souhaitez améliorer votre visibilité et atteindre notre communauté ? N'hésitez plus et contactez-nous !

Name: 𝕞𝕠𝕠𝕡𝕠𝕟𝕥𝕠
Description:
Portal for Japanese minimalist architecture — – -
日本の ミニマリスト アーキテクチャ

[story]
we started this project in spring of 2012 after identifying a gap in online architecture media that no serious anglophone website strictly devoted to Japanese minimalist architecture was out there.

we concentrate on Japanese minimalist architecture projects built in Japan or architecture built elsewhere by Japan-based architectural offices and architects. focus is definitely on already built projects, but occasionally some great proposal can find its way to the site also.
mooponto recently started publishing product+furniture designs created by Japanese designers. also, you can soon expect too see hi quality projects designed by non-Japanese architects built all over the world, that are true to Japanese minimalist spirit.

projects presented here are mostly described by their respected authors themselves, with hi-res photographs and plans and as accurate as possible project data at the bottom of each post.

[mission]
our goal is to bring the amazing philosophy and design ideas behind Japanese minimalist architecture closer to wider audiences beside architects and designers, and by doing so to create the largest online project-based archives for Japanese architecture.

御苦労様。

Name: The Upside
Description:
The Upside, c'est un média en ligne qui a pour vocation de présenter des informations différentes, positives, optimistes et inspirantes. 

L’idée est de commencer (continuer?) à regarder vers l’avenir en explorant les changements actuels, les nouveaux comportements et nouvelles tendances. J’espère qu’en découvrant ces nouvelles possibilités, les lecteurs se sentiront inspirés.
Inspirés à changer, à s’ouvrir, à explorer, à partager, à donner, à créer, etc. Peu importe ce que ça vous inspire, la première pierre du changement sera posée.

Dans ma croisade pour l’optimisme et l’alternatif, j’ai choisi d’articuler mon site autour de trois rubriques principales :
Les initiatives positives : Ici, je souhaite mettre en lumière tous les types d’initiatives positives et acteurs du changement : entreprises, associations, fondations, particuliers, … L’idée est de partager des projets et concepts alternatifs, insolites, solidaires et/ou authentiques.

 Les explorations : Cette section va vous faire voyager. A l’autre de bout de la Terre ou à côté de chez vous, découvrez toutes sortes de petites et grandes évasions atypiques : tour du monde alternatif, évasions locales, nouvelles tendances de voyage, découvertes d’autres cultures, projets artistiques et culturels, etc. En bref, ici, on s’ouvre au monde, on découvre et on apprend.

Les inspirations : Cette rubrique est plus personnelle. C’est un tout autre voyage que vous allez entreprendre : le voyage intérieur.
Mode de vie alternatifs, réflexions philosophiques, psychologie, pensées positives, parcours de vie hors du commun, …
Vous viendrez chercher ici votre dose quotidienne de cogitation et d’inspiration.

Des initiatives positives et des nouveaux sujets inspirants, il y en a partout, tout autour de nous. Alors si vous avez entendu parler d’une belle initiative ou si vous êtes vous même acteur du changement, n’hésitez pas à m'écrire à  charlene@theupside.fr 

Merci et bonne lecture !

Name: La notice +
Description:
La notice +, le média universitaire.
La notice + est le média universitaire dont l'objectif est la diffusion d'une analyse pluridisciplinaire de l'actualité. Écrire pour transmettre. Transmettre pour apprendre. 
•Outil de réflexion •Recherche •Décryptage

Fondée en mai 2020, la Notice + regroupe une équipe de rédaction composée d’étudiants majoritairement spécialisés en sciences humaines. Plus particulièrement en Histoire, sciences économiques, sciences politiques et droit.

CE QUE NOUS FAISONS …

Histoire :
Parce que l’histoire est trop souvent perçue comme événementielle sans une logique de temps long, la Notice + cherche à conjuguer l’actualité avec un fait historique décrypté et expliqué.

Économie :
Parce que les sciences économiques nous concernent tous mais sont trop souvent perçues comme disjonctives, la Notice + cherche à décrypter l’actualité au prisme de notions expliquées et accessibles à tous.

Géopolitique :
Parce que nous vivons plus que jamais dans un monde ouvert et régi par les relations internationales, la Notice + entend décrypter l’actualité internationale en explicitant les grandes ambiguïtés du XXIe siècle.

Science politique :
Les rouages du fonctionnement institutionnel des États n’auront plus de secret pour vous ! Parce que l’organisation d’un État s’analyse au prisme des sciences politiques, la Notice + entend décrypter l’actualité d’un point de vue institutionnel.

Médias :
Parce que notre monde ne peut occulter le poids des médias au sein de notre régime d’hyper-information, la Notice + cherche à décupler l’information par l’analyse du fonctionnement des vecteurs de notre connaissance : les médias.

 مع التركيز القوي على توفير صحافة عالية الجودة ، يلتزم المحايد بتقديم الأخبار بطريقة تُعلم القراء وتثقفهم.  نعتقد أن لكل شخص الحق في الوصول إلى معلومات دقيقة وجديرة بالثقة ، ونحن فخورون بأن نكون مصدرًا موثوقًا للأخبار لقرائنا.

 تابعنا لتبقى على اطلاع دائم بآخر الأخبار والأحداث التي تحدث في جميع أنحاء العالم.

Après quasiment deux ans de podcast hebdomadaires et le recrutement de rédacteurs pour la partie blog du site internet, en décembre 2022, l'association a changé de visage.



Chloé Pagliccia, fondatrice de l'association et hôte du podcast, et Léa Raso della Volta, chercheuse à l'Université Côte d'Azur, se sont associées pour transformer le média Statu Quo en Think Tank.



Toutes deux intéréssées par les sciences de l'information et de la communication, l'idée du Think Tank Statu Quo est d'apporter une éclairage sur les liens entre les SIC et la criminologie, d'une part, et d'autre part les relations internationales.

OGTV tackles a wide range of social issues and produces individual stories and unique series that feature Pets; Family; Wellness; Military; Small Business; and Community, or addresses themes such as Homelessness; Diversity & Inclusion; and People with Special Needs.

IA supports quality investigative journalism, as well as citizen journalism and a diversity of voices. It believes Australians are short-changed by the mass media — and so it dedicates itself to seeking out the truth and informing the public.

Established in June 2010, by David Donovan, Independent Australia is a member of the Australian Press Council and the Federal Parliamentary Press Gallery.

IA's editorial team possesses a wealth of experience through its senior editorial team, which is made up of founder and publisher David Donovan, managing editor Michelle Pini, digital editor Dan Jensen and assistant editors Nicholas Bugeja and Cherie Moselen.

Also on the team, contributing hugely to IA's success, are investigations editor Ross Jones, media editor Dr Lee Duffield and history editor Dr Glenn Davies.

IA features regular columns from outstanding journalists, political commentators and cartoonists including Mark David, Alan Austin, Abul Rizvi, Dr Jennifer Wilson, Dr Victoria Fielding, Paul Budde and Tom Tanuki among others.

Description:
O PoliNotícias é um site  que publica só NOTÍCIAS BOAS e inspiradoras para um  público que está cansado de ler somente notícias negativas.

Buscando expressar diversidade e inspirado na Pollyana, personagem do livro de mesmo nome, resiliente e sempre otimista que buscava transformar sua realidade, nosso site quer trazer um pouco mais de leveza e esperança pro seu dia a dia  . 

Em mensagem para o Dia das Comunicações Sociais, em maio de 2017, o Papa Francisco  incentivou os profissionais da área a comunicar a esperança, rompendo espiral do medo gerado por “notícias más”. É nisso que pensamos aqui no PoliNotícias! :)

Sabemos que as notícias negativas fazem parte do mundo e da vida, e precisam ser divulgadas, mas acreditamos que há uma lacuna existente na mídia, que não dá o devido valor às boas notícias. Não é que o mundo esteja pior, nós que não ficamos sabendo das coisas boas que acontecem. 

Criado por um jornalista da pequena cidade de Lagoa Santa, Minas Gerais, o PoliNoticias conta apenas com voluntários em sua equipe, que buscam fazer esse projeto tão legal acontecer. O site é uma iniciativa sem fins lucrativos, embora busque receitas de publicidade para autossustentar-se e fazer reinvestimentos visando melhoria e qualificação. 

A expectativa dos idealizadores do site PoliNoticias  é de que ele se consolide como um veículo de comunicação diferenciado e inovador, pelo apreço que tem ao aspecto positivo das notícias. 

A notícia boa não se espalha sozinha. Nos ajude a compartilhar a iniciativa PoliNotícias: www.polinoticias.com.br

Sinta-se à vontade para se conectar e enviar uma mensagem! É um prazer tê-lo por aqui.

In short, they are the greatest Champions the Earth has ever seen.

For those who enjoy online shopping we have a huge variety.

Ex-Offenders Resource Network, Inc., is a first of its kind organization anywhere in the WORLD, and it has garnered worldwide attention, in that it has been viewed in more than 220 Countries across the Globe, and in ALL Fifty (50) States here in the United States. The men and women who make up the core team of advisors and instructors here at Ex-Offenders Resource Network, Inc., are ex-offenders, symphatizers as well as CEO's and Founders/Executive Directors of non-profit organizations, as well as Bankers, educators, IT Professionals, and more.

It is a unique non-profit organization exclusively for ex-offenders. Our mission is to provide the men and women returning home after serving lengthy periods of incarceration with the 21st Century technology skills they will need to make a successful re-entry. And, to reduce the current recidivism rate here in the United State, and on a Global scale. 

We, believe that one of the factors that greatly contribute to recidivism is the lack of competitive job skills.  And, employers unwilling to hire an ex-offender.

Name: Stop Modern Day Slavery
Description:
Stop Modern Day Slavery is an international, youth-led organization that takes a multi-step approach to ending human trafficking. Founded in 2019, Stop Modern Day Slavery began by publishing educational articles and social media campaigns. Since then, we have expanded our advocacy to include providing services to survivors of human trafficking, amplifying survivors’ voices, hosting events with world leaders in the anti-trafficking community, and partnering with brands that use ethical labor practices. 

With a growing team of motivated college and graduate students, Stop Modern Day Slavery approaches human trafficking prevention from the perspective of those most affected: youth. Our diverse team of students meticulously crafts our expanding repository of informative pieces on human trafficking, all of which are backed by extensive research. Our goal is for Stop Modern Day Slavery to be a virtual library of articles that both educate and inspire.
 
Most importantly, we show people from around the world that they have the power to stop modern day slavery. As consumers, we can choose to fund companies with ethical labor practices over those with murky supply chains. We can choose to support companies that provide fair wages to their employees over those that mistreat their workers. If we stop to think of the people behind our clothes’ label, we can have a massive impact on their lives.

Description:

DE LEZERS
Lezers van Klein Wonen Magazine zijn zeer divers. Van milieubewuste zelfvoorzieners tot studenten, van
avontuurlijke busjesnomaden tot mensen die niet alleen maar willen werken voor hun hypotheek en van jong tot oud. Zij verkiezen ervaringen boven bezit, willen flexibel zijn en hechten veel waarde aan vrijheid, duurzaamheid, milieu en natuur.

DE FILOSOFIE
Klein Wonen Magazine kent geen papieren edities. Een bewuste keuze om zo het duurzame karakter van het merendeel van haar lezers te onderstrepen. De makers van Klein Wonen Magazine pogen in hun werk eveneens zoveel mogelijk rekening te houden met het milieu door veel gebruik te maken van de digitale snelweg in plaats van geasfalteerde paden.

DE INTERACTIE
Geen papier betekent dat Klein Wonen Magazine optimaal gebruik kan maken van interactie. Veel artikelen en advertenties bieden hyperlinks naar video’s, extra foto’s (o.a. 360 graden beelden), websites, sociale media en downloads. Zo krijgen de lezers van Klein Wonen Magazine naast de content een schat aan extra relevante informatie. En dat met slechts één klik op hun scherm!

HET ADVERTEREN
De markt van het klein wonen is booming, maar jong. Veel mensen zijn nog zoekende en dat biedt ondernemers een uitgelezen kans om zich te profileren. Klein Wonen Magazine biedt haar adverteerders een uitstekend podium om haar producten en diensten onder de aandacht te brengen van deze groeiende doelgroep. Al onze advertenties kunnen worden voorzien van interactieve links naar websites, webshops, sociale media, video’s en downloads.

ARO believes 100% in free speech and an unbias media. Our user sentiment analysis is one of our tools to determine what the sentiment is on specific topics.

ARO and HPC/ EthoRithm and Beach Automation have developed a program that can determine online user sentiment. This program finds user tweets, videos, posts, and comments to determine actual user sentiment on a subject.

The program can filter online expression to answer questions on any topic. The program can also build rankings on topics based on user sentiment. ARO uses the data to answer questions about hot button news and commentary content.

The reality is, mainstream media does not accurately cover what Americans think. ARO uses data to cover the sentiment of the American people. This sentiment is available to give readers a different opinion on what is going on in America.

Name: Jim Prevor's Perishable Pundit
Description:
"We failed to anticipate Pearl Harbor
not for want of the relevant
materials but because of a
plethora of irrelevant ones."
— Roberta Wohlstetter
Pearl Harbor: Warning and Decision

Roberta Wohlsetter won the Bancroft Prize, the highest honor a historian can win, for her exhaustive study of the run up to Pearl Harbor. Her conclusion, highlighted above, was that there was so much "noise" — so much irrelevant, incorrect or misleading information, that the important information was ignored or misinterpreted.

This dilemma is known to historians as "The Roberta Wohlsetter Problem," and it applies to business decisions just as well as military intelligence.  Our job here at PerishablePundit.com is to ease the problem for executives by mining the information super-highway to select what is truly important to know and to provide insight as to its meaning and significance.

PerishablePundit.com is dedicated to three propositions:

1. First, that perishables are, and for the foreseeable future will be, the crucial arena for differentiating competition in the food marketing business.

2. Second, that looking at the business solely through the prism of long established departments specializing in different perishable areas such as produce, deli, meat, dairy, bakery,  seafood and floral no longer is sufficient.

3. Third, that executives, confronted with understanding the significance of perishables to their operations and directing the success of these operations, are presented with an overabundance of information, and the challenge is to determine what information is important and what is its meaning and significance.

Name: Erraticus
Description:
Erraticus is an online publication focused on human flourishing, taking a pragmatic approach to ideas. 

We care about ideas that help us to live well together, focusing on their practical consequences. We want to engage with ideas that work, minimizing the frequent fruitlessness that stems from barren dichotomies, rigid ideologies, and detached theorizing.

We primarily publish long-form and short-form essays that blur the lines between the academic and our many publics, remaining intellectually rigorous and emotionally prescient. In addition to poetry, we are also home to the Damn the Absolute! podcast.

Erraticus was founded in 2016 by Jeffrey Howard. Having experienced the rather infertile nature of approaching ideas or truth as abstract, universal, and unembodied, we seek to nurture views focused on the tangible fruits of ideas rather than merely their roots. 

A consistent feature of reality is one of change and contingency, both in nature and our human-created institutions. Because of this, we approach such matters with intellectual humility and open-mindedness rather than hold to hard categories or fixed dualisms. 

We resist reductivistic and overly theoretical views of the world. 

We value perspectives originating from experience, judging the merits of ideas based on the results they have for us in our practical lives. 

We believe better beliefs, knowledge, and, ultimately, meaning come through a community of inquirers, engaged with the questions of living, and that through such an approach, we can make our individual lives and communities better than they are today.

While appreciating the accumulated wisdom of the past, we are forward-looking, realizing that what worked well in the past will not necessarily work well in the present nor in the future. In that spirit, we acknowledge the benefits and importance of a plurality of voices, especially at the local level where social, moral, and political concerns are most effectively addressed.

We zijn nieuwsgierig naar wat er gebeurt met die kwart procent van uw belastinggeld die naar kunst gaat en wat er gebeurt zónder die kwart procent van uw belastinggeld. Daar zit altijd wel een verhaal in.

En dat verhaal komt u alleen te weten dankzij onze journalisten, die dóórvragen en verder kijken. Daar staat Cultuurpers voor. Dat een kunstwerk zich niet één, twee, drie blootgeeft vinden we best, maar dat een kunstbedrijf dat doet, accepteren we niet. In beide gevallen helpen we u graag met kijken en begrijpen. Er wordt immers al genoeg onzin verkondigd over kunst, en niet in de laatste plaats door de kunstwereld zelf.

Cultuurpers zoekt dat uit.

Het Cultureel Persbureau is een coöperatieve vereniging van journalisten met als hoofddoel: innovatie van de kunstjournalistiek. De leden zijn zelfstandig ondernemende journalisten in alle takken van het journalistieke vak: van bloggers tot papieren tijgers, van tekenaars tot cam-jo’s, van zendamateurs tot computernerds.

Name: Madame Labriski
Description:
Madame Labriski, c’est Mériane Labrie, la femme qui carbure à la purée de dattes. Entrepreneure visionnaire, elle est auteure de best-sellers culinaires et de romans jeunesse, conférencière en série, marathonienne (3 h 08), maman de 2 jeunes enfants et de la marque Madame Labriski inc., qui comprend aussi Mini Labriski. Ouf!

Ses livres de cuisine (plus de 200 000 exemplaires vendus au Québec) sont traduits en anglais et seront lancés en Europe en 2021. Elle présente une gamme de produits alimentaires sans sucre raffiné ajouté et a la ferme ambition de faire évoluer l’industrie de l’alimentation. Lauréate de nombreux prix et distinctions, sa mission est de diminuer la consommation de sucre raffiné pour améliorer la santé… des Terriens.

Pour expliquer l’énergie qui la caractérise, elle dit avec humour qu’elle s’est fait enlever par E.T. l’extra-terrestre pour sauver le monde de la surconsommation de sucre raffiné.

Inspirée par les plus grandes histoires de réussite entrepreneuriale mondiales, elle a décidé ne pas rêver sa vie, mais de faire de sa vie un grand rêve. C’est les deux pieds sur Terre et la tête dans les nuages qu’elle avance telle une marathonienne infatigable dans sa grande quête de changer le monde, une bouchée de purée de dattes à la fois.

Amoureuse des marques inspirantes (elle a été conceptrice-rédactrice et stratège publicitaire avant de devenir la Madame), son but ultime est de faire de Madame Labriski inc. une marque assez forte et puissante pour pouvoir, un jour, propulser fièrement des athlètes québécois et canadiens aux Jeux Olympiques.

Carburez-vous aux Labriski?

Name: (think) enough.
Description:
VISION
We trust businesses and individuals to make the best decisions for society and environment, once they see it’s possible.

MISSION
We showcase how it’s possible.

• (think) enough. is a directory connecting individuals to ‘for-purpose’ businesses.
• (think) enough. is a framework highlighting how for-purpose businesses operate and their impact.
• (think) enough. is a community supporting these businesses, holding them accountable and driving global economic change. 

OUR PHILOSOPHY
"We look for the purpose-driven"
We celebrate businesses who put their mission at the centre of operations, just as we do. We are looking for those who value purpose as much as profit (if not more!).
"We praise transparency"
We believe businesses should be responsible for, and transparent about, their impact. That’s why the (think) enough. platform is only populated by businesses willing to open up and show us what goes on in the background and on the inside. 
"We highlight positivity"
We focus on positivity and urge anyone on our platform to do the same. There are some great organisations that call out bad behaviour, naming and shaming is an important part of the conversation, but it’s not our space... we focus on highlighting what good business looks like.
"We do enough"
We are here to help, support and build enthusiasm about doing enough - celebrating all steps towards a more just and sustainable world. We believe that a little change from all of us would be enough to start the shift to a new, kinder economy.

Name: PHP Review
Description:
Depois de muita procura por conteúdos de fácil acesso na internet, não foi possível encontrar conteúdo que abrangesse tanto a linguagem de programação quanto os assuntos que o envolvem.

Com esta perspectiva surgiu a PHP Review, que como todo projeto colaborativo, teve o seu nome escolhido pela comunidade PHP. Desta forma a revista já nasceu com o compromisso de ser colaborativa, gratuita e com qualidade. Apesar do começo ser colaborativo, tomamos o devido cuidado para que o projeto não fosse demasiadamente grande no início para que o comprometimento, marca registrada dos programadores PHP, não fosse perdido com o tempo, como ocorre em todo projeto que começa sem planejamento.

A PHP Review está e estará amadurecendo com o tempo, pois um upgrade das informações sempre acontece e de vez em quando o seu próprio core acaba sendo atualizado para uma melhor utilização. Com esta filosofia sabemos que a PHP Review não nasceu de um único projeto e nem continuará sendo sempre da mesma forma.

A partir de agora anuncio que a PHP Review finalmente está amadurecida o suficiente para a sua versão 1.0, que trará além de conteúdo técnico para programadores PHP, muita informação para ser utilizada no seu dia a dia do trabalho, proporcionando um maior conhecimento da linguagem, mercado de trabalho, novas tecnologias, e muito mais. E convidamos você para fazer parte deste grupo que fará o upgrade da revista, enviando sempre conteúdos relevantes (e até os não tão relevantes assim).

Name: Health Issues India
Description:
Health Issues India (HII) is a transformative platform at the forefront of health and patient advocacy, championing an integrated and patient-centered approach to wellness. As a pioneering council operating at the intersection of healthcare, public health, and policy, HII fosters collaboration and meaningful dialogue among diverse stakeholders across the healthcare ecosystem. 

In addition to its advocacy and collaboration efforts, HII serves as an independent online media platform, amplifying voices, ideas, and innovations across the health landscape. By highlighting critical themes and emerging trends, HII drives awareness, education, and action on issues that matter most to the health of India’s people. 

Our Purpose 
HII is dedicated to driving solutions that address India’s most pressing health challenges. By bridging gaps across the health ecosystem, we create platforms for informed discussions, enabling innovation, collaboration, and impactful action. We aim to empower stakeholders with reliable health insights while advocating for a healthier, more equitable India.

Our Vision 
Healthcare excellence transcends traditional medical care. At HII, we embrace a holistic view of health that includes the social, psychological, and environmental factors shaping patient outcomes. By fostering collaboration among all critical stakeholders, we seek to create a synergistic approach that not only addresses medical needs but also advances systemic improvements in India’s health ecosystem. 

Our Approach 
HII’s strategy is built on the foundation of multi-stakeholder engagement, knowledge-driven advocacy, and powerful storytelling through its media platform.

Name: ARbitt
Description:
Life.  This world.  You, me.  What is it?  What are we?  Where are we?  What is the meaning of life?  Do we have a choice?  We all have asked these questions, we all have pondered on these matters.  We, your new found best friends here at ARbitt Co. Limited, have an answer to one of these heavy duty mental gemstones.  Are you sure you want to know?  Well, here it is.  Choice is an illusion, created between those with power, and those without.  

And we know what we’re talking about.  We are a worldwide international company  after all.  We’re  headquartered in Hong Kong (arguably the one and only free trade capital of the known civilized world) and we have subsidiaries all over the rest of the known civilized world – UAE, Russia, the US, China, India etc.   ARbitt is the new breed of a business company, ARbitt is a unique business and cultural hub that unites like-minded people from around the world.  People like you and me who have clear motivation to change this world for the better, people who act, who start with themselves, who change the experience of the individual and the individual experiences of others as a derived result.  ARbitt doesn’t wait for the choice to be offered up, but I’m sure you knew that already.

What does that really mean?  ARbitt Co. Nuestras posturas editoriales

En Política, nos interesa saber y mostrar cómo funciona el poder y fiscalizar a quienes lo detentan para que hagan un uso correcto de sus facultades y del dinero que han puesto a su disposición los ciudadanos.

ElPensador.io buscará intervenir en la realidad política y en la generación de políticas públicas articulando a los actores del sistema político y a los miembros de la comunidad de lectores.

En Cultura, ElPensador.io cree en las expresiones de las diversas culturas que conforman nuestra América. Todas son bienvenidas en un marco de respeto y reconocimiento mutuo.

En Economía, valoramos la información que aporte al ciudadano en conocimiento y empoderamiento, que le permita emprender y defender sus derechos en el sistema económico. Creemos en el valor de los intercambios, en la igualdad de oportunidades y en la capacidad de la sociedad de fiscalizar y evitar las fallas en el mercado.

Creemos en un tratamiento de contenidos que estimule la reflexión, el debate y la participación e intervención activa de las personas en la sociedad en que viven, sin dogmas ni verdades absolutas.
Informa, cuestiona, interviene…

Description:
Metis c’est un site, une revue en ligne, une Newsletter hebdomadaire, une équipe de rédacteurs, un réseau de correspondants en Europe et dans le monde.

Son fil rouge : le travail.

Donc le travail et l’emploi, le travail et le non-travail, le travail qui fait du mal, mais aussi celui qui fait du bien, la place du travail dans l’économie et la société, les nouvelles formes de travail et d’emploi, celles de l’économie numérique par exemple.

Créé en 2007, Metis est un site et un média en ligne, engagé, indépendant, financé essentiellement par le soutien de ses abonnés.

Metis s’adresse à l’intelligence de ses lecteurs, réguliers ou occasionnels : on y trouve des informations, des analyses et comparaisons entre pays, des opinions, des entretiens et portraits sur la réalité du travail dans sa grande diversité. On y cause emploi et protection sociale, relations collectives, politiques sociales. Suivant le fil rouge du travail, on y fait volontiers un détour par l’histoire, ou par la littérature, ou par le cinéma. En France comme dans les différents pays européens, voire au-delà.

Veterans who are using our supporting video are much more likely to get an in-person interview. Mission Hire Me is funded by corporate sponsorship and organizational grants in order to provide a no-fee service to transitioning Veterans.

Name: Charcoal + Gravel
Description:
Who We Are

Charcoal + Gravel is a web application that showcases handpicked content from the world of food, travel and activities. Our signature city guides explore the culture, history and people that make each destination unique. We bring candid, experiential reviews for millennials, tourists, locals, and their mums and dads too.

Our Story

C+G started out as a thought experiment in the early days of 2017. We wanted to reimagine the work of food and travel writers, and how it is consumed. We empower the people capturing moments of personal and cultural significance and help our readers connect with that experience. A photo-essay detailing the emotional journey of a photographer will often find space next to a sassy take-down of a lackluster food establishment.

Our creative team comes together with a burning desire to be honest and intimate. We believe that our brand is only as strong as the people who constitute it: if they have something promising to offer, we don’t mind taking credit for it.   

Our Values

Our company ethos is one of inclusivity. We are an equal-opportunity employer and welcome people into our team regardless of age, gender, disability, religion, ethnicity, marital status and sexual orientation. We believe that real growth comes from fostering an environment where the exchange of ideas is possible and we encourage this though a democratic, non-hierarchical approach to agenda-setting and decision-making.

Nossos Serviços:

Oferecemos uma ampla gama de serviços de publicidade e mídia digital, incluindo:

Publicidade em Mídias Sociais: Desenvolvemos campanhas estratégicas de mídias sociais para impulsionar o reconhecimento da marca e o envolvimento do público.

Marketing de Conteúdo: Criamos conteúdo relevante e envolvente para blogs, sites e redes sociais, mantendo o público interessado e informado.

Gestão de Anúncios Online: Maximizamos o ROI por meio de campanhas de anúncios pay-per-click (PPC) e otimização constante.

SEO (Otimização de Mecanismos de Busca): Melhoramos a classificação nos motores de busca para aumentar o tráfego orgânico.

Design Criativo: Desenvolvemos identidades de marca, materiais gráficos e campanhas criativas que cativam e inspiram.

Email Marketing: Criamos estratégias de email marketing personalizadas para nutrir relacionamentos com clientes.

Por Que Escolher a Digital Idea br

Experiência: Com anos de experiência em publicidade e mídia digitais, estamos preparados para enfrentar os desafios mais complexos.

Compromisso com o Sucesso: O sucesso de nossos clientes é nossa prioridade número um. Trabalhamos em estreita colaboração para alcançar objetivos e superar expectativas.

Inovação Constante: Estamos sempre à frente das últimas tendências e tecnologias digitais, garantindo que nossos clientes permaneça atualizado no mercado.
