Description:
Living Hyphen is an intimate journal and community that explores the experiences of hyphenated Canadians. From the Haitian-Quebecois commuting along the Montréal Métro to the South Asian trans man applying for permanent residency, from the young Filipino-Canadian woman texting her immigrant mother to the Plains Cree and Métis man meeting a traditional healer, this magazine reveals the rich inner lives of Canada’s diverse communities.

Through short stories, photography, poetry, and illustrations, we uncover what it means to be a part of a diaspora. We examine life in between cultures, as individuals who call Canada home but with roots in different, often faraway places. Our stories are beautiful, heartbreaking, uplifting, contradictory, and constantly unfolding.

Living Hyphen’s aim is to redefine the mainstream and to turn up the volume on voices that often go unheard.

A equipe do LAbI é formada por pesquisadores das áreas de Física, Astronomia, Biologia, Educação e Comunicação; profissionais das áreas de Jornalismo, Produção Audiovisual e Computação; e estagiários. Além desse núcleo fixo, são articulados grupos de consultores nas áreas específicas para cada projeto desenvolvido.

As ações do LAbI são acompanhadas por oficinas que buscam compartilhar com o público — especialmente professores do Ensino Médio — a tecnologia e a metodologia empregadas, visando a formação de multiplicadores e o acompanhamento e avaliação dos produtos concretizados. Além disso, a equipe do Laboratório tem procurado , em suas diferentes áreas de atuação, produzir conhecimento sobre essas metodologias, bem como compartilhar esse conhecimento.

Produtos e Processos

Séries de Divulgação Científica (ClickCiência; Mídia e Ciência; Ciência Explica; As aventuras de Ultravioleta; Que curso eu faço?)

Name: Business Advice UK
Description:
Business Advice is a title focused solely on a section of the business community currently underserved – micro companies.

It’s a site created by the team at Caspian Media, the award-winning specialist B2B publisher behind Real Business – the most-read title for established SMEs and growing businesses.

Rather than writing for companies which are beyond the £1m turnover mark or classified as “high-growth startups”, Business Advice is providing content for those early on in the entrepreneurial journey – the four million micro businesses seen as the “engine room” of the British economy.

Official government statistics show that 96 per cent of all companies in the UK employ fewer than ten staff. Business Advice leverages the market expertise gained from turning Real Business into a leading brand to provide much-needed assistance for these smaller firms, and those exploring the formative years of growth.

It brings together all important forms of content, from pressing news, to valuable guides, to insightful profile pieces of up and coming micro enterprises.

It combines the colour that comes from meeting and interviewing enterprising business builders throughout the country with easy to understand tips and guides on issues such as sorting out your accounts, hiring members of staff and dealing with procurement.

Readers are able to access bespoke advice by submitting questions to the Business Advice editorial team, who will then liaise with industry experts to secure a response.

Providing a fully-optimised mobile offering, Business Advice will soon have a stocked calendar of events bringing together the kind of entrepreneurs and business leaders who are doing their bit to make the UK a leading global economy.

Name: Yale Broadcasting Company (WYBC)
Description:
WYBC is Yale Radio, a legion of students armed to protect and defend the good word at Yale. You didn’t know we had a radio station? Just as well—radio is dead, but long live radio!

College radio exists outside the realm of commercial radio’s pigeonholed purpose of trite music and loveable talking heads, as it owes nothing to anyone. College radio takes the financial limitations of the commercial realm, obliterates them, and instead focuses on endeavors like effective content delivery and supporting local talent. Radio is solely a metonym for the YouTube and iTunes services of yesteryear. Go ahead and argue that radio is dead and we’ll agree with you. But is creativity and conversation dead at Yale? Have we run out of things to talk about? Yet where is that forum for sharing the good word? Long live radio.

Until recently, there was a void in campus life from a lack of WYBC, causing untold chaos in the music scene and the recorded arts on campus. This is largely WYBC’s own fault. Our beloved FM station (now professionally-programmed and #1 in New Haven) didn’t change from its position as Yale Radio’s backbone, and consequently became irrelevant for the students who trained to become DJs. It didn’t help when we bought AM 1340 ten years ago to talk to students, as no students owned radios. Those stifled days are over.

Last year, we launched WYBCX, our Internet-only and FCC-free stream, and we’re exploding onto your laptops this semester with the launch of our outrageous WYBCX.COM. We want to be your home page, your college’s media hub for what matters. We want you to hear each other’s opinions and have a home to display it. We want you to meet our talented jocks that run the gamut from bluegrass to business talk to deep house. Name: Global Journalist
Description:
Global Journalist produces multi-platform content about the state of press freedom around the world, covers developments in international journalism and serves international journalists. We tell the stories of the storytellers.

The International Press Institute started Global Journalist more than 30 years ago as a report about issues facing journalists worldwide. It evolved into a globally circulated quarterly magazine distributed by the Los Angeles Times for many years. Since 1998, Global Journalist has been produced by the Missouri School of Journalism in Columbia, Missouri.

Our content includes radio shows, text stories, videos and digital publications. We engage international journalists weekly in discussions about today's issues. Global Journalist Radio airs at 18:30 CT (23:30 UTC) on Thursdays on KBIA 91.3 FM, an NPR affiliate in Columbia, Missouri.

For a complete archive of Global Journalist radio shows and stories, visit globaljournalist.org.

We also invite you to engage in conversation about issues in international journalism by joining our LinkedIn group: https://www.linkedin.com/groups/Global-Journalist-6643743.

Name: The White Coat Project
Description:
A human library cataloguing the stories of the unsung heroes – The ones who don a white coat instead of an armour and cape.

Ours has always been the “road less travelled” right from the start and the side of the story less talked about. We belong to the profession where the lives of others depend upon us, but how often do we talk about our lives?

The issues we face, gender bias, non-conducive working conditions, gut-wrenching sights. Or the small things that made us smile today, a compliment from a patient, or seeing a newborn enter this world?

‘Social distancing’ -two words that have brought about seismic change to the daily lives of millions around the world yet we can still stay close to each other by knowing each other’s story.

We are a bunch of college students trying to listen to the hearts and read the minds of ones who use stethoscopes to listen to yours, the ones who put their best with their white coats and white gloves on.

We aim to create a human library of the unsung heroes- the ones who invest the best years of their lives to add to yours.

This venture under IMA-MSN Punjab aims to highlight the struggles- personal or professional, that medical students or doctors face throughout their lives. It is an initiative to give the world a sneak-peek into the lives of these warriors on the front line. These are our personal stories, stories of our work, the patients we treat, the discrimination and violence we face, or just some small anecdotes that brought joy to our day. It is our attempt to make the world a better place. A place for positivity, equality, love, and healing.

Fighting against violence against the medical staff and gender bias, while also spreading smiles and tales about a good day.

You don’t have to be a writer to have a story worth telling.

Send your experiences and hot-takes on the current events and we would be more than happy to give your story a platform.

Name: Hawaii Reporter News
Description:
Hawaii Reporter is an award-winning, independent, online news journal launched in February 2002 to cover key business, government, political and educational stories. Local journalists Malia Zimmerman co-founded the publication, which now boasts readers from around the world. The state’s top business and political leaders consider Hawaii Reporter a daily “must read.” Though Hawaii Reporter publishes all points of view, the publication features many local and national columnists and contributors, the vast majority who are free market oriented, and who offer opinions and news not found elsewhere in Hawaii.  Hawaii Reporter’s special reports on the slave factory in American Samoa, elderly abuse, the 2004 mayor’s election, the Ka Loko Dam breach, the Hawaii Superferry, the Honolulu rail and other transportation issues, climate change, Women of World War II, Growing Up in Hawaii, Slice of Life Hawaii, legislation at the Hawaii State Capitol, and corruption and waste in local government, have gained widespread local and national attention.  Hawaii Reporter was also the local inspiration for the Hawaii Journalism Shield law passed in 2009 – a law considered one of the best in the country by national journalism advocacy organizations. Hawaii Reporter has worked as a consultant to ABC 20/20, FOX News and as a researcher for the New York Post and more.

HawaiiReporter.com gets 500,000 visitors a month.

Name: Artes & contextos
Description:
Artes & Contextos é um órgão de Informação artística.
Partilha ideias, próprias ou de terceiros, sobre a Arte, as artes e os seus contextos. 
Divulga e reflete acerca de obras de arte e eventos artísticos: de sala ou de rua; de galeria ou de estúdio; literárias, de palco ou de écran; eruditos ou populares; contemporâneos ou intemporais; de artistas notáveis ou desconhecidos, em voga ou do passado, estreantes ou do futuro, e realiza entrevistas na forma de conversa com intervenientes com interesse, do e no mundo das artes.
Tentará sem perder o rumo, e numa fórmula Indie, chegar a artistas de qualquer área em fase inicial de carreira, ou com projetos inovadores e àqueles que por independência ou por esconjuração dos mercados passam ao lado dos circuitos.
Os autores e editores reservam privilégio ao seu próprio gosto e não divulgam o que dele se afasta nem aquilo que não aconselhariam. Não lhe dedicam tempo, e também por isso,  prescindem de se pronunciarem. 
Artes & Contextos não confunde arte com artesanato nem há espaço para sucedâneos de Arte, pseudo-arte, para-artes nem (mas com respeito) artes populares. 
Não se sobrevaloriza a quantidade e, nem a popularidade nem o populismo, serão critérios de escolha.
Rejeitamos quaisquer compromissos comprometedores da liberdade individual de escolha e de opinião, sejam comerciais ou corporativos; políticos ou ideológicos; religiosos ou quaisquer outros, pretensamente orientadoras do pensamento ou modeladoras de caráter.
Todas as opiniões, crenças e credos, serão respeitadas no limite dos Direitos Humanos.
O direito a opinião própria é inalienável e todas as peças em editorial, como todos os artigos de opinião são identificados como tal, e assinados.
Artes & Contextos tem preocupações humanistas e humanitárias e manifestará, sempre que oportuno e pertinente, a defesa dos direitos humanos.
Artes & Contextos preconiza um direito universal à felicidade e uma obrigação universal de respeito pelos direitos individuais.

NME es una revista mensual enfocada en los sectores minería y energía, que busca ofrecer una nueva alternativa informativa, técnica y especializada en ambos sectores. Hoy, con más de 100 ediciones publicadas en forma ininterrumpida desde marzo de 2009, la revista luce renovada y actualizada, confirmando lo que su propio nombre anticipa al apostar por una “nueva” visión en minería y energía.

Así, esta propuesta informativa fue evolucionando hacia una mirada más pluralista y también crítica en torno a ambas industrias. ¿El objetivo? Que los lectores puedan formarse una opinión más completa acerca del acontecer minero y energético, considerando la diversidad de puntos de vista que cruzan a ambos sectores.

De esta manera, Revista Nueva Minería y Energía ha logrado marcar diferencias, aprendiendo y creciendo. Pero por sobre todo, evolucionando. Porque si hay algo que ha caracterizado a esta revista, es su constante afán por buscar nuevas fórmulas, enfoques diferentes y propuestas novedosas.

Por eso, Revista NME no sólo logró consolidarse rápidamente como una de las más importantes revistas técnicas especializadas del país, sino que hoy es ampliamente reconocida en las dos industrias que cubre habitualmente.

Name: Humansof2020
Description:
“Hello, new world!”

When we founded humansof2020.com, we intended to create a space where anyone could self-publish their stories from the most eventful year of our lives. We believed that the year 2020 should not be seen only as the year of the pandemic and that our shared experiences of loss, courage, hope and even humor could teach and inspire future generations. We’re proud of our small but growing community and the stories we’ve shared. 

As the virus continues to evolve and change the way we live, we now view the year 2020 as a defining point in our lives. Yes, it remains the year when humanity found itself utterly unprepared. But it’s also the marker of an incredible stage of humanity’s evolution. Whether we recognize it or not, we’re changing everything about and around us. 

At a personal level, we’ve hopefully found more time to introspect and realign our priorities. At work, we’ve changed the way we function. We’re learning how to integrate work and life. Some of us have turned challenges into opportunities and pivoted our businesses. Many others have turned into creators and entrepreneurs. Our faith in institutions has been realigned. We’ve seen how technology has replaced several traditional models of industry. We have more respect for healthcare workers and schoolteachers than ever before. 

As the virus continues to mutate, we need to be ahead in our own evolution. We cannot do that by wishing things go back to the way it was. Instead, we need to look at new experiences that can be replicated and developed into new ways of living. But we can only do that when we learn from and collaborate with each other. 

That’s what humansof2020.com is for. It’s our platform to document, explore, share and celebrate the new world that began in the year 2020. Join us to make history or chart the future by sharing your experience at humansof2020.com

Name: La Tige Podcast| Initiatives durables en Afrique de l'Ouest
Description:
La Tige est le premier podcast francophone dédié aux initiatives durables en Afrique de l'Ouest lancé par Anna A. Touré, Experte Développement Durable installée au Mali puis au Sénégal depuis 2004.

Un mardi sur deux, elle y met en lumière des acteur.ices du continent africain engagé.e.s en faveur de l'environnement.

Une façon positive d'aborder les conséquences du Changement Climatique avec des solutions durables, inspirantes et duplicables à la clef.

On a l’habitude d’entendre parler des conséquences du changement climatique sur le continent africain, des inondations, de la sécheresse, de la pollution ou encore de la famine.
On a moins l’habitude d’entendre parler de toutes celles et ceux qui partent en croisade pour reverdir, innover, se déplacer, habiller, construire et consommer différemment.
La tige c’est cette jeune pousse symbole d’espoir et de volonté pour faire face aux enjeux climatiques, c’est la résilience.

Dans ce podcast, vous entendrez des entrepreneurs, des artisans, des associations, des activistes qui ont décidé d’agir pour améliorer le cadre de vie des communautés.

A chaque épisode, je vous présenterai des initiatives concrètes et inspirantes afin d’avoir une empreinte écologique positive.
Je vous souhaite une très belle écoute sur La Tige, c’est parti pour faire le plein d’idées durables !

Anna A. Touré

Tu souhaites parler sur La Tige, envoie un mail à LaTige_podcast@green-inception.com.

Name: The Global Entrepreneurship Week
Description:
In de week van 16-22 november 2009 neemt Nederland samen met 77 andere landen wereldwijd deel aan de Global Entrepreneurship Week (GEW). Tijdens één week zullen miljoenen jongeren zich wereldwijd aansluiten bij een groeiende beweging van ondernemende mensen, om nieuwe ideeën te genereren en op zoek te gaan naar manieren om dit uit te voeren. Een initiatief om jonge mensen te inspireren om innovatie, verbeelding en creativiteit te omarmen.

Wil jij weten wat er internationaal gebeurd tijdens de Global Entrepreneurship Week? Bezoek de website: www.unleashingideas.org

De Global Entrepreneurship Week zal jonge mensen verbinden door middel van lokale, nationale en wereldwijde activiteiten, ontworpen om jongeren te helpen om de potentiële starter of innovator in zichzelf te ontdekken. Studenten, onderwijzers, ondernemers, het bedrijfsleven, de non-profitsector, overheid en vele anderen zullen aan een waaier van activiteiten deelnemen. Voor Nederland biedt de week de kans om ondernemerschap en ondernemendheid onder jonge mensen te stimuleren. Door krachten te bundelen en activiteiten af te stemmen kan het nationale beleid op het gebied van onderwijs en ondernemerschap verder worden versterkt.

De Global Entrepreneurship Week is er voor iedereen die geïnteresseerd is in ondernemen. Neem ook deel aan de GEW 2009 en motiveer anderen - spread the word!

Organiseer een activiteit om jongeren en jonge ondernemers te helpen, te inspireren of te begeleiden.

Via de website kun je zien welke activiteiten worden georganiseerd. Bekijk welke je interessant vindt, en schrijf je in!

Meer informatie over deelnemen klik hier: http://www.gewnederland.nl/deelnemen.

Nous communiquons sur les dernières expériences ou initiatives afin de vous inspirer au quotidien et de vous donner l'envie de passer à l'action pour changer les choses.

NOUS (BIEN)VEILLONS POUR VOUS !

Ces thématiques vous intéressent ?
Pour vous inscrire à la newsletter Quokkapi, suivez le lien : www.quokkapi.com

Vivons ensemble la transformation de notre société et devenons acteurs du changement !


CONNAISSEZ-VOUS LE QUOKKA ?  
Peu connu en Europe et dans le reste du monde, le Quokka est un animal aussi mystérieux qu’attirant vivant principalement sur l’île de Rottnest Island, à l’Ouest de l’Australie. Ses traits sympathiques, son sourire naturel et ses pauses hilarantes lui valent le surnom « d’animal le plus heureux du monde ». Son succès s’étend jusqu’aux réseaux sociaux sur Instagram notamment via le Hashtag #quokkaselfie

Name: RedBus2US
Description:
What’s RedBus2US.com all about ?
It is all about information and experiences for international students, working professionals and many others aspiring to study, work, travel and live in America and many other countries.  We have been the trusted source of providing reliable information over the past 10 years, starting from 2009. We have reached over 32 million users since we started our blog. 

What are things we cover on the blog ?
Articles, news updates that address questions like below…

As a student aspiring to come to US you might think…

How will it be here once you land in America ?
How would your MS life be here in US ?
What everyone think of you back in India ?
Where to work when student ?
What every student should know ?
What every student can enjoy ?
What is on campus job vs off campus working as a student ?
How to get scholarship ?
How is the education system in America ?
Should I come to US in recession ?
What kind of jobs will I get after MS ?
How should I choose employer for working ?
As a professional aspiring to come to US on H1B or work visa you may think…

What are the immigration issues ?
What is H1b visa ?
How to choose consulting company ?
How to negotiate with employers ?
How are interviews different from India ?
What can I bring to US ?
What is life style there? Clothes ?
What should I learn ? How to talk on phone ?
Should I buy car after I go ?
After getting a job and having some money in US, you may think…

Where to invest ? US or India ? Why ?
What can you enjoy after you get a job ?
What can you do in USA ? What are the opportunities ?
How to network with Desi community ?
Should you date someone ?
Should you do social drinking ?
What sports should you follow ?
Lifestyle, dress sense ? Brands ?
How to network with others in America ?
Should you learn to dance ? What is the edge with dancing ?
Where to go during breaks to have fun ?
How to plan finances here in US ?

We cover many such topics.

Name: The Assistant's List
Description:
The Assistant’s List is home to unapologetically forward-thinking assistants who passionately believe in innovative learning and growth centered development.

The role of assistant has changed drastically over the past ten years and the changes emerging over the next decade are likely to border on the extreme. 

Technology and automation will continue to erode what once defined our traditional duties. 

Counterintuitively, the role isn’t shrinking, it’s expanding. The defining characteristics of what it means to be Executive Assistant and the core competencies of how we perform our jobs are being fundamentally reformulated.

Let’s get real, development in our roles can sometimes be anemic. There are a host of articles, blogs, and courses that tell you WHAT to do but fail to offer practical actions for HOW to do it in the real world.

This blog is a guide to facilitate your development and prepare you for the coming transformation. Here you’ll get equipped with the tools, strategies, and techniques that will raise your level and transform you into an assistant for the New Era.

Our roles will only be sustainable if we proactively level up, take ownership of our development, and advocate for our own growth.

Name: lovedeco.ro
Description:
Lovedeco.ro este o publicație în care scriem despre cum să-ți fie mai bine acasă, indiferent că este vorba de un apartament, o locuință în chirie, căminul studențesc sau o casă mare cu grădină sau terasă. 

Scopul nostru este de a scurta timpul de căutare, atunci când este vorba despre idei și soluții în designul unui cămin. În articolele de pe Lovedeco.ro facem trimiteri către cele mai bune produse de home & deco, idei ingenioase, sfaturi pertinente venite din partea arhitecților renumiți, designerilor de interior, meseriașilor sau instalatorilor, pentru a creiona o imagine cât mai realistă despre ce presupune o amenajare. 

Pentru că secretul e ca fiecare casă să spună o poveste, trecem săptămânal - acum mai mult virtual decât fizic - pragul celor mai interesante locuințe din România, care serveas drept izvor de inspirație, și le prezentăm așa cum sunt: cu improvizații sau reparații neplănuite. 

Pe lângă articole de design, periodic dăm startul unor dezbateri care pornesc de la problemele oamenilor. Ascultăm și spunem poveștile comunităților, cartierelor și orașelor în care mergem. 

Știm că un spațiu devine acasă numai prin viziune, astfel că ne dorim să oferim toate instrumentele pentru a transforma visul în realitate. Misiunea noastră este să livrăm soluții și alternative, inspirație și informație. 

 Împreună transformăm orice casă în acasă!

Name: Pixidis
Description:
Pixidis è la bussola quotidiana per capire come va il mondo.

Oggi si è bombardati di informazione, di qualsiasi qualità, tanto che si corre il rischio di scegliere fra consultare faticosamente troppe fonti (con contributi non sempre attendibili o interessanti) o non informarsi affatto. 

Il mondo del lavoro, al contempo, è sempre più frenetico, specialmente per i giovani professionisti, e non lascia tempo ad un'informazione plurale, che permetta di prendere visione di insieme, studiare e maturare le proprie personali opinione critiche, aderenti all'evolversi dei contesti. 

Pixidis nasce da un gruppo di professionisti che, nei loro diversi settori lavorativi, hanno la necessità di tenersi informati e aggiornati, di studiare quotidianamente. Il nostro scopo è quindi quello di selezionare, collegare, sintetizzare e commentare le notizie attorno a noi, fornendo un canale critico e preparato che possa fare da "pixidis" (così gli antichi chiamavano il primo tipo di bussola mai inventato) attraverso l'informazione attuale, con contributi brevi e smart, che chiunque può inserire efficacemente nei piccoli spazi della propria giornata.

Name: Projekt MdM - Media dla MiŚOT
Description:
Dlaczego MiŚOT

          W RPT jest ponad 3 tys. aktywnych przedsiębiorców telekomunikacyjnych. Mali i Średni Operatorzy Telekomunikacyjni (MiŚOT) stanowią w tym gronie ponad 90% firm, a swoim zasięgiem obejmują blisko 30% stacjonarnego rynku dostępu do internetu, co stanowi drugą siłę po Orange.
          Jest to jedna z kilku stale rozwijających się gałęzi polskiej gospodarki. Rosnąca wartość rynku MiŚOT idzie w parze z rozwojem technologicznym i innowacją. Branża posiadająca dostęp do instrumentów finansowych wspierających inwestycje. Operatorzy mają dostęp do preferencyjnych pożyczek szerokopasmowych dofinansowanych ze środków państwowych.

 Dlaczego MdM

            MdM skupia większość najważniejszych mediów, z których MiŚOT czerpią informacje z rynku:
- ICT Professional – jedyny magazyn branży MiŚOT (drukowany i dostępny online),
- ISP Forum – najpopularniejsze forum polskich lokalnych operatorów,

Name: Think Differently: SCULPTED Podcast
Description:
This isn’t just another Podcast, it’s a mindset.

Hosted by former Pro Footballer turned tech founder Nick Kratochvil, SCULPTED brings you behind the curtain of high performance, bold thinking, and unconventional growth.

 With a logic-first, emotionally detached lens, Nick sits down with industry leaders, disruptors, and visionaries to challenge default thinking, from crabs in a bucket to tall poppy syndrome, no idea is off-limits.

 What started in a 24m² apartment in Germany has grown into a movement, documenting the unfiltered journey of building, breaking, and becoming.

If you’re:
	•	 Tired of surface-level motivation
	•	 Seeking depth, tension, and truth
	•	 Building something bigger than yourself

Then this space is for you.

Raw. Unfiltered. Thought-provoking.
Think differently. Live deliberately.
 Stay SCULPTED.

Name: P4U Reporter
Description:
Nobody can contradict the fact that, NEWS media has changed the world.

The world, as we perceive it today, is largely an image created by News Media.  The news which is predominantly negative, is vastly limited to bigger cities, events, and politics. And it is filtered and influenced by vested interests. 
Moreover, much like our democracy, there is no participation by the public at large in News Media.

So this is why P4U REPORTER was launched.

This platform is designed to bring in the change and disruption by questioning the status quo of News Media and journalism. Here the news can be submitted by anyone. Common People, bloggers, journalists, content writers, etc., will all be able to participate on our platform.

The platform is designed for global audience and the news can be submitted in 5 mins with advanced features like that of geo tagging and time, location and category filters.

To be truely independent, we are based away from state and national capitals, we don’t take sides, no monetary resources will come between the News and its presentation.

We are creating a truely independent media and not just a mirage of independent media.

We want to create a better world. The world as it is.

Join the revolution. Be the change.

Founded in September of 2007, DogTime Media is the largest vertical media community focused exclusively on pet owners and the 56 billion dollar annual pet market. DogTime Media actively supports the efforts of rescue groups and shelters nationwide to significantly reduce the number of homeless and neglected pets in the country. DogTime Media has several programs dedicated to giving back to the animal community including monthly and annual grant programs and our annual pet bloggers award program (known as The Petties). We continuously look for ways we can give back to the animal community. Through our efforts, DogTime Media has donated over $300,000 to pet related causes. Name: Raise the Roots
Description:
Raise the Roots is a digital agency specializing in online engagement for nonprofit organizations. We assist nonprofits in reaching their online advocacy, fundraising, and outreach goals through strategic consulting, copywriting, digital production of websites and email, social media, data management and analysis, list acquisition, vendor evaluation, training, and migration. 

Strengthen your engagement over email and social by gaining new insights into your supporters. Profile and segment audiences to incorporate conditional content into your efforts and personalize the relationship with supporters. Use marketing automations to welcome new friends and reactivate the old.

Benefit from our experience mobilizing citizens to influence policy makers at the local, state, national, and international level. Leverage email, social, phones, and paid services to make your supporters' voices heard. Coordinate online efforts with lobbying and communications tactics through tele-townhalls, letter-to-editor campaigns, and more. 

Successful fundraising relies on strong relationships with donors. Emphasize the breadth of your work and your victories. Give donors a sense of ownership in your organization. Use data to present custom ask strings and content based on their areas of interest. Test messaging to maximize the number of gifts, recurring donations, and amounts.

Name: netDoktor
Description:
www.netDoktor.de ist Ihr Gesundheitsportal im Internet.
Sie haben Fragen zu einer Erkrankung oder Behandlung? Sie wollen wissen, was hinter Ihren Symptomen steckt oder sich informieren, was es im Bereich Gesundheit Neues gibt? netDoktor liefert die Antworten! 
netDoktor bietet seit 1999 leicht verständliche Informationen zu Krankheiten, Symptomen, Medikamenten, Behandlungsmethoden und Laborwerten. Alle Inhalte sind von Ärzten, Biologen und Fachjournalisten erstellt und richten sich nach hohen Qualitätsansprüchen. Im Vordergrund steht dabei, alle Inhalte verständlich aufzubereiten – so möchte netDoktor dazu beitragen, dass Sie umfassend und unabhängig informiert sind.
Wer ist eigentlich dieser netDoktor? 
Wir sind ein junges, hochmotiviertes Team aus Redakteuren, IT- und UX-Fachleuten, Produktmanagern und Sales-Experten, die das Portal stetig voranbringen und verbessern. Bereits seit zwei Jahrzehnten arbeiten wir mit sehr viel Spaß an einem netDoktor, der Ihnen bei allen Fragen rund um Medizin und Gesundheit kompetent zur Seite steht. Unser Ziel ist alle Nutzer-Fragen zu beantworten. Wir haben Lust auf Innovationen: netDoktor arbeitet permanent an neuen Ideen und entwickelt sich weiter. Der Symptom-Checker steht beispielhaft für die Arbeitsweise des Unternehmens: Nah am Nutzer und medizinisch verlässlich.

netDoktor als Teil der BurdaVerlag Publishing GmbH gehört zu Hubert Burda Media.

Impressum: https://www.netdoktor.de/ueber-uns/impressum/

Datenschutz: https://www.netdoktor.de/ueber-uns/datenschutz/

NewsPlus: Real News For You From Trusted Sources

Brings breaking news, local stories, trending videos and personalized feed based on users' interests, in their language, while avoiding fake news and unsafe content. Install the app from www.newsplusapp.com and enjoy.

NewsPlus is fully automated news aggregation platform which uses machine learning to select the most relevant stories in real time from huge volume of articles that get published 24x7 across the world. Through Android, iOS and Web applications, NewsPlus delivers highly relevant news in 10 languages for audience in India, SE Asia, USA, while prioritizing local sources

Users can follow friends and share stories directly and chat with them. Users can curate the stories & videos they like into Magazines for their followers to see. NewsPlus is also going to be a publishing platform which makes it very easy for users to write and publish stories in their language.  

Proprietary algorithms using NLP group the articles & videos related to a story into story clusters, from which media & social signals are derived and used 1) for selecting important stories, 2) for avoiding fake news & unsafe content (thus maintain brand safety), 3) for generating real time notifications and 4) for providing 360 full coverage.

Designed for developing countries, this small sized app delivers good experience on slow/poor mobile networks along with great offline support. Provides simple experience for casual or first time smartphone users, and rich experience for power users or news junkies with Personalization, Social, Chat, Magazines and Publishing features.

Content comes from our interest in the business of snow. We aim to be first or at least fast. Some stories will be presented as found, but where possible we try to offer readers information which is supplemented by analysis and interpretation. SIN will try to tell snow pros what they need to know, good news and bad. There are no bylines at SIN, no bigging up, no back slapping, no knee jerk reactions. As refreshing as a cold dry blanket of pow.

If you’re a snow pro please add us to your media contact list. If you have something interesting (and legal) to say we'd like to hear from you. Your story appearing on SIN allows you to communicate with snow pros and wannabee pros all over the world.

Name: HSE EAST AFRICA
Description:
HSE East Africa is the leading independent publication in corporate responsibility, health, safety and environmental practice, covering every industry in the region. Covering a wide range of topics, from office to heavy industry, and from general safety management to specific workplace hazards, HSE East Africa enables our readers to get a whole new mix of practical, lively, and editorially sound articles to enhance safety at the workplace.

HSE East Africa places special focus on the oil and gas and energy projects in Kenya, Uganda, Tanzania, Mozambique, Rwanda and Ethiopia with emphasis on the impact of these projects on the people in this region.

Health and safety has, for too long and by too many, been seen simply as unnecessary paperwork. In other cases it's been an afterthought, with budget concerns and building aesthetics ranking above worker safety in the design stages of projects. The impact on the environment resulting from the numerous infrastructure projects as well as industrial activities within the region have at times been ignored leading to undue exposure of the population to harm.

HSE East Africa seeks to change attitudes towards workplace safety, highlight potential threats to the environment and educate on laws, policies and best practice.

We believe that gaining information is key to coming up with better solutions. Societies work smoother when well informed individuals take better decisions. 

We want TheSoup to be the quickest way to learn & be aware, while coping with the ever increasing information on the internet by developing better way of consumption.

Lets say you are interested in the 'Trump Campaign-Russia Investigation' or 'Bitcoin & Cryptocurrency Market' or 'Delhi's Air Pollution Crisis' or 'Hollywood's Sexual Harassment Scandal'.
How do you ensure that you stay updated with such stories of your interest? 

TheSoup organizes news and events as stories you can follow so that you don't miss out on the stuff you care about. When something new happens in your followed story it comes to you directly as a single update covered by multiple sources.

Our AI based algorithms scans through various sources everyday to form stories and update them, so that all the story updates reach you instead of you looking for them.

Founded in 1991, CABJ won NABJ’s coveted Student Chapter of the Year award in 2001, 2002 and 2007, and was nominated for the award in 2005 and 2012. Our slogan supports this mission precisely: Without diversity, there is no excellence. 

CABJ hosts various activities and opportunities for CABJ members to learn more about the unique areas of journalism. These activities include panels, speakers, a mentor program, and exclusive lists of important industry-related websites. Name: Politically Incorrect - incorrect.gr
Description:
Σχετικά με εμάς..

Καλωσορίσατε στο Politically Incorrect, την σελίδα που φτιάχτηκε από νέους για νέους. Γιατί έχουμε άποψη και θέλουμε να ακουστεί.

Στην εποχή μας που όλα αλλάζουν και οι προτεραιότητες πλέον βρίσκονται στις ουσιαστικές ανάγκες, δύσκολα ακούνε οι φορείς τη νέα φωνή. Αντίθετα, όλοι ακολουθούν το παλιό και το γνώριμο.

Δεν είμαστε ένα ακόμα ειδησεογραφικό site. Κάτι τέτοιο είναι εξαιρετικά διαδεδομένο και γίνεται με μεγάλη επιτυχία από πολλά μέσα. Αυτό που θέλουμε είναι να δοθεί η φρέσκια ματιά, η άλλη άποψη, οι αληθινές ιστορίες νέων εντός και εκτός Ελλάδας.

Στόχος μας; Να δημιουργήσουμε μια δυναμική συζήτηση για τους νέους και να τους φέρουμε πίσω στην πολιτική.

Θέλουμε να μιλήσουν όλοι εκείνοι που διστάζουν, εκείνοι που δεν ακούγονται και εκείνοι που δεν έχουν κάποιον άλλον να μιλήσει για αυτούς.

Θέλουμε να διαφωνήσουμε. Δεν θέλουμε να αναζητήσουμε τι είναι αληθινό, αλλά την δική μας αλήθεια. Θέλουμε να μάθουμε και να ακουστούμε.

Θέλουμε να ακουστεί ακόμα και το πολιτικό λάθος, γιατί από τα λάθη μαθαίνουμε. Γιατί για να μάθεις να έχεις φωνή, πρέπει πρώτα να είσαι Politically Incorrect.

*Tα άρθρα που δημοσιεύονται και είναι ενυπόγραφα, δεν υπόκεινται σε οποιαδήποτε μορφή λογοκρισίας. Για τις απόψεις που διατυπώνονται φέρει ευθύνη ο εκάστοτε συγγραφέας και όχι το ίδιο το site. Αν θέλετε να αρθρογραφήσετε ή απλά να επικοινωνήσετε μαζί μας, μπορείτε να στείλετε email στο incorrectgr@gmail.com. Αποστολή άρθρου συνεπάγεται επιθυμία δημοσίευσής του.

Politically Incorrect is a website (@ incorrect.gr) created as a magazine that connects young people with politics, keeps them up to date on all the latest developments, news about Greece and the world, contains weird news, conversations with important people, as much as opinions and true stories of young people. Name: TrafficHaus
Description:
TrafficHaus is an elevated ad serving platform, which allows publishers and advertisers greater control of their inventory and investments. The platform itself is built by publishers, for publishers, it uses a variable CPM model, through proprietary algorithms based on a self-serve live bidding platform.

For the initial phase we are leaving it as a run of network platform, available for publishers to freely use to sell their inventory to their client base. Advertisers are also able to resell their existing inventory that they are unable to monetize via the Traffic Haus platform. Select the ad size, location, volume, Geographical location, and device(s) you would like to advertise on and bid for traffic. Our algorithm takes each advertiser's bid and budget into account along with the minimums set by us or the pub, as well as the geographical makeup and other proprietary valuations, based on the bid and comparative data, the system and allocates the traffic accordingly. Set the price you wish to pay and have the flexibility to quickly adjust your bids in real time, taking control of your ROI.

Name: TeverePost
Description:
TeverePost è il nuovo progetto di informazione locale della Valtiberina.

CHI C'È DIETRO TEVEREPOST? - Un gruppo unito da professionalità, voglia di fare ed entusiasmo. Siamo una redazione giovane, con un’età media al di sotto dei 40 anni. Per ciascuno di noi, TeverePost rappresenta l’opportunità di mettere le proprie capacità e tutta l’esperienza maturata in anni di gavetta al servizio dei nostri concittadini.

DI COSA CI OCCUPEREMO - TeverePost cercherà di raccontare regolarmente le principali vicende della Valtiberina, spiegando in modo semplice e lineare cosa sta succedendo nel territorio e perché. L’obiettivo è quello di dare vita ad uno spazio di espressione alternativo mediante la diffusione di notizie, approfondimenti e contenuti originali che diano al lettore tutti gli elementi per comprendere il senso di una storia ed esprimere il proprio giudizio. Un’attività certamente dispendiosa, ma di indubbia gratificazione.

COME AGIREMO - “Meno cose, ma fatte meglio”. La nostra realtà vuole ispirarsi ai principi dello slow journalism e a tutte quelle esperienze editoriali, sempre più numerose, che scelgono di puntare sulla qualità dei contenuti anziché piegarsi alle logiche dell’informazione digitale come l’abbiamo intesa fino ad oggi: ossessione per la quantità e la velocità, sensazionalismi e caccia al click sui social, comunicati stampa copia-incolla, presenza sistematica di refusi, verifiche approssimative, “notizie” che non lo sono.

La grande sfida di TeverePost sarà quella di proporre qualcosa di diverso ed autentico anche in ambito strettamente locale. Ciò, inevitabilmente, comporterà un lavoro più complesso e meno ‘immediato’ che tuttavia, ne siamo certi, nel lungo periodo potrà restituire qualcosa di realmente positivo alla comunità.

Name: Central Track
Description:
CentralTrack.com, a Dallas-focused publication that plans to aim its focus directly and unapologetically at the elusive 18-to-35-year-old demographic by writing about the things they’re most interested in -- music, restaurants, bars, nightlife, fashion, sports, art and anything else connected to the most happening events in town on a given week -- and through the online-only, social media- and mobile-ready means we all clearly prefer.

Founded by former Dallas Observer music editor Pete Freedman and in collaboration of some of Dallas’ most recognizable bloggers and social media personalities, we aim to voraciously cover Dallas’ rich cultural landscape and showcase the wonderful diversity and fascinating blend of high- and low-brow aesthetics that this city so uniquely boasts. The name Central Track, even, is a nod to as much, referencing the rail (and subsequently named neighborhood) that once separated the Downtown Dallas and Deep Ellum entertainment districts just as the city’s cultural identity was taking shape in the late 1800s.

Point is: We know what we’re talking about. We also unabashedly think that Dallas is pretty awesome.

Name: Redefine Dichotomies
Description:
Now more than ever, it's important to explore and amplify Asian diaspora (e.g., Asian American, Asian Canadian, Asian European) stories. 

In the US, the rise in violence against Asian Americans has been disheartening and frustrating, but it's also important to realize that this isn't the only form of racism. Racism isn't always overt; it can be more subtle and appear as unconscious biases or microaggressions that even well-intentioned people maintain.

I'm working to subvert some of these biases and humanize Asian diaspora experiences. Hopefully these stories help people 1. understand the similarities we share as humans and 2. learn from our differences.

Name: LAYERS Online Magazin
Description:
LAYERS ist ein multimediales Online Magazin und eine unabhängige Plattform für zeitgeistigen Journalismus. Gemeinsam mit einem smarten AutorInnen Team aus Leipzig und Hamburg beschäftigen wir uns mit Themen rund um das gute Leben. Wir gehen Fragen wie „Lebt es sich besser in der Stadt oder auf dem Land?“, „Wie können und wollen wir in Zukunft arbeiten, leben und reisen?“ oder „Brauchen wir Kinder, um glücklich zu sein?“ nach.

Neben den großen Fragen des Lebens möchten wir euch aber auch ganz handfeste Tipps mitgeben, zum Beispiel welches Buch ihr gerade auf dem Nachttisch liegen haben solltet, bei welchen Marken ihr nicht nur schicke, sondern auch nachhaltige Produkte shoppen könnt und ob ihr jetzt auch einen TikTok Account braucht.

Euch erwarten spannende, witzige, leichte und nachdenkliche Beiträge aus den Kategorien Design, Kultur, New Work, Gutes Leben, Unterwegs und Menschen.
Wir teilen mit euch persönliche Erfahrungen, echte Geschichten und individuelle Lebenswege zwischen Selbstverwirklichung und Erwartungsdruck; gesellschaftlichen Strukturen und einem gesunden Fuck-it-all-Mindset.

So vielschichtig wie unsere Themen sind auch die Formate, in denen wir mit euch unsere Gedanken teilen. 

Natürlich gibt es jede Menge Lesestoff für euch, zum Beispiel in Form von Kolumnen oder Interviews mit spannenden Menschen. Darüber hinaus habt ihr die Möglichkeit, euch ausgewählte Beiträge von deren AutorInnen vorlesen zu lassen. So könnt ihr nebenbei kochen, Auto fahren, eure Nägel lackieren oder einfach die Augen schließen und lauschen. Ansonsten könnt ihr euch auch auf inspirierende (analoge) Fotos, kurze Video-Clips und ausgewählte Illustrationen freuen.

Name: Bluefin Media
Description:
Bluefin Media is one of the leading digital media companies in the world with over 15 years of experience in the marketplace.  The business is comprised of four divisions, and each is described below:

• Bluefin Publishing – The publishing division is ranked in the top 100 networks on the Internet (Quantcast, 2015) with over 30 Million unique visitors every month.  The publishing division includes 40+ sites in the network spanning across five verticals (entertainment news, food, fashion, automotive, and health/wellness).

• Dealer 24/7 – Dealer 24/7 is a complete digital marketing solution for the automotive industry with a focus on media buying, content creation, and consulting services.  Clients typically see their digital marketing budgets produce at least 2-3 times greater return with Dealer 24/7 when compared to their current providers.

• Streaming Revolution – Streaming Revolution is a video technology solution that was developed with the flexibility to meet the needs of companies of all sizes at a cost savings of 50% on average from their current partner.  Solutions for every aspect of digital video delivery is what separates SR from the rest of the industry (player, platform, CDN, content production, ad serving, and advertiser demand).

• B Liquid – B Liquid is a digital marketing agency servicing clients across all industries with a focus on strategy development, creative production, and media buying execution.  Every campaign is tailored to meet the specific needs of the client, and performance is guaranteed to eliminate the risk of delivering results.

Clients and strategic partners include: AOL, French Telecom, Google, MediaMath, Appnexus, Bright Roll, RGM Group, Allrecipes, La-Z-Boy, Buckeye Cablesystem, Denison University, Yark Automotive, Golden Globe Awards, Scripps Interactive, Mahalak Automotive, and Daily Motion.

Le constat est simple : nos activités professionnelles peuvent avoir un impact positif et à grande échelle sur la société et son fonctionnement.

Ainsi, nous soutenons cette dynamique solidaire à travers le partage de témoignages vidéos auprès de notre communauté. 

Notre plateforme évolue par ailleurs vers un espace de réflexion participatif en ouvrant la discussion sur la thématique de la solidarité et du rôle de l’Entreprise dans le monde de demain. Nous croyons à la force et la créativité de l’intelligence collective et souhaitons vous permettre de vous questionner et de prendre la parole afin de nourrir le débat sur ce sujet.

Restons unis et solidaires au-delà de la crise actuelle.

Name: Grid Monitor
Description:
We are here to solve problems. We are here to help. We believe in solving problems that shift work from low-skill, time-consuming, error-prone data collection and organizing and updating of information… to more time spent advising, developing quicker insights, faster response times, more quality outcomes in impactful activities. 
 
External Regulatory Information management is a problem that spans all Market Participants. We continue to believe that creating an automated data platform designed to serve the common information needs of all Market Participants that lowers costs and increases quality outcomes, is worth pursuing. 
 
Our service is continuously collecting relevant information from ERCOT, the Public Utility Commission of Texas, and the Texas Legislature. We connect meetings to filings to news articles by creating one central repository of hard-to-find information — filings, parties, streaming public meetings, reporting, news, and relevant social feeds.
 
Our corporate purpose is to save industry and markets meaningful amounts of time by reducing the number of clicks between professionals, teams, and associations and their interwoven yet decentralized regulatory information needs.

Moi c'est Antonin - 18 ans d'expérience commerciale, un mental de compétiteur et une admiration pour le journalisme.

A force de chercher à m'améliorer, j'ai questionné, lu, rencontré des personnalités fortes qui transforment leurs ambitions en réalité.

Cela m'a amené à me questionner. Qu'est-ce qui les anime? Que font-elles différemment? Qu'est-ce qui motive leur action?

Dans ce podcast, je partagerai les parcours de celles et ceux qui ont en commun l'énergie de faire aboutir les projets qui les font rêver.

J'espère ainsi vous donner envie de vous mettre en mouvement car quand on les écoute on se rend compte que rien n'est impossible !

Une newsletter -Va voir Higher- complète le dispositif.  J'y partage les coups de cœur qui m'ont inspiré. Sa fréquence d'envoi est....fluctuante...

J'espère que vous apprécierez - Bonne écoute & Bonne lecture !

Name: VIDEONAUTE
Description:
Je suis Emilie, une entrepreneuse multipassionnée qui ne rentrera jamais  dans aucune case conventionnelle. Ma mission est de permettre à chaque entrepreneur de produire des vidéos de qualité pour un budget accessible et en un temps raisonnable. 

Entre 2006 et 2015, avocate d’affaires passionnée d’écriture et de filmographie, je réoriente mes compétences vers les petites et moyennes entreprises et développe une expertise en droit commercial, droit d’auteur, droit audiovisuel et droit des nouvelles technologies.

En 2017, je prends un virage majeur en intégrant Tisch School of the Arts, une école de cinéma new-yorkaise de renommée internationale.

Mon documentaire “Scattered” reçoit les félicitations du jury et une mention spéciale de journalistes du New York Times.

J’échange alors avec certains des réalisateurs les plus en vogue de la planète, les géants de l’industrie du film, du web & du marketing digital et des entrepreneurs disruptifs et inspirants.

Tous reportent le même problème: le monde de l’entrepreneuriat a changé. Désormais, pour être visible sur le net et se démarquer des concurrents, les compétences de l’entrepreneur doivent s’ouvrir au monde de la vidéo.

Je développe alors ma propre méthode de conception de la vidéo basée sur le comportement des prospects et à destination des entrepreneurs.

Comprendre les entrepreneurs qui m’entourent, leur transmettre les bons outils et stratégies en vidéo marketing pour qu’ils développent leur marque, obtiennent plus de ventes et aient un impact visible sur le net est ce que j’apprécie le plus dans la vie.

Grâce à ma méthode, chaque entrepreneur peut désormais suivre un processus simple et rapide pour créer des vidéos professionnelles à un coût raisonnable.

Donc si tu es un entrepreneur, un coach, un thérapeute, un consultant et/ou porteur de projets et que tu souhaites construire des stratégies en vidéo marketing comme des pro et développer ton entreprise, tu es exactement au bon endroit !
A bientôt,
Emilie

Name: Alexandre & Aristote
Description:
ALEXANDRE & ARISTOTE

DITES-NOUS QUI VOUS ETES, 
NOUS VOUS DIRONS QUOI LIRE !

Les livres se vendent de plus en plus sur internet. Or, aucun moteur de recherche, ni aucune plateforme de vente ne permet de rechercher un livre adapté à son profil. Par exemple, pour un étudiant qui s’intéresserait depuis peu à l’Histoire, lancer une recherche « Histoire pour débutant » ne le conduirait à rien. Parallèlement, ni l’école, ni la télévision, ne jouent plus ce rôle de précepteur. Concrètement, si un jeune souhaite se forger une culture générale pour réussir un concours, pour faire de la politique, ou par simple soif de savoir, aucune institution, ni aucune entreprise ne peut aujourd’hui le guider dans son parcours intellectuel, en tenant compte à la fois de ses goûts, de ses ambitions et de son niveau.  

Avec Alexandre & Aristote, nous nous sommes donné un objectif : faire aimer la lecture en proposant à chacun le bon livre au bon moment. Aristote, c’est le précepteur d’Alexandre le Grand. Celui qui lui donnera toutes les armes intellectuelles qui lui permettront de conquérir le monde. « Au fond des victoires d'Alexandre, on retrouve toujours Aristote », écrit Charles de Gaulle. Car la connaissance n’est pas stérile et nous la voyons même comme la base de l’action, qui doit permettre à chacun d’atteindre ses ambitions, pourvu qu’il trouve son Aristote. C’est ce que notre nom décrit.

Grâce à un algorithme de première pointe et fort d'une bibliothèque de plusieurs milliers de livres, Alexandre & Aristote est capable de cerner le profil de ses utilisateurs en quelques minutes. Il cible ses conseils de lecture et participe, livre après livre, à construire pour chacun un parcours intellectuel personnalisé. Une aide précieuse à l’acquisition d’une véritable culture.

Name: TOUTMONCINÉMA | LE CINÉMA VU PAR VOUS, POUR VOUS !
Description:
UN CONSTAT DE DEPART
On n’a jamais eu autant de films à portée de clic et pourtant, on finit toujours par regarder ce que nous dicte l’algorithme ! Alors qu’en fait, nous avons tous des inoubliables à voir, revoir et partager ...

TOUTMONCINÉMA C’EST QUOI ?
Un lieu de partage – toutes générations et tous genres confondus – des stars, répliques, scènes cultes et inoubliables qui font le cinéma que vous aimez.
Une communauté multi-supports à travers son site, ses réseaux sociaux, sa chaîne et son rendez-vous podcast « le cinéma de monsieur toutmoncinéma ».

POURQUOI « MONSIEUR TOUTMONCINÉMA » ?
Un nom hommage à Pierre Tchernia, le « Monsieur Cinéma » qui a marqué des générations d’amoureux du cinéma.
Un porte-parole de la communauté toutmoncinéma.

DE QUOI PARLE LE PODCAST ?
C’est aussi bien #laminute qui évoque en une minute l’un des inoubliables partagés - que #LaRépliqueQuiClaque qui revient sur toutes ces répliques qui claquent encore dans nos têtes - ou encore #SurVosÉcrans avec les immanquables du moment à (re)voir absolument … quel que soit l’écran - sans oublier #lachronique votre « 5 à 7 minutes » (voire plus si affinités) consacrée à un réalisateur, un thème ... incontournables du cinéma.
[ et au-delà, au fil de la playlist de CinéMaRadio, vos BO éternelles de films avec #labandeson ]

LE BUT DE TOUT ÇA ? … 
Tout simplement donner envie de (re)découvrir tous ces films que ce soit en salle, en vidéo, en VOD/SVOD ou à la télévision !

EN QUELQUES CHIFFRES
-> Une communauté de plus de 45 000 amoureux de cinéma via ses réseaux sociaux sociaux, son site et son podcast
-> Plus de 1 million de personnes touchées chaque mois
-> Un cœur de cible 45-64 ans amateurs éclairés de cinéma

Welkom bij Mies Magazine

Hét online magazine over alle aspecten die een mens tegenkomt vóór, tijdens en na een scheiding.

Mies Magazine trekt tienduizenden bezoekers in Nederland en België
 
Een krappe twee jaar na de start heeft Mies Magazine, het online tijdschrift voor de Mens in een scheiding, enkele tienduizenden unieke bezoekers per maand vanuit België en Nederland. Een spontane actie van oprichtster Michèle de Vries is uitgegroeid tot een grote en hechte community waar iedereen die met scheiden te maken heeft – privé en professioneel – met elkaar verbonden wordt. Bezoekers wisselen ervaringen en tips uit, partners schrijven geregeld artikelen, blogs, columns en geven advies vanuit hun professie en expertise. 

Mies Magazine richt de aandacht volledig op de mens in een scheiding. Iedereen heeft een eigen verhaal, elke scheiding heeft een ander verloop en uitkomst. Alle menselijke aspecten vóór, tijdens en na een scheiding komen aan bod op het online platform. Behalve de tienduizenden mensen die op zoek zijn naar informatie, advies en lotgenoten, heeft Mies Magazine ook in korte tijd een groot aantal professionals aan zich weten te verbinden, zoals mediators, advocaten, coaches, belangenorganisaties en financieel specialisten. Zowel in Nederland als België blijkt Mies Magazine in een grote behoefte te voorzien.

Name: Rijnstreek Business
Description:
Rijnstreek Business is een regionaal zakenmagazine, die jaarlijks 10 maal verschijnt.

Historie van uitgeverij de Reus media

In 1992 rolde bij De Reus media uit Rijnsburg de eerste Rijnstreek Business-edities van de drukpers. Een nieuw fenomeen was geboren. Rijnstreek Business vulde een specifieke behoefte aan informatie in, door een zakenmagazine uit te brengen waarin ondernemers zich profileren door middel van bedrijfsreportages en advertenties binnen een relevante redactionele context.

Waarvoor we staan

Als gespecialiseerde organisatie is De Reus media toegewijd aan het met elkaar in contact brengen van ondernemers in de regio. Primair doen we dit door het (jaarlijks 10 x) uitgeven van het regionaal zakenmagazine Rijnstreek Business. Secundair ondersteunen we ondernemers hierin via onze jaarlijkse ondernemersverkiezing de Sterkste Schakel, Forumdiscussies, Speeddatings, Rondetafelgesprekken, Autotestdagen en de website.

Waarvoor we gaan

Wij (h)erkennen de behoefte van ondernemers in de regio om met elkaar te communiceren en kennis te nemen van elkaars activiteiten. Op allerlei niveaus en in een steeds complexere maatschappij. Onze uitdaging is om voor deze ondernemers een verbindende rol te spelen in het bewerkstelligen van deze communicatie.

Kernwaarden
Professioneel
Stijl
Persoonlijk
Kwaliteit

De Reus media is gevestigd in het voormalige gemeentehuis van bloemendorp Rijnsburg (Burgemeester Koomansplein). Perfect gelegen in hart van de Rijnstreek regio. U kunt ons kantoor bereiken via telefoonnumer 071-4080557. Of per e-mail info@rijnstreekbusiness.nl.

Name: La Fábrica de Audio
Description:
LA FÁBRICA DE RADIO es ahora La Fábrica de Audio

El formato audio sigue más vivo que nunca, el audio para tu web cada vez es más demandado y el podcast se convierte en el nuevo canal y método de escuchar tus contenidos favoritos. ¿Y si todo eso lo podemos hacer donde tú quieras?
Cuantas veces te has preguntado ¿Y si la Radio hubiera venido a mi empresa, negocio, evento, colegio...?

Con más de 35 años de oficio a sus espaldas Paco Cremades lanza su nuevo proyecto LA FÁBRICA DE AUDIO que : es audio para tu web, es podcast, es audio a domicilio, audio en estado puro, directo, fresco, a medida, hecho con todo el mimo y la profesionalidad ajustada a la necesidad de cada cliente. 

LA FÁBRICA DE AUDIO es una hoja en blanco, libertad total, todo lo que quepa en la imaginación, porque se adapta a cada situación y propuesta poniendo el equipamiento para audio al servicio de clientes, particulares, empresas, entidades u otras emisoras que quieran diversificar también sus propuestas. Es una herramienta más que se puede integrar en otras propuestas. 

Vamos a donde quieras porque la Radioneta de La Fábrica de Audio es un estudio móvil sobre ruedas, con las condiciones técnicas, el confort y la comodidad para grabar tus audios y crear podcast adaptándonos a cualquier necesidad o circunstancia, optimizando tu tiempo con nuestra movilidad. Coordinamos agenda y es toda tuya.

Paco Cremades (Valencia, 1966) es un todoterreno radiofónico con más de 35 años de trayectoria en los que ha ejercido de comunicador, gestor y locutor en múltiples programas y cadenas. Su pasión y oficio es la radio, en toda su extensión, y en el actual contexto de cambio reinventarse es un reto constante por el que apuesta decididamente. 

En LA FÁBRICA DE AUDIO Paco Cremades ofrece ahora un servicio único y abierto a la imaginación. Como el mismo audio, en constante evolución y movimiento.

Correttezza dell'informazione, chiarezza e capacità di spiegare le complesse dinamiche europee sono le linee guida del progetto editoriale di Europae. 

La redazione di Europae è composta da oltre 30 giovani analisti, giornalisti, ricercatori e professionisti provenienti da tutta Italia, con esperienza accademica e professionale di rilievo presso istituzioni europee, società di consulenza, università e centri di ricerca in Italia e in Europa.

Euro Babble will feature in-depth investigative pieces on key underreported European issues (in the style of John Oliver), translations of compelling local European news stories that slipped under the radar, humorous, stereotype-busting fact-checking and explainer articles, and waffle-free interviews of leading European figures.

Name: Byline Media Ltd
Description:
Imagine getting paid well to write the kind of stories you actually care about. And imagine never having to see another ‘listicle’, ‘native ad’, or even any kind of advert. That’s the goal of Byline, a new platform for truly independent journalism.

Byline uses crowdfunding to directly match readers with journalists. 

For journalists: 
Byline offers the prospect of a regular income. We also offer tools to engage readers; incentives to encourage more readers to pay; and, a distribution platform to grow the journalist's overall audience. There is no all-powerful editor, and no pressure from advertisers. We directly match journalists with paying readers. Journalists with top-quality backgrounds are already signing up.

For readers: 
Make your bespoke newspaper - Byline recommends work based on your tastes, unbundling 'the news' to give you only what you want. And in return for payment, gain benefits from the journalist, such as exclusive content like interview notes, and the right to ask questions, or suggest future content.

Those who join will be part of a group that includes: The National Union of Journalists; NKNews, The Tab, the feminist writer Julie Bindel, who will visit forty different countries to investigate prostitution; former reporters from the iconic but now defunct San Francisco Bay Guardian; veteran British investigative journalist Graham Johnson; and others such as a Kenyan journalist on LGBT life in that country, a Vice reporter on the lives of dictators’ children, and a Spanish journalist with access to new information on the killing of Che Guevara. We are also planning to launch with columns from a few esteemed, provocative and insightful commentators: ‘heterodox’ economist Ha-joon Chang, author of “When China Rules the World” Martin Jacques, FT “Agony Uncle” columnist and founder of Shanghai Tang Sir David Tang, and two leading intellectuals on the Israel and Palestine conflict, Norman Finkelstein and Benny Morris.

Name: Investigative journalists' team iFact
Description:
Investigative journalists' team iFact was founded in 2016 by Nino Bakradze and Nino Gagua. From the beginning, it aimed to improve the quality of investigative journalism in Georgia and provide important information to the audience in a very simple way. 
'iFact' is a member of international networks of investigative journalists, such as Organized Crime and Corruption Reporting Project (OCCRP) and Global Investigative Journalists Network (GIJN). Accordingly, our stories have hight standard of ethical and balanced journalism, we assure that iFact provides impartial and reliable information.
iFact has worked on international investigative projects. the most recent international project was the "Pandora documents".
Currently, 'iFact' has two offices, one in Tbilisi and one in Kutaisi. 
we work on deep investigative stories that reflects the most problematic aspect of our society, such as the corruption, nepotism, disinformation, Russian propaganda and hybrid warfare in Georgia. Also we work on stories related to the Georgian orthodox church.

Name: The Boston Political Review
Description:
The Boston Political Review is Boston University’s premiere political publication founded in 2014.

We are a nonpartisan student-run platform for the BU community to express its voice and to give our readers a refreshing source of unbiased information. 

The BPR typically consists of four sections: Global Politics, U.S. Politics, Local Politics, and Social & Business. We have launched an additional fifth section regarding the 2020 Election to provide special coverage on races at the local, state, and federal level.

Our writing staff strike a harmonious balance between a typical news story and academic paper as their articles contain elements of traditional student journalism coupled with academic research.

The BPR is committed to creating an informed student body and maintaining a publication with integrity that upholds the key tenets of student journalism.

Name: Antipresse.net
Description:
Créée en 2015 et dirigée par Slobodan Despot, l’Antipresse est un e-magazine de réflexion et de divertissement basé en Suisse et tourné vers toute la francophonie. L’Antipresse ne s’occupe pas de l’actualité, mais du présent. L’Antipresse ne prétend pas produire de l’information, mais de la connaissance et de la conscience. Nous proposons un regard inactuel, libre et humain sur un monde qui menace de nous échapper. Nous ne comptons pas sur l’intelligence artificielle pour nous expliquer la réalité. Nous voulons voir dans les choses plus que les choses. 
L’Antipresse paraît tous les dimanches matin à 7 heures. On peut s’y abonner n’importe quel jour de la semaine: https://antipresse.net/abonnements/

Name: Coffee Table Stories
Description:
Rahul Rawal is an author, a podcaster & a storyteller. He debuted as an author with his book ‘Blue Crayons – Tales from life and beyond’ in 2018. He also runs a podcast named ‘Coffee Table Stories’ which is well received and is hosted on all famous platforms like YouTube, Spotify, Google, Apple, etc. He has also done some open mic storytelling sessions with some of the famous forums at United Nations Office, Accessible travel forums to name a few. Rahul is born and brought up in Delhi, India but he aspires to travel around the world with his wheelchair. He actively voices the concerns around accessible travel and other accessibility issues faced by the wheelchair users in the country.
His soul’s desire for travel but the challenges of inaccessibility on a wheelchair has somewhere ignited the urge to explore his imagination of places and people through his stories. He believes everyone around us carry a story. Though we keep looking for validation in famous personalities from film, sports, etc., a lot of time inspired by someone in the position of power and fame but if we look around everyone is a hero – a protagonist of their own life and that has formed the very basis of his stories be it in his book or podcasts.

Rahul is a day dreamer and a night owl who loves spending his free time weaving stories. He loves to be in the company of a nice coffee and his favorite books when he is not writing. He is a sucker for a great conversation the ones which go deep beyond the surface. He dreams of settling in the hills where he runs a coffee shop which serve great coffee, best books and the magnificent view of the hills. Feel free to drop a ‘Hello’ at rahulrwl@gmail.com.

Name: The New RC Soaring Digest
Description:
RC Soaring Digest (RCSD) is a reader-written monthly publication for the radio controlled sailplane enthusiast and was published continuously from January of 1984 through December of 2018. From 2004 through to their retirement in 2018, RCSD was edited and published by Bill and Bunny Kuhlman. After a hiatus in 2019 and 2020, RCSD was revived as a 'digital first' online publication led by Managing Editor Terence C. Gannon with Bill and Bunny remaining as Editors Emeritus.

We're proud to say the fundamental nature of RCSD has not changed since its inception, which was aptly described by the very first Editor and Publisher, Jim Gray, in Volume 1 Number 1 in January of 1984:

"R/C Soaring Digest will make every effort to bring you the latest, best and most up-to-date information about this hobby/sport of ours. It will, like any good newspaper, cover the who, the what, the where, the how, and the why of R/C soaring and sailplanes.

We'll talk about airfoils, about new designs, about F3B, about 2-meter sailplanes; and we'll try to bring you soaring personalities and 'guest spots.' There will be some contest reports, and a contest calendar, if possible, covering at least the major events. We will have a beginner's corner with simple ideas building hints, and help for the newcomer to R/C soaring.

You will find a lot of information from abroad...with the reasons behind why they do what they do, and how it's different from our approach. I'll make a real effort to bring theory and practice closer together, and I'll need your help to even come close to these goals."

The current monthly issue can always be found the website below, and back issues are linked off of this same page.

Name: Africtelegraph
Description:
AfricTelegraph.com est l’une agence privée en ligne, spécialisée dans la diffusion d'informations, reportages et analyses sur l'Afrique et l'Afrique centrale en particulier. Nous abordons plusieurs domaines tels que la politique, l’économie, le social, la culture, le sport, les droits de l’homme, etc. Indépendante, AfricTelegraph.com est au service de l’information générale et fait aussi dans la promotion des libertés, de la justice et de la paix.

AfricTelegraph.com a été créé en novembre 2015 de la volonté d’un groupe de journalistes et reconnue par le Ministère de la Communication.

AfricTelegraph.com fournit tous les jours des articles pour de nombreuses publications qui en font la demande.

AfricTelegraph.com fournit, au quotidien et gratuitement, sur Internet des dépêches (News Update), autres que celles rédigées pour les agences traditionnelles, des articles d’analyse à la demande, des éditoriaux et revue de presse pour d’autres médias et entreprises.

Mieux nous connaître

AfricTelegraph.com, c’est un groupe de journalistes, dont plusieurs sont indépendants de presse écrite et audiovisuelle, principalement des agenciers, qui a permis la création de AfricTelegraph.com. Notre objectif est de fournir à des éditeurs de presse généraliste ou spécialisés du monde entier des articles qui valorisent et reflètent le vrai visage de l’Afrique, et des produits audiovisuels de qualité. Nous nous concentrons sur des sujets qui font parler et nous voulons devenir un point de référence pour ceux qui veulent de vraies informations et le développement. Aucun article ou reportage n’est acheté par l’agence.

Que propose AfricTelegraph.com?

Des articles (toutes rubriques confondues), des reportages magazine, des photos, les appels d’offres, les offres d’emploi, les promotions commerciales, des enquêtes financières, et d’autres. Les services énumérés plus haut sont destinés aux éditeurs de presse écrite, aux sociétés et investisseurs privés, ainsi qu’aux décideurs.

Name: Outside of the Boot
Description:
An unhealthy obsession, a thriving passion, the beautiful game.

In the growing competitive market of football blogging, standing out and creating an impression is the agenda. So when we decided to turn our passion & obsession for this game into an organized online portal, we knew we had to offer readers something they weren’t getting elsewhere.

“Outside of the Boot”, just like the exquisite football technique which is difficult to execute, our website offers a similar beauty in terms of it’s content. We not only think ‘outside the box’, but also deliver to the readers with this innovative ideology in mind.

Name: Nordic Design
Description:
Nordic Design was created in 2010 to be used as a personal design reference, and it quickly became a go-to source of information for people around the world. It is now a leading, award-wining blog dedicated to Scandinavian design and interiors.

Updated regularly, Nordic Design presents a curated selection of innovative products, beautiful home tours, travel tips, shopping destinations, interviews, styling inspiration and decorating ideas.

Catherine Lazure-Guinard created Nordic Design out of a love for the simplicity and timeless appeal of Scandinavian design. She is a strong believer in buying less and better, and that we should only surround ourselves with beautiful objects that we truly love; well-designed, functional and quality products, with a respect for craftsmanship and materials. Her goal is to create a meaningful home that is elegant yet cozy, personal and characterful. You’ll find Catherine’s inspiration for her everyday life on Nordic Design.


About the Editor:

Catherine Lazure-Guinard is the founder and editor of Nordicdesign.ca. Her passion for Scandinavia was born studying in Denmark 15 years ago. She discovered with great admiration the Nordic lifestyle, designs and cultures. And just like that, a semester abroad turned into a decade of living in Europe.

She is now based out of her home near Montreal from where she shares her finds and inspiration, driven by her passion for the pure aesthetics of the North.

Besides running Nordic Design, Catherine advises brands on strategic management, positioning, content creation, PR campaigns and social medias. She has over 10 years of experience as a multichannel marketing and communication consultant for international companies.

Catherine also offers Interior Consulting services.

Name: The Franchise Ticker
Description:
The Franchise Ticker is a multi-channel initiative bringing together members of the franchise community (and beyond). Cassidy Ford founded The Franchise Ticker in 2021. Diagnosed with Tourette Syndrome at age 17, Cassidy created the Ticker as a way to help others become comfortable what she had to embrace as a teenager: the uncomfortable.

This means being real. The Franchise Ticker was born out of the idea that when we let our personal and professional worlds intersect, we unlock our real potential for success. It is based on 5 key, action-oriented pillars.

1.	First, we, as a community, are here to normalize vulnerability and connection in both work and life
2.	We collectively encourage women to embrace their inner badass
3.	Also, we build up new generations in the franchise space through mentorship and leadership by example
4.	The fourth pillar is to champion diversity and inclusion in franchising, including the queer community, individuals of all different abilities and people of color
5.	And finally, our mission is to shatter social stigmas about Tourette’s and mental health issues, especially in the professional realm

Listen to and watch The Franchise Ticker podcast bi-weekly on Spotify and YouTube. You can also follow @franchiseticker on Instagram and Twitter to keep up with thoughts on franchising, stories of life with Tourette's, and more. 

All links can be found at linktr.ee/franchiseticker.

Name: FONDAZIONE STUDI TRIBUTARI
Description:
La Fondazione Studi Tributari nasce da un’idea del Prof. Avv. Raffaello Lupi, il quale, affiancato da un nutrito team di professionisti e di studiosi, si è posto il raggiungimento di un obbiettivo ambizioso, quello di colmare il vuoto teorico esistente tra due branche importanti delle scienze sociali, complementari e compenetrate: il diritto tributario e la scienza delle finanze. 
Fin dalla sua costituzione, la Fondazione ha svolto un ruolo di riferimento nell’ambito della ricerca teorica del diritto tributario. Ogni studio e ogni scritto è stato realizzato al fine di colmare l’esigenza di approfondire gli aspetti della “tassazione aziendale”, intesa come quella tassazione riferita alla maggior parte della società attraverso le aziende. Questa visione d’insieme della tassazione aziendale è la cornice generale cui riportare gli episodi commentati su Dialoghi Tributari, la Rivista bimestrale edita da IPSOA e curata dal Prof. Avv. Raffaello Lupi e dal Prof. Avv. Dario Stevanato. 
I destinatari ai quali gli studi e le riflessioni della Fondazione si rivolgono sono da una parte gli operatori del settore, i cosiddetti “addetti ai lavori”, desiderosi di una cornice in cui contestualizzare la loro casistica lavorativa; dall’altra gli uomini delle istituzioni, gli imprenditori, i sindacalisti, gli opinion makers, interessati a un settore che assorbe quasi la metà del Prodotto Interno Lordo.

Description:
Das führende Fachforum für betriebliche Altersversorgung und Wertkonten im Internet. 

Mitglieder > 2.500

Hier ist Platz für Diskussionen über wichtige bzw. aktuelle Themen aus Anbieter-, Berater- und Kundensicht. 

Themenbereiche: 

■  Fachbereich betriebliche Altersversorgung und Wertkonten**
Bereich für Fachbeiträge und Fachdiskussionen, Fragen, Antworten, Expertenmeinungen, Fachinformationen, Erfahrungsaustausch und Nachrichten zum Thema bAV und Wertkonten.

■ Fachbereich Beraterhaftung** 
Haftung der Berater und Vermittler im Bereich bAV und Wertkonten sowie die Absicherung und das Management der Risiken.

■ Fachbereich Vertrieb, Vergütung und Honorarberatung** 
Diskussionen, Antworten und Ideen zur vertrieblichen Umsetzung des Themas bAV und Wertkonten in den Unternehmen sowie zur Vergütung der Beratungs- und Betreuungsleistungen von Versorgungswerken.

■ Fallbeispiele aus der Praxis - Probleme und Lösungen** 
Hier können Sie Praxisfälle (anonymisiert) zur Diskussion stellen oder auch Netzwerkpartner für die gemeinsame Problemlösung finden.

■ Weiterbildung, Fachliteratur und Software** 
Weiterbildungen: Tipps und Erfahrungen zu Weiterbildungen im Bereich bAV. 
Fachliteratur: Empfehlenswerte Fachliteratur (Bücher, Magazine, Newsletter). Pro Empfehlung bitte ein neues Thema einstellen. Software: Welche Anbieter und Programme gibt es, welche Erfahrungen haben Sie gemacht ?

■ Gesetzestexte, aktuelle Rechtssprechung und BMF-Schreiben** 
Hier finden Sie Gesetzestexte zur bAV und haben die Möglichkeit, Kommentierungen sowie Hinweise, Aktenzeichen und Inhalte aktueller Urteile aus dem Bereich bAV zu veröffen
