Name: inflexion Studios
Description:
We scale companies, brands and individuals by building media brands.

Media is what people consume. What people read, watch or listen to influences their decisions. This is true in business, industry or life. Therefore, creating impactful content is how you build trust at scale in the digital age. 

Here's why:

1) With the internet, your audience have unlimited options. 
2) Unlimited options means unlimited competitors. For attention, and thus loyalty.
3) Saturation makes standing out hard. 
4) If you don't stand out, you can't build a loyal audience.
5) On the internet, loyalty is built from trust.
6) Trust is built from showing people what you do, how well you do it and for how many people you've done it. 
7) A media brand allows you to show your credibility to more people, more often.
8) Thus, a successful media brand allows you to build trust at scale. 
9) If you are the most trusted brand in your market, you win. 

We help you do exactly this by creating you a media brand that is thoughtful, unique and meaningful for the people whose loyalty you actually care about. 

Our brands have been featured across global media outlets such as Forbes, CNBC, Sky, ABC and many more.

Name: LeVert.ma
Description:
LeVert.ma est le premier site d’information marocain indépendant, dédié exclusivement à l’écologie & au développement durable. LeVert.ma délivre l’actualité nationale et internationale en continu. Notre journal s’inscrit dans une démarche éco-citoyenne ayant pour objectif principal la sensibilisation de la société aux sujets environnementaux : développement durable, énergies renouvelables, efficacité énergétique, tourisme et agriculture durable, économie circulaire, Réchauffement climatique, la conservation de la biodiversité, …

La genèse du journal LeVert.ma

Tout est parti du constat que le Maroc, pays organisateur de la COP22 et pionnier dans le domaine de l’écologie et du développement durable, ne disposait pas d’un véritable média spécialisé dans les grandes problématiques environnementales. De surcroît, l’ambition majeure du journal LeVert.ma est d’enrichir l’espace médiatique marocain avec un nouveau regard porté sur les sujets relatifs à l’écologie dans leurs dimensions sociales et économiques, locales et internationales.

Notre ADN est forgé autour de cinq valeurs fondamentales : Informer, Sensibiliser, Accompagner, Promouvoir et Faire évoluer.

Notre ligne éditoriale

LeVert.ma est un journal électronique gratuit qui respecte une ligne éditoriale basée sur une complète indépendance de l’expression et des idées. Notre journal est totalement indépendant de toute institution ou parti politique. Il est auto financé par ses fondateurs.

LeVert.ma est organisé autour de sept rubriques distinctes mais complémentaires dans l’optique de fournir l’information la plus complète aux citoyens marocains : environnement et développement durable, efficacité énergétique, agriculture & halieutique, eaux & forêts, faune & flores, tourisme durable et vie pratique.

LeVertTV embellie notre matière journalistique par une touche multimédia raffinée au travers des capsules de sensibilisation ainsi que des vidéos reportages.

Name: The Fix Media Deutschland
Description:
Medienbranche und Medienunternehmen erleben einen massiven Wandel: Nutzer und Nutzerverhalten verändert sich radikal, Werbebudgets strukturieren sich um, neue  Plattformen etablieren sich und innovative Technologien schaffen neue Formate, Konzepte und Erfolgsfaktoren. Diese Veränderungen haben viele Publikationen verwundbar gemacht. Und ihre Auswirkungen sind auf der ganzen Welt spürbar – auch in Deutschland.

Obwohl Deutschland einer der größten Medienmärkte der Welt ist, wird er von Branchenprofis auf der ganzen Welt häufig zu Unrecht übersehen und ist im globalen Mediendiskurs unterrepräsentiert. Einerseits braucht der deutsche Medienmarkt mehr internationales Know How und Innovationen aus dem Ausland. Andererseits haben viele deutsche Medienunternehmen das Potenzial, regionale oder globale Marktführer zu werden. Auch deutsche Kreativunternehmen und MediaTech-Firmen haben ein enormes Potenzial. 

The Fix ist international. Und wir sind der Überzeugung, dass unsere kunterbunte, multiethnische und polyglotte europäische Region spezifische Herausforderungen zu überwinden hat – und daher auch spezifische Lösungen braucht.

Mit einer internationalen Perspektive fokussieren und analysieren Konzepte, Technologien und Erfolgsfaktoren von Medien in einem zunehmend digitalen, aber auch globaleren Umfeld. Aus diesem Grund wollen wir mithelfen, die Medienmärkte in Europa stärker zu integrieren und möchten hier als wichtiges Scharnier und relevante Vernetzungsplattform fungieren.

Description:
Keydmedia Online is a leading independently operated digital media company based in Mogadishu, Somalia.

Keydmedia Online aims to present objective news on Somalia to domestic and international readers through articles, editorials, and audiovisual materials.

Emphasis is placed on interviews with local politicians on the country's direction. Through its global network of experienced journalists, the organization also strives to provide broad-based coverage and adhere to the ethics of journalism.

The word "Keyd" is from the Somali language and it stands for archive. Keydmedia Group has succeeded in saving some of the Somali cultural heritage after the collapse of the central government. Keydmedia has the following items in archive: 78,000 photos, 44 original posters and over 8900 hours of videos and audios.

Keydmedia Online was founded in 2010 by Somali filmmaker Ali Said Hassan. It is dedicated to the Somali community worldwide.

Description: WISO portal okuplja urednički i autorski tim prepoznatih profesionalaca sa višedecenijskim iskustvom u interdisciplinarnim oblastima liderstva, strategije, upravljanja organizacijama i timovima, orijentisanosti ka korisnicima, marketingu, komunikacijama i drugim oblastima stručnosti koje su nezaobilazne ako želite da svoje poslovanje i svoju karijeru dovedete na sledeći, viši nivo.

Name: Oldmates
Description:
Oldmates is a creative film production company, with passion for film, sound and design. We are driven by the beauty of telling stories, and the endless ways of doing so. Whether it’s a product, craftsmanship or service, we got you covered.

We are two old mates who know eachother from school and made our graduation project together. We have always had a good relationship that never left. That gave us the idea to start a new film production company together.

Name: Dadnatal by Dad AF
Description:
Dad AF is the digital support network for tens of thousands of Dads around the world. 

We bring Dads of all backgrounds and life situations together to get advice, support and friendship. 

Labelled as “life saving” by mental health survivors, we make a difference by giving Dads a safe and inclusive environment to talk openly about their lives. 

We are Dad AF. You are Dad AF.

Name: Farsi Works
Description:
Farsi Works is part of The Works Network and specializes in the Farsi speaking markets. 

As most of the key media publication are in Farsi, Farsi Works has taken a leadership position in keeping its English speaking clientele in particular, informed on a daily basis, about the key developments or discussions that are happening in the Farsi world and how this will impact their businesses.

The media experts at Farsi Works track a large number of media publications and sift through the maze of articles finding information that will provide its readers with relevant and in-depth information about this fast growing and important market place. 

Farsi Works also provides media updates in English to its clients via a Daily briefing report, which is available on a subscription basis. These reports are sent to the designated emails of the subscribers keeping them updated on the key media developments. 

To subscribe to the daily report or if you would like to send us your feedback, please write to farsiworks@farsiw.com

Name: DYNAMIC RADIO
Description:
Dynamic Radio est une radio qui alterne programmation musicale "Groove and Dance" et programmes originaux. 

Elle est disponible via le site internet dynamicradio.fr , une application mobile dédiée , les enceintes connectés et les bouquets de radios. 

Notre audience est de plus en plus importante grâce à une fidélisation de notre public via les réseaux sociaux et les nombreux événements auxquels nous participons.

Name: 8AM
Description:
Het internet en sociale media hebben de journalistiek ingrijpend veranderd. Er wordt voortdurend gevochten voor de aandacht, met content die er enkel op is gericht traffic te genereren en niet meer als hoofddoel heeft te informeren. Ondanks de onomstotelijke kracht van sociale media om mensen samen te brengen, hebben media nog nooit zo ver van de lezer gestaan als nu. Op die zaken wil 8AM een antwoord bieden.

8AM is een platform voor kwalitatieve nieuwsbrieven, die gecureerd worden door echte mensen. Geen algoritmes dus, maar mensen van vlees en bloed, die selecteren op basis van kwaliteit. E-mail is daar volgens ons dan ook het perfecte medium voor.

Wij voeren geen strijd om je aandacht. Eens je bent ingeschreven op een van onze nieuwsbrieven, moeten wij er gewoon voor zorgen dat die de moeite waard is voor jou. Onze strijd is er dus eentje voor kwaliteit. En als we dat volgens jou niet brengen, als wij niet brengen wat je van ons verwacht, kan je je gewoon uitschrijven. Zo simpel is het.

Name: Hello FRANCHISE
Description:
Hello Franchise fait la promotion des meilleurs concepts de franchises en France et en Europe. Découvrez les dossiers, les experts et bien sûr un annuaire de franchises évolutif. 

Découvrez, au travers de fiches claires et illustrées l’ensemble de l’information juridique à connaître pour ouvrir une franchise, les chiffres et l’historique du commerce organisé, les erreurs à éviter, les rendez-vous « foires et salons » de l'année, et les 9 étapes pour devenir franchisé et développer votre affaire (trouver un local, le financement, le contrat, la stratégie de développement, la multi-franchise etc.)

L’actualité de la franchise vous est présentée selon 2 axes : l’actualité des réseaux (Ouverture de points de vente, Stratégie, participation à un salon etc.) et l’actualité du commerce organisé en général (Actualité forte d’un réseau, Interview de fondateurs, présentation d’un salon, arrivée d’un nouvel acteur, idées innovantes etc.). Une actualité quotidienne pour détecter les meilleurs opportunités de business. 

L’annuaire de la franchise vous propose de consulter gratuitement des fiches claires et détaillées pour orienter votre choix vers une franchise rentable. Ces fiches organisées par secteur détaillent l’historique, les chiffres clés, les conditions financières d’accès au réseau, la carte des points de vente, les témoignages, l’accompagnement fourni par le réseau, le type de contrat, sa durée etc. Contactez l'enseigne de votre choix

La rubrique expert vous oriente vers le choix du meilleur prestataire pour vous accompagner dans l’ouverture et le développement de votre entreprise et de sa réussite (avocats, consultants, agence de presse, agence de communication etc.). Une sélecton de conseillers experts dans le développement de franchise au niveau national et international.

Name: Taunton Interactive
Description:
Taunton Interactive is the digital division of The Taunton Press.  We serve a rapidly-growing digital audience of more than 7 million monthly unique users across 6 enthusiast verticals with an array of consumer-facing websites, mobile applications and digital content applications.  Our portfolio of category-leading brands includes Fine Homebuilding, Fine Woodworking, Green Building Advisor, Fine Cooking, Fine Gardening, and Threads. Our team is incredibly passionate about our customers and their interests. We love what we do, and, more importantly, who we do it with.
 
We’re committed to serving the needs of our niche audiences in digital media through product innovation, domain expertise, and the passionate communities that surround our brands.  We create value for our users as well as our partners and sponsors who seek a dialogue with these audiences.  
 
We value agility, data, speed to market, accountability, exceptional user experiences, and an entrepreneurial spirit in pursuit of excellence. 
 
In addition to operating 9 websites, our digital products include tablet subscriptions, paid digital memberships, mobile applications, ebooks, streaming video and other goods and services that meet the needs of global enthusiast audiences.
 
Taunton Interactive has offices in Newtown, CT and the Flatiron District of New York City.

Name: Teď a tady
Description:
Zpomalte s podcastem, který nespěchá. Vydejte se s námi napříč tématy, názory a příběhy hostů. Rozhovory vedené tak, aby přinesly radost i vzdělání, nový pohled nebo inspiraci. Autenticky, do hloubky. 
Výsledkem jsou osobní a neformální zpovědi zajímavých hostů, od vědců, vynálezců a akademiků, přes politiky a podnikatele až po umělce, učitele či duchovní průvodce. Buďte s námi Teď a tady.

Name: Buurtmamas.nl
Description:
Met Buurtmama’s vind je online andere mama's bij jou in de buurt. Zo ontmoet je vrouwen, die net als jij, een kinderwens hebben, zwanger of net bevallen zijn of die een kind hebben tot ongeveer 5 jaar. Ideaal als je ervaringen wilt uitwisselen. Of gewoon eens gezellig een kop koffie of thee wil doen bij jou in de buurt.  

 Verder vind je op de site informatieve blogs. Blogs die geschreven zijn door professionals. Denk hierbij aan coaches (slaap & sport), verloskundige, pedagoog, seksuoloog, mediator,  fotograaf etc.  

Wil je adverteren, een advertorial plaatsen of schrijf jij ook interessante blogs vanuit je professie, stuur gerust een bericht naar info@buurtmamas.nl.

Name: Chic Contenidos
Description:
Empresa dedicada a la generación de contenidos para medios de comunicación (TV, Radio y medios digitales). 

► Creadora de los formatos televisivos: AutoDefinidos, Mundo Salud, Confesiones -Estelar-, AutoDefinidos - Vendimia, y Confesiones - Live (emitido no sólo en TV, sino en vivo a través de Facebook y YouTube).  Desde hace 3 años realizamos Tardes de Remate, el programa líder de las tardes de MENDOZA

► Propietaria de los sitios: www.MendozaChic.com - www.SomosEmprendedores.com.ar - www.MundoSalud.com.ar 

► Chic Contenidos también se encarga de armar estrategias comunicacionales, y marketing off y on line, para empresa de renombre nacional e internacional.

Name: Walt Disney Birthplace
Description:
The Walt Disney Birthplace project is about more than just a restoration. It is also an opportunity to research this period of the Disney family history which has sparked a larger vision for the home beyond the restoration.

Each day, we gain new insights into how and why Walt and Roy became the men they were. We are learning how their childhood, family and parents impacted their lives and laid a foundation that nurtured collaboration, creativity, and innovation.

With our team of project advisors, we are formalizing strategies on how we can empower today’s families to nurture and raise the creative thinkers of tomorrow.

Our dream is that The Walt Disney Birthplace becomes a portal to new approaches in early childhood development and helps to inspire future Walts and Roys.

Name: Flique Editorial
Description: This digital space allows people of different backgrounds and walks of life to come together and share their unique perspective on the world. We specialize in entertainment in all of its forms, bringing you the fun, the messy, the serious, and the heartbreaking. We aim for this platform to facilitate the exchange of ideas from our flique to yours.

Name: FOLIE
Description: Folie Magazine es la primera revista sin género para la generación Z.

Name: RED LIVE
Description:
একটু অন্যরকম গল্প ঠিক যেন রূপকথার মত।আর সেই রূপকথা যদি বাস্তব হয় তবে তো বিস্ময়ের অন্ত থাকে না।RED LIVE এই বাস্তব রূপকথার গল্পগুলো জানানোর একটি প্রাথমিক প্ল্যাটফর্ম।প্রতিটি গল্প বাই সাইকেলের মত।

যেমনটি আইনস্টাইন বলেছিলেন-

“জীবন বাই সাইকেল চালানোর মত একটা ব্যাপার, পড়ে যেতে না চাইলে তোমাকে সামনে চলতে হবে”

আমাদের আশেপাশে এমন অনেক অসাধারন মানুষ আছেন যারা তাদের জীবন বাই সাইকেলের মত চালাতে চালাতে রূপকথার সব বিস্ময়কর গল্প তৈরি করেছেন।তারা তাদের নিজেদের মতো করে পরিবর্তন আনছেন সমাজের বিভিন্ন পর্যায়ে বিভিন্ন কাজের মাধ্যমে।

RED LIVE তাদের গল্প বলতে চায়,তাদের গল্প যারা সাধারন হয়েও অসাধারন।যারা হাজার ভিড়ের মধ্যে নিজেকে করেছেন আলোকিত পথ প্রদর্শক।তবে এই পথ প্রদর্শন করতে প্রয়োজন হয় মোটিভেশনাল স্পিচ,প্রয়োজন হয় উদ্যোক্তা বিষয়ক সকল তথ্য যা RED LIVE ধারাবাহিক ভাবে প্রচার করবে।

একটি সমাজে উদ্যোক্তা বা ব্যবসায়ী বাস করার পাশাপাশি বাস করেন ডাক্তার,ইঞ্জিনিয়ার,আইন বিশেষজ্ঞ এবং নানা পেশার মানুষ বাস করেন।তাদের প্রয়োজনীয় সকল তথ্য দিতে RED LIVE এর দারুন আয়োজন।ক্যারিয়ার গঠনে সবচেয়ে বড় ভূমিকা রাখে সঠিক তথ্য এবং ক্যারিয়ার বিষয়ক বিভিন্ন উপদেশ সে সব জানাবে RED LIVE ।

RED LIVE শুধু অসাধারন ব্যক্তির মাঝেই সীমাবদ্ধ থাকবে না,থাকছে

একটু অন্যরকম গল্প ঠিক যেন রূপকথার মত।আর সেই রূপকথা যদি বাস্তব হয় তবে তো বিস্ময়ের অন্ত থাকে না।RED LIVE এই বাস্তব রূপকথার গল্পগুলো জানানোর একটি প্রাথমিক প্ল্যাটফর্ম।প্রতিটি গল্প বাই সাইকেলের মত।


•স্বাস্হ্য বিষয়ক তথ্য।
•মোটিভেশন স্পিচ।
•ইঞ্জিনিয়ারিং খুঁটিনাটি বিষয় তথ্য।
• ই-কমার্স বিষয়ে তথ্য।
•ক্যারিয়ার এবং জব সেক্টর বিষয়ক তথ্য।
•উদ্যোক্তার সফলতার গল্পের বিশাল আয়োজন ছাড়াও রয়েছে বিস্ময়কর সব চমক।

Name: Royaume des Pros
Description:
Le Swiss Web Festival devient le Royaume des Pros et s'installe à Genève!

Organisé depuis 2014, le Swiss Web Festival est l’un des principaux événements professionnels dédiés aux contenus digitaux en Suisse. Il rassemble annuellement les professionnels de la communication, de l’audiovisuel et du digital afin d’échanger sur différentes thématiques. Depuis 2018, le Swiss Web Festival devient le Royaume des Pros. La troisième édition aura lieu l'année prochaine, en 2022 !

Name: Election-Net
Description: À Election-net, nous sommes fiers de fournir des informations précises, opportunes et impartiales sur tous les événements en RDC et au-delà.

Name: Gallery Fuel
Description:
Gallery Fuel is dedicated to helping fine art dealers and galleries in small to mid-sized markets grow and improve their businesses.

It is our goal to help both experienced and emerging art dealers and gallery staff stay on top of sales, marketing and art collector buying trends so their art gallery business can be flexible and thrive.  Meeting the needs of both artists and collectors takes a special knowledge base and skill.  Gallery Fuel is here to help you cultivate those skills, so you can keep your doors open.

Name: Fashion and the Free
Description:
Welcome to Fashion and The Free - a platform for all of the wonderful people across the world of Fashion who keep the industry alive. 

It’s for the designers and buyers. The print maker’s and the fabric specialists. The photographers and factory floor workers. For the startups and side hustlers. For students and the professionals with decades under their belt.

We publish monthly articles which give the real people of Fashion a voice to inspire, educate and share their stories - in the hope that others can learn, relate, and connect. We aspire to answer questions like, Whats next? Where do I go from here? What can I do with the skills and knowledge I’ve obtained? 

We aim to help you navigate the road blocks, or build new skills to take you to the next level of your career (or even begin a new one). And to give you a place to relate and feel connected while building a community of incredibly talented people. 

Responsible fashion is hugely important at Fashion and the Free, we aim to educate others in sustainable and ethical practices as well as showcasing the latest fashion brands that are having a positive impact on people and the planet.

We hope you enjoy our content, please don't hesitate to reach out with any feedback!

Name: Umwe Africa
Description: Umwe publishes African news and educational content on social media, with the aim to engage youth with matters that are shaping the future. We are the first African news organization to produce news for African youth.

Name: World Ag Journal
Description:
The World Ag Journal is committed to its readers and their lives in agriculture. 

Founded by agriculture lifers for agriculture lifers, we strive to create and present only the most current and relevant news and information for all of the most important points of influence in our industry.

Our goal is to be the single bookmark in your browser for news (agricultural and otherwise), economics, commodities, livestock, technology, properties, jobs and more.

One bookmark to deliver your agriculture world.

The company offers a wide range of content, including local news, education news, real estate news, and political updates. It also features a variety of posts and videos on its social media platforms. The company's website allows users to create profiles and connect with friends. It also provides updates from Ludhiana police and other local authorities.

Name: WeTalkRadio Network
Description: WeTalkRadio Network is a black owned, woman owned online entertainment network. Founded in 2010 with a mission to provide quality talk, music, art, news, entertainment, events and consulting while fostering unique connections that will provide platforms for businesses, individuals and organizations and reach a wide range of potential customers around the globe. Our motto is “We talk, we listen and we take action”. We use our unique services to inform, inspire, entertain, educate, and connect our diverse customer to the global marketplace. We broadcast community-oriented programming targeting the audience that is seeking intelligent radio and video content. WeTalkRadio is fast becoming an internet sensation with a heavy saturation in the U.S.A. and 27 countries. Over 12 radio personalities make up the 10 radio shows that broadcast to over 100,000 listeners around the globe. Currently streaming on over 30 platforms including, WeTalkRadio.com, Google and Apple Podcasts, iHeart, Spotify and more. Our live and pre-recorded shows feature special guests, news and music ranging from: R&B, Hip Hop, Soul, Blues, Jazz and Inspirational. In addition to radio and video shows, each year we create and produce virtual and in-person events. WeTalkRadio aims to empower individuals and organizations by giving them a platform for their voice and topics to be heard. Our team are all seasoned and dedicated professionals and has produced worldwide radio programs, podcasts and video content for streaming platforms. We work diligently to ensure our quality programming and services reach the diverse interest of our growing audience through various facets.

Name: Legal Nurse Podcast

Legal Nurse Podcast is dedicated to helping legal nurse consultants and life care planners build knowledge, skills and businesses with the insights they gain from Legal Nurse Podcast.  

Our twice weekly shows (Monday and Wednesday) are filled with insights, tips and ideas for your LNC practice. 

Shows are cohosted by Pat Iyer and Kelly Campbell.

Name: Blue Tree Web
Description: Blue Tree Web is the guest post services provider company. Here is the list of blogs that accepts guest post. A guest post is when you write a post on someone else's blog or website. Learn how to get an opportunity to make a guest post and how to leverage it for you.

Souvent, ces discussions seront complétées par des invité(e)s qui viendront partager leur regard et leurs analyses.

Le Climat en Questions a été nominé pour le Prix du Podcast - Strasbourg 2022, un concours de podcasts audio francophones entre malvoyants, non-voyants et voyants, proposé par l'association Vue (d)Ensemble et Plan Sonore et en 2023 pour le Prix du Podcast Santé Francophone (catégorie environnement/RSE) organisé par MedShake et le Festival de la Communication Santé.

Name: Fuori Schema
Description:
Una delle parole che si sente sempre più spesso nelle aziende, in università e sui giornali è “innovazione”.
Ma che cosa significa esattamente? Quando possiamo definire un’idea “innovativa”?

Con lo scopo di rispondere a queste domande Roberto, imprenditore, e Matteo, designer, hanno lanciato Fuori Schema; un podcast in cui due amici, con due punti di vista diversi, si incontrano ogni settimana per cercare di capire meglio cos’è l’innovazione e come sta cambiando il nostro modo di vivere.

Le nostre rubriche:

1 Fuori Schema – Quando pensiamo a startup la nostra mente ci porta subito alla Silicon Valley, eppure anche in Italia vengono fondate ogni anno centinaia di startup. Il nostro obiettivo? Andare a scoprirle una ad una. Ogni due martedì dalle 7 del mattino scopriamo insieme una startup italiana, per comprendere meglio cosa fa, come è nata e come si sta muovendo per avere successo

2 Fuori News – Secondo Yuval Noah Harari, scrittore e professore dell’Università di Gerusalemme, la censura al giorno d’oggi si ottiene inondando le persone di informazioni. Ogni 60 secondi nel mondo vengono creati 571 nuovi siti, pubblicati 41 mila post su Facebook e condivisi 178 mila tweet. Per questo abbiamo deciso che ogni giovedì saremo noi a selezionare per voi una notizia dal mondo della tecnologia e dell’innovazione

3 Fuori Tema – Non tutte le idee arrivano da startup, e con Fuori Tema, andremo a scoprire sfaccettature completamente diverse. Quando lo pubblichiamo? Le idee non si pianificano, quando arrivano bisogna solo cavalcarle

4 Fuori Classe – Startup, business model, branding, funding…. Quante parole che si sentono sempre ma cosa vogliono dire esattamente? Lo scopriamo insieme ogni due martedì dalle 7 del mattino, con una puntata dedicata ad un singolo concetto, per comprenderlo e sdoganarlo

Name: Sistema Critico
Description: Sistema Critico è un gruppo di studenti universitari che si pone come obiettivo il racconto del reale in modo critico e giovanile, avvicinando le persone alle questioni che il mondo ci pone ogni giorno. Ci muoviamo attraverso la Filosofia, l’Economia, la Società, la Politica, l’Attualità, la Storia, allo scopo di sensibilizzare i lettori verso un approccio più critico ed approfondito sulle tematiche che ci riguardano. Sistema Critico non fa riferimento a nessun partito, ideologia o affiliazione politica; si fonda piuttosto sulla compresenza di tanti ragazzi e ragazze con storie diverse che condividono un progetto comune: esprimere le idee e diffondere la potenza del pensiero. Il gruppo non opera unicamente online, ma organizza anche eventi pubblici, come gli Speech Cocktail (aperitivi culturali) che hanno visto negli anni un’incredibile partecipazione di giovani . In un’epoca caratterizzata da  forte individualismo e disaggregazione sociale, Sistema Critico cerca di creare una piattaforma virtuale e fisica dove riunire le persone, con lo scopo di creare un confronto e una conseguente comunità alimentata dalla socialità. Nell’ottemperare a questo obiettivo, Sistema Critico propone una lettura del mondo profonda e orientata alla comprensione della complessità, più che alla sua semplificazione. Essendo una realtà composta esclusivamente da giovani, il gruppo ricerca costantemente un approccio dinamico improntato al rinnovamento continuo, non troppo rigido e accademico, attento ai feedback provenienti dall’esterno. Il taglio che si dà alle questioni trattate è sempre critico, nel senso che indaga, giudica, riflette e si interroga, ma giovanile e pop, quindi accessibile a tutti e fondato sulla diffusione non-elitaria del sapere.

Name: SOS PETROS
Description:
O Discrepantes.com.br tem o propósito de congregar os empregados da Petrobras e os participantes da Petros, ampliando e aprofundando o nível de informação sobre os assuntos de nosso interesse, através da disseminação de informações de qualidade.

Para isto, monitoramos a internet com recursos avançados, rastreando informações que são disseminadas para os nossos diversos canais de comunicação (Site, e-mail, mídias sociais).

O nosso objetivo estratégico é, pela informação, conscientizar os participantes da necessidade de uma maior união e pela atuação conjunta, à margem da política sindical e partidária, e assim defender de forma independente e autêntica nossos interesses e o nosso patrimônio.

Estamos interessados em exigir e acompanhar a apuração dos desvios de governança que têm ocorrido na Petrobras e na Petros, e assim contribuir para resgatar o orgulho e a tradição de excelência dessa estratégica Companhia.

Daarin duiken we in de leefwereld van de jongeren en leren we hoe ze geconfronteerd worden met deze problemen. Hapklare lessenpakketten staan leerkrachten bij om dit aan te pakken in de klas. Schooltelevisie 2.0 dus.

Daarnaast zijn ook de jongeren zelf welkom bij ED TV. Via allerhande tools zoals een chatfunctie of een forum leidt ED TV hen naar de juiste instantie die klaar staat om te helpen. A little bit about this site and me.

At over 60, I am looking for work for the second time in five years. During this time I've look and searched on multiple sites for information on finding a job or on issues concerning working when you’re fifty or older. There is a lot of good information out there, but it's dispersed over multiple websites.

Our goal with WorkAfter50 is to gather this news and information and deliver a consolidated site for people in their 50's, 60, 70's and older who want to work or need to work.  We will also be providing links to resources to help in your managing and improve your working life. 

The news we gathered from online sources, with portions of content to give you a sense of the topic. In deference to those content creators and sources we link back to the original site for the complete story. 

We hope that you will find this helpful. 

Good luck with your endeavors!

Dan

Name: Vuyu
Description:
Stream live from my mobile?

Across multiple social media platforms?

ALL AT THE SAME TIME???

No way!!

Yes way! VuYu is the first app that lets you broadcast live to followers & friends simultaneously across different social media platforms – from your mobile!!

A real game changer in the world of live streaming – but why would you want to go live at the same time on multiple social media sites? Easy! More viewers get to see what’s going on there and then without you having to lose that moment for your followers on another site to miss.

Now you don’t have to choose which network to stream on first, or decide which of your followers must miss that spontaneous broadcast – whichever network they follow you on, they’ll all see it!

You can even save all of your live broadcasts on your profile for your followers to view later!

Go live instantly and simultaneously on Facebook, Instagram, YouTube, Vimeo, Periscope & Twitch. Just connect your accounts and add your device within minutes, when you sign up to a monthly subscription plan.

Why else use VuYu?

- No Ads! That’s right, no pop ups, no adverts at the top or bottom of the app – none at all!

- Saves your live videos on your VuYu profile, allowing people to follow you, like and dislike your videos.

- All comments and reactions on your live video with an easy-to-use filter to display comments just from a particular network if you wish.

- You can even customise your VuYu profile with a header image, profile photo and custom bio…

Easy to go live - simply select the network(s) you want and go live!

Easy, affordable plans. £1.99 a month for unlimited usage with a small VuYu logo - or £4.99 without the logo.

More networks will be added in future updates. Have fun with our new app.

Name: take care
Description:
take care lists a curated variety of sustainable alternatives for products and services. We want to help and inspire people by offering sustainable alternatives so we can all take care of our planet in a better way, making better decisions step by step.

We are on a mission to grow the platform with enough options for people to stimulate local consumption and shopping. Of course, it’s important to keep in mind that it’s better to buy less and/or re-use products. But if you do buy something new we like to be your start page in your search for sustainable alternatives.

Besides this, we also want to share the stories behind these products and services by connecting with these companies and offer them a platform to share their stories. By this, we hope to inspire and share knowledge where everyone can learn from.

Every company we list on the platform is curated by us. The main criteria on which we select these companies is that the core business of a company is centered around a sustainable approach. Besides this, we pay attention to how this approach is put into practice.

We also look at what the impact is of a business in the branch that they operate in. What we find important is the contribution a company has to move the branch forward when it comes to sustainability. The willingness to learn and making progress every year to make more processes of their business sustainable.

With take care, we like to focus on learning from each other based on feedback and come up with solutions to make our planet a better, brighter, cleaner and healthier place for all of us.

ABOUT STARTUP RADAR
Startup Radar is a startup news and opinion website that was formed in 2018 with the help of 500v2, the Ministry of SMEs and Startups, and Korea Foundation for the Advancement of Science and Creativity (KOFAC) who were the main organizers of Startup Festival 2017.

The site offers startup news, articles related to the startup ecosystem, original content from guest contributors from the leading tech sectors, event/conference coverage, culture, entertainment, lifestyle, and the latest breaking tech news.

Startup Radar has a vast network of VCs, accelerators, startups, and media spans all across Asia, U.S., and the U.K.

The company will host major conferences and events in Korea, including the Startup Festival 2018, partnered pitch competitions, and various meet-ups that will serve the startup community through alliance and collaboration.

Startup Radar serves to not only be Korea’s tech and startup community but also help Asian startups go global.  In addition, help global startups to connect with Asia.

What Startup Radar provides.
– The latest startups news
– Guest contributions from the leading experts in the startup ecosystem
– Partnerships for future global conferences
– Government sponsored “Startup Idea” contest for Seoul’s High Schools
– Provide consultation for SMEs looking to expand outside of Korea
– Help global companies enter the Asian market.

Name: MamaLeaders Podcast
Description:
Herzlich willkommen bei MamaLeaders, dem Podcast in dem wir von inspirierenden Müttern lernen, wie sie Karriere und Familie vereinbaren.

Name: All Things Nordic
Description:
Our world is in a mess. We live in chaos.  

Do you feel the same way we feel? That we need to take action and make our lives better and more balanced? And that by doing that, our world can change? 

We believe in that. 100%. This is our vision. 

We also believe that changing little things in our everyday life, inspired by the Scandinavian and Nordic lifestyle, can have a significant impact on our well-being. 

We have experienced that ourselves. This is why we created the All Things Nordic weekly newsletter service. 

Our mission is to share stories, concepts and ideas from Scandinavia and the Nordics, that can help you live a more balanced life: mentally, physically, emotionally, socially.

WE ARE NOT a weekly email filled with beautiful landscapes of Scandinavia and the Nordics. You see, there are just so many pages and social media groups to see pictures with snow, fjords and Northern Lights. 

WE ARE your weekly dose of Scandinavia and the Nordics, delivered right to your inbox, every Thursday. Filled with stories, concepts and ideas, in a wide range of topics: from people and places to lifestyle, food and languages.

We believe in the power of the moment. NOW. How we can all improve our daily life and live more balanced, TODAY.

You may live a hectic and stressful life in the Western world, sometimes feeling like you don't have a purpose. Or you may feel unhappy with the situation where you live at the moment, elsewhere in the world, and would like to travel, even move to the Nordics.

Until then and after that, make sure you follow our weekly All Things Nordic newsletter.

All you need to do is to subscribe to our mailing list. Join the thousands who have already embraced the Nordic way of life. Visit https://www.allthingsnordic.eu

We promise: no spam, no salesy emails. Just pure Nordic value. 

Still unsure? Check the latest email we sent earlier today, to the thousands who have already joined our community. Visit https://www.allthingsnordic.eu/daily-email

Name: The Big Picture Pk
Description:
There has been a continual debate in the intellectual circles on the representation of middle class and youth in politics, for all the right reasons of course. Our view is based on the same principle, making our case for local journalism and inclusion of youth in journalism.  
We feel that the stories of communities can be best told by its own people. So we invested our time and energy into training young citizen journalists with the passion to tell local stories from their communities. We trained them to paint the issues and report on stories that best depict the ground realities of the settlements they are based in, to build a collective narrative that explains the layers of this highly diverse society of ours. 
These hyper-local stories produced on our programs have been enlightening, inspiring, and helped shape our perspectives too. They are like pieces of puzzle, which when put together form the metanarrative of our society, its complexities, unfold the ground realities, and make up the sociocultural fabric of our communities, thus contributing to The Big Picture of the society we identify with. 
The Big Picture Pk is a citizen journalism portal creating and curating hyper-local human interest stories on culture, people, and society. 
In the past, our students have put together stories of local libraries, community and charity schools, and community centers. They have interviewed laborers and fishermen from informal settlements, local activists and entrepreneurs in different domains, and residents about their everyday struggles with water mafia, land mafia, and local law and order situation. We have published over 14 print publications featuring stories of resilience, peace, co-existence, interfaith harmony, tolerance, global citizenship, community activism etc. on education, environment, and gender beats etc. Last year, we launched a quarterly youth magazine entitled Youth Matters carrying some of these powerful inclusive narratives. 
#SupportLocalJournalism

Name: WebShepherd
Description:
De onlinewereld is volop in beweging, ontwikkelingen volgen elkaar in rap tempo op. Voor jou als ondernemer een flinke uitdaging, want soms kun je het allemaal even niet meer bijbenen. 
Maar om jouw klanten over de streep te trekken, is het wel essentieel dat je aansluit. Sterker nog; als je weet hoe jij online je weg kunt vinden, maak je jouw organisatie des te sterker. 
Wat je nodig hebt bij het banen van die weg is een betrouwbare en deskundige raadgever. Een gids, die jou en je organisatie ondersteunt en je een prominente plek in de online wereld bezorgt. Geen dure online marketeer (je bent immers geen multinational!), maar een partner die samen met jou de opties die er liggen optimaal verkent en benut. Ik vervul die rol graag voor je. Als een soort herder, die met jou als herders onder elkaar de kudde in beweging zet. Zodat jij straks je schaapjes op het droge hebt!

Name: Son of Jeddah | Pop-Culture & Superhero Fandom in Saudi & GCC
Description:
Son of Jeddah is a cultural venture spotlighting the 5M+ superhero & pop-culture fans in Saudi Arabia and the GCC, spanning Marvel, DC, Transformers, anime, and gaming.

Through our flagship sub-brand, Superheroes of Arabia, we bridge global IP holders, studios, and investors with an audience fueling a $400M+ entertainment economy — from cinema and streaming to toys, collectibles, cosplay, and fan events.

What we offer:
 Access to Saudi & GCC’s passion-driven fandom market
 Engagement with global IP leaders including Warner Bros (DC), Disney (Marvel), Hasbro, McFarlane Toys, and Netflix’s Millarworld
 Pathways for brand partnerships, licensing, live events, and investments

With deep cultural insight since 2017 and strong ties to creators, talent, and fan communities, Son of Jeddah is shaping the next frontier of pop-culture in the region.

What sets us apart is our role as a gateway to licensing. Studios and global brands often struggle to localize fan experiences in Saudi Arabia — events fall short, merchandise lacks authenticity, and the fan voice gets overlooked. Son of Jeddah bridges that gap by combining:
	•	Deep fan insight — understanding what Saudi and GCC fans truly want.
	•	Community trust — earned through years of engagement with collectors, cosplayers, and cinema-goers.
	•	Strategic positioning — enabling partnerships with local investors, venues, and sponsors to bring licensed experiences, events, and products to life.

Our sub-brand, Superheroes of Arabia, amplifies this mission through media, podcasts, and collaborations that put Arab fandom on the global stage.

 If you’re a studio, investor, or brand looking to unlock the Saudi market for licensed content, events, or experiences — Son of Jeddah is your bridge.

 Join us in empowering fandom to become a cornerstone of Saudi’s creative economy.

Name: Parte del discorso
Description:
Parte del discorso è un blog di cultura e società, che conta sulla collaborazione di un nutrito e giovane team di volontari. Nasce nel gennaio 2014 con l’ambizioso obiettivo di diventare un punto di riferimento per appassionati e curiosi, con approfondimenti su arte, società e viaggio. A questi si aggiungono numerose interviste e rubriche curate dai nostri autori.

Qui ogni firma ha un proprio spazio dove potersi esprimere liberamente. Il progetto è infatti basato sul confronto e sullo scambio di idee e sono parte del discorso non solo gli autori, ma anche i lettori, costantemente invitati a essere coinvolti grazie alla possibilità di commentare i nostri articoli e seguire la nostra attività sui social.

È proprio questo coinvolgimento alla base dell’idea di Parte del discorso e l’ingrediente fondamentale per la crescita del progetto. Lo stesso nome del sito fa riferimento non solo alla scrittura, ma anche al confronto e al dialogo con i lettori, che diventano sempre più numerosi. Scegliere di sostenere Parte del discorso significa supportare il lavoro di giovani volenterosi e ripagare la fatica di chi lavora con dedizione al progetto.

Name: "Storia e Futuro"
Description: "Storia e Futuro" è una rivista open access di storia contemporanea. Nata nel 2002, ha una periodicità regolare grazie all’impegno di docenti e studiosi afferenti a diverse Università italiane e straniere e all’apporto scientifico di un prestigioso comitato editoriale che, insieme a un folto gruppo di valutatori esterni, contribuisce a mantenere alto il livello qualitativo. L’e-journal ha sede presso il Dipartimento di Discipline storiche dell'Università di Bologna ed è l’emanazione di un’Associazione di promozione culturale (SefAps). La redazione è disponibile a valutare articoli inerenti temi di ricerca di storia contemporanea, secondo le modalità spiegate nel sito (clicca peer review), e proposte di e-book da parte degli enti promotori di convegni.

Name: Un tocco di zenzero
Description:
Un tocco di zenzero è in realtà Sandra Salerno.

Il blog è stato una piattaforma per fare esperimenti. 
Prima in cucina, con consulenze e lezioni, i corsi presso Eataly Torino. 
Poi il lavoro è cambiato, abbandonata la cucina, ma solo quella pratica, ho continuato a scrivere e raccontare di cibo e non ho mai smesso. 
Consulenze, social media marketing, Blogging, eventi legati al mondo del food, ma anche vino. 
Mi piace connettere le persone e i brand. È una cosa che mi riesce bene e continuo a farlo.
Tra gli altri ho lavorato per: Fattorie Fiandino, Palatifini, Fattorie Osella, Voiello, Molino Quaglia, Gli Aironi Risi & Co, Manfrotto e altri. 
Scrivo di cibo, di esperienze gastronomiche e di luoghi di charme e fascino. Mi piacciono le cose belle e le cose buone. Racconto solo di quei luoghi che mi hanno colpito per qualche motivo, ma solo se le sensazioni sono positive. Se no evito. Non amo il 'recensire per forza'.
Mi trovate anche su FB, Pinterest, Twitter, Instagram.
Il mio pseudonimo in rete è @toccodizenzero

Name: Toc toc Firenze
Description:
Siamo nati nel 2013 come un web magazine ad alta partecipazione con uso civico della notizia. Tutti potevano scrivere, fotografare, filmare o altro. Se non lo sapevi fare, ti veniva insegnato. Ma non dilunghiamoci sul passato che abbiamo già raccontato.

Da ottobre 2017 abbiamo cambiato registro: siamo andati oltre guelfi e ghibellini. Abbiamo deciso di approfondire le questioni di Firenze e dell’area metropolitana, di non rimanere sulla superficialità delle cose e dei fatti. Ma anzi di cercare di leggere i fenomeni che accadono sul nostro territorio, cercando di bypassare le tifoserie che troppo spesso appiattiscono il dibattito sul bianco o sul nero, sul sì o sul no.

Questo è quello che cerchiamo di fare tutti i giorni.

Name: Smart As Media
Description:
Smart As Media was established in 2016 as a freelance media agency by two of Australia’s most prolific and experienced journalists, Stephen Corby and Andrew Chesterton.

Stephen has worked for newspapers, magazines and websites in Australia, England and the US, and previously edited both Wheels and TopGear Australia magazines, which people often assume must have been his most enjoyable jobs. In actual fact, he enjoyed being a feature writer and columnist for The Sunday Telegraph more, because of the endless variety. And the sweet, sweet sensation of spending Rupert Murdoch’s money.

Andrew began as a journalist at Sydney’s The Daily Telegraph before he was lured into the fast-paced world of supercars alongside Corby at TopGear Australia  magazine, where he quickly became recognised as one of the country’s most entertaining and engaging feature writers.

Andrew then side-stepped into corporate communications for three years with FCA Australia before being lured back into journalism with a senior role at The Daily Mail, which involved spending time at HQ in London. He now knows more about websites and SEO than he ever wanted to.

Through his work for CarsGuide, he has also become one of Australia’s most popular, and entertaining, video presenters.

Andrew is one of those people who has so many ideas on any given day that you do fear for the structural integrity of his skull, and also one of the world’s most insatiable news hounds.

Name: TwNews
Description:
Estabelecendo uma conexão com o universo moderno sem deixar a raiz do antigo se partir, nasce a TW News, que vem para mostrar um pouco do que o mundo tem de novo, questionando, explicando, dando notícias, entendendo e discutindo assuntos habituais, sob nova ótica. A TW News vem falar sob pessoas, ideias, conquistas, conselhos, projetos que se iniciam e projetos que já são sucesso. Uma revista onde o espaço para as palavras é compartilhado com vídeos e movimentos, que vão além da escrita para dar ênfase nas matérias, pois ela já nasce digital. 
Os temas que receberão maior espaço na revista são aqueles vinculados a economia, e tecnologia, saúde e meio ambiente, cultura e esportes, porém sempre tratados através de um enfoque alternativo às revistas similares que dominam o mercado, sendo estes abordados com uma postura de análise crítica, porém não ofensiva, além de bastante educativa para dar uma visão diferenciada aos acontecimentos e trazer o leitor para mais perto de cada entrevista realizada. 
A proposta editorial da TW News está ancorada no fundamento de que o leitor deve, a todo momento, se identificar com o que está lendo, deve fazer parte daquilo. Desta forma, a revista apresenta em seu formato digital a opção de escolha de matérias para o próximo mês. O site da revista conta com todo o conteúdo das matérias distribuídas em editorias; além de blogs e colunas, há também uma série de recursos multimídia como áudios e vídeo.
Sempre dando destaque na defesa dos direitos humanos, movimentos sociais e todo e qualquer ato que promova a solidariedade, tendo como característica principal o não alinhamento com partidos políticos.

Name: Le Point Positif
Description:
Au travers de la situation exceptionnelle que nous sommes en train de vivre, j’ai décidé de donner la parole aux hommes et aux femmes qui travaillent tous les jours pour permettre à notre économie de fonctionner.

Ce sont des chefs d’entreprise, des indépendants, des salariés, des étudiants et également nos retraités.

Au travers de ce podcast, je souhaite savoir s’ils ont vu cette crise arrivée ? Comment ils ont réagi à l’annonce du confinement ? Comment ils ont géré leur activité à ce moment ? Comment ils vivent cette situation personnellement et professionnellement ? Quelles actions ils ont mis en place ? Comment ils organisent l’après ?

Car je pense que dans chaque situation si dure soit-elle, il y a toujours une leçon à en tirer et un point positif à en sortir pour réussir à vivre et à s’adapter au changement.

Les choses n’arrivent pas par hasard, il faut en prendre conscience et ne pas reproduire les erreurs du passé. Nous devons apprendre, comprendre et avancer.

Comme Darwin disait : « Ce n’est pas la plus forte espèce qui survit, ni la plus intelligente. C’est celle qui est la plus adaptable au changement. »

Je vous invite tous les jours à écouter sur l’ensemble des plateformes de téléchargement un épisode du podcast : le point positif !

Prenez soin de vous et restons positif ;)

Seiring perkembangan waktu dan jumlah lembaga baru yang bertambah, kepengurusan Koran Kampus Manunggal diserahkan sepenuhnya kepada mahasiswa dan berganti nama menjadi Lembaga Pers Mahasiswa Manunggal pada 1998.

Name: Afro Comb Podcast
Description:
Ropa started this podcast because through her experience living in Germany for 5 years, she realized that the few times stories about the African continent and its people are told, they are told from a European perspective. The problem with this, is that this euro-centric view of the continent often pushes forward the same single, tired narrative of poverty and corruption on the African continent.

Ropa's goal was to begin to saturate the podcasting landscape with stories of African people, told by the African people themselves. She thoroughly believes in the power of storytelling to start conversations, change perceptions, and challenge mindsets. The hope is that with each story told on this podcast, the diversity and multidimensionality of African people from different countries is shown.

Each episode has a different guest or group of guests. The interview is designed to understand the guest along 4 themes -
- Identity(who they are)
- Background (where they have been)
- People (which relationships have shaped them)
- Purpose (where they are going)

The guests are from different countries, with different professions, passions, sexual orientations, religions, nationalities and so on. The only things they have in common, is that they are of African descent (born to at least one African parent), and are living in Europe.

As far as documenting history goes, this podcast also hopes to create a repository of interviews that will one day be able to serve as first hand accounts of the Afro diasporan experience. The emphasis will always be on stories, not statistics, and the perspective will always be that of the owner of the story, and not anyone else. By doing so, this library of interviews will be unadulterated, unfiltered, and undoctored.

Name: DAPADOI

Akademi Bisnis Online adalah pusat belajar bisnis online untuk Anda bisa mendapatkan berbagai berita bisnis, peluang bisnis, solusi bisnis bahkan modal bisnis.

Akademi Bisnis Online dirancang sebagai sebuah portal dan “service site” dengan tujuan untuk memudahkan Anda mengetahui segala hal yang dibutuhkan untuk bisa mulai membangun bisnis online melalui internet dalam tempo 30 hari atau kurang. Ada banyak sekali informasi tentang bisnis online, internet marketing, social media, produk bisnis, blogging, profil pebisnis, entrepreneurship, peluang bisnis, dan berbagai informasi lainnya yang kami harapkan mampu memberikan inspirasi dan motivasi bagi Anda.

Sejak pertama kali dibentuk pada tahun 2009, Akademi Bisnis Online sudah bertransformasi dari sebuah situs keanggotaan ekslusif, menjadi situs portal bisnis umum seperti saat ini dengan tujuan untuk bisa berbagi informasi tentang bisnis online secara khusus, kepada lebih banyak orang lagi di Indonesia. Hadirnya internet telah membuka kesempatan besar bagi setiap orang, termasuk Anda untuk bisa berkreasi dan berinovasi untuk sekedar mendapatkan penghasilan tambahan atau bahkan menciptakan bisnis baru yang menjanjikan. Sungguh sangat disayangkan bila Anda belum bisa memaksimalkan kesempatan ini untuk bisa mengubah hidup Anda menjadi lebih baik, setidaknya lebih baik dalam hal finansial, sehingga Akademi Bisnis Online ingin mengajak Anda bersama-sama untuk bisa melakukan hal itu.

Akademi Bisnis Online tidak akan menunjukan cara ajaib untuk bisa menghasilkan banyak uang, tapi kami akan menunjukkan banyak hal untuk bisaemulai mengembangkan bisnis Anda secara online. Anda akan menemukan banyak sekali panduan praktis dan teruji tentang bagaimana membangun sebuah bisnis melalui internet hanya dengan sebuah komputer di rumah Anda, dan yang PALING PENTING kami juga akan memberikan produk dan materi “perlengkapan perang” yang lengkap bagi pebisnis pemula seperti Anda dan usaha kecil menengah untuk bisa menatap pasar dunia.

Name: Comme un poisson dans l'eau
Description:
Bienvenue dans Comme un poisson dans l'eau, le podcast contre le spécisme ! 

Le spécisme est la discrimination en fonction du critère de l'espèce, qui est à la fois omniprésente et invisible dans nos sociétés. Alors dans ce podcast, on va essayer ensemble d'y voir plus clair en invitant des chercheur.euses, des journalistes, des artistes, des membres d'associations de défense des animaux, etc. 
Peut-on continuer à manger des animaux ? Le véganisme est-il une obligation morale ? Quels sont les animaux qui ressentent la douleur ? Faut-il leur donner des droits ? L’espèce humaine est-elle supérieure aux autres espèces ? En quoi les animaux sont-ils exploités par les humains ? Pourquoi traitons-nous différemment les chiens et chats des cochons et des veaux ? Est-ce que la domination exercée sur les animaux est comparable à d’autres types de dominations comme le sexisme ou le racisme ? 

Voilà quelques-unes des nombreuses questions que l'on se pose avec mes invité.e.s !

Name: La Nouvelle Assiette

La Nouvelle Assiette, c'est donc un Podcast, mais aussi une communauté de projets et de personnes qui souhaite de manière simple et décomplexée passer à l'action et avoir un impact positif sur leur environnement ! 

L'exploration La Nouvelle Assiette est terminée, ses co-fondateurs Lara Garrido et Maxime Clerbout ont crée une entreprise sociale "Mherit". Cette fois, ils explorent cette question : "Comment valoriser le potentiel de talents expérimentés (+45 ans) ?" N'hésitez pas à suivre cette nouvelle aventure sur Linkedin & Instagram :)

The dynamic duo, Jumoke Abdullahi & Kym Oliver, frustrated with the lack of
representation and unaddressed discrimination faced by disabled People of Colour, joined forces to create a platform to increase visibility & highlight the narratives of this ‘invisible population, within an invisible population’!

Eftertryk Magasin blev stiftet i 2017 af Uffe Kaels Auring og Poya Pakzad.

Eftertryk Magasin er et nyt digitalt tidsskrift om politik, litteratur og kultur. Korte, rammende indspark, og lange, reflekterede betragtninger om tidens væsentligste spørgsmål udgives fortløbende.

Eftertryk forholder sig ikke partout kritisk til de herskende anskuelser i samtiden. Men når sagen forholder sig kritisk til de hævdvundne opfattelser, holder vi os til sagen.

Det er ikke de store bogstavers massive tryk, ej heller de skjulte politiske aftryk, ikke positionering på højtryk, men eftertankens præcise eftertryk, du får hos os.

Vores produkt er kort sagt: Ord der bliver stående. (kilde: http://www.eftertrykket.dk/om-eftertryk-2/)

Vi udgiver løbende artikler, anmeldelser mm., og vi modtager gerne bidrag. Bidrag kan sendes til redaktionsmedlemmerne - redaktionen består af følgende personer:

Name: World Fashion Watch
Description:
Why do we do it? Is it about a look? A place? A trend? Is it about the person in the picture? Or the person snapping it? It’s all & none of the above, believe it or not.
 
It’s imagination. Risky, innovative, fearless fashion—it comes from the coolest closets in the world, straight to the streets. Don’t blink, or you’ll miss it. Take a snap & perhaps you’ll never lose it. You may even inspire someone else, and keep that hot style spreading from street to street, all over the world. Yup, you. 
 
It’s spotting the look that launched a thousand double-takes. It’s real. It’s raw. And it’s happening right now. It’s a world where anything goes, and it’s spinning out of control, just like we like it. It’s a crazy love affair with the everyday taste makers. It’s documenting fashion from the bottom up, not the top down. What does that mean? Anything. Absolutely anything…
 
So what’s WFW? It’s just people uniting over killer fashion in everyday places. Watching, connecting, snapping. Inspiring. It’s pretty cool, when you stop to think about it. 
 
Honestly, it’s as simple as this: Every street is a runway. Every day is a fashion show. And yes, we’re watching you…

Name: Work The Magic Within
Description:
Work The Magic Within is a gateway into the journey inward. It’s a modern online spellbook that’s uniquely and intentionally written for women, especially women of color, to assist and inspire them on their quest for self-discovery and finding where their magical powers to manifest their dreams into reality hide. The magic we make in real life as well as on this platform is that of lightworkers. It draws on the forces of the Universe to transform the darkness into light, the invisible into tangible. It eases the soul as it brings awareness and mastery. It helps connect with our authentic selves, all so that we can ultimately become the enchantresses of our lives.

Of all existing techniques, our favorite ways to practice magic are by using written incantations (storytelling, essays or affirmations in the modern world) added to some deep self-reflection. Knowing ourselves to the core, understanding how we function or respond to life, and more specifically why, is magic basics, and there’s an everlasting soulful power to words that simply feels natural to use when it comes to documenting these moments of self-reflection and eventually pass on the wisdom that they come along with.

Whether it’s through its exclusive interviews, how-to articles, personal essays or divine guidance, Work The Magic Within aims for its content to leave a mystical trace on your soul, let out the goddess in you, and lead you farther in your own spiritual realm.

Name: Time To Comment
Description:
Time To Comment is a solution for people that would like the expand their network and visibility on LinkedIn.
In groups of max. 40 people every person in the group comments on a different post every day. Because all people in one group know each other they can give really great comments on every post. Every group has a cycle between 10 and 20 days depending on the number of people in the group.
Because people comment a post can get more visibility.  How nice is it when you post something on LinkedIn that you have 40 people that will give a comment?
Every day in the morning our system will send an sms message to all people in the group. They can see what post they need to comment on by opening the Time To Comment (Time IT) app. 
When the Comment Cycle ends we share the total views of every post with the group. 
So everybody can see what are the results.

Name: Australia Immi
Description:
Australia Immi is an online community where all Australian Skilled Visa holders and future applicants can communicate and educate about regulations, policy, and changes. A skilled visa is essentially any visa in Australia based on skills, qualifications, and work experience. Subclasses: 491 (Skilled Worker Regional), 494 (Skilled Employer-Sponsored Regional), 190 (Skilled Nomination), 189 (Skill Independent), 186 (Employer Nomination Scheme), 187 (Regional Sponsor Migration Scheme), 482 (Temporary Skilled Shortage), 485 (Temporary Graduate, Post Study Work), 476 (Skilled- Recognised Graduate), 407 (Training Visa).

Joining this community will enable you to get a clear picture of the number of people in the EOI pool and points accumulated. Similarly, with features such as “Recent Invites” you can quickly share your recent invitation, and on the “Discussions” forum you can share your ideas and browse through some commonly faced issues and queries throughout the Visa Lodgement process.

This community has been created to allow the free flow of information and help people navigate the immigration process in Australia.

Name: SideMeet
Description:
WAT IS SIDEMEET?
Een commercieel platform waar escort agencies zich kunnen aanmelden om de profielen van hun modellen te adverteren. Alsook een platform met een sociaal engagement gericht op modellen die werken onder begeleiding van een agency. 

ALGEMEEN
* Harde valuta zijn een grote motivatie voor sekswerkers.
* NGO's kunnen agency modellen niet rechtstreeks benaderen.
* Institutionele websites zijn vaak te complex of zelfs saai om te motiveren.

AANPAK
Het commerciële platform biedt een rechtstreeks voordeel voor de modellen. Het sociale aspect sluit hierbij aan door dichtbij hun leefwereld te blijven. Zoals bv. de vele engagementen van gespecialiseerde influencers op gebied van social media voor de adult industrie.

DOEL
* Agency modellen ontdekken nieuwe verdien mogelijkheden zoals webcam, aanbieden van foto- en video of geluidsmateriaal, enz. 
* De hulpmiddelen die nonprofit organisaties aanbieden worden bekend gemaakt bij de doelgroep. Zo is er bv, anoniem en kosteloos onderzoek door een arts, sociale assistentie, hulp bij administratie, enz. 
* Begeleide educatie aanbieden die voor de modellen een meetbaar voordeel oplevert (zijnde €). Velen hebben vaak moeite om wegwijs te geraken in onze snel wijzigende technologische samenleving. Door begeleiding worden technieken aangeleerd om Social Media op een veilige en verantwoorde manier te gebruiken. In een latere fase worden andere opleidingen geïntroduceerd om meer richting reguliere arbeidsmarkt te navigeren.

#SAMEN
Uiteraard kunnen we dit enkel met de hulp en het advies van sociaal geëngageerde organisaties realiseren. Thema’s zoals LGBT+ emancipatie, Inclusie en diversiteit, Discriminatie, Digitale samenleving, Normalisatie, Decriminalisation, Educatie sluiten rechtstreeks aan bij het SideMeet project. 

BEN JIJ SOCIAAL GEËNGAGEERD? MELD JE AAN BIJ SIDEMEET!

Tripsteri App has won several awards, including the 2017 Uutisraivaaja innovation grant from the Helsingin Sanomat Foundation, and second place in the 2018 Visit Finland Digital Travel Innovation contest. 

We are members of the Finnish Association for Sustainable Tourism and we also have a Certificate of Sustainable Tourism Course from Perho Business College.

Name: The Drip Podcast
Description:
In April 2020, Patience E. Adamu and Kurtis Vermont launched "The Drip: A podcast about political decision making during a state of emergency", because they are passionate about public policy and found that multicultural millennials were undeserved by traditional media when discussing Canadian politics. This prompted them to build a culturally appropriate space that educates and informs--especially during a pandemic.

In June 2020, George Floyd’s death sparked a racial revolution the world over, forcing them to pivot. Now Kurtis and Patience assess the decisions being made by our political leaders through the lens of anti-Black racism.

This distinctly Canadian podcast is released every Monday and is broken up into five segments:

Segment 1: Canadian Politics (an analysis of Canadian political decision making in Ottawa and select provinces).

Segment 2: Canadian Economy (an analysis of the Canadian economy based on headlines in a given week)

Segment 3: Blackity Black Black (Addressing issues specific to the Black community, ranging from politics to pop culture)

Segment 4: The World (recognizing that Black people in the GTA come from all over the world, we know that world issues are relevant to our audience as they likely have family members in the Caribbean, Asia, Africa and elsewhere).

Segment 5: Questions for the Audience (based on stories in the media or the experiences of others).

In February 2021, The Drip ranked 2nd on Apple Podcast's Canada: Government Chart. In March 2021, The Drip ranked 4th on a Buzzfeed list of "21 Audiobooks And Podcasts by Black Canadians You Have To Listen To", from memoirs and fiction to pop culture and politics.

Find The Drip wherever you get your podcasts.

Description:
Tres Cantos Plus es más que una página web, un medio de comunicación, un boletín, una revista o un periódico de cosas pasadas. Es el primer instrumento ciudadano de comunicación para todos los tricantinos. De comunicación en los dos sentidos, con libertad, sin dependencia de la política, ni delos políticos, ni de ningún grupo poderoso de presión.

Esto es gracias al fruto de la colaboración de muchas personas y muchos esfuerzos de muchos que creen necesario un medio colaborativo en una sociedad del siglo XXI, libre y que no dependa ni de la publicidad institucional ni de un pequeño grupo de anunciantes que impongan sus contenidos. Es un proyecto fruto de muchos colaboradores, patrocinadores, micropatrocinadores, mecenas, micromecenas y anunciantes que consiguen que se viable y se mantenga siempre la pluralidad y la libertad de poder escribir de un modo educado lo que piense todo el mundo, pudiendo contestar y contrastar opiniones hablando de los temas que interesan a los tricantinos: queremos hablar de Tres Cantos, de su ciudad, sus servicios, sus personajes públicos, asociaciones, empresas,… más que de lo que dicen los políticos. Se propondrán siempre soluciones y no solamente se tratarán problemas y quejas. Ayudaremos entre todos hacer una ciudad más vivida, más social y con mayores relaciones sociales entre todos nosotros para mejorar la convivencia, la solidaridad y la comprensión de los problemas de los demás.

No vivimos solos, somos ciudadanos y este es el PLUS que necesitaba Tres Cantos.

Name: The Periphery
Description:
The Periphery used to have a tech focus, and we described ourselves as society and culture podcast disguised in tech. 

But…here’s the thing. As we wrapped on season 2 and started brainstorming this season, we found ourselves feeling a bit boxed in. There are a lot of interesting peripheral conversations that are sometimes made less interesting, at least to us, when we’re restricted to discussing them through the lens of tech. So while the disruptive and powerful technologies that are transforming our society will always be an important element of this podcast, we are adopting a more sociological approach to understanding what technology means and its connections to culture and power. But do not fret. Our focus will always be geared toward bridging the two sides of the periphery: those empowered at the frontier and those on the margins that are left out.

Season 3 starting soon!

Description:
Established by Boga & Associates on its 25th anniversary, bogalaw journal publishes articles by students, young professionals and practitioners, providing opportunities for them to enhance professional legal skills and not only, and to contribute through their research work and writing.

Committed to serve to the young community, we welcome young lawyers in an inclusive online platform that builds on diverse experiences and talented people who demonstrate an affinity with our values.

Boga & Associates cooperates with the European Law Students Association (ELSA) and AIESEC, two of the most important student organizations worldwide. These two organizations are run by and for students and recent graduates, who are interested in achieving academic and professional experience.

Most students writing takes form of essays, research papers, blogs, recent cases and recent legislation.

Bogalaw journal covers a variety of national and international issues and topics, seeking to publish innovative, original scholarship that makes a significant contribution to the fields of law, economics, taxation and accounting.

We welcome submissions on scholarly research and practical experience from students and professionals on a broad range of topics, which cover law, and economics.

Because we strive to publish outstanding and original work, submissions to bogalaw journal are subject to several levels of review by the editorial board.

Name: OBOZREVATEL
Description:
Obozrevatel - інтернет-видання, створене в 2001 році. Відтоді сайт регулярно посідає перші рядки в рейтингах щоденної відвідуваності серед інтернет-ЗМІ України.

Редакційний відділ Obozrevatel - це творча група, яка наповнює інтернет-видання новинами та публікаціями з найважливіших, гострих, актуальних тем, які стосуються як українського суспільства, так і всього світу.

Наразі Obozrevatel має найбільше охоплення української аудиторії і продовжує залишатися найкращим мультиплатформенним постачальником свіжих новин та цікавих публікацій.

При цьому Obozrevatel ще й найтехнологічніший з існуючих українських інтернет-медіа: обсяг мобільного трафіку видання, згідно з даними міжнародної дослідницької компанії Gemius, в рази перевершує показники найближчих конкурентів.

За даними Google Analytics, щодня сайт Obozrevatel відвідують близько 1 млн унікальних користувачів, за місяць - понад 12 млн.

За даними міжнародної дослідницької компанії SimilarWeb, Obozrevatel єдиний з українських ЗМІ входить в топ-5 найпопулярніших медіа-сайтів в Україні.

У 2017 році Obozrevatel запустив також свій телеканал - Oboz TV. Влітку 2017 року було отримано ліцензію на цілодобове супутникове телемовлення, а восени - відкрито нову ТВ-студію, яка оснащена новим 4К обладнанням і відповідає всім сучасним стандартам.

Oboz TV регулярно влаштовує прямі ефіри, ток-шоу з гостями, онлайн-марафони, круглі столи та багато іншого.

Name: fantasticmag
Description: Ya basta de compartimentos: no hay nadie que sólo viva de la música o del cine o de la moda o de la literatura... Bienvenidos al individuo cultural en version 2.0 (que suena a snob pero es pura diversión): todos escuchamos música, vemos pelis, leemos libros, juegamos a videojuegos y, claro, intentamos vestirnos con la mayor gracia posible (aunque algunos lo consiguen con mayor acierto que otros... así es la moda). Así que, ¿por qué verte en la necesidad de recurrir a trescientas mil webs diferentes cuando puedes tenerlo todo en Fantastic Plastic Magazine? A tu servicio quedamos un grupo de periodistas que intentaremos entretenerte pero que, sobre todo, vamos a divertirnos. Aquí vamos a escribir de lo que nos apetece, no de lo que "toca". No tendremos barreras temporales ni espaciales: nuestro único horizonte es hacer que la información te llegue de la forma más original e interesante posible. Tap into our sophisticated AI technology to kill the jargon and simplify your message with a quick simple language summary.

Share the video to your channels, and we’ll share it to ours! Like your own personal PR team, we’ll send your research into the world for maximum reach and impact. 

Yes. . . it is that easy. 

Sign up for free at verbalize.science, and start breathing life into your research today.

Name: Georgia News Lab
Description:
The Georgia News Lab is an award-winning investigative reporting collaborative. It is a partnership between some of the top college journalism programs in Georgia along with two of the leading news outlets in the Southeast, The Atlanta Journal-Constitution and WSB-TV, Channel 2 Action News. The News Lab’s dual mission is making the vital work of investigative reporting affordable for news organizations and increasing diversity in professional newsrooms. In training a new generation of diverse investigative reporters the News Lab helps news outlets better serve the public and bring marginalized voices into the public debate.
The News Lab is widely recognized for its work.  It was named the Grand Prize winner of the Online News Association’s Challenge Fund for Innovation in Journalism Education in 2015. The Society of Society of Professional Journalists has twice named the News Lab the collegiate winner of the Larry Peterson Memorial Award for Investigative Journalism. The Association of Opinion Journalists named the News Lab the winner of the Barry Bingham Sr. Award for 2016, in recognition of “outstanding efforts to encourage minority students in the field of journalism.” In 2016, the Atlanta Press Club awarded the News Lab its highest honor, the Impact Award. And in 2017, Press Club named the News Lab the inaugural winner of its News Innovation Award.

Name: Sulla Razza
Description:
Sulla Razza è un podcast, realizzato grazie al supporto di Juventus e prodotto da Undermedia, che vuole tradurre in italiano concetti ed espressioni provenienti dalla cultura angloamericana, ma che ci ostiniamo ad applicare alla realtà italiana, come “BAME,” “colourism,” e “fair skin privilege.” 

L’idea di produrre un podcast come Sulla Razza nasce dalla necessità di intavolare una conversazione sulla questione razziale in Italia — e di farlo con un linguaggio aggiornato e in un format in cui le voci degli italiani di colore sono pressoché assenti.
Due volte al mese, per sei mesi, Sulla Razza tradurrà 12 espressioni inglesi e in 30 minuti cercherà di spiegarle e di contestualizzarle nella società italiana.

Ciascun episodio si apre con una introduzione storica, prosegue con una contesualizzazione fatta anche di testimonianze ed esempi concreti, si conclude con un finale fatto di domande, perché la questione razziale contemporanea non è semplice da afferrare per chi non la prova sulla propria pelle.

Name: Hopscotch Games
Description:

Maybe a team lunch. Maybe a team happy hour. Maybe you have some games in the office like a Pool table or Ping pong table. While in person you are able to constantly create opportunities to have team building. However while having more and more virtual and remote workforce has been tending the rate at which it happens exploded in 2020 and is expected to sustain a higher level than in the past.

What this means is that team building gets harder. As a manager of resources, you need to work harder and be more creative to build a culture where your team loves their job and showing up each day to be the best employee they can. We are here to help by offering free online team building exercises such as Choose Your Own Adventures or Escape Rooms you can carve out time in a week to get together and still have those experiences you would have in person.

Naš rad na ovoj ideji baziran je na dva osnovna principa, koji su iznad onoga što je samo novinarstvo: participativnost i ekologija.

Mediji moraju svoje delovanje zasnivati na uverenju da se javni prostor ne zagađuje lažnim vestima i promocijom govora mržnje, zato je ova ideja ekološka.
Mediji moraju da nađu način da u svoj rad uključe građane kojima se obraćaju, da probaju da naprave zajednicu koja će biti osnovna snaga tih medija, dakle, zajednica a ne politička partija ili lokalni tajkun – zato participativnost.

Javni servis je pokušaj da se popuni ona praznina koja postoji zbog trenutne nemogućnosti drugih medija da objektivno i u kontinuitetu izveštavaju sa jednakom pažnjom iz svih delova Srbije.

Verujemo da će naši čitaoci biti svi koji Srbiju vide kao celinu i koje zanima da na jednom mestu saznaju što više o životu ljudi iz svih delova Srbije.

Verujemo da će ovo mesto pomoći okupljanju medijskih profesionalaca iz cele Srbije i da će pomoći i medijima u kojima rade ali i unapređivanju cele medijske scene u Srbiji.

Name: Attollo - The People's Development Network
Description:
Attollo is a multi-award winning, pre-launch, Impact start-up. Our vision is to eliminate poverty. 

We believe in putting the average person at the forefront of their respective communities development. We understand that everyday people have an intimate understanding of what their community needs in order to thrive. At Attollo we look to equip our users with a network, resources, knowledge and opportunity to help communities solve the problems they face using sustainable and value producing methodologies. 

We're harnessing the latest cutting-edge technology to build a decentralised platform that offers transparency, security and value to all our active users and stakeholders. Our approach to eliminating poverty is a paradigm shift, our model allows for above market returns and we're able to achieve this without the need for donations from our end users.

We take the financial burden off the average individual and absorb it into our costs, as we look to better communities, the environment and society at large using the United Nations Sustainable Development Goals framework to direct our change.

For our work we've been internationally recognised on three separate occasions, with the third being an invite to the United Nations (NY). Domestically, we've been recognised a further seven times, with the seventh being an invite to the House of Lords (UK). We've been asked to join three of Scotland's leading accelerators, recently graduating from the internationally recognised start-up and fintech accelerator at the Royal Bank of Scotland's Gogaburn Headquarters. 

Our approach is a real paradigm shift, which we believe will be a significant contributing factor to changing the world for the better in the decades ahead.
We invite you to join us on this journey. Thank you!
