Name: All Things Hunza
Description:
All Things Hunza is a website that curates content about the district of Hunza and publishes on regular basis fresh information about the region. The website was started in 2016 by Imran Ahmed Hunzai.

The website is divided into 9 sections:

1. Blog
The blog is where we post most of the stories. It is subdivided into four sub-sections.

- Hunza Through Foreign Eyes
There is something common between all national and foreign tourists who visit the spectacular valley – they have so much to say about their journey. This section invites tourists to share their experience in Hunza with our readers.

- From Hunza with Love
This section is maintained by our editorial team and features stories about general happenings in the district.

- Know the Unknown
There are a lot of mysteries and myths about Hunza and its people. This section is dedicated to posting facts and figures that otherwise could go untalked about on the internet.

- Gilgit Aur Baltistan
Hunza is one of the ten districts of Gilgit-Baltistan. This section of All Things Hunza blog showcases popular stories from districts of Gilgit-Baltistan other than Hunza.

2. About

3. Hunza Diet

4. Hunza Online Shop
We are collaborating with over a dozen individuals and small businesses to bring you products from Hunza valley to an online store from where you could order these products no matter what part of the world you live in. Except for our merchandise, all products are handmade by the artisans of Hunza valley.

5. Humans of Hunza
Inspired by Humans of New York (HONY), Humans of Hunza (HOH) is a project started by Imran Ahmed Hunzai, the founder of All Things Hunza. This section showcases stories of common Hunzokuts (Hunza people) in their own words. The project can be accessed at Humans of Hunza Facebook page, Twitter account and Instagram profile.

6. Tours

7. Events

8. Videos

9. Live

Name: Revista Mundo ArtróPodo
Description:
Estamos convencidos que no somos los únicos aficionados a la entomología que en algún momento se han preguntado por qué, dentro del ingente número de revistas que cada mes inundan los quioscos, internet o las redes sociales, no hay ninguna dedicada a la divulgación de esta ciencia. Esto nos resultaba extraño, y más aún cuando un paseo virtual por los grupos de Facebook dedicados a nuestros queridos bichos, arrojan cifras de vértigo; en sólo quince grupos de Facebook relacionados con la entomología y aracnología amateur hay más de 20.000 miembros.

No podíamos concebir que un grupo que pudiera ser tan numeroso, y que estuviera tan ávido de información, no tuviese ni una sola publicación divulgativa exclusiva sobre el tema. Existen revistas muy buenas sobre naturaleza, fotografía, reptiles, terrariofilia, etc., que en alguno de sus artículos han tocado el tema de los artrópodos de soslayo. Sin embargo no existe ninguna publicación dirigida exclusivamente al aficionado a los insectos y arácnidos, donde se aborden temas directamente relacionados con cualquiera de los aspectos que, en el desarrollo de nuestra afición nos encontramos.

La mayoría de nosotros salimos al campo con regularidad. Aunque nos gustan los insectos en general, solemos tener una especial fijación o interés por uno o varios grupos de ellos. Tratamos de reconocerlos e identificarlos, así como de fotografiarlos y, en algunos casos, registramos y compartimos datos sobre su fenología, comportamiento y otros aspectos interesantes sobre los mismos. Nos suelen gustar las mismas lecturas, nos movemos más o menos por el mismo espacio en la red y, en definitiva, nos mueven las mismas inquietudes e intereses.

Pues ese es precisamente el porqué de esta revista, el encontrar un espacio común donde dar rienda suelta a nuestra afición y abordar todos aquellos temas que nos interesan e inquietan.

Bienvenidos a esta vuestra revista.

Name: The Indian Hemp Story
Description:
The Indian Hemp Story was started with an intention to educate about the benefits of industrial hemp, a species of the cannabis plant which is non-psychoactive and has innumerous medicinal and industrial uses. It can be used to produce over 20,000 products and can be used to provide food, clothing, shelter, and medicines, the basic needs of humanity.

Hemp is magical, not only because of its versatile uses, but also because it is a sustainable choice. The flower, seeds, stalk, leaves, roots - all of them are useful, producing close to zero waste. What's better? Hemp products are easier to re-cycle and are biodegradable. Hemp grow without the use of pesticides, requires very less water and has a negative cargon footprint.

Também somos parceiros do ACNUR (Alto Comissariado das Nações Unidas para Refugiados) – Agência da ONU para Refugiados.

A frente dos trabalhos está o jornalista e psicólogo William Messias (Anhembi-Morumbi).

MISSÃO
1) Temos um trabalho de responsabilidade social envolvendo o jornalismo contemporâneo, que é a qualidade da notícia. Este é o nosso papel perante a sociedade. Este trabalho começa na graduação de jornalismo. Somos o canal deste desenvolvimento dos futuros formadores de opinião na comunidade global.

2) Promover o acesso de todas as faixas etárias de idade ao aperfeiçoamento de idiomas gratuito. Com isso, O Clube do Jornalismo é traduzido para 14 idiomas.

CRONOLOGIA
Outubro, de 2007: nasce a marca no Yahoo Grupos. No início, o objetivo era divulgar vagas de empregos para jornalistas.

Novembro, de 2008: criação do site de emprego para jornalistas.

Da molti anni nel settore della promozione territoriale online, Napolike è ormai il punto di riferimento quotidiano per coloro che desiderano conoscere gli infiniti aspetti di Napoli, il turismo, la sua inarrestabile vitalità, gli eventi e le iniziative che la animano dal mattino alla notte inoltrata. 

Napolike propone un nuovo modo di vivere la città, di attraversarla e di percorrerla, scegliendo i luoghi più interessanti, le esperienze più emozionanti e i momenti più affascinanti in cui poterla conoscere e innamorarsene.
La filosofia di Napolike esprime un modo diverso ma tradizionale di amare Napoli, rispettandola nei suoi contrasti, nella sua costante oscillazione tra attaccamento al suo passato e al desiderio di slancio verso il futuro. 

Raccontiamo ogni giorno tutte queste sfumature con passione per trasmettere a cittadini e turisti un sentimento di appartenenza e per stabilire un legame profondo con la nostra città ricca di stimoli sempre nuovi e in perenne movimento.

Perché lo facciamo? Perché siamo i primi ad amare Napoli e il nostro desiderio è quello di costruire e diffondere a livello nazionale e internazionale la nostra idea di città, contrastando i pregiudizi e i luoghi comuni. Motivi per cui abbiamo scelto di non abbandonare il nostro territorio, ma di investirci e impegnarci per dargli il valore che merita. Ogni giorno.

Name: The Daring
Description:
The Daring is an art and culture magazine for introspective, playful, and provocative thinking about the intersection between art and life in the world today. An internet garden, if you will. We are in a dynamic conversation with artists about the issues that matter to them most — creativity, mental health, opinions, and issues relating to human life in all its subtleties.

Our stories are organized around four categories: Art, Music, Poetry, and Self. Each one informs the other, just as artists inspire each other. Through interviews, podcasts, essays, and poetry our mission is to celebrate the nuances of living an expressive life, as told by working artists — including writers, musicians, designers, visual artists, and others.

The Daring launched in 2019 and is headquartered in South Orange, NJ.

Name: Gojob
Description:
== Présentation de Laformation.ma ==

Nouveau support de communication adapté aux besoins des lycéens et des étudiants, '''Laformation.ma''' est un moteur de recherche et un annuaire marocain dédié aux formations diplômantes et qualifiantes, privées ou publiques.
« Le site http://www.laformation.ma regroupe la grande majorité des organismes présents au Maroc ainsi que les formations qu’ils proposent. Le site offre également un contenu éditorial riche en articles, des guides pratiques (guide des diplômes, guide des métiers, guide des lycéens, guide des études à l’étranger…) et des témoignages de professionnels » indique M. Othman ALJ co-fondateur du site Laformation.ma.

== Objectifs de Laformation.ma ==

Indépendant de tout organisme de formation, laformation.ma poursuit deux objectifs:
* Permettre aux lycéens et étudiants, à la recherche d’une formation, de trouver, en seulement quelques clics, la formation idéale pour développer leurs compétences.
* Offrir aux organismes de formation une visibilité unique et leur permettre, à travers une présentation exhaustive de l’ensemble de leurs formations, de cibler leur audience et d’accroitre leur notoriété.

== Fonctionnalités de Laformation.ma ==

* Guides: guide des diplômes,guide des métiers,Orientation lycée,Guide CPGE, guide études à l’étranger, Vie étudiante, Bourses & prêts, espace carrière...
* Forum
* Témoignages de professionnels
* Cours & exercices pour les lycéens

Name: Or-jeu
Description:
Or-jeu c’est un jeu de mot mêlant réalité et ambition. Réalité, parce que le basket féminin est souvent hors des médias, hors des intérêts et très peu médiatisé. Et pourtant, c’est le sport féminin collectif où le nombre de licenciées est le plus important en France. 
Mais c’est aussi et surtout une discipline où les féminines brillent en équipe de France jeunes, en équipe de France A et où la formation tient une place prépondérante dans les centres de formations. Le basket féminin se développe, brille sur son territoire et à l’étranger, alors il semble plus opportun d’utiliser cette version du mot « Or » pour en parler. C’est donc ça l’ambition, être à la hauteur.

Le choix du mot « jeu » est quant à lui une référence au sport en lui-même, à sa pratique qui doit rester une passion et où le plaisir doit primer. De plus, en souhaitant aborder le sport amateur jusqu’en NF2, chacun et chacune doit pouvoir trouver sa place dans ce média et se rappeler que ce n’est qu’une partie de plaisir et donc un « jeu ».

Name: Association Mango Media
Description:
L’association Loi de 1901 “Mango Media” a été créée un jour de novembre 2019, par les fondateurs du média en ligne Le Petit Reporter, qui souhaitaient aller plus loin dans leur aventure journalistique : découvrir, vérifier, écrire, informer, transmettre. 
Grâce à l’association, nous souhaitons agir sur notre territoire en faveur de l’éducation aux médias, en nous associant à l’école de journalisme de Lille, pour qu’à Chambéry, Aix-les-Bains, les jeunes aient un accès facilité à l’information : comment devient-on journaliste? Comment vérifie-t-on ses sources avant de partager ou de publier une info? Nous animerons donc des stages, et poursuivrons cette transmission au travers de conférences et de débats.
Le but de l’association est aussi de gérer le média, de le faire vivre en lui donnant les moyens d’exister sur le territoire : nous sommes journalistes indépendants, et voulons le rester. Vous êtes nombreux déjà à nous lire, à nous suivre, à nous partager. Si vous le souhaitez, vous pouvez aussi nous soutenir et adhérer à notre association ici : lepetitreporterdu73.com rubrique "soutenir le journal"
Merci à tous et à toutes et à très vite, sur Le Petit Reporter

Name: 3tech GmbH
Description:
3tech GmbH an agency specializing in Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO).

Our passion in helping companies succeed online we transformed our portfolio from offering premium Web Design and Development services to Conversion Rate Optimization.

Through many conversations with our clients we learned that a redesign or relaunch of a website is usually not what companies to boost sales.

We now offer different value to our clients, value you might not even notice just by looking at the website or online shop, but value you can feel. By introducing science based A/B-testing and validating changes to the design and user experience we make sure you’re actually getting a significant uplift in results.

An uplift of only 1% in conversion rate can have a significant impact on the revenue, which is what our clients really want.

Our goal with 3tech is to help your business grow sustainably online and make the most of the visitors and potential customers you already have.

How do we do this?

1. We analyse your eCommerce store & setup conversion tracking
2. We formulate hypotheses that could improve conversions
3. We test the highest priority hypotheses in a process called A/B testing
4. We implement the winning tests in your website or store

Conversion optimization is not a one-off project but a process. Your competition runs Conversion Optimization as a permanent, strategic improvement process. Once achieved improvements are lost over time. Therefore it is of high importance to implement Conversion Optimization as a permanent process in your company.

Not only the purchase in an online shop is a typical case for optimization. Any other action carried out by the user that represents value for the provider can also be improved from an economic point of view.

If you are ready to start leveraging the power of conversion rate optimization, let's talk. Schedule a free discover call by clicking the link down below.

Schedule a discovery call now https://calendly.com/3tech/discovery

Name: Mobile and Social Media Journalism: A Practical Guide for Multimedia Journalism
Description:
**Second edition is now available. Order now at http://bit.ly/MobileandSocialMedia

Now in its second edition, "Mobile and Social Media Journalism: A Practical Guide for Multimedia Journalism" (Routledge) continues to be an essential resource for learning how journalists and news organizations use mobile and social media to gather news, distribute content, and engage with audiences. 

Merging theory and practice, the book includes checklists and practical activities in every chapter, enabling readers to immediately build the mobile and social media skills that today’s journalists need and that news organizations expect. The second edition retains a focus on journalism’s core values, such as authentication, verification, and credibility, while guiding readers on how to apply them to digital media activities. The book also offers an in-depth discussion of the audience’s active role in producing content, how mobile devices and social media have changed the way the audience consumes news, and what these changes mean for journalists.

Fully revised and updated to address the latest trends in multimedia journalism, the second edition includes two new chapters: “Writing Mobile-Friendly Web Stories” and “The Spread of Fake News”.

"Mobile and Social Media Journalism" is a valuable resource for journalism students, as well as media professionals seeking to update their skills.

Additional Features:

• "From the Newsroom" Q&As feature diverse perspectives and insights from local and national journalists working in a range of roles.

• Twitter handles are listed for every journalist mentioned in the book, empowering students to interact with them.

• Chapter checklists have been classroom tested by the author. Some items encourage students to tweet the author directly or discuss questions as a class.

* "Until you love, you will never give everything"

Name: International Science Editing
Description:
International Science Editing offers a premium language and copyediting service to all scientists who want to publish their manuscript in scientific peer-reviewed periodicals and books.

International Science Editing was founded in 1991 by Mike Cushley and has developed from a science-based copyediting company into a modern media company offering services in all areas of science publishing through a number of associate companies including Compuscript Ltd, one of Europe's primary suppliers of pre-press services to the STM publishing sector.

In the international world of science publishing, the ability to write in English at a high standard is a major advantage, which not all scientists share. However, the services of International Science Editing are available to all scientists worldwide. With our many years of experience in the business, we have developed a vast network of trusted and skilled editors in the British Isles. All our science editors have postgraduate qualifications, experience in science research and are native English speakers. We take great pride in the selection and training of our editors.

Name: Vila de Utopia
Description:
A revista eletrônica Vila de Utopia é inspirada na crônica homônima de Carlos Drummond de Andrade. Publica diariamente reportagens, artigos, crônicas, contos, poesias sobre a Cidadezinha Qualquer, com viés crítico da histórica letargia itabirana.

“A cidade parece encantada. E de fato o é. Acordará algum dia? Os itabiranos afirmam peremptoriamente que sim. Enquanto isso, cruzam os braços e deixam a vida passar. A vida passa devagar em Itabira do Mato Dentro”,
assinalou o nosso poeta em 1933.
Desde o lançamento do jornal O Cometa, em 1979, antecessor da Vila de
Utopia, que batemos na mesma tecla. “Itabira tem pouco tempo para criar
alternativas econômicas que assegurem a sua sustentabilidade após a
extração da última tonelada de minério”.

Ou seja, passou da hora de a cidade, com a sua sociedade civil organizada e
lideranças políticas, se preparem objetivamente para esse futuro sem a mineração, criando alternativas econômicas. Essa é outra pauta recorrente
em nosso site.

Nuestro compromiso es por tanto, en primer lugar, con la defensa de la vida desde la concepción hasta la muerte natural, con la defensa de la familia natural, con la defensa férrea del derecho de los padres a decidir la educación de sus hijos y con una concepción de la política orientada al bien común, sin perder de vista la verdadera Buena Noticia, la que nos llena de Esperanza: Jesucristo.

Name: United By Pop
Description:
Created by friends and former coworkers Verity Harris (U.K.) and Jackie Kolgraf (U.S.) in June 2016, United By Pop is an online community that aims to bring together everything trending in both the United Kingdom and the United States.

Unlike other pop culture websites that report on only one country or attempt to cover the entire world, United By Pop celebrates the differences and similarities of the pop cultures scenes in the United Kingdom and the United States. Because of its two-country audience, United By Pop is a great place to promote music, projects, launches, etc. that have growth potential in both locations.

The writers behind United By Pop infuse their personal love for everything pop culture in their pieces; rather than just breaking news, they passionately report on their favorite artists, actors, authors, etc. with the fervor of a true fan. Fans writing for fans, United By Pop’s audience values its truthful, dedicated point-of-view.

United By Pop strives to give millennial fans a place where they can “fangirl” safely, without fear of being mocked or belittled. Whether its readers are still hanging onto the boybands of the 90’s, deep in One Direction mania, or on the hunt for new artists to follow across the country (or across the pond!), United By Pop treats them like the passionate fans they are but also as adults.

A Hapfun, à partir de todas essas ações, também realiza a aproximação da população brasileira com esses empreendimentos, para criar um diálogo diferenciado entre ambos e estimular o delicioso hábito de visitar parques temáticos, uma atividade extremamente saudável, lúdica e interativa.

Name: Magma Magazine
Description:
Che cos’è Magma Magazine?

Siamo una squadra di ragazze e ragazzi che prova una passione a dir poco travolgente per la letteratura. Come una dirompente eruzione vulcanica.

Troppo spesso, nell’immaginario collettivo, la letteratura viene percepita come elitaria, o associata solo alle noiose lezioni scolastiche – con ansia da interrogazione annessa.

Vogliamo ribaltare questa prospettiva. Vogliamo raccontare opere e autori con uno stile fresco e appassionato. Proprio come l’esplosione di un vulcano, vogliamo far risvegliare nei lettori l’amore dormiente per il meraviglioso mondo dei libri, in tutte le sue magmatiche forme. 

«Questa è la parte più bella di tutta la letteratura: scoprire che i tuoi desideri sono desideri universali, che non sei solo o isolato da nessuno. Tu appartieni», diceva Francis Scott Fitzgerald. Noi crediamo che la letteratura sia appartenenza, che la letteratura sia di tutti. E con Magma Magazine vi accompagniamo in questo viaggio.

Magma Magazine è il supplemento di approfondimento letterario di Frammenti Rivista (www.frammentirivista.it), testata giornalistica online di attualità e cultura edita dall’associazione culturale “Il Fascino degli Intellettuali”.

Name: Bespoke Black Book
Description:
At Bespoke Black Book, we like to think that we look at luxury a little differently. We don’t want to tell you everything that glitters is gold, so we write informatively and honestly about subjects as wide-ranging as food, travel, lifestyle, culture, wellness and winter. As an independent online magazine, we aim to be your indispensable guide to the luxury lifestyle, but we also feel strongly about equal rights, social responsibility and ethical behaviour. The beating heart of everything we do is our team of thirty contributors; many are experts in their field and they represent a wide range of nationalities, ethnicities, sexualities and belief systems.

Even though we love all the multi-sensory delights of the luxury lifestyle, as well as sharing them with you, we are committed to a digital product so that we can minimise our own carbon footprint and environmental impact. As part of the Mindful Media Group, we are taking action to protect the planet we live on by promoting small businesses and producers with a love for sustainable products, and championing eco conscious brands.

We hope that you like our ethical philosophy, but we can also walk the talk when it comes to luxury! This is how we are able to write story-led content, with integrity and a dash of humour, about our own experiences of products and services across the globe, providing you with high-quality articles and hand-picked personal recommendations. If you like our approach, make sure you take Bespoke Black Book with you everywhere as your guide-on-the-go to a world of luxurious pursuits and purchases.

Name: Bebac.com
Description:
Bebac na internetu

Roditeljski portal Bebac.com predstavlja najveći i najuticajniji online centar za trudnice, majke sa bebama i parove koji žele da zasnuju porodicu. Portal www.bebac.com nastao je u želji i potrebi da se populacija mladih parova informiše i edukuje na njima prihvatljiv i lako dostupan način. Na sajtu radi tim ginekologa, pedijatara, psihologa, nutricionista...

Sajt je lak za navigaciju, pristupačan i dinamičan. Na sajtu postoji forum na kom korisnici mogu da se dopisuju, razmenjuju iskustva, kao i lični prostor za vođenje dnevnika. Posebno zanimljiv je „timeline“ (dinamična skala razvoja) koji postaje tačan lični vodič po nedeljama trudnoće  nakon što trudnica unese prvi dan svoje poslednje  menstruacije. Ako ukucate datum rođenja bebe možete da pratite njen razvoj po nedeljama.

Na portalu je moguće pratiti i najnovije vesti iz oblasti ginekologije, akušerstva, pedijatrije, dečije i razvojne psihologije. Korisnice koje se pridruže Bebac.com zajednici nedeljno na ličnu elektronsku adresu dobijaju mail  sa svim podacima prilagođenim za svoju nedelju trudnoće, dok mladim majkama stiže mail sa opisom  očekivanog razvoja bebe za određenu starost. 

Razgovarajte sa Bebcem :)

Ovo je prvi web portal u Srbiji koji razgovara sa svojim korisnicima. Na veoma originalan način ljupki Bebac sa sajta prepoznaje posetiteljku i razgovara sa njom, podseća je na obaveze, zakazane lekarske preglede, neophodne vakcinacije i sve u vezi sa njenom trudnoćom i roditeljstvom.

Sigurne strane

...predstavljaju sekciju Moj kutak na sajtu Bebac.com kojoj možete pristupati isključivo Vi korišćenjem Vaše lične lozinke. Na taj način smo želeli da osiguramo Vašu privatnost dok pišete svoj dnevnik, postavljate svoje fotografije, pratite svoju težinu ili organizujete svoje obaveze...

Speak Freely is a publication promoting the ideas of liberty – providing liberty-loving writers from all over Europe with a platform to publish direct and engaging articles on culture, politics, economics and science & technology.

Our network of writers ranges from experienced, published individuals to fledgling talents who are just finding their voices within the world of pro-liberty writing – but all are united by shared values of individualism, personal responsibility, self-ownership and limited government. With the support of our editorial team, new and inexperienced writers are able to hone their craft and develop their unique voices within the movement – with all the support they need to join the forefront of up-and-coming liberty-focused writers in Europe.

Speak Freely is an offshoot of the European branch of Students for Liberty, the world’s largest pro-liberty student organisation.

Name: Creative Life Lessons
Description: Through conversations with accomplished creative professionals in fields ranging from music, television, and film to science, photography, and fashion, Creative Life Lessons looks to reveal the wisdom and insights gleaned from people who've successfully negotiated the delicate balance between self-expression and commercial necessity.

Name: The Parallax View
Description: The Parallax publishes news on the intersection of heath care and cybersecurity/digital privacy, Tuesdays & Fridays in The Parallax View newsletter.

Name: The Atalaku Effect Podcast
Description:
Atalaku is a word from Congo, which means "praising". Atalaku to someone thus means praising that person for what she did, is doing, or plan to do.

In 2019, the world and some Africans still see the oldest continent as a synonym of war, poverty and hopelessness. 

Our mission is to change that narrative by presenting the Africa and africans we know: resilient, strong, entrepreneurial and influential in all industries!

We are starting that mission's execution via a podcast, The Atalaku Effect: we interview Africans on the continent and the diaspora, praising them for what they do, the struggles they surmounted, as examples the continent can and should be proud of.

Name: The Monarchists Podcast
Description:
The world’s best and only ODU podcast!

The Monarchists, Mike and Aaron, sit down with Old Dominion University (ODU) alums, athletes and coaches (current and former) to discuss the school, their experiences and how their lives have been impacted by the school and their athletic programs.

We are ODU sports first fan-run support group; podcasting, blogging and fundraising for ODU.

Name: Places – A Musical Journey
Description:
Places is a unique live stream concept developed by the DJ and producer Philipp Wolf and the world traveller Marko Roth. With extraordinary locations and the impulsive sound of Philipp Wolf, PLACES has already reached more than 16  million viewers. 

Placing Philipp Wolf in a complete unusual environment for a DJ set, is the common theme of all the different episodes. Some of them have taken place at a busy airport runway, an offshore plattform in the Baltic Sea or a hot air balloon just to name a few. The DJ live set is broadcasted on social media and implemented in cooperation with several other partners. 

Be ready for a musical journey around the globe and discover so much more unique places with Philipp and Marko.

Name: Expandr Media
Description: Proyecto periodístico que le da voz a las personas y sus historias detrás de las empresas que mueven a Mexico y Latinoamérica hacia un mejor futuro más próspero y humano. Expandr Media hablamos de negocios  entre personas.

Name: Projeto Bike
Description:
Felipe Ritter, administrador e Pedro Carrizo, jornalista, ambos ciclistas e usuários da bike como meio de transporte, resolvemos lançar esse projeto para somar aos esforços de tantas pessoas e empresas para que as bikes possam trafegar de maneira segura por nosso país e ser uma alternativa real de meio de transporte.

No mundo inteiro o uso da bike como meio de transporte está crescendo. Os países europeus estão já bem na nossa frente.  Porém se juntarmos esforços e soubermos pressionar e orientar nossos governantes quanto aos inegáveis benefícios das bikes como meio de transporte limpo e viável, Amsterdam não ficará mais tanto à nossa frente.
